TFT13_TeamupAugment_Reunion.name: Trait: Reunion
TFT13_TeamupAugment_Reunion.desc: When Vi casts, Ekko releases 3 afterimages towards her target dealing @EkkoAfterImageReducedDamage*100@% damage. When Ekko casts, Vi slams an earthquake towards his target dealing @ViEarthquakeReducedDamage*100@% damage.Gain a Vi and Ekko.

TFT13_Augment_BruiserCrown.name: Bruiser Crown
TFT13_Augment_BruiserCrown.desc: Gain a Bruiser Emblem, a Redemption, and a Sett.

TFT13_Augment_VladCarry.name: Crimson Pact
TFT13_Augment_VladCarry.desc: Gain a Vladimir. Your strongest Vladimir gains +@IncRange@ Range and gains @BonusMana@ bonus Mana each attack. His Ability no longer heals but grants @TOOLTIPDamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp, deals @TOOLTIPBonusDamage*100@% bonus damage, and spreads additional damage to the nearest enemy.

TFT13_Augment_Artillerist.name: Rocket Collection
TFT13_Augment_Artillerist.desc: Artillerist rockets deal @IncreasedRocketDamage*100@% increased damage. Every @RocketDamageThreshold@ rockets your Artillerists fire, gain a Collector (max @MaxItems@). Gain a Tristana and Urgot. (Rockets Fired: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Artillerist_TotalDamage@)

TFT13_TeamupAugment_UnlikelyDuo.name: Trait: Unlikely Duo
TFT13_TeamupAugment_UnlikelyDuo.desc: Jinx and Sevika gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage and @Health@ Health. Whenever one casts, they grant the other @Mana@ mana. Sevika's arm is luckier.Gain a Jinx and Sevika.

TFT13_Augment_Dominator.name: Domination
TFT13_Augment_Dominator.desc: Dominators gain @ShieldPercentAS*100@% Attack Speed while shielded. When a Dominator gets a kill, all Dominators gain @ShieldAmount@ Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Gain a Cassiopeia.

TFT13_Augment_Sniper.name: Sniper's Nest
TFT13_Augment_Sniper.desc: Snipers gain +@DamageAmp@% Damage Amp for each round fought from the same starting hex (Maximum +@MaxAmp@%). Gain a Zeri.

TFT13_Augment_ArtilleristCrown.name: Artillerist Crown
TFT13_Augment_ArtilleristCrown.desc: Gain an Artillerist Emblem, a Runaan's Hurricane, and a Tristana.

TFT13_Augment_FirelightCrest.name: Firelight Crest
TFT13_Augment_FirelightCrest.desc: Gain a Firelight Emblem and a Zeri.

TFT13_Augment_Bruiser.name: Heavily Smash
TFT13_Augment_Bruiser.desc: Every @RefreshSeconds@ seconds, Bruisers deal @SlamPercentHealth*100@% bonus max Health bonus physical damage on their next attack. Gain a Steb and a Trundle.

TFT13_Augment_Cabal.name: Forbidden Magic
TFT13_Augment_Cabal.desc: Every @NumTakedownsPerStack@ takedowns by Black Rose champions or Sion grant Sion permanent @SionADPercentPerStack*100@% Attack Damage and @SionHealthPerStack@ Max Health. Gain 3 Black Rose champions. (Stacks: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Cabal_NumStacks@)

TFT13_Augment_WatcherCrest.name: Watcher Crest
TFT13_Augment_WatcherCrest.desc: Gain a Watcher Emblem and a Vander.

TFT13_Augment_Watcher.name: Battle Scars
TFT13_Augment_Watcher.desc: Every time Watchers are attacked, they gain @IncreaseADByTakeAttack@% Attack Damage. Every time Watchers are hit by an ability, they gain @IncreaseAPByTakeSpell@ Ability Power. Gain a Vander.

TFT13_TeamupAugment_Geniuses.name: Trait: Geniuses
TFT13_TeamupAugment_Geniuses.desc: When Heimerdinger casts, Ekko releases @NumEkkoAfterImages@ afterimages, each dealing @ReducedEkkoDamage*100@% damage. When Ekko casts, Heimerdinger fires @NumHeimerMissiles@ missiles, each dealing @ReducedHeimerDamage*100@% damage.Gain a Heimerdinger, Ekko, and a Jeweled Gauntlet.

TFT13_Augment_BlueCarry.name: This WILL Work
TFT13_Augment_BlueCarry.desc: Gain a Powder. Your strongest Powder's explosion radius is increased by two hexes, has different damage falloff, but deals @TOOLTIPONLYFriendlyDamage@% damage to ALLIES.

TFT13_Augment_CabalCrown.name: Black Rose Crown
TFT13_Augment_CabalCrown.desc: Gain a Black Rose Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and a Cassiopeia.

TFT13_Augment_ConquerorCrown.name: Conqueror Crown
TFT13_Augment_ConquerorCrown.desc: Gain a Conqueror Emblem, a Last Whisper, and a Rell.

TFT13_TeamupAugment_Betrayal.name: Trait: Betrayal
TFT13_TeamupAugment_Betrayal.desc: Maddie always targets Ambessa's target with her Ability and attacks. Every round where either gets at least @NumKills@ kills, gain a Maddie.Gain a 2-star Maddie and Ambessa.

TFT13_Augment_EnforcerCrown.name: Enforcer Crown
TFT13_Augment_EnforcerCrown.desc: Gain an Enforcer Emblem, an Infinity Edge, and a Maddie.

TFT13_Augment_Academy.name: Academic Research
TFT13_Augment_Academy.desc: Whenever you build an item, gain a completed item anvil instead. That anvil always offers an Academy item and the item built. Gain @NumItems@ random components. Gain a Lux and an Ezreal.

TFT13_Augment_Ambusher.name: Loot Explosion
TFT13_Augment_Ambusher.desc: Ambusher kills have a chance to drop loot, scaling with Critical Strike Chance. The value of the loot given can also critically strike, granting even more loot. Gain a Camille and a Powder.

TFT13_Augment_SniperCrest.name: Sniper Crest
TFT13_Augment_SniperCrest.desc: Gain a Sniper Emblem and a Zeri.

TFT13_Augment_ScrapCrown.name: Scrap Crown
TFT13_Augment_ScrapCrown.desc: Gain a Scrap Emblem, a Ziggs, and @NumComponents@ random components.

TFT13_Augment_AGoldenFind.name: A Golden Find
TFT13_Augment_AGoldenFind.desc: Champions evolved by the Anomaly drop @GoldPerRequirement@ gold every @NumKillsRequirement@ kills. Gain @FreeRerolls@ free rerolls.

TFT13_Augment_PitFighterCrown.name: Pit Fighter Crown
TFT13_Augment_PitFighterCrown.desc: Gain a Pit Fighter Emblem, a Sterak's Gage, and a Gangplank.

TFT13_Augment_Enforcer.name: Law Enforcement
TFT13_Augment_Enforcer.desc: Enforcer champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage. Every @WantedEnemyBreakpoint@ Wanted enemy deaths grant @BonusGoldAmount@ gold. Gain a Steb and Maddie.

TFT13_Augment_AutomataCrown.name: Automata Crown
TFT13_Augment_AutomataCrown.desc: Gain an Automata Emblem, a Guardbreaker, and a Nocturne.

TFT13_Augment_SorcererCrown.name: Sorcerer Crown
TFT13_Augment_SorcererCrown.desc: Gain a Sorcerer Emblem, an Adaptive Helm, and a Vladimir.

TFT13_Augment_SingedCarry.name: Mad Chemist
TFT13_Augment_SingedCarry.desc: Gain a Singed. Your strongest Singed cannot attack but constantly runs, leaving a poison trail dealing magic damage over time. His Ability will always target himself and instead grants @TOOLTIPONLYOmnivamp@% Omnivamp and Move Speed.

TFT13_Augment_Visionary.name: Voidcaller
TFT13_Augment_Visionary.desc: For every @Mana@ Mana Visionaries spend during combat, summon a Voidling, up to @MaxVoidlings@ Voidlings. Gain a Rell and Morgana.The Voidling has @Stage2Health@-@Stage6Health@ Health based on Stage.

TFT13_Augment_FirelightCrown.name: Firelight Crown
TFT13_Augment_FirelightCrown.desc: Gain a Firelight Emblem, a Protector's Vow, and a Scar.

TFT13_TeamupAugment_BloodBrothers.name: Trait: What Could Have Been
TFT13_TeamupAugment_BloodBrothers.desc: Vander gains @MaxHealthGainPerCast@ permanent max Health each time Silco casts. Silco gains @APGainPerDeath@ permanent Ability Power each time Vander dies.Gain a 2-star Vander, a Silco, and a Spear of Shojin.

TFT13_Augment_Firelight.name: Aerial Warfare
TFT13_Augment_Firelight.desc: Firelight champions gain @FirelightBonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and @FirelightBonusAP@ Ability Power when they start a Firelight dash. They gain another @Bonus@% for every hex traveled that combat. Gain a Scar and Zeri.

TFT13_TeamupAugment_Sisters.name: Trait: Sisters
TFT13_TeamupAugment_Sisters.desc: Gain the Sister Trait. When Vi scores a takedown, Jinx gains @ASBuff*100@% bonus Attack Speed for @JinxDuration@ seconds. When Jinx scores a takedown, Vi gains @ADBuff*100@% bonus Attack Damage for @ViDuration@ seconds.Gain a Vi and Jinx.

TFT13_Augment_AnotherAnomaly.name: Another Anomaly
TFT13_Augment_AnotherAnomaly.desc: After the Anomaly round on 4-6, gain an item that duplicates the chosen Anomaly Effect onto the equipped champion.

TFT13_Augment_QuickstrikerCrown.name: Quickstriker Crown
TFT13_Augment_QuickstrikerCrown.desc: Gain a Quickstriker Emblem, a Guinsoo's Rageblade, and a Nocturne.

TFT13_Augment_VisionaryCrown.name: Visionary Crown
TFT13_Augment_VisionaryCrown.desc: Gain a Visionary Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and a Renata Glasc.

TFT13_Augment_Sentinel.name: Shield Bash
TFT13_Augment_Sentinel.desc: Sentinels gain @PercGain*100@% bonus Armor and Magic Resist. Every @Interval@ seconds, their next attack deals @ResistToDamageRatio*100@% of their total resistances as magic damage. Gain a Loris.

TFT13_Augment_SniperCrown.name: Sniper Crown
TFT13_Augment_SniperCrown.desc: Gain a Sniper Emblem, an Infinity Edge, and a Zeri.

TFT13_Augment_ExperimentCrest.name: Experiment Crest
TFT13_Augment_ExperimentCrest.desc: Gain an Experiment Emblem and an Urgot.

TFT13_Augment_FamilyCrown.name: Family Crown
TFT13_Augment_FamilyCrown.desc: Gain a Family Emblem and a Redemption.

TFT13_Augment_ChembaronCrest.name: Chem-Baron Crest
TFT13_Augment_ChembaronCrest.desc: Gain a Chem-Baron Emblem and a Renata Glasc.

TFT13_Augment_Grant6Cost_Warwick.name: What You Really Are
TFT13_Augment_Grant6Cost_Warwick.desc: Gain a Bloodthirster. After you deal @PlayerDamage@ damage to other players, gain a Warwick and a Sterak's Gage.(Current: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_WarwickDamageCount@)

TFT13_Augment_Grant6Cost_Viktor.name: Glorious Evolution
TFT13_Augment_Grant6Cost_Viktor.desc: Gain an Adaptive Helm. After you upgrade @NumUpgrades@ champions, gain a Viktor and a Jeweled Gauntlet.(Current: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_GrantViktor@)

TFT13_Augment_Sorcerer.name: Arcane Retribution
TFT13_Augment_Sorcerer.desc: When Sorcerers die, they deal @DeathPercentage*100@% of their Ability Power as magic damage to all adjacent units. Gain a Vladimir and Lux.

TFT13_Augment_SentinelCrest.name: Sentinel Crest
TFT13_Augment_SentinelCrest.desc: Gain a Sentinel Emblem and a Rell.

TFT13_Augment_ChainsawCarry.name: Brutal Revenge
TFT13_Augment_ChainsawCarry.desc: Gain 2 Rennis. Your strongest Renni's Ability costs @TOOLTIPManaReduction@ less and causes her to lunge towards the farthest enemy within @TOOLTIPHexDistance@ hexes, dealing @TOOLTIPAbilityDamage*100@% damage to the target and reduced damage to enemies in her path.

TFT13_Augment_PrimeCarry.name: Gloves Off
TFT13_Augment_PrimeCarry.desc: Gain a Vander. Your strongest Vander gains a brand new Ability that no longer grants resistances, but deals @TOOLTIPBonusDamage*100@% increased damage and punches the target backwards, dealing @TOOLTIPONLYSplashPerc*100@% of the original damage to all enemies hit.

TFT13_Augment_RebelCrest.name: Rebel Crest
TFT13_Augment_RebelCrest.desc: Gain a Rebel Emblem and an Akali.

TFT13_Augment_Experiment.name: The Mutation Survives
TFT13_Augment_Experiment.desc: Experiments gain @Health*100@% Health and grant a special hex. The Experiment in the hex is killed on combat start, granting their Experiment bonus to other laboratory hexes. Gain 3 Experiment champions.

TFT13_Augment_Conqueror.name: Noxian Guillotine
TFT13_Augment_Conqueror.desc: Conquerors execute enemies below @BaseExecuteThreshold@% Health. When they do, they gain @ArmorandMagicResist@ Armor and Magic Resist for the rest of combat. Gain a Darius and Draven.

TFT13_Augment_AcademyCrown.name: Academy Crown
TFT13_Augment_AcademyCrown.desc: Gain an Academy Emblem and a random sponsored item.

TFT13_Augment_WatcherCrown.name: Watcher Crown
TFT13_Augment_WatcherCrown.desc: Gain a Watcher Emblem, a Steadfast Heart, and a Scar.

TFT13_Augment_Quickstriker.name: Adrenaline Burst
TFT13_Augment_Quickstriker.desc: Combat start and every @TimeBetweenProcs@ seconds, all Quickstrikers attack @AttackSpeed*100@% faster for @BuffDuration@ seconds. Gain a Nocturne and Akali.

TFT13_Augment_Formswapper.name: Why Not Both?
TFT13_Augment_Formswapper.desc: While you field 2 of the same Form Swapper in different forms, both gain @BonusStats@ Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist, and @BonusStats@% Attack Damage. When you 3-star a Form Swapper, gain a 2-star copy. Gain a Swain and Gangplank.

TFT13_Augment_Scrap.name: Top of the Scrap Heap
TFT13_Augment_Scrap.desc: Every @NumScrapItemsConverted@ components Scrap champions convert, gain a random component (max @MaxComponents@). Gain a Powder and a Trundle.Converted: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Scrap_NumComponents@/@NumScrapItemsConverted@

TFT13_Augment_AmbusherCrest.name: Ambusher Crest
TFT13_Augment_AmbusherCrest.desc: Gain an Ambusher Emblem and a Camille.

TFT13_Augment_QuickstrikerCrest.name: Quickstriker Crest
TFT13_Augment_QuickstrikerCrest.desc: Gain a Quickstriker Emblem and an Akali.

TFT13_Augment_Family.name: Welcome to the Playground
TFT13_Augment_Family.desc: If at least @MinNumFamilyMembers@ Family members are alive after @TimeRequirement@ seconds in combat or at the end of combat, gain a random copy of a Vander, Powder, or Violet. Gain a Powder and Violet.

TFT13_Augment_DominatorCrown.name: Dominator Crown
TFT13_Augment_DominatorCrown.desc: Gain a Dominator Emblem, a Protector's Vow, and a Blitzcrank.

TFT13_Augment_Chembaron.name: War for the Undercity
TFT13_Augment_Chembaron.desc: Everytime you choose to save your Shimmer on a Black Market, heal @Heal@ player health and gain @Gold@ gold. Gain a Renni.

TFT13_Augment_RebelCrown.name: Rebel Crown
TFT13_Augment_RebelCrown.desc: Gain a Rebel Emblem, a Jeweled Gauntlet, and an Akali.

TFT13_Augment_VisionaryCrest.name: Visionary Crest
TFT13_Augment_VisionaryCrest.desc: Gain a Visionary Emblem and a Renata Glasc.

TFT13_Augment_FishCarry.name: Combat Medic
TFT13_Augment_FishCarry.desc: Gain a Steb. Your strongest Steb's Ability's Mana cost is reduced by @ManaReduction@, but no longer heals. Steb's spell grants @TOOLTIPONLYOmnivamp@% Omnivamp and strikes 3 times, each dealing @TOOLTIPONLYModifiedDamage*100@%.

TFT13_Augment_Grant6Cost_MissMage.name: A Change Of Fate
TFT13_Augment_Grant6Cost_MissMage.desc: Gain a Blue Buff. After starting a round with @RoundGold@ gold and winning a player combat, gain a Mel and a Hextech Gunblade.Tasks can be completed in any order.

TFT13_Augment_ArtilleristPlus.name: Rocket Collection+
TFT13_Augment_ArtilleristPlus.desc: Artillerist rockets deal @IncreasedRocketDamage*100@% increased damage. Every @RocketDamageThreshold@ rockets your Artillerists fire, gain a Collector (max @MaxItems@). Gain a Tristana and Urgot. (Rockets Fired: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT13_Augment_Artillerist_TotalDamage@)

TFT13_Augment_BruiserCrest.name: Bruiser Crest
TFT13_Augment_BruiserCrest.desc: Gain a Bruiser Emblem and a Sett.

TFT13_Augment_SorcererCrest.name: Sorcerer Crest
TFT13_Augment_SorcererCrest.desc: Gain a Sorcerer Emblem and a Vladimir.

TFT13_Augment_PitFighterCrest.name: Pit Fighter Crest
TFT13_Augment_PitFighterCrest.desc: Gain a Pit Fighter Emblem and an Urgot.

TFT13_Augment_ConquerorCrest.name: Conqueror Crest
TFT13_Augment_ConquerorCrest.desc: Gain a Conqueror Emblem and a Rell.

TFT13_Augment_TrundleCarry.name: Trolling
TFT13_Augment_TrundleCarry.desc: Gain a Trundle. Your strongest Trundle's Ability no longer heals, but grants him @TOOLTIPONLYAS@% Attack Speed for @TOOLTIPONLYDuration@ seconds, and permanently grants him @TOOLTIPONLYADPerCast@% Attack Damage. His maximum mana is reduced by @ManaReduction@.

TFT13_Augment_AmbusherCrown.name: Ambusher Crown
TFT13_Augment_AmbusherCrown.desc: Gain an Ambusher Emblem, a Hand of Justice, and a Camille.

TFT13_TeamupAugment_Menaces.name: Trait: Menaces
TFT13_TeamupAugment_Menaces.desc: While fielded with Silco, Powder gains Dominator, but no longer benefits from Family. When her monkey explodes, it creates @TOOLTIPONLYNumMonstrosities@ of Silco's monstrosities.Gain a 2-star Powder and a Silco.

TFT13_Augment_GuidedAnomaly.name: Guided Anomaly
TFT13_Augment_GuidedAnomaly.desc: Gain @FreeAnomalyRerolls@ free Anomaly rerolls. Unused rerolls are converted to gold. Gain @InitialGold@ gold now.

TFT13_Augment_PitFighter.name: Training Arc
TFT13_Augment_PitFighter.desc: Pit Fighters permanently gain @ADPerLoss*100@% Attack Damage if they lost the last combat. If they won, gain @HealthPerWin@ Health instead. Gain an Urgot.

TFT13_Augment_ChembaronCrown.name: Chem-Baron Crown
TFT13_Augment_ChembaronCrown.desc: Gain a Chem-Baron Emblem, a Nashor's Tooth, and a Smeech.

TFT13_Augment_IreliaCarry.name: Blade Dance
TFT13_Augment_IreliaCarry.desc: Gain an Irelia. Your strongest Irelia gains @TOOLTIPBonusAS*100@% Attack Speed and gains a brand new Ability that dashes her between two targets, dealing physical damage to both.

TFT13_TeamupAugment_Mentorship.name: Trait: Martial Law
TFT13_TeamupAugment_Mentorship.desc: When Ambessa casts, Caitlyn fires an empowered attack at the target, dealing @TOOLTIPONLYCAITAD@% damage. Ambessa gains @TOOLTIPONLYADSHARE@% of Caitlyn's Attack Damage.Gain a Caitlyn and Ambessa.

TFT13_Augment_SentinelCrown.name: Sentinel Crown
TFT13_Augment_SentinelCrown.desc: Gain a Sentinel Emblem, a Crownguard, and a Loris.

TFT13_Augment_AcademyCrest.name: Academy Crest
TFT13_Augment_AcademyCrest.desc: Gain an Academy Emblem and a Leona.

TFT13_Augment_ArtilleristCrest.name: Artillerist Crest
TFT13_Augment_ArtilleristCrest.desc: Gain an Artillerist Emblem and a Tristana.

TFT13_Augment_DominatorCrest.name: Dominator Crest
TFT13_Augment_DominatorCrest.desc: Gain a Dominator Emblem and a Blitzcrank.

TFT13_Augment_Rebel.name: Paint the Town Blue
TFT13_Augment_Rebel.desc: When the first @NumOfUnits@ Rebels die each combat, summon a copy of themselves that is one-star lower with @ReducedHealth@ less Health. Gain an Akali and an Irelia.

TFT13_Augment_AutomataCrest.name: Automata Crest
TFT13_Augment_AutomataCrest.desc: Gain an Automata Emblem and a Nocturne.

TFT13_Augment_ExperimentCrown.name: Experiment Crown
TFT13_Augment_ExperimentCrown.desc: Gain an Experiment Emblem, a Bloodthirster, and an Urgot.

TFT13_Augment_Automata.name: Fractured Crystals
TFT13_Augment_Automata.desc: When an Automata champion fires their blast, they fire a second blast at the closest enemy dealing @Percentage*100@% of the original damage. Gain an Amumu and Nocturne.

TFT13_Augment_ScrapCrest.name: Scrap Crest
TFT13_Augment_ScrapCrest.desc: Gain a Scrap Emblem and a Ziggs.

TFT17_Augment_EkkoGodAugment.name: Ekko's Boon
TFT17_Augment_EkkoGodAugment.desc: Gain the Anomaly, an item which grants units a powerful evolution depending on their role. Gain @NumRemovers_TOOLTIPONLY@ Magnetic Removers.

TFT17_Augment_SorakaGodAugment.name: Soraka's Boon
TFT17_Augment_SorakaGodAugment.desc: Your team gains @HealthPerTacHealth@ Health for each missing player health. At the start of each player combat, gain an additional @Heal@ player health.

TFT17_Augment_AnimaSquad_Commander.name: Anima Commander
TFT17_Augment_AnimaSquad_Commander.desc: Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by @PlayerHealth@.

TFT17_Augment_LeonaCarry.name: Shieldmaiden
TFT17_Augment_LeonaCarry.desc: Gain a Leona. Your strongest Leona becomes an Attack Fighter that dashes through enemies to deal physical damage, stunning the first target hit.

TFT17_Augment_Concentration.name: Concentration
TFT17_Augment_Concentration.desc: Conduit Abilities last @PowerMin@% to @PowerMax@% longer, depending on the Ability. Gain a Zoe and a Mordekaiser.

TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment.name: Aurelion Sol's Boon
TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment.desc: Choose 1 of @NumQuestOptions_TOOLTIPONLY@ quests to prove yourself to Aurelion Sol.Chosen Quest: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment@

TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment_Smal.name: Your team gains @SmallQuestADAP@ Attack Damage and Ability Power.
TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment_Smal.desc: Your team gains @SmallQuestADAP@ Attack Damage and Ability Power.

TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment_Medi.name: After @MedQuestRounds@ player combats, gain a completed item anvil and @MedQuestGold@ gold.

TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment_Larg.name: After @LargeQuestRounds@ player combats, gain +1 to all non-unique traits.

TFT17_Augment_MordekaiserCarry.name: Heat Death
TFT17_Augment_MordekaiserCarry.desc: Gain a Mordekaiser. Your strongest Mordkaiser becomes a Magic Fighter with a slowly growing aura that deals damage over time.

TFT17_Augment_InvaderZed.name: Invader Zed
TFT17_Augment_InvaderZed.desc: Gain a Spear of Shojin. On Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@, gain a Zed. After receiving Zed, he can then appear in your shops.Zed is a 5-cost Attack Fighter that creates clones of himself.

TFT17_Augment_AhriGodAugment.name: Ahri's Boon
TFT17_Augment_AhriGodAugment.desc: Your team gains @ADAPPerLevel@% Attack Damage and Ability Power per level. Gain @XP@ XP each round for the rest of the game.

TFT17_Augment_Timebreaker_Timestream.name: Timestream
TFT17_Augment_Timebreaker_Timestream.desc: Timebreakers gain @Health@ Health and @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed every time you reroll (including free rerolls). Gain an Ezreal and a Pantheon.(Health: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Augment_Timebreaker_Timestream_HP@, Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Augment_Timebreaker_Timestream_AS*100@%)

TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment_Boon.name: Boon of Resurrection
TFT17_Augment_AurelionSolGodAugment_Boon.desc: The first time you would be eliminated, instead remain at 1 Health

TFT17_Augment_Arbiter_DivineAmendment.name: Divine Amendment
TFT17_Augment_Arbiter_DivineAmendment.desc: Arbiters add a second effect to their law.Gain a Leona and a Zoe.

TFT17_Augment_AatroxCarry.name: Stellar Combo
TFT17_Augment_AatroxCarry.desc: Gain an Aatrox. Your strongest Aatrox becomes an Attack Fighter with an ability that swaps between three different strikes.

TFT17_Augment_YasuoGodAugment_MoreHexes.name: Yasuo's Share The Spotlight
TFT17_Augment_YasuoGodAugment_MoreHexes.desc: Yasuo's hexes also affect adjacent units at @Effectiveness*100@% effectiveness.

TFT17_Augment_PoppyCarry.name: Termeepnal Velocity
TFT17_Augment_PoppyCarry.desc: Gain a Poppy. Your strongest Poppy becomes a ranged Attack Caster that flings a high-velocity Meep at her target.

TFT17_Augment_IvernMinionCarry.name: The Big Bang
TFT17_Augment_IvernMinionCarry.desc: Gain a Meepsie. Your strongest Meepsie becomes a Magic Fighter that leaps to a nearby hex to deal damage in a large radius.

TFT17_Augment_PykeCarry.name: Contract Killer
TFT17_Augment_PykeCarry.desc: Gain a Pyke. Your strongest Pyke becomes an Attack Fighter, generates gold on team takedown, and gains a reset on-kill Ability.

TFT17_Augment_YasuoGodAugment_GoldenHex.name: Yasuo's Golden Hex
TFT17_Augment_YasuoGodAugment_GoldenHex.desc: Paint a Golden Hex. The unit in the hex gains @BonusHealth@ health, @AttackSpeed*100@% attack speed, and drops @Gold@ gold on kill.

TFT17_Augment_ThreshGodAugment.name: Thresh's Boon
TFT17_Augment_ThreshGodAugment.desc: Each round, roll a die. Get a bonus based on that roll.Health: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshGodAugment_Health@Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshGodAugment_AttackSpeed@%

TFT17_Augment_JaxCarry.name: Reach for the Stars
TFT17_Augment_JaxCarry.desc: Gain a Jax. Your strongest Jax becomes a Magic Fighter that deal bonus magic damage on attack and gains stacking Attack Speed on cast.

TFT17_Augment_SnipersNest.name: Sniper's Nest
TFT17_Augment_SnipersNest.desc: Snipers gain @DamageAmp@% Damage Amp for each combat fought from the same starting hex, up to @MaxAmp@%. Gain an Ezreal and a Gnar.

TFT17_Augment_ApotheoticForge.name: Apotheotic Forge
TFT17_Augment_ApotheoticForge.desc: Choose 1 of 4 Divine Artifacts.Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.

TFT17_Augment_ShepherdAugment.name: Shepherd's Song
TFT17_Augment_ShepherdAugment.desc: On Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@, gain a Sona and a Shepherd Emblem.

TFT17_Augment_EvelynnGodAugment.name: Evelynn's Boon
TFT17_Augment_EvelynnGodAugment.desc: Your team gains @Durability*100@% Durability. Lose an additional @HP@ Tactician Health when you lose combat.

TFT17_Augment_TourOfTheGalaxy.name: Tour of the Galaxy
TFT17_Augment_TourOfTheGalaxy.desc: Voyagers gain @HP@ Health, @AD*100@% Attack Damage, and @AP@% Ability Power, increased by @IncPercent*100@% each time you fight a new player. You prefer to fight players you haven't fought recently. Gain a Pyke and a Meepsie.

TFT17_Augment_NasusCarry.name: Bonk!
TFT17_Augment_NasusCarry.desc: Gain a Nasus. Your strongest Nasus becomes an Attack Fighter with a single target Ability that gets stronger with each kill.

TFT17_Augment_KayleGodAugment.name: Kayle's Boon
TFT17_Augment_KayleGodAugment.desc: For each unique completed item on your team, your team gains @Health@ Health, @AD*100@% Attack Damage, and @AP@% Ability Power.

TFT17_Augment_YasuoGodAugment_PaintedPow.name: Yasuo's Boon
TFT17_Augment_YasuoGodAugment_PaintedPow.desc: Increase the power of Yasuo's hexes by @Effectiveness*100@%. If you only have 2 hexes, gain @GoldIfTwo@ gold.

TFT17_Augment_KayleGodAugment_Scrapper.name: Boon of the Scrapper
TFT17_Augment_KayleGodAugment_Scrapper.desc: Combat start: Up to @NumComponents@ components temporarily turn into completed items. Gain @NumRemovers@ removers and a salvager.Salvagers allow you to break completed items into components

TFT17_Augment_GragasCarry.name: Self Destruct
TFT17_Augment_GragasCarry.desc: Gain a Gragas. Your strongest Gragas becomes a Magic Fighter with a massive explosion, but also damages himself.

TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_NeutronStar.name: Neutron Star
TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_NeutronStar.desc: Every star level of unique Dark Star units you field increases the execute threshold by @PercentPerLevel*100@%. Gain a Cho'gath and Lissandra.Bonus Execute Percent: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_NeutronStar_BonusExecutePercent*100@%

TFT17_Augment_ShieldTank_DivinePaladins.name: Divine Paladins
TFT17_Augment_ShieldTank_DivinePaladins.desc: Vanguard shields are @PercentStronger*100@% stronger and explode when broken, dealing @Damage@ magic damage split between enemies in a @Hex@-hex radius.

TFT17_Augment_VarusGodAugment_BoonOfStar.name: Varus's Boon
TFT17_Augment_VarusGodAugment_BoonOfStar.desc: Your team gains @Health@ health for each total star level in your army, and your 5 cost odds increase by @PercentIncrease@%.

TFT17_Augment_EvelynnGodAugment_BloodPri.name: Blood Price
TFT17_Augment_EvelynnGodAugment_BloodPri.desc: Gain @Health@ Tactician Health. Your rightmost shop slot costs Tactician Health instead of gold.

TFT17_Augment_Weightlifting.name: Lift Off
TFT17_Augment_Weightlifting.desc: At the start of each round, if the combined Health of all your unique Brawlers is high enough, gain a reward and increase the threshold (up to four times). Gain a Cho'Gath and a Gragas.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_Weightlifting_RewardName@@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_Weightlifting_CurrentHealth@ / @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_Weightlifting_MaxHealth@

TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_WhiteHole.name: Loot Singularity
TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_WhiteHole.desc: When the Black Hole consumes enemies, it turns them into space matter. After acquiring enough, the Black Hole turns it into loot! Gain a Cho'gath and a Lissandra.Space matter and loot quality increase each time. Gain @TwoPiecePoints@/@FourPiecePoints@/@SixPiecePoints@ space matter depending on Dark Star breakpoint.Space Matter: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_WhiteHole_CurrentStacks@ / @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_WhiteHole_StacksToNextCashout@

TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment.name: Heart of the Swarm
TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment.desc: All 3-star champions now count towards Swarmling power. At level @LevelRequirement@, while fielding @Num3StarUnits@ unique 3-star champions, Primordians summon the Apex Primordian. Gain a Briar, Bel'veth, and 2-star Rek'sai.Unique 3-Star Champions Fielded: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalStarredUnits@ / @Num3StarUnits@Levels: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalLevel@ / @LevelRequirement@

TFT9_Augment_MagicalJourneyPlus.desc: After each carousel, randomly gain @XP@ XP or @Rerolls@ free rerolls. Then, randomly gain one of these effects again.
