TFT9_Augment_ExecutionerPlusPlus.desc: Your team executes enemies below @Healththreshold@% Health on hit. Executions have a @GoldChance@% chance to drop @goldgenerated@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_PhreakyFridayHR.name: Phreaky Friday
TFT9_Augment_PhreakyFridayHR.desc: Gain an Infinity Force. After @CombatNum@ player combats, gain another.Infinity Force: Artifact that offers tons of offensive and defensive stats

TFT9_Augment_Execute.name: Execute
TFT9_Augment_Execute.desc: If a champion's target is below @hppercent@% Health, they deal @damageamp@% more damage.

TFT9_Augment_ThinkInsideTheBox.name: Think Inside The Box I
TFT9_Augment_ThinkInsideTheBox.desc: Units that don't start combat on the edge of your board gain @AP*100@% Ability Power and @Health@ Health.

TFT9_Augment_LearningFromExperience1.name: Patient Study I
TFT9_Augment_LearningFromExperience1.desc: After player combat, gain @winxp@ XP if you won or @lossxp@ XP if you lost.

TFT9_Augment_GuildOfThieves.name: Guild of Thieves
TFT9_Augment_GuildOfThieves.desc: Your champions always have Thieves' Gloves. Your current items are removed, and whenever you would gain an item, you instead gain @GoldAmount@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_LearningFromExperience3.name: Patient Study III
TFT9_Augment_LearningFromExperience3.desc: After player combat, gain @winxp@ XP if you won or @lossxp@ XP if you lost.

TFT9_Augment_ActionSurge3.name: Action Surge III
TFT9_Augment_ActionSurge3.desc: After @CombatDuration@ seconds of combat, your team gains @AttackSpeedBoost*100@% Attack Speed for @AttackSpeedDuration@ seconds.

TFT9_Augment_ActionSurge2.name: Action Surge II
TFT9_Augment_ActionSurge2.desc: After @CombatDuration@ seconds of combat, your team gains @AttackSpeedBoost*100@% Attack Speed for @AttackSpeedDuration@ seconds.

TFT9_Augment_LearningPotential.name: Learning Potential
TFT9_Augment_LearningPotential.desc: After each player combat, gain @Experience@ XP per @NumTraitsPerExp@ inactive traits on your board.Inactive Traits: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_Augment_LearningPotential_TraitNum@

TFT9_Augment_GetJinxed.name: Get Jinxed!
TFT9_Augment_GetJinxed.desc: After @Delay@ seconds of combat, a Super Mega Death Rocket crashes into the largest clump of enemy units, dealing @Stage2Damage@-@Stage6Damage@ depending on the current stage. Enemies hit have their healing reduced by @GrievousWoundsPercent@% for @Duration@ seconds.

TFT9_Augment_BerserkI.name: Berserkers I
TFT9_Augment_BerserkI.desc: Your units gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed per @MissingHealthPercent*100@% missing health.

TFT9_Augment_PhreakyFridayPlusHR.name: Phreaky Friday +
TFT9_Augment_PhreakyFridayPlusHR.desc: Gain an Infinity Force. After @CombatNum@ player combats, gain another.Infinity Force: Artifact that offers tons of offensive and defensive stats

TFT9_Augment_BloodPrice2.name: Blood Price II
TFT9_Augment_BloodPrice2.desc: Your team gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for each @Health@ missing player health.

TFT9_Augment_BloodPrice3.name: Blood Price III
TFT9_Augment_BloodPrice3.desc: Your team gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for each @Health@ missing player health.

TFT9_Augment_BloodPrice1.name: Blood Price I
TFT9_Augment_BloodPrice1.desc: Your team gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for each @Health@ missing player health.

TFT9_Augment_PumpingUp2HR.name: Pumping Up II
TFT9_Augment_PumpingUp2HR.desc: Your team gains @BaseAS@% Attack Speed. After each round, they gain @IncreasePerRound@% more. (Current Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_PumpingUp2Rounds@%)

TFT9_Augment_ActionSurge.name: Action Surge
TFT9_Augment_ActionSurge.desc: After @CombatDuration@ seconds of combat, your team gains @AttackSpeedBoost*100@% Attack Speed for @AttackSpeedDuration@ seconds.

TFT9_Augment_LevelUpSilver.name: Level Up?
TFT9_Augment_LevelUpSilver.desc: Gain [newvarplz] XP now. When you buy XP, gain @XP@ more for free.

TFT9_Augment_AirspeedVelocity3.name: Unburdened III
TFT9_Augment_AirspeedVelocity3.desc: Your units without items equipped gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT9_Augment_LongTimeCraftingHR.name: Latent Forge
TFT9_Augment_LongTimeCraftingHR.desc: After @NumberOfCombats@ player combats, gain an Artifact anvil. The anvil offers 4 choices. Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.

TFT9_Augment_Conditioning1.name: Conditioning I
TFT9_Augment_Conditioning1.desc: Your team permanently gains @healthperstack@ max Health every @secondspertrigger@ seconds in combat. Combat start: Your team gains @StartingHealth@ bonus max Health.

TFT9_Augment_Conditioning2.name: Conditioning II
TFT9_Augment_Conditioning2.desc: Your team permanently gains @healthperstack@ max Health every @secondspertrigger@ seconds in combat. Combat start: Your team gains @StartingHealth@ bonus max Health.

TFT9_Augment_Conditioning3.name: Conditioning III
TFT9_Augment_Conditioning3.desc: Your team permanently gains @healthperstack@ max Health every @secondspertrigger@ seconds in combat. Combat start: Your team gains @StartingHealth@ bonus max Health.

TFT9_Augment_StrengthOfAges.name: Strength Of Ages I
TFT9_Augment_StrengthOfAges.desc: At the end of each stage, all units on your board and bench gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage, @AP*100@% Ability Power, and @Health@ Health.

TFT9_Augment_EagleEye.name: Eagle Eye
TFT9_Augment_EagleEye.desc: You know who your next opponent will be. Your units gain @ArmorAmount@ Armor or @MRAmount@ Magic Resist, and you can swap between the two during the planning phase.

TFT9_Augment_BerserkII.name: Berserkers II
TFT9_Augment_BerserkII.desc: Your units gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed per @MissingHealthPercent*100@% missing health.

TFT9_Augment_Commander_ManaJolt1.name: Mana Jolt I
TFT9_Augment_Commander_ManaJolt1.desc: Combat start: Your team gains @startingmana@ Mana.

TFT9_Augment_Commander_ManaJolt2.name: Mana Jolt II
TFT9_Augment_Commander_ManaJolt2.desc: Combat start: Your team gains @startingmana@ Mana.

TFT9_Augment_Commander_ManaJolt3.name: Mana Jolt III
TFT9_Augment_Commander_ManaJolt3.desc: Combat start: Your team gains @startingmana@ Mana.

TFT9_Augment_NoScope.name: No Scope
TFT9_Augment_NoScope.desc: Units in the first two rows have their range reduced to a maximum of @RangeMax@ but gain @Armor@ Armor, @MagicResist@ Magic Resist, and @AD*100@% Attack Damage per hex of range lost.

TFT9_Augment_ExecutionerPlus.name: Executioner II
TFT9_Augment_ExecutionerPlus.desc: Your team executes enemies below @Healththreshold@% Health on hit. Executions have a @GoldChance@% chance to drop @goldgenerated@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_MediumEndShopping.name: High-End Shopping I
TFT9_Augment_MediumEndShopping.desc: Champions appear in the first @NumLeveledUpShops@ slots of your shop as if you were 1 level higher. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_ACutAboveHR.name: A Cut Above
TFT9_Augment_ACutAboveHR.desc: Gain a Deathblade. Champions holding this item have a @ProcChance*100@% chance to drop @Gold@ gold on kill.

TFT9_Augment_Commander_Amplify1.name: Amplify I
TFT9_Augment_Commander_Amplify1.desc: Your team gains @CritDamage@% Critical Strike Damage.

TFT16_Augment_RumbleCarry.name: Artillery Barrage
TFT16_Augment_RumbleCarry.desc: Gain a Rumble. Your strongest Rumble gains +@MaxRange@ Range and constantly fires missiles at enemies, increased with Attack Speed.

TFT16_Augment_Arcanist_ChaosMagic.name: Chaos Magic
TFT16_Augment_Arcanist_ChaosMagic.desc: Arcanists gain @ManaRegen@ Mana Regen. After every @ManaToSpend@ Mana they spend, a magical effect hits the board. Gain a Neeko and an Ahri.

TFT16_Augment_BandleBounty.name: Bandle Bounty I
TFT16_Augment_BandleBounty.desc: Reach level 10 and field 10 unique Yordles to reveal the Bandle Path's secret. Gain a Lulu and a Rumble.

TFT16_Augment_SlayerCrown.name: Slayer Crown
TFT16_Augment_SlayerCrown.desc: Get a Slayer Emblem, a Yasuo, and a Quicksilver.

TFT16_Augment_IoniaCrown.name: Ionia Crown
TFT16_Augment_IoniaCrown.desc: Get an Ionia Emblem, a Yasuo, and a Deathblade.

TFT16_Augment_DarkinWeapon_Scythe.name: The Darkin Scythe
TFT16_Augment_DarkinWeapon_Scythe.desc: Gain the Darkin Scythe, a powerful Artifact for Attack Fighters that grants the Darkin trait. Darkin heal the Tactician with takedowns.

TFT16_Augment_BilgewaterCrown.name: Bilgewater Crown
TFT16_Augment_BilgewaterCrown.desc: Get a Bilgewater Emblem, a Twisted Fate, and a Guinsoo's Rageblade.

TFT16_Augment_Targon_ClimbtheMountain.name: Climb the Mountain
TFT16_Augment_Targon_ClimbtheMountain.desc: Your Targonians gain @MaxHealth@ max Health and @ADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power for every Targonian fielded. Gain an Aphelios.

TFT16_Augment_DefenderCirclet.name: Defender Circlet
TFT16_Augment_DefenderCirclet.desc: Get a Defender Emblem, a Garen, and a Chain Vest.

TFT16_Augment_TheDarkinForge.name: Unsealed From Steel
TFT16_Augment_TheDarkinForge.desc: Choose 1 of 4 Darkin Weapons. Darkin Weapons are Artifacts that grant the Darkin trait.

TFT16_Augment_ZaunCirclet.name: Zaun Circlet
TFT16_Augment_ZaunCirclet.desc: Get a Zaun Emblem, a Recurve Bow, and...a 2-Star Vi!?

TFT16_Augment_TenetGuile.name: Guile
TFT16_Augment_TenetGuile.desc: The first @NumChampions@ champions that die each combat spawn copies of your strongest champion. Copies have @ReducedHealth*100@% max Health and deal @ReducedDamage*100@% damage.

TFT16_Augment_Slayer_TotalDominationPlus.name: Total Domination+
TFT16_Augment_Slayer_TotalDominationPlus.desc: Slayers gain @BaseDA*100@% Damage Amp, plus @DAPerBreakpoint*100@% for every @SurvivingSlayerBreakpoint@ surviving Slayers at the end of combat. Gain a Briar and a Qiyana.Current Damage Amp: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT16_Augment_Slayer_TotalDomination_CurrentDA@%

TFT16_CarouselOfChaosAugment_TimeUndilat.name: Time UNdilator
TFT16_CarouselOfChaosAugment_TimeUndilat.desc: Gain a Time Undilator, a dangerous bomb that destroys ALL units in an X-pattern at the start of combat. Also, something is terribly wrong with your shop...

TFT16_Augment_VoidCirclet.name: Void Circlet
TFT16_Augment_VoidCirclet.desc: Get a Void Emblem, a Bel'veth, and a Recurve Bow.

TFT16_Augment_Yordle_WildGrowth.name: Wild Growth
TFT16_Augment_Yordle_WildGrowth.desc: 3-star Yordles become massive, moving slower but gaining @Health*100@% Health and @ADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power. Gain a Rumble and Lulu.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_LichBane.name: Artifact Expert: Lich Bane
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_LichBane.desc: Get a 2* Sona , a Lich Bane, and a Tear Of The Goddess

TFT16_Augment_NoxianInvasion.name: Darkwill's Invasion
TFT16_Augment_NoxianInvasion.desc: Your team gains @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp, increased to @EnhancedDamageAmp*100@% if the Noxus trait is active.

TFT16_Augment_UltraRapidFire.name: U.R.F
TFT16_Augment_UltraRapidFire.desc: Gain a Spatula. Champions holding Spatula or Frying Pan items gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and @ManaRegen@ Mana Regen.

TFT16_Augment_CompleteCollection.name: Complete Collection
TFT16_Augment_CompleteCollection.desc: After you unlock @ChampsToEmblem@ champions from an origin, gain that origin's Emblem.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_LudensTempe.name: Artifact Expert: Luden's Tempest
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_LudensTempe.desc: Get a 2* Caitlyn , a Luden's Tempest, and a Recurve Bow

TFT16_Augment_PoppyCarry.name: Hammer of Orlon
TFT16_Augment_PoppyCarry.desc: Gain an Illaoi. Your strongest Illaoi becomes a Fighter. Her Ability is replaced with an airborne slam that's recast when she kills her target.

TFT16_TeamupAugment_SingedTeemo.name: Poison Pals
TFT16_TeamupAugment_SingedTeemo.desc: Gain a 2-star Teemo. Singed's damage refreshes Teemo's poisons, and every @TeemoDamageReq@ magic damage Teemo deals grants your strongest Singed @SingedAPGain@% Ability Power. Gain a Teemo after each player combat.

TFT16_Augment_WalkTheTruePath.name: Walk The True Path I
TFT16_Augment_WalkTheTruePath.desc: Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator and a Yasuo. Reach level 10 and field 10 unique Ionians to unlock a Prismatic Upgrade.

TFT16_Augment_DemaciaCirclet.name: Demacia Circlet
TFT16_Augment_DemaciaCirclet.desc: Get a Demacia Emblem, a Garen, and a Needlessly Large Rod.

TFT16_Augment_WardenCrown.name: Warden Crown
TFT16_Augment_WardenCrown.desc: Get a Warden Emblem, a Xin Zhao, and an Adaptive Helm.

TFT16_Augment_DefenderCrown.name: Defender Crown
TFT16_Augment_DefenderCrown.desc: Get a Defender Emblem, a Neeko, and a Steadfast Heart.

TFT16_Augment_Noxus_BringerOfRuin.name: Bringer of Ruin
TFT16_Augment_Noxus_BringerOfRuin.desc: Every takedown Atakhan scores permanently grants him @AP@% Ability Power and @MaxHealth@ max Health. Gain a Briar and a Sion. (Current Takedowns: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT16_Augment_Noxus_BringerOfRuin_Takedowns@)

TFT16_Augment_BrawlerCirclet.name: Bruiser Circlet
TFT16_Augment_BrawlerCirclet.desc: Get a Bruiser Emblem and a Wukong.

TFT16_Augment_ZaunCrown.name: Zaun Crown
TFT16_Augment_ZaunCrown.desc: Get a Zaun Emblem, a Giant Slayer, and an Ekko.

TFT16_Augment_ChoGathCarry.name: Vorpal Spikes
TFT16_Augment_ChoGathCarry.desc: Gain a Cho'Gath. Your strongest Cho'Gath gains +1 Attack Range and his attacks launch spikes that deal magic damage based on his max Health.

TFT16_Augment_DarkinWeapon_Aegis.name: The Darkin Aegis
TFT16_Augment_DarkinWeapon_Aegis.desc: Gain the Darkin Aegis, a powerful Artifact for Tanks that grants the Darkin trait. Darkin heal the Tactician with takedowns.

TFT16_Augment_DarkinWeapon_Staff.name: The Darkin Staff
TFT16_Augment_DarkinWeapon_Staff.desc: Gain the Darkin Staff, a powerful Artifact for Magic Casters that grants the Darkin trait. Darkin heal the Tactician with takedowns.

TFT16_Augment_TheTrifarix.name: The Trifarix
TFT16_Augment_TheTrifarix.desc: Your @NumChampions@ strongest champions gain @Health@ Health, @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp, and execute enemies under @ExecuteThreshold*100@% Health.

TFT16_Augment_WardenCirclet.name: Warden Circlet
TFT16_Augment_WardenCirclet.desc: Get a Warden Emblem, a Braum, and a Giant's Belt.

TFT16_Augment_ShadowIsles_RuinedKing.name: The Ruined King
TFT16_Augment_ShadowIsles_RuinedKing.desc: Gain a 2-star Viego. Your strongest Viego shares @PassiveSharePercent*100@% of his Passive with other Shadow Isles allies. After collecting @SoulReq@ souls, his Ability upgrades.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Manazane.name: Artifact Expert: Manazane
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Manazane.desc: Get a 2* Anivia, a Manazane , and a Tear Of The Goddess

TFT16_Augment_GunslingerCrown.name: Gunslinger Crown
TFT16_Augment_GunslingerCrown.desc: Get a Gunslinger Emblem, a Tristana, and an Infinity Edge.

TFT16_Augment_YordleCrown.name: Yordle Crown
TFT16_Augment_YordleCrown.desc: Get a Yordle Emblem, a Teemo, and a Rabadon's Deathcap.

TFT16_Augment_DisruptorCirclet.name: Disruptor Circlet
TFT16_Augment_DisruptorCirclet.desc: Get a Disruptor Emblem, a Seraphine, and a Tear of the Goddess.

TFT16_TeamupAugment_SpinToWin.name: Spin to Win
TFT16_TeamupAugment_SpinToWin.desc: Gain a Yasuo and Rek'Sai. Each time your spinning champions spend @ManaToSpend@ total Mana they permanently gain @Health@ Health and @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp. Fielding more increases their spin area by 1-hex.

TFT16_Augment_EarthAxiom.name: Earth Axiom
TFT16_Augment_EarthAxiom.desc: Gain an Earth Hex. Champions within gain @Resistances@ Armor and Magic Resist. At @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, they Stun enemies within @HexRadius@ hexes for @StunDuration@ seconds.

TFT16_Augment_PiltoverCirclet.name: Piltover Circlet
TFT16_Augment_PiltoverCirclet.desc: Get a Piltover Emblem, a Seraphine, and a Tear of the Goddess.

TFT16_Augment_FreljordCirclet.name: Freljord Circlet
TFT16_Augment_FreljordCirclet.desc: Get a Freljord Emblem, a Lissandra, and a Needlessly Large Rod.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_ZhonyasPara.name: Artifact Expert: Zhonya's Paradox
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_ZhonyasPara.desc: Get a 2* Milio, a Zhonya's Paradox, and a Negatron Cloak

TFT16_Augment_Longshot_KeepAway.name: Keep Away
TFT16_Augment_Longshot_KeepAway.desc: Longshots gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. If they cast while their target is within @HexDistanceFromTarget@ hexes, the target is knocked back @KnockbackDistanceInHexes@ hexes (cooldown: @CooldownDuration@s). Gain a Caitlyn and a Kog'Maw.

TFT16_Augment_XinZhaoCarry.name: Trials of Twilight
TFT16_Augment_XinZhaoCarry.desc: Gain @NumberOfCopies@ Xin Zhao. Your strongest Xin Zhao constantly strikes nearby enemies and executes enemies. After @RoundsBeforeTransformation@ player combats as a 3-star, unlock Zaahen. He replaces Xin Zhao and takes his items.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Fishbones.name: Artifact Expert: Fishbones
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Fishbones.desc: Get a 2* Ashe, a Fishbones, and a Sparring Gloves

TFT16_Augment_JuggernautCrown.name: Juggernaut Crown
TFT16_Augment_JuggernautCrown.desc: Get a Juggernaut Emblem, a Cho'gath, and a Protector's Vow.

TFT16_Augment_VanquisherCrown.name: Vanquisher Crown
TFT16_Augment_VanquisherCrown.desc: Get a Vanquisher Emblem, a Gangplank, and a Hand of Justice.

TFT16_Augment_DisruptorCrown.name: Disruptor Crown
TFT16_Augment_DisruptorCrown.desc: Get a Disruptor Emblem, a Malzahar, and a Blue Buff.

TFT16_Item_WorldRune.name: Realm Warp
TFT16_Item_WorldRune.desc: Use on any champion to gain an emblem for each of their listed traits.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT16_Augment_DarkinWeapon_Bow.name: The Darkin Bow
TFT16_Augment_DarkinWeapon_Bow.desc: Gain the Darkin Bow, a powerful Artifact for Marksmen that grants the Darkin trait. Darkin heal the Tactician with takedowns.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_DeathfireGr.name: Artifact Expert: Deathfire Grasp
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_DeathfireGr.desc: Get a 2* Kog'Maw, a Deathfire Grasp, and a Recurve Bow

TFT16_Augment_Ixtal_Expeditionist.name: Ixtal Expeditionist
TFT16_Augment_Ixtal_Expeditionist.desc: Gain a Qiyana, a Neeko, and a Milio. Increase your current and max player Health by @PlayerHealth@.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_NavoriFlick.name: Artifact Expert: Flickerblade
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_NavoriFlick.desc: Get an Aphelios, a Flickerblade, and a Recurve Bow

TFT16_Augment_DefenseOfIonia.name: Defense of the Placidium
TFT16_Augment_DefenseOfIonia.desc: Your team gains @Durability*100@% Durability, increased to @EnhancedDurability*100@% if the Ionia trait is active.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Hullbreaker.name: Artifact Expert: Hullbreaker
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Hullbreaker.desc: Get a 2* Xin Zhao, a Hullbreaker, and a Chain Vest

TFT16_Augment_XinZhaoCarryII.name: Trials of Twilight II
TFT16_Augment_XinZhaoCarryII.desc: Gain @NumberOfCopies@ Xin Zhao and a Bloodthirster. Xin Zhao becomes an Attack Fighter. After @RoundsBeforeTransformation@ player combats as a 3-star, unlock Zaahen. At the start of the next @NumDuplicators@ stages, gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator.

TFT16_Augment_YordleCirclet.name: Yordle Circlet
TFT16_Augment_YordleCirclet.desc: Get a Yordle Emblem, a Needlessly Large Rod, and...a Rabadon's Deathcap!?

TFT16_Augment_WaterAxiom.name: Water Axiom
TFT16_Augment_WaterAxiom.desc: Gain a Water Hex. Champions within gain @ManaRegen@ Mana Regen. Their damage @ShredPercent*100@% Shreds enemies for @Duration@ seconds.

TFT16_TeamupAugment_JarvanShyvana.name: Dragonguards
TFT16_TeamupAugment_JarvanShyvana.desc: Gain a Shyvana and a 2-star Jarvan IV. When Jarvan casts, Shyvana gains Shield. When Shyvana casts, Jarvan jumps in and deals damage based on his Armor and Magic Resist. After every player combat, gain a Jarvan IV.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_BlightingJe.name: Artifact Expert: Blighting Jewel
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_BlightingJe.desc: Get a Teemo, a Blighting Jewel, and a Needlessly Large Rod

TFT16_Augment_Targon_CosmicCalling.name: Cosmic Calling
TFT16_Augment_Targon_CosmicCalling.desc: Gain a Spear of Shojin and a Leona. On Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@, gain a Taric.

TFT16_Augment_Void_EvolveAndOvercome.name: Evolve and Overcome
TFT16_Augment_Void_EvolveAndOvercome.desc: For every @NumTakedownsReq@ champions that Mutated Void allies takedown, gain @XP@ XP. Gain a Cho'Gath and a 2-star Kog'Maw. @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_EvolveAndOvercome_Tooltip@Void provides unique Mutations.

TFT16_Augment_DemaciaForever.name: Demacia Forever
TFT16_Augment_DemaciaForever.desc: Demacians gain @Health@ permanent Health every time they rally. They also gain @Stats@% permanent Attack Damage and Ability Power every @RallyCount@ rallies. Gain a Jarvan IV, a Sona, and a Xin Zhao.

TFT16_Augment_DemaciaCrown.name: Demacia Crown
TFT16_Augment_DemaciaCrown.desc: Get a Demacia Emblem, a Crownguard, and a Jarvan IV.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Indomitable.name: Artifact Expert: The Indomitable
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Indomitable.desc: Get a Sion, The Indomitable, and a Giant Belt.

TFT16_Augment_Slayer_TotalDomination.name: Total Domination
TFT16_Augment_Slayer_TotalDomination.desc: Slayers gain @BaseDA*100@% Damage Amp, plus @DAPerBreakpoint*100@% for every @SurvivingSlayerBreakpoint@ surviving Slayers at the end of combat. Gain a Briar and a Qiyana.Current Damage Amp: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT16_Augment_Slayer_TotalDomination_CurrentDA@%

TFT16_Augment_LongshotCirclet.name: Longshot Circlet
TFT16_Augment_LongshotCirclet.desc: Get a Longshot Emblem, a Recurve Bow, and a Vayne.

TFT16_Augment_BlitzcrankCarry.name: Rocket Fist
TFT16_Augment_BlitzcrankCarry.desc: Gain a Blitzcrank. Your strongest one becomes an Attack Fighter. His Ability no longer shields but instead fires a hook towards the furthest enemy and gains powerful punches for a set amount of attacks.

TFT16_Augment_AirAxiom.name: Air Axiom
TFT16_Augment_AirAxiom.desc: Gain an Air Hex. Champions within gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and their damage @SunderPercent*100@% Sunders enemies for @Duration@ seconds.

TFT16_Augment_VanquisherCirclet.name: Vanquisher Circlet
TFT16_Augment_VanquisherCirclet.desc: Get a Vanquisher Emblem, an Ambessa, and a B.F. Sword.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Innvervatin.name: Artifact Expert: Innervating Locket
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Innvervatin.desc: Get a 2* Illaoi, a Innervating Locket, and a Giant Belt

TFT16_Augment_IxtalCrown.name: Ixtal Crown
TFT16_Augment_IxtalCrown.desc: Get an Ixtal Emblem, a Neeko, and a Gargoyle Stoneplate.

TFT16_Augment_BandleBountyPlus.name: Bandle Bounty II
TFT16_Augment_BandleBountyPlus.desc: For every Yordle you've unlocked or unlock, gain @Gold@ gold. Reach level 10 and field 10 unique Yordles to reveal the Bandle Path's secret. Gain a Tristana and Teemo.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Dawncore.name: Artifact Expert: Dawncore
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Dawncore.desc: Get a Teemo, a Dawncore, and a Tear Of The Goddess

TFT16_Augment_TenetVision.name: Vision
TFT16_Augment_TenetVision.desc: You will be offered Might and Guile augments this game. When you reach Level @LevelReq@, gain a random 5-cost champion, a completed item anvil, and a Champion Duplicator. Collecting all 3 Tenet augments grants a powerful reward.

TFT16_Augment_WoodAxiom.name: Wood Axiom
TFT16_Augment_WoodAxiom.desc: Gain a Wood Hex. Champions within gain @PercentHealth*100@% max Health. After combat, they permanently gain @PermanentHealth@ Health.

TFT16_Augment_FireAxiom.name: Fire Axiom
TFT16_Augment_FireAxiom.desc: Gain a Fire Hex. Champions within gain @ADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power. Their damage @BurnPercent*100@% Burns and @GrievousWoundsPercent*100@% Wounds for @Duration@ seconds.

TFT16_Augment_HeroOfThePlacidium.name: Hero of the Placidium
TFT16_Augment_HeroOfThePlacidium.desc: Strike enemies with telekinetic blades during combat, dealing damage and 30% Shredding and Sundering. Blade damage increases based on your total star level of Ionian champions.

TFT16_Augment_IxtalCirclet.name: Ixtal Circlet
TFT16_Augment_IxtalCirclet.desc: Get an Ixtal Emblem, a Giant's Belt, and...a Lesser Duplicator!?

TFT16_Augment_JuggernautCirclet.name: Juggernaut Circlet
TFT16_Augment_JuggernautCirclet.desc: Get a Juggernaut Emblem, a Negatron Cloak, and a Swain.

TFT16_Augment_FreljordCrown.name: Freljord Crown
TFT16_Augment_FreljordCrown.desc: Get a Freljord Emblem, a Hextech Gunblade, and an Anivia.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_ProwlersCla.name: Artifact Expert: Prowler's Claw
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_ProwlersCla.desc: Get a 2* RekSai, a Prowler's Claw, and a Sparring Gloves

TFT16_Augment_ShenCarry.name: Shadow Dash
TFT16_Augment_ShenCarry.desc: Gain a Shen. Your strongest Shen becomes an Attack Fighter. His Ability is replaced with a dash that strikes low Health enemies. The number of dashes increases with each cast.

TFT16_Augment_ArcanistCrown.name: Arcanist Crown
TFT16_Augment_ArcanistCrown.desc: Get an Arcanist Emblem, an Ahri, and a Jeweled Gauntlet.

TFT16_Augment_SlayerCirclet.name: Slayer Circlet
TFT16_Augment_SlayerCirclet.desc: Get a Slayer Emblem, a Bel'veth, and a Sparring Glove.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_TitanicHydr.name: Artifact Expert: Titanic Hydra
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_TitanicHydr.desc: Get a 2* Briar, a Titanic Hydra , and a B.F. Sword

TFT16_Augment_IoniaCirclet.name: Ionia Circlet
TFT16_Augment_IoniaCirclet.desc: Get an Ionia Emblem, a Yunara, and a B.F. Sword.

TFT16_Augment_NoxusCrown.name: Noxus Crown
TFT16_Augment_NoxusCrown.desc: Get an Noxus Emblem, a Sion, and a Protector's Vow.

TFT16_Augment_WalkTheTruePathPlus.name: Walk The True Path II
TFT16_Augment_WalkTheTruePathPlus.desc: Gain @LesserDuplicatorAmount@ Lesser Champion Duplicators, a Yasuo, and a B.F. Sword. Reach level 10 and field 10 unique Ionians to unlock a Prismatic Upgrade.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_SpectralCut.name: Artifact Expert: Spectral Cutlass
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_SpectralCut.desc: Get a 2* Yasuo, a Spectral Cutlass, and a Sparring Gloves

TFT16_Augment_Zaun_SilcosRevenge.name: Silco's Revenge
TFT16_Augment_Zaun_SilcosRevenge.desc: Zaunites explode into Shimmer on death, dealing @PercentMaxHealthDamage*100@% of their max Health to @EnemiesToDamage@ nearby enemies as magic damage. Gain a Blitzcrank, an Ekko, and a Vi.

TFT16_Augment_TheWorldRunes.name: The World Runes
TFT16_Augment_TheWorldRunes.desc: Gain @NumEmblems@ Emblems from random Region traits. Gain @BaseXPPerRound@ XP every player combat, increased to @EnhancedXPPerRound@ XP if @MinRegionTraitsActive@ or more Region traits are active.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_TalismanOfA.name: Artifact Expert: Talisman Of Ascension
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_TalismanOfA.desc: Get a 2* Zac, a Talisman Of Ascension, and a Giant Belt

TFT16_Augment_LongshotCrown.name: Longshot Crown
TFT16_Augment_LongshotCrown.desc: Get a Longshot Emblem, a Teemo, and a Guinsoo's Rageblade.

TFT16_Augment_VoidCrown.name: Void Crown
TFT16_Augment_VoidCrown.desc: Get a Void Emblem, a Rek'Sai, and a Striker's Flail

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_HorizonFocu.name: Artifact Expert: Horizon Focus
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_HorizonFocu.desc: Get a Cho'Gath, a Horizon Focus, and a Needlessly Large Rod

TFT16_Augment_Piltover_HexgateTravel.name: Hexgate Travel
TFT16_Augment_Piltover_HexgateTravel.desc: When the Piltover invention triggers for the first time each combat, gain a random number of Piltover champions that cost between 1 and @MaxGold@ gold. Gain a Caitlyn and a Vi.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_SnipersFocu.name: Artifact Expert: Sniper's Focus
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_SnipersFocu.desc: Get a 2* Tristana , a Sniper's Focus, and a B.F. Sword

TFT16_Augment_IllaoiCarry.name: Leap of Faith
TFT16_Augment_IllaoiCarry.desc: Gain an Illaoi. Your strongest Illaoi becomes a Fighter. Her Ability is replaced with an airborne slam that's recast when she kills her target.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_WitsEnd.name: Artifact Expert: Wits End
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_WitsEnd.desc: Get a 2* Viego, a Wits End, and a Needlessly Large Rod

TFT16_TeamupAugment_LucianVayne.name: Sentinels of Light
TFT16_TeamupAugment_LucianVayne.desc: Gain a Lucian & Senna and a 2-star Vayne. Vayne fires additional bolts at enemies afflicted with Black Mist and on takedown, grants Attack Speed to Lucian & Senna.

TFT16_Augment_TenetMight.name: Might
TFT16_Augment_TenetMight.desc: Your team gains @BaseTeamAD*100@% Attack Damage and @BaseTeamHealth@ Health. Gain an additional @TeamADPerDefeat*100@% Attack Damage and @TeamHealthPerDefeat@ Health per unique defeated or eliminated Tactician (@TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT16_Augment_TenetMight_DefeatedOpponents@/7).

TFT16_Augment_PiltoverCrown.name: Piltover Crown
TFT16_Augment_PiltoverCrown.desc: Get a Piltover Crown, a Loris, and a Gargoyle Stoneplate.

TFT16_Augment_BrawlerCrown.name: Bruiser Crown
TFT16_Augment_BrawlerCrown.desc: Get a Bruiser Emblem, a Sion, and a Spirit Visage.

TFT16_Augment_QuickstrikerCrown.name: Quickstriker Crown
TFT16_Augment_QuickstrikerCrown.desc: Get a Quickstriker Emblem, an Ashe, and a Kraken's Fury.

TFT16_TeamupAugment_AmbessaKindred.name: Chosen Wolves
TFT16_TeamupAugment_AmbessaKindred.desc: Gain an Ambessa and a Kindred. When Kindred casts, Ambessa always gains their protection against death and gains Attack Damage while protected. When Ambessa casts, Wolf strikes all enemies hit, dealing reduced damage.

TFT16_Augment_InvokerCirclet.name: Invoker Circlet
TFT16_Augment_InvokerCirclet.desc: Get an InvokerEmblem, a Lissandra, and a Needlessly Large Rod.

TFT16_Augment_GunslingerCirclet.name: Gunslinger Circlet
TFT16_Augment_GunslingerCirclet.desc: Get a Gunslinger Emblem, a Miss Fortune, and a Recurve Bow.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Lightshield.name: Artifact Expert: Lightshield Crest
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Lightshield.desc: Get a 2* Neeko, a Lightshield Crest, and a Chain Vest

TFT16_Augment_Vanquisher_PerfectParry.name: Perfect Parry
TFT16_Augment_Vanquisher_PerfectParry.desc: Vanquishers have a chance to Parry equal to their Critical Strike Chance. When Parrying, they reduce their damage taken by @ParryDR*100@%. Gain a Rek'Sai.

TFT16_Augment_TheAxiomata.name: The Axiomata
TFT16_Augment_TheAxiomata.desc: Gain @NumAugments@ random elemental hex augments. Future augment rounds instead grant you items and gold based on the augment's tier.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Shiv.name: Shiv Expert: Twisted Fate
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_Shiv.desc: Get a Twisted Fate, a Statikk Shiv, and a Needlessly Large Rod.

TFT16_TeamupAugment_SeraphineSona.name: Joint Album
TFT16_TeamupAugment_SeraphineSona.desc: Gain a Seraphine. Seraphine's heal is increased based on her ally's missing Health. Sona gains the Disruptor trait and fires an additional bolt with every cast. Gain a Sona after each player combat.

TFT16_Augment_Weightlifting.name: Lifting Competition
TFT16_Augment_Weightlifting.desc: At the start of each round, if the combined Health of all your unique Bruisers is high enough, gain a reward and increase the threshold (up to four times). Gain a Shen and a Sion.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Augment_Weightlifting_RewardName@@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Augment_Weightlifting_CurrentHealth@ / @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Augment_Weightlifting_MaxHealth@

TFT16_TeamupAugment_EkkoZilean.name: Timewinders
TFT16_TeamupAugment_EkkoZilean.desc: Gain 2 Ekkos. Gain @XP@XP every combat Ekko participates in. Gain an Ekko every time you level up. At 3-Star, gain a Zilean.Ekko's empowered attacks echo to all enemies being damaged by Zilean's spell, dealing @DamageShare*100@% of the original damage.

TFT16_Augment_Shurima_SecretsOfTheSands.name: Secrets of the Sands
TFT16_Augment_Shurima_SecretsOfTheSands.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. Gain an Azir on Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@. Each time you unlock a Shuriman, gain an ideal item for them.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_UnendingDes.name: Artifact Expert: Unending Despair
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_UnendingDes.desc: Get a 2* Rumble, a Unending Despair, and a Negatron Cloak

TFT16_Augment_InvokerCrown.name: Invoker Crown
TFT16_Augment_InvokerCrown.desc: Get an Invoker Emblem, a Milio, and an Archangel's Staff.

TFT16_Augment_NoxusCirclet.name: Noxus Circlet
TFT16_Augment_NoxusCirclet.desc: Get an Noxus Emblem, an Ambessa, and a Sparring Glove.

TFT16_Augment_ArcanistCirclet.name: Arcanist Circlet
TFT16_Augment_ArcanistCirclet.desc: Get an Arcanist Emblem, a Tear of the Goddess, and a Lux.

TFT16_Augment_QuickstrikerCirclet.name: Quickstriker Circlet
TFT16_Augment_QuickstrikerCirclet.desc: Get a Quickstriker Emblem, a Yunara, and a B.F. Sword.

TFT16_Augment_BilgewaterCirclet.name: Bilgewater Circlet
TFT16_Augment_BilgewaterCirclet.desc: Get a Bilgewater Emblem, a Miss Fortune, and a Recurve Bow.

TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_SeekersArmg.name: Artifact Expert: Seeker's Armguard
TFT16_Augment_ArtifactExpert_SeekersArmg.desc: Get a 2* Ekko, a Seeker's Armguard, and a Needlessly Large Rod

TFT17_MarketOffering_LoversPlus.name: Lovers +
TFT17_MarketOffering_LoversPlus.desc: Gain a @MajorUnitCost@-cost and a @MinorUnitCost@-cost that share a trait.

TFT17_MarketOffering_DelayedRandomArtifa.name: Artifact Item
TFT17_MarketOffering_DelayedRandomArtifa.desc: After @Delay@ rounds, gain a random Artifact.

TFT17_MarketOffering_BloodPactPlusPlus.name: Blood Pact ++
TFT17_MarketOffering_BloodPactPlusPlus.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. For each other player that picks this, lose @HealthLossPerPlayer@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_ComponentAnvil.name: Component Anvil
TFT17_MarketOffering_ComponentAnvil.desc: Drag this to the Shop to open an Armory full of component items! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_GoldQue.name: Wealth Quest
TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_GoldQue.desc: When you reach @GoldRequired@ gold, gain a component anvil and @GoldReward@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_RollTheBones.name: Roll the Bones
TFT17_MarketOffering_RollTheBones.desc: Roll @Dice@ dice. Gain gold equal to the total.

TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Wind.name: Acceleration Hex
TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Wind.desc: Place the hex on a champion. Allies in the hex gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_HardPivot.name: Hard Pivot
TFT17_MarketOffering_HardPivot.desc: Sell your board and bench. Gain @FreeRerolls@ free rerolls, and your next @FiveCostShops@ shops have all 5 costs.

TFT17_MarketOffering_2star4cost_Eve.name: 2-star 4-cost
TFT17_MarketOffering_2star4cost_Eve.desc: Gain a random @StarLevel_TOOLTIPONLY@-star @ChampCost_TOOLTIPONLY@ cost champion. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_SorakasEmbrace.name: Soraka's Embrace
TFT17_MarketOffering_SorakasEmbrace.desc: At combat start, grant the ally who died first the previous combat @ShieldFloor@ to @ShieldCeiling@ Shield, based on the current Stage.

TFT17_MarketOffering_LesserDupe_Varus.name: Lesser Champion Duplicator
TFT17_MarketOffering_LesserDupe_Varus.desc: Use on a 3-cost champion or less to create a 1-star copy on your bench.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_StarQue.name: Starry Quest
TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_StarQue.desc: The next time you star up a champion, gain @GoldReward@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_DelayedCompletedAnv.name: Completed Item Anvil
TFT17_MarketOffering_DelayedCompletedAnv.desc: In @Delay@ rounds, gain a Completed Item Anvil.

TFT17_MarketOffering_CategoryHack_Combat.name: Combat Hack
TFT17_MarketOffering_CategoryHack_Combat.desc: Your next augment selection will display all combat augments in the first slot, and that slot has @NumExtraRolls_TOOLTIPONLY@ extra rerolls.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Craftsmanship.name: Craftsmanship
TFT17_MarketOffering_Craftsmanship.desc: Gain @ReforgersUpfront@ Reforgers now and one at the start of each stage. Whenever you use a Reforger, gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Chosen_5Cost.name: 2 Salvagers
TFT17_MarketOffering_Chosen_5Cost.desc: Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_Gold_Stage3_Eve.name: @Gold@ gold
TFT17_MarketOffering_Gold_Stage3_Eve.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. You cannot buy champions for @ShopRoundLoss@ rounds.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Chosen_1Cost.name: 2 Salvagers
TFT17_MarketOffering_Chosen_1Cost.desc: Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_Chosen_2Cost.name: 2 Salvagers
TFT17_MarketOffering_Chosen_2Cost.desc: Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_2star3cost_Eve.name: 2-star 3-cost
TFT17_MarketOffering_2star3cost_Eve.desc: Gain a random @StarLevel_TOOLTIPONLY@-star @ChampCost_TOOLTIPONLY@ cost champion. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Lovers.name: The Lovers
TFT17_MarketOffering_Lovers.desc: Gain a @MajorUnitCost@-cost and a @MinorUnitCost@-cost that share a trait.

TFT17_MarketOffering_AugmentWheel.name: Augment Wheel
TFT17_MarketOffering_AugmentWheel.desc: Gain either: 1 random Prismatic augment, 2 random Gold augments, or 3 random Silver augments and @SilverGold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_StarlightPlusPlus.name: Starcrossed Upgrade ++
TFT17_MarketOffering_StarlightPlusPlus.desc: Your next shop contains all @Tier@-cost units. The first one you buy is free and upgraded to 2-star.

TFT17_MarketOffering_SilverAugment.name: Silver Augment
TFT17_MarketOffering_SilverAugment.desc: Open an armory of 3 Silver augments and choose one.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Chosen_3Cost.name: 2 Salvagers
TFT17_MarketOffering_Chosen_3Cost.desc: Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Social.name: Starlight Hex
TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Social.desc: Place the hex on a champion. Allies in the hex gain @ManaRegen@ Mana Regen.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_PlusOne.name: Boon of Omnipotence
TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_PlusOne.desc: When you reach level @LevelReq@, gain +1 to all non-unique traits.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Augment_TradeSector.name: Trade Sector
TFT17_MarketOffering_Augment_TradeSector.desc: Gain a free Shop reroll every round. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Delayed5CostShop.name: 5-cost shop
TFT17_MarketOffering_Delayed5CostShop.desc: After @Delay@ rounds, get a free shop reroll and your next shop contains all 5-cost champions.

TFT17_MarketOffering_StarlightPlus.name: Starcrossed Upgrade
TFT17_MarketOffering_StarlightPlus.desc: Your next shop contains all @Tier@-cost units. The first one you buy is free and upgraded to 2-star.

TFT17_MarketOffering_PandorasSeat.name: Pandora's Seat
TFT17_MarketOffering_PandorasSeat.desc: At the start of every round, champions on the @BenchSlotCount@ rightmost bench slots transform into random champions of the same cost.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Starlight.name: Starcrossed Upgrade
TFT17_MarketOffering_Starlight.desc: Your next shop contains all @Tier@-cost units. The first one you buy is free and upgraded to 2-star.

TFT17_MarketOffering_TomeOfTraits.name: Tome of Traits
TFT17_MarketOffering_TomeOfTraits.desc: Drag this Tome to the Shop to open an Armory full of emblems! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

TFT17_MarketOffering_FinalistGambit.name: Finalist Gambit
TFT17_MarketOffering_FinalistGambit.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. If you make it to top 4, gain @FinalistGold@ more gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Anomaly.name: Anomaly
TFT17_MarketOffering_Anomaly.desc: Next planning phase, gain an Anomaly which lets you apply a powerful evolution to one champion. You can spend gold to reroll the offering.

TFT17_MarketOffering_ArtifactAnvil.name: God Artifact Anvil
TFT17_MarketOffering_ArtifactAnvil.desc: Drag this to the Shop to open an Armory full of God Artifact items! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

TFT17_MarketOffering_DelayedComponentAnv.name: Component Anvil
TFT17_MarketOffering_DelayedComponentAnv.desc: After @Delay@ rounds, gain a component anvil.

TFT17_MarketOffering_BloodPact.name: Blood Pact
TFT17_MarketOffering_BloodPact.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. For each other player that picks this, lose @HealthLossPerPlayer@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_LesserDupe_Varus_St.name: Lesser Champion Duplicator
TFT17_MarketOffering_LesserDupe_Varus_St.desc: Use on a 3-cost champion or less to create a 1-star copy on your bench.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_LowHPQu.name: Low Health Quest
TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_LowHPQu.desc: The first time you fall to @HP@ health, gain @GoldReward@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Augment_Shimmerscal.name: Shimmerscale Essence
TFT17_MarketOffering_Augment_Shimmerscal.desc: Gain a Mogul's Mail. In @combatnum@ rounds, gain a Gamblers Blade.These items give gold as well as combat power.

TFT17_MarketOffering_GoldPerTurn_Stage3.name: Gold Every Turn
TFT17_MarketOffering_GoldPerTurn_Stage3.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold each round for the rest of the game.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Gold_Stage4_Eve.name: @Gold@ gold
TFT17_MarketOffering_Gold_Stage4_Eve.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. You cannot buy champions for @ShopRoundLoss@ rounds.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Augment_StarterKit.name: Starter Kit
TFT17_MarketOffering_Augment_StarterKit.desc: Gain a 4-cost champion, a 2-star 1-cost champion that shares a trait with them, and @Gold@ gold.At the start of the next @FutureChampionCount@ stages, gain that 4-cost champion again.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Sacrifice.name: Sacrifice
TFT17_MarketOffering_Sacrifice.desc: Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician Health and gain @gold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_ExtraAugmentRollsPl.name: Augment Rerolls
TFT17_MarketOffering_ExtraAugmentRollsPl.desc: You get +@ExtraRolls@ Augment rerolls for all future augment choices. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Steamroll.name: Steamroll
TFT17_MarketOffering_Steamroll.desc: Gain a random @Tier@- cost and 1 gold. Repeat after each player combat until you lose one.

TFT17_MarketOffering_BlessingWealth.name: Blessing: Wealth
TFT17_MarketOffering_BlessingWealth.desc: Permanently grant a champion @ADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power, and a @GoldChance@% chance to generate @Gold@ gold on takedown.

TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_RerollQ.name: Reroll Quest
TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_RerollQ.desc: After rolling the shop @RerollsNeeded@ times, gain @AnvilsToGrant@ component anvils.

TFT17_MarketOffering_2TinyDupes.name: 2 Tiny Duplicators
TFT17_MarketOffering_2TinyDupes.desc: Use on a 1-cost champion to create a 1-star copy of them.

TFT17_MarketOffering_RainbowShops.name: Rainbow Shops
TFT17_MarketOffering_RainbowShops.desc: Your next @NumShops@ shops will each contain one unit of each tier. Gain @NumRerolls@ free reroll.

TFT17_MarketOffering_GroupHugPlus.name: Better Together +
TFT17_MarketOffering_GroupHugPlus.desc: Gain @Health@ Tactician Health. If at least 5 players choose this, gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_ThreeCostChampion_O.name: Owned @Tier@ cost
TFT17_MarketOffering_ThreeCostChampion_O.desc: Gain a copy of a @Tier@-cost champion you own and @BonusGold@ gold.If you don't own any @Tier@-cost champions, gain a random one

TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Electr.name: Storm Hex
TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Electr.desc: Place the hex on a champion. The first time an ally in the hex hits an enemy with an Ability, that enemy is Stunned for @StunDuration@ seconds.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_MaxInterest_Stage2.name: Divine Investment
TFT17_MarketOffering_MaxInterest_Stage2.desc: Your maximum interest is increased by 1. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_1star4cost_Eve.name: 4-cost
TFT17_MarketOffering_1star4cost_Eve.desc: Gain a random @StarLevel_TOOLTIPONLY@-star @ChampCost_TOOLTIPONLY@ cost champion. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_MaxInterest_Stage3.name: Divine Investment
TFT17_MarketOffering_MaxInterest_Stage3.desc: Your maximum interest is increased by 1. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_2Salvagers.name: 2 Salvagers
TFT17_MarketOffering_2Salvagers.desc: Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_GroupHug.name: Better Together
TFT17_MarketOffering_GroupHug.desc: Gain @Health@ Tactician Health. If at least 5 players choose this, gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_AnvilTransformation.name: Anvil Transformation
TFT17_MarketOffering_AnvilTransformation.desc: Whenever you would get a component, gain a Component Anvil instead. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_LevelQu.name: Level Quest
TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_LevelQu.desc: When you reach level @Level@, gain @GoldReward@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_PenguPairs.name: Super Parting Gift
TFT17_MarketOffering_PenguPairs.desc: The next time you select God Pengu's gift, gain an extra copy of the champion and @Gold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Augment_LevelUp.name: Level Up!
TFT17_MarketOffering_Augment_LevelUp.desc: When you buy XP, gain an additional @XP@. Gain @InitialXP@ immediately.

TFT17_MarketOffering_DivineEmpathy.name: Divine Empathy
TFT17_MarketOffering_DivineEmpathy.desc: At @FirstPlayerHPThreshold@ and @SecondPlayerHPThreshold@ player Health, gain a random component.

TFT17_MarketOffering_SteamrollPlus.name: Steamroll+
TFT17_MarketOffering_SteamrollPlus.desc: Gain a random @Tier@-cost and 1 gold. Repeat after each player combat until you lose one.

TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Wood.name: Cosmic Hex
TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Wood.desc: Place the hex on a champion. Allies in the hex gain @PercentHealth*100@% max Health, and gain @BonusHealth@ permanent Health each round.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_Humility.name: Humility
TFT17_MarketOffering_Humility.desc: Set your loss streak to @Streak@ and gain @Health@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Dummy_Evelynn.name: Frontline Dummy
TFT17_MarketOffering_Dummy_Evelynn.desc: Gain a training dummy with a Brawler Emblem, a Bastion Emblem, and a Vanguard emblem.

TFT17_MarketOffering_RandomBoon_Stage3.name: Random Boon
TFT17_MarketOffering_RandomBoon_Stage3.desc: Gain a random boon from ANY god, and @Gold@ gold.Chosen Boon: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshBoon_Stage3UnitProp1@@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshBoon_Stage3UnitProp2@

TFT17_MarketOffering_RandomBoon_Stage2.name: Random Boon
TFT17_MarketOffering_RandomBoon_Stage2.desc: Gain a random boon from ANY god, and @Gold@ gold.Chosen Boon: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshBoon_Stage2UnitProp1@@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshBoon_Stage2UnitProp2@

TFT17_MarketOffering_RandomBoon_Stage4.name: Random Boon
TFT17_MarketOffering_RandomBoon_Stage4.desc: Gain a random boon from ANY god, and @Gold@ gold.Chosen Boon: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshBoon_Stage4UnitProp1@@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_ThreshBoon_Stage4UnitProp2@

TFT17_MarketOffering_ExtraAugmentRolls.name: Augment Rerolls
TFT17_MarketOffering_ExtraAugmentRolls.desc: You get +@ExtraRolls@ Augment rerolls for all future augment choices. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_2LesserDupes_Eve.name: Duplicator Deal
TFT17_MarketOffering_2LesserDupes_Eve.desc: Gain 2 Lesser Champion Duplicators. You cannot use your shop for @ShopRoundLoss@ rounds.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Recombobulator_Stag.name: Mini Recombobulate
TFT17_MarketOffering_Recombobulator_Stag.desc: Transform all 1 and 2-Cost champions on your board into random ones of a higher cost.

TFT17_MarketOffering_SplitGold_Stage2.name: Chest of Greed
TFT17_MarketOffering_SplitGold_Stage2.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold, plus @SplitGold@ gold split between all players who pick this (rounded down.)

TFT17_MarketOffering_SplitGold_Stage3.name: Chest of Greed
TFT17_MarketOffering_SplitGold_Stage3.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold, plus @SplitGold@ gold split between all players who pick this (rounded down.)

TFT17_MarketOffering_RandomCompleted_Eve.name: Completed Item
TFT17_MarketOffering_RandomCompleted_Eve.desc: Gain a random completed item. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_5TinyDupes.name: Duplicator Bundle
TFT17_MarketOffering_5TinyDupes.desc: Gain 4 Tiny Champion Duplicators and 1 Lesser Champion Duplicator.

TFT17_MarketOffering_SplitGold_Stage4.name: Chest of Greed
TFT17_MarketOffering_SplitGold_Stage4.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold, plus @SplitGold@ gold split between all players who pick this (rounded down.)

TFT17_MarketOffering_NextPVEScuttle.name: Scuttle Party
TFT17_MarketOffering_NextPVEScuttle.desc: Your next PVE round will be replaced with a Scuttle Crab round with bonus loot!

TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Ice.name: Cryogenic Hex
TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Ice.desc: Place the hex on a champion. The first time an ally in the hex falls below @HealthThreshold@% Health, they freeze for @BlockDuration@ second and heal @HealPercent*100@% of their max Health.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_Chosen_4Cost.name: 2 Salvagers
TFT17_MarketOffering_Chosen_4Cost.desc: Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_Dummy_Kayle.name: Armored Dummy
TFT17_MarketOffering_Dummy_Kayle.desc: Gain a training dummy with a Warmog's Armor, Bramble Vest, and Dragon's Claw.

TFT17_MarketOffering_DelayedRandomArtifa.name: Artifact Item
TFT17_MarketOffering_DelayedRandomArtifa.desc: After @Delay@ rounds, gain a random Artifact.

TFT17_MarketOffering_PrismaticAugment.name: Prismatic Augment
TFT17_MarketOffering_PrismaticAugment.desc: Open an armory of 3 Prismatic augments and choose one.

TFT17_MarketOffering_EphemeralRerolls.name: Ephemeral Rerolls
TFT17_MarketOffering_EphemeralRerolls.desc: At the start of each round, if you don't have a free reroll, gain a free reroll.

TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_TraitQu.name: Trait Quest
TFT17_MarketOffering_AurelionSol_TraitQu.desc: After fielding @NumTraits@ non-unique traits in a player combat, gain a random Emblem and a Reforger.

TFT17_MarketOffering_RandomEmblem.name: Random Emblem
TFT17_MarketOffering_RandomEmblem.desc: Gain a random Emblem. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_CompletedAnvil.name: Completed Item Anvil
TFT17_MarketOffering_CompletedAnvil.desc: Drag this to the Shop to open an Armory full of completed items! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Golden.name: Golden Hex
TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Golden.desc: Use on a champion to paint the hex below them, turning it into a Golden hex which empowers champions within. The empowered champion gains @BonusHealth_TOOLTIPONLY@ Health, @AttackSpeed_TOOLTIPONLY*100@% Attack Speed, and drops @Gold@ gold on kill.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_MarketOffering_TreasureArmory.name: Treasure Armory
TFT17_MarketOffering_TreasureArmory.desc: At the start of the next round, get an offering of loot you can reroll for 1 gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_LoversPlusPlus.name: Lovers ++
TFT17_MarketOffering_LoversPlusPlus.desc: Gain a @MajorUnitCost@-cost and a @MinorUnitCost@-cost that share a trait.

TFT17_MarketOffering_GoldAugment.name: Gold Augment
TFT17_MarketOffering_GoldAugment.desc: Open an armory of 3 Gold augments and choose one.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Augment_PreciseSmit.name: Precise Smithing
TFT17_MarketOffering_Augment_PreciseSmit.desc: Reforging items and Artifacts grants an anvil of the same value instead. Gain @NumComponents@ component and @NumReforger@ reforger now, and @StageReforger@ reforgers every stage.Includes components and Radiant Items, but does not affect Emblems or Tactician's Items.

TFT17_MarketOffering_IncreasedFiveCostOd.name: @PercentIncrease@% Increased 5-Cost Odds
TFT17_MarketOffering_IncreasedFiveCostOd.desc: Permanently increase your shop odds for 5-costs by @PercentIncrease@%.

TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Fire.name: Solar Hex
TFT17_MarketOffering_EmpoweredHex_Fire.desc: Place the hex on a champion. Allies in the hex deal @FireDamagePercent*100@% bonus magic damage over @Duration@ seconds. This damage 33% Wounds, and 1% Burns over the duration.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every secondWound: Reduces healing received

TFT17_MarketOffering_DivineRefund.name: Divine Refund
TFT17_MarketOffering_DivineRefund.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. The next time you create an item, gain a copy of one of the components at random.

TFT17_MarketOffering_Stimmy.name: Divine Intervention
TFT17_MarketOffering_Stimmy.desc: After falling to @HealthThreshold@ player health, gain a special loot orb.

TFT17_MarketOffering_SharedWealth_Stage4.name: Shared Wealth +
TFT17_MarketOffering_SharedWealth_Stage4.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. If at least @PlayersNeeded@ players choose this, gain an additional @BonusGold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_BloodPactPlus.name: Blood Pact +
TFT17_MarketOffering_BloodPactPlus.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. For each other player that picks this, lose @HealthLossPerPlayer@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_TwoCostChampion_Two.name: 2-star 2-cost
TFT17_MarketOffering_TwoCostChampion_Two.desc: Gain a 2-star 2-cost champion. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_SharedWealth_Stage2.name: Shared Wealth
TFT17_MarketOffering_SharedWealth_Stage2.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. If at least @PlayersNeeded@ players choose this, gain an additional @BonusGold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_3star1cost_Eve.name: 3-star 1-cost
TFT17_MarketOffering_3star1cost_Eve.desc: Gain a random @StarLevel_TOOLTIPONLY@-star @ChampCost_TOOLTIPONLY@ cost champion. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_SharedWealth_Stage3.name: Shared Wealth +
TFT17_MarketOffering_SharedWealth_Stage3.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. If at least @PlayersNeeded@ players choose this, gain an additional @BonusGold@ gold.

TFT17_MarketOffering_1star5cost_Eve.name: 2  5-costs
TFT17_MarketOffering_1star5cost_Eve.desc: Gain @NumChamps_TOOLTIPONLY@ random @StarLevel_TOOLTIPONLY@-star @ChampCost_TOOLTIPONLY@ cost champions. Lose @HealthLoss@ Tactician Health.

TFT17_MarketOffering_IncreasedFiveCostOd.name: @PercentIncrease@% Increased 5-Cost Odds
TFT17_MarketOffering_IncreasedFiveCostOd.desc: Permanently increase your shop odds for 5-costs by @PercentIncrease@%.

TFT17_MarketOffering_AllTierFourShop.name: @Tier@-Cost Shop
TFT17_MarketOffering_AllTierFourShop.desc: Your next shop contains all @Tier@-cost units. The first one you buy is free.

TFT17_MarketOffering_AllTierThreeShop.name: @Tier@-Cost Shop
TFT17_MarketOffering_AllTierThreeShop.desc: Your next shop contains all @Tier@-cost units. The first one you buy is free.

TFT17_MarketOffering_FourCostChampion_Ow.name: Owned @Tier@ cost
TFT17_MarketOffering_FourCostChampion_Ow.desc: Gain a copy of a @Tier@-cost champion you own and @BonusGold@ gold.If you don't own any @Tier@-cost champions, gain a random one

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_ChemicalCapacitorMod_R.name: Malware Matrix
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_ChemicalCapacitorMod_R.desc: Dealing physical damage to an enemy reduces the target's Armor by @ResistReduce@. (Ability Damage Cooldown: @Cooldown@ seconds)At (4): If the holder is Psionic, every @NumAttacks@rd attack cleaves, dealing @CleaveDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to nearby enemies.Recommended users: Master Yi and Pyke.

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_DroneMod_Radiant.name: Drone Uplink
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_DroneMod_Radiant.desc: A drone repeats @DamageRepeat@% of damage from the holder's attacks and Abilities to the same targets every @Interval@ seconds.At (4): If the holder is Psionic, gain an additional mini-drone that repeats @SecondDroneDamageRepeat*100@% of damage.Recommended users: Sona and Viktor.

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_ChemicalCapacitorMod.name: Malware Matrix
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_ChemicalCapacitorMod.desc: Dealing physical damage to an enemy reduces the target's Armor by @ResistReduce@. (Ability Damage Cooldown: @Cooldown@ seconds)Recommended users: Master Yi and Pyke.

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_TargetlockMod.name: Target-Lock Optics
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_TargetlockMod.desc: The holder's first attack on each enemy deals @AttackPct@ (%i:scaleAD%) additional damage.Recommended users: Pyke and Master Yi

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_SemiconductorMod_Radia.name: Semiconductor
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_SemiconductorMod_Radia.desc: Every @AttacksToLaunch@ attacks and every @AttacksToReceive@ times being attacked, zap the @NumEnemies@ nearest enemies, dealing @PctHealthDamage*100@% of enemy Health as magic damage.Recommended users: Gragas and Master Yi.

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_TargetlockMod_Radiant.name: Target-Lock Optics
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_TargetlockMod_Radiant.desc: The holder's first attack on each enemy deals @AttackPct@ (%i:scaleAD%) additional damage.At (4): If the holder is Psionic, they heal @HealPct*100@% of their max Health whenever their target dies.Recommended users: Pyke and Master Yi

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_GrenadeMod_Radiant.name: Biomatter Preserver
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_GrenadeMod_Radiant.desc: Gain @PctMaxHP*100%@% max Health and deploy @NumGrenades@ Life Orbs. Every @Interval@ seconds of combat, one drops restoring @HealPct*100@% of the holder's missing Health.At (4): If the holder is Psionic, they gain @IncreasedHealing*100@% increased healing from all sources.Recommended user: Gragas.

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_DroneMod.name: Drone Uplink
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_DroneMod.desc: A drone repeats @DamageRepeat@% of damage from the holder's attacks and Abilities to the same targets every @Interval@ seconds.Recommended users: Sona and Viktor.

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_SemiconductorMod.name: Semiconductor
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_SemiconductorMod.desc: Every @AttacksToLaunch@ attacks and every @AttacksToReceive@ times being attacked, zap the @NumEnemies@ nearest enemies, dealing @PctHealthDamage*100@% of enemy Health as magic damage.Recommended users: Gragas and Master Yi.

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_SympatheticImplantMod.name: Sympathetic Implant
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_SympatheticImplantMod.desc: Every @Interval@ seconds, gain @ManaRegenOverTime@ additional Mana Regen.Recommended users: Sona and Viktor.

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_SympatheticImplantMod_.name: Sympathetic Implant
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_SympatheticImplantMod_.desc: Every @Interval@ seconds, gain @ManaRegenOverTime@ additional Mana Per Second. At (4): If the holder is Psionic, their abilities deal @TrueDamageConversion*100@% of their ability damage as true damage instead.Recommended users: Sona and Viktor.

TFT17_Item_PsyOps_GrenadeMod.name: Biomatter Preserver
TFT17_Item_PsyOps_GrenadeMod.desc: Gain @PctMaxHP*100%@% max Health and deploy @NumGrenades@ Life Orbs. Every @Interval@ seconds of combat, one drops restoring @HealPct*100@% of the holder's missing Health.Recommended user: Gragas.

TFT17_Item_Artifact_ZekesHeraldShadow.name: Zeke's Bleak Herald
TFT17_Item_Artifact_ZekesHeraldShadow.desc: When combat begins, the holder reduces the Attack Speed of all allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row by %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeedReduction@%. The holder then gains %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed for each affected ally.

TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademia_Hero101.name: Hero 101
TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademia_Hero101.desc: The first time you win @CombatWins@ player combats (Wins: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademia_Hero101_Wins@), all Battle Academia champions gain @BonusHealth@ Health and @ReducedMana*100@% reduced max Mana. Gain a Garen and Ezreal.

TFT15_Augment_EdgelordCrown.name: Edgelord Crown
TFT15_Augment_EdgelordCrown.desc: Gain an Edgelord Emblem, a Hand of Justice, and a Yasuo.

TFT15_Augment_ProdigyCrown.name: Prodigy Crown
TFT15_Augment_ProdigyCrown.desc: Gain a Prodigy Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and an Ezreal.

TFT15_Augment_SupremeCellsCirclet.name: Supreme Cells Circlet
TFT15_Augment_SupremeCellsCirclet.desc: Gain a Supreme Cells Emblem and an Akali.

TFT15_Augment_TheCrew_SpaceCamp.name: Space Camp
TFT15_Augment_TheCrew_SpaceCamp.desc: Whenever you upgrade a 1-cost Crew champion, gain a random 1-3 cost Crew champion. Gain a Malphite.

TFT15_Augment_KennenCarry.name: Nine Thousand Volts
TFT15_Augment_KennenCarry.desc: Gain a Kennen. Your strongest Kennen becomes a ranged Marksman. He throws piercing Shurikens that can stun and deal magic damage.

TFT15_Augment_DrMundoCarry.name: Give 'em the Chair!
TFT15_Augment_DrMundoCarry.desc: Gain a Dr. Mundo. Your strongest Dr. Mundo becomes a Ranged Marksman. He now throws chairs that deal heavy damage, but cost Health.

TFT15_Augment_CrystalGambit_DiamondHands.name: Diamond Hands
TFT15_Augment_CrystalGambit_DiamondHands.desc: Gain @IncreasedGP*100@% more total Gems from Crystal Gambit, but you can only cash out once, on @CashoutStage@-@CashoutRound@. While Double Down is active, winning loses an additional @PercentGPLostOnWin*100@% of your total Gems rather than cashing out.

TFT15_Augment_Executioner_GoldenGuilloti.name: Golden Guillotine
TFT15_Augment_Executioner_GoldenGuilloti.desc: Executioner kills have a chance to drop loot, scaling with Critical Strike Chance. The value of the loot given can also critically strike, granting even more loot. Gain a Katarina and Kalista.

TFT15_Augment_SentaiCirclet.name: Mighty Mech Circlet
TFT15_Augment_SentaiCirclet.desc: Gain a Mighty Mech Crest and a Lucian

TFT15_Augment_Prodigy_UnboundArcana.name: Unbound Arcana
TFT15_Augment_Prodigy_UnboundArcana.desc: Every 2 seconds, Prodigies gain Ability Power equal to @PercentManaToAP*100@% of their Mana Regeneration (rounded down).

TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademia_ClassPresid.name: Class President
TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademia_ClassPresid.desc: Combat start: Powered Up Battle Academia champions and allies adjacent to one gain @Health@ Health, @AD*100@% AD, and @AP@% AP. Battle Academia units gain double. Gain a Katarina

TFT15_Augment_Heavyweight_RingTheBell.name: Ring The Bell
TFT15_Augment_Heavyweight_RingTheBell.desc: After @Timer@ seconds, your Heavyweight champions gain @MaxHealth*100@% max Health and @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp. Gain a Kobuko and a Zac.

TFT15_Augment_SniperCrown.name: Sniper Crown
TFT15_Augment_SniperCrown.desc: Gain a Sniper Emblem, an Infinity Edge, and a Caitlyn.

TFT15_Augment_CrystalRoseCirclet.name: Crystal Gambit Circlet
TFT15_Augment_CrystalRoseCirclet.desc: Gain a Crystal Gambit Emblem and a Janna.

TFT15_Augment_StarGuardian_Superstar.name: Star Power
TFT15_Augment_StarGuardian_Superstar.desc: Star Guardians with a Power Up grant @PercentIncrease*100@% increased Star Guardian bonuses. Gain a Xayah.

TFT15_Augment_BastionCirclet.name: Bastion Circlet
TFT15_Augment_BastionCirclet.desc: Gain a Bastion Emblem, a Giant's Belt, and a Leona.

TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademiaCrown.name: Battle Academia Crown
TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademiaCrown.desc: Gain a Battle Academia Emblem, a Spirit Visage, and a Garen.

TFT15_Augment_StrategistCirclet.name: Strategist Circlet
TFT15_Augment_StrategistCirclet.desc: Gain a Strategist Emblem, a Ziggs, and a Tear of the Goddess.

TFT15_Augment_SpellslingerCrown.name: Sorcerer Crown
TFT15_Augment_SpellslingerCrown.desc: Gain a Sorcerer Emblem, a Jeweled Gauntlet, and an Ahri.

TFT15_Augment_MalphiteCarry.name: Tectonic Titan
TFT15_Augment_MalphiteCarry.desc: Gain a Malphite. Your strongest Malphite becomes a Fighter, gaining increased Attack Speed. He now charges at nearby enemies, knocking them up and dealing heavy damage.

TFT15_Augment_SupremeCells_AllForOne.name: The Strongest Survive
TFT15_Augment_SupremeCells_AllForOne.desc: Whenever an ally dies, they grant the Supreme Cell with the most damage this round @PercentHealth*100@% of their maximum health. Gain a Kai'Sa and Kennen.

TFT15_Augment_SoulFighterCrown.name: Soul Fighter Crown
TFT15_Augment_SoulFighterCrown.desc: Gain a Soul Fighter Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and a Kalista.

TFT15_Augment_SoulFighter_TheGodsEyeOpen.name: The God's Eye Opens
TFT15_Augment_SoulFighter_TheGodsEyeOpen.desc: Every @Cadence@ seconds the God's Eye grants a random Soul Fighter @ShieldAmount@ shield and @AS*100@% stacking Attack Speed for the rest of combat. Gain a Kalista and Naafiri.

TFT15_Augment_Bastion_RaidBoss.name: Raid Boss
TFT15_Augment_Bastion_RaidBoss.desc: Your strongest Bastion champion gains @Health*100@% max Health. When other Bastions die, they transfer @DefenseRatio*100@% of their Armor and Magic Resist to it. Gain a Shen and Rell.

TFT15_Augment_StrategistCrown.name: Strategist Crown
TFT15_Augment_StrategistCrown.desc: Gain a Strategist Emblem, a Janna, and an Adaptive Helm.

TFT15_Augment_Mentor_LearnFromTheBest.name: Learn From The Best
TFT15_Augment_Mentor_LearnFromTheBest.desc: Whenever you star-up a champion they permanently gain @BonusPercent*100@% of every unique Mentor bonus of Mentors on your board or bench. Gain a Yasuo.

TFT15_Augment_DestroyerCrown.name: Executioner Crown
TFT15_Augment_DestroyerCrown.desc: Gain a Executioner Emblem, a Striker's Flail, and a Katarina.

TFT15_Augment_SentaiRanger_BeTheLegs.name: I'll Be The Legs
TFT15_Augment_SentaiRanger_BeTheLegs.desc: The Mighty Mech gains @BonusDefenses@ Armor and Magic Resist and @BonusHealth@ Health. Gain 3 Mighty Mech champions. Field 7 Mighty Mech, reach level 10, and hold all 3 Mighty Mech Augments to activate MECHA-MERGE PROTOCOL.

TFT15_Augment_Luchador_GrandSlam.name: Grand Slam
TFT15_Augment_Luchador_GrandSlam.desc: Luchadors gain @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed. When Luchador is active, Luchadors leap into battle at combat start. Luchador leaps deal @PercentBaseAD*100@% of their Basic Attack Damage. Gain a Dr. Mundo.

TFT15_Augment_JuggernautCirclet.name: Juggernaut Circlet
TFT15_Augment_JuggernautCirclet.desc: Gain a Juggernaut Emblem, an Udyr, and a Giant's Belt.

TFT15_Augment_SentaiCrown.name: Mighty Mech Crown
TFT15_Augment_SentaiCrown.desc: Gain a Mighty Mech Emblem, a Kraken's Fury, and a Lucian.

TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademiaCirclet.name: Battle Academia Circlet
TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademiaCirclet.desc: Gain a Battle Academia Emblem and a Rakan.

TFT15_Augment_ChallengerCirclet.name: Duelist Circlet
TFT15_Augment_ChallengerCirclet.desc: Gain a Duelist Emblem, an Ashe, and a BF Sword.

TFT15_Augment_StarGuardian_PowerOfFriend.name: Power of Friendship
TFT15_Augment_StarGuardian_PowerOfFriend.desc: Star Guardians who start combat adjacent to at least one other Star Guardian gain @Mana@ Mana Regeneration, @Defenses@ Armor, and @Defenses@ Magic Resist. Gain a Rell.

TFT15_Augment_NeekoCarry.name: Starfall
TFT15_Augment_NeekoCarry.desc: Gain a Neeko. Your strongest Neeko becomes a Magic Fighter and gains increased Attack Speed. Her Ability deals more damage, and increases its radius with every cast.

TFT15_Augment_HeavyweightCirclet.name: Heavyweight Circlet
TFT15_Augment_HeavyweightCirclet.desc: Gain a Heavyweight Emblem, a Poppy, and a Giant's Belt.

TFT15_Augment_HeavyweightCrown.name: Heavyweight Crown
TFT15_Augment_HeavyweightCrown.desc: Gain a Heavyweight Emblem, a Spirit Visage, and a Kobuko.

TFT15_Augment_TheCrew_EscapeVelocity.name: Escape Velocity
TFT15_Augment_TheCrew_EscapeVelocity.desc: Gain 1 Velocity per reroll, and @LevelNum@ when you level up. Crew units gain @AS*100%@% Attack Speed for every 3 Velocity.(Velocity: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_TheCrew_EscapeVelocity_Velocity@)

TFT15_Augment_Edgelord_GainTheEdge.name: Gain The Edge
TFT15_Augment_Edgelord_GainTheEdge.desc: Edgelords now gain up to @Mult*100@% of their Attack Speed bonus the lower health their target is. Gain a Shen and Xayah.

TFT15_Augment_SupremeCells_NewContenders.name: New Contenders
TFT15_Augment_SupremeCells_NewContenders.desc: Grant @BonusSharePercent*100@% of Supreme Cell's bonus to all champions on your team. Any champion on your team can now become the Supreme Cell. Gain a Kai'Sa and Kennen.

TFT15_Augment_UdyrCarry.name: Burning Bright
TFT15_Augment_UdyrCarry.desc: Gain an Udyr. Your strongest Udyr becomes an Attack Fighter and sends bouncing gusts of flame out with every attack. His spell no longer rapidly attacks, but instead grants him stacking Attack Speed.

TFT15_Augment_Juggernaut_Indomitable.name: Unceasing
TFT15_Augment_Juggernaut_Indomitable.desc: Whenever an ally Juggernaut dies, all other Juggernauts gain a @MaxHealthHeal*100@% max Health shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and gain @AdditionalDurabilityRatio*100@% more Durability. Gain an Aatrox and Dr. Mundo.

TFT15_Augment_Wraith_ShadowHomunculous.name: The Darkness Within
TFT15_Augment_Wraith_ShadowHomunculous.desc: The first @NumWraiths@ Wraith champions to die each combat summon a monstrosity from the Shadow Realm. Gain a Jhin and Zac.

TFT15_Augment_StarGuardianCrown.name: Star Guardian Crown
TFT15_Augment_StarGuardianCrown.desc: Gain a Star Guardian Emblem, a Steadfast Heart, and a Rell.

TFT15_Augment_SentaiRanger_BeTheHead.name: I'll Be The Head
TFT15_Augment_SentaiRanger_BeTheHead.desc: The Mighty Mech gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Gain a 3 Mighty Mech Champions.Field 7 Mighty Mech with a total of @TOOLTIPStarLevelReq@ Star Levels and reach level 10 to activate MECHA-MERGE PROTOCOL.

TFT15_Augment_MightyMech_PowerUpload.name: Power Upload
TFT15_Augment_MightyMech_PowerUpload.desc: You can give the Mighty Mech a Power Up. When it has Power Up the Mighty Mech gains @Health@ Health and @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp.Gain an Aatrox, a Senna, and a Power Remover.

TFT15_Augment_Protector_PreemptiveProtec.name: Preemptive Protection
TFT15_Augment_Protector_PreemptiveProtec.desc: Combat start: Protectors shield themselves and their closest ally for @ShieldPercentAmount*100@% of their maximum health. Shields stack. Gain a Rakan.

TFT15_Augment_ZacCarry.name: Perfect Form
TFT15_Augment_ZacCarry.desc: Gain a Zac. Your strongest Zac becomes a Specialist. He now bounces around the battlefield dealing damage in a one hex radius.

TFT15_Augment_Mentor_TeachersCouncil.name: Teacher's Council
TFT15_Augment_Mentor_TeachersCouncil.desc: Mentor bonuses are granted to your team regardless of how many Mentors you play. Gain a Kobuko.

TFT15_Augment_ProtectorCirclet.name: Protector Circlet
TFT15_Augment_ProtectorCirclet.desc: Gain a Protector Emblem, a Neeko, and a Giant's Belt.

TFT15_Augment_Strategist_GamePlan.name: Game Plan

TFT15_Augment_SniperCirclet.name: Sniper Circlet
TFT15_Augment_SniperCirclet.desc: Gain a Sniper Emblem, a Jinx, and a Recurve Bow.

Whenever you win player combats, Luchadors grow in size and permanently gain @ADPerWin@% Attack Damage and @HealthPerWin@ Health. Gain a Dr Mundo and Gnar.(Total: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_Luchador_TournamentTitan_AD@% AD; @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_Luchador_TournamentTitan_Health@ Health)

TFT15_Augment_DestroyerCirclet.name: Executioner Circlet

TFT15_Augment_BastionCrown.name: Bastion Crown

TFT15_Augment_SupremeCellsCrown.name: Supreme Cells Crown

TFT15_Augment_EdgelordCirclet.name: Edgelord Circlet
TFT15_Augment_EdgelordCirclet.desc: Gain an Edgelord Emblem, a Samira, and a Recurve Bow.

TFT15_Augment_Sorcerer_DazzlingDisplay.name: Dazzling Display
TFT15_Augment_Sorcerer_DazzlingDisplay.desc: Enemies who take damage from Sorcerer Abilities deal @DamageReduction*100%@% less damage for @Duration@ seconds. Gain a Lux and a Lucian.

TFT15_Augment_EmpyreanCirclet.name: Wraith Circlet
TFT15_Augment_EmpyreanCirclet.desc: Gain a Wraith Emblem and a K'Sante.

TFT15_Augment_RingKingCrown.name: Luchador Crown
TFT15_Augment_RingKingCrown.desc: Gain a Luchador Emblem, a Sterak's Gage, and a Dr Mundo.

TFT15_Augment_ProtectorCrown.name: Protector Crown
TFT15_Augment_ProtectorCrown.desc: Gain a Protector Emblem, a Protector's Vow, and a Neeko.

TFT15_Augment_StarGuardian_TinyTeam.name: Tiny Team
TFT15_Augment_StarGuardian_TinyTeam.desc: When you field @MaxStarGuardians@ or less Star Guardians, increase Star Guardian bonuses by an additional @BonusIncrease*100@%. Gain a Syndra and Rell.

TFT15_Augment_ViCarry.name: Knuckledusters
TFT15_Augment_ViCarry.desc: Gain a Vi. Your strongest Vi becomes an Attack Fighter and has a chance to drop loot on kill. She now deals heavy single target damage and gains Attack Damage for item components equipped on your team.

TFT15_Augment_EmpyreanCrown.name: Wraith Crown
TFT15_Augment_EmpyreanCrown.desc: Gain a Wraith Emblem, a Hextech Gunblade, and a Malzahar.

TFT15_Augment_Wraith_DeepeningShadows.name: Deepening Shadows
TFT15_Augment_Wraith_DeepeningShadows.desc: At combat start and whenever the Shadow Realm strikes, Wraith champions gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage and @AP@% Ability Power. Gain a Jhin and Zac.

TFT15_Augment_JuggernautCrown.name: Juggernaut Crown
TFT15_Augment_JuggernautCrown.desc: Get a Juggernaut Emblem, a Spirit Visage, and a Dr. Mundo.

TFT15_Augment_StarGuardianCirclet.name: Star Guardian Circlet
TFT15_Augment_StarGuardianCirclet.desc: Gain a Star Guardian Emblem and a Rell.

TFT15_Augment_SoulFighterCirclet.name: Soul Fighter Circlet
TFT15_Augment_SoulFighterCirclet.desc: Gain a Soul Fighter Emblem and a Kalista.

TFT15_Augment_ProdigyCirclet.name: Prodigy Circlet
TFT15_Augment_ProdigyCirclet.desc: Gain a Prodigy Emblem, a Malzahar, and a Needlessly Large Rod.

TFT15_Augment_SoulFighter_TournamentFavo.name: Tournament Favorites
TFT15_Augment_SoulFighter_TournamentFavo.desc: Soul Fighters gain Fame when they deal damage. Each Fame breakpoint grants loot. Gain a Naafiri and Kalista.Fame: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_SoulFighter_TournamentFavorites_Damage@/@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT15_Augment_SoulFighter_TournamentFavorites_Breakpoint@

TFT15_Augment_SentaiRanger_BeTheHead_Gol.name: I'll Be The Head
TFT15_Augment_SentaiRanger_BeTheHead_Gol.desc: The Mighty Mech gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Gain a Gangplank.Field 7 Mighty Mech with a total of @TOOLTIPStarLevelReq@ Star Levels and reach level 10 to activate MECHA-MERGE PROTOCOL.

TFT15_Augment_Duelist_AdaptiveStyle.name: Adaptive Style
TFT15_Augment_Duelist_AdaptiveStyle.desc: On attack, Duelists gain @OffensiveStats*100@% Attack Damage and Ability Power, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times. Duelist Tanks instead gain @DefensiveStats@ Armor and Magic Resist. Gain a Kai'Sa and Kayle.

TFT15_Augment_ChallengerCrown.name: Duelist Crown
TFT15_Augment_ChallengerCrown.desc: Gain a Duelist Emblem, a Kraken's Fury, and a Gangplank.

TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademia_TransferStu.name: Transfer Students
TFT15_Augment_BattleAcademia_TransferStu.desc: At the start of every stage and after every carousel round, gain @NumChamps@ random 1-3 cost Battle Academia champions. Gain an Ezreal.

TFT15_Augment_CrystalRoseCrown.name: Crystal Gambit Crown
TFT15_Augment_CrystalRoseCrown.desc: Gain a Crystal Gambit Emblem, an Adaptive Helm, and a Janna.

TFT15_Augment_RingKingCirclet.name: Luchador Circlet
TFT15_Augment_RingKingCirclet.desc: Gain a Luchador Emblem and a Dr Mundo.

TFT15_Augment_Sniper_PreciseShot.name: Precise Shot
TFT15_Augment_Sniper_PreciseShot.desc: Every @Cadence@ seconds, all Sniper champions fire a shot that deals @BaseADPercent*100@% of their Basic Attack Damage to the lowest health enemy in range. Gain a Jhin.

TFT15_Augment_ShenCarry.name: Twilight Assault
TFT15_Augment_ShenCarry.desc: Gain a Shen. Your strongest Shen becomes a ranged Marksman gaining +3 Range. His ability no longer shields but instead deals additional damage.

TFT15_Augment_GarenCarry.name: Schoolyard Justice

TFT15_Augment_MightyMech_MultiMech.name: Multi-Mech
TFT15_Augment_MightyMech_MultiMech.desc: You no longer gain the Mighty Mech. Instead, all Mighty Mech champions gain @MechStatPercentage*100@% of the Health, Ability Power, and Attack Damage the Mech would have.Gain an Aatrox.

TFT15_Augment_SentaiRanger_BeTheArms.name: I'll Be The Arms
TFT15_Augment_SentaiRanger_BeTheArms.desc: The Mighty Mech gains @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed.Field 7 Mighty Mech, reach level 10, and hold all 3 Mighty Mech Augments to activate MECHA-MERGE PROTOCOL.

TFT15_Augment_SoulFighter_SoulSurge.name: Soul Surge
TFT15_Augment_SoulFighter_SoulSurge.desc: When they hit Max Power, Soul Fighters gain @AS*100@% Attack Speed and @Durability*100@% Durability for @Duration@ seconds.

TFT15_Augment_SpellslingerCirclet.name: Sorcerer Circlet
TFT15_Augment_SpellslingerCirclet.desc: Gain an Sorcerer Emblem, a Karma, and a Tear of the Goddess.

TFT14_Augment_DynamoCirclet.name: Dynamo Circlet
TFT14_Augment_DynamoCirclet.desc: Gain a Dynamo Emblem, a Miss Fortune, and a BF Sword.

TFT14_Augment_VanguardCirclet.name: Vanguard Circlet
TFT14_Augment_VanguardCirclet.desc: Gain a Vanguard Emblem, a Leona, and a Giant's Belt.

TFT14_Augment_Bruiser_Vertical.name: Reinforcing Skeleture
TFT14_Augment_Bruiser_Vertical.desc: Whenever a Bruiser dies, it permanently gains @HealthBonus@ Health.Gain a Darius and Alistar.

TFT14_Augment_Divinicorp_Vertical.name: Divine Ascension
TFT14_Augment_Divinicorp_Vertical.desc: After @Delay@ seconds your Divinicorp champions ascend, gaining @BonusHealthPerc*100@% Health and @BonusAttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Gain a Rhaast and a Morgana.

TFT14_Augment_CypherCrown.name: Cypher Crown
TFT14_Augment_CypherCrown.desc: Gain a Cypher Emblem, a Giant Slayer, and a LeBlanc.

TFT14_Augment_Supercharge_Vertical.name: Overclocked
TFT14_Augment_Supercharge_Vertical.desc: Your A.M.P. champions with @ItemAmount@ items gain @AmpBonus@ Amp. Gain @Rerolls@ rerolls, a Naafiri, and a Nidalee.

TFT14_Augment_Marksman_Vertical.name: Flatline
TFT14_Augment_Marksman_Vertical.desc: Marksmen execute enemies under @ExecutionPercent*100@% Health. Every time a Marksman executes, all Marksman gain @ASBonus*100@% Attack Speed. Gain a Jhin and a Kindred.

TFT14_Augment_Swift_Vertical.name: Speed Kills
TFT14_Augment_Swift_Vertical.desc: Rapidfire champions start at @StartingStacks@ stacks and can go to @MaxStacks@. If you win combat within @CombatDuration@ seconds, gain @GoldReward@ gold. Gain a Twisted Fate and a Kog'Maw.

TFT14_Augment_DivinicorpCrown.name: Divinicorp Crown
TFT14_Augment_DivinicorpCrown.desc: Gain a Divinicorp Emblem, a Spirit Visage, and a Rhaast.

TFT14_Augment_DynamoCrown.name: Dynamo Crown
TFT14_Augment_DynamoCrown.desc: Gain a Dynamo Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and an Elise.

TFT14_Augment_Immortal_Vertical.name: Golden Fleece
TFT14_Augment_Immortal_Vertical.desc: Each Golden Ox drops @GoldDropped@ gold after fighting @TurnsPerGold@ rounds. Your max interest is @InterestCap@. Gain a Graves, an Alistar, and @Gold@ gold.

TFT14_Augment_RapidfireCirclet.name: Rapidfire Circlet
TFT14_Augment_RapidfireCirclet.desc: Gain a Rapidfire Emblem, a Zeri, and a BF Sword.

TFT14_Augment_AnimaSquad_PowerUp.desc: Anima Squad takedowns have a @DropChance@% chance to drop an XP orb that sells for 1 XP. Anima Squad units gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for each of your player levels. Gain a Seraphine and Illaoi.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_AnimaSquad_Count_Tooltip@

TFT14_Augment_GragasCarryPlus.name: The Chug Bug+
TFT14_Augment_GragasCarryPlus.desc: Gain @TOOLTIPNumberOfCopies@ Gragas. Your strongest Gragas's attacks have a chance to knockback and deal bonus magic damage. His ability heals and empowers his next attack.

TFT14_Augment_SlayerCrown.name: Slayer Crown
TFT14_Augment_SlayerCrown.desc: Gain a Slayer Emblem, a Hand of Justice, and a Vayne.

TFT14_Augment_Syndicate_KeepYourFriendsC.name: Keep Your Friends Close

TFT14_Augment_GoldenOxCrown.name: Golden Ox Crown
TFT14_Augment_GoldenOxCrown.desc: Gain a Golden Ox Emblem, a Nashor's Tooth, and a Graves.

TFT14_Augment_BruiserCrown.name: Bruiser Crown
TFT14_Augment_BruiserCrown.desc: Gain a Bruiser Emblem, a Crownguard, and a Darius.
