TFT14_Augment_Supercharge_Splash.name: Transference
TFT14_Augment_Supercharge_Splash.desc: When A.M.P. champions die, the nearest A.M.P. champion gains @AmpBonus@ Amp until the end of combat. Gain a Naafiri and a Nidalee.

TFT14_Augment_Cutter_Splash.name: Cutpurse
TFT14_Augment_Cutter_Splash.desc: Executioners have a @GoldDropChance*100@% chance to drop a gold when their attacks critically strike. Gain a Graves and Rengar.Gold Gained: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_CutpurseGold@

TFT14_Augment_Boombots_BigBoom.name: Hunter Killer Missile

TFT14_Augment_StreetDemonCirclet.name: Street Demon Circlet
TFT14_Augment_StreetDemonCirclet.desc: Gain a Street Demon Emblem and a Jinx.

TFT14_Augment_MarksmanCrown.name: Marksman Crown
TFT14_Augment_MarksmanCrown.desc: Gain a Marksman Emblem, an Infinity Edge, and a Jhin.

TFT14_Augment_TechieCrown.name: Techie Crown
TFT14_Augment_TechieCrown.desc: Gain a Techie Emblem, a Jeweled Gauntlet, and a Shyvana.

TFT14_Augment_StreetDemon_TaggingSpree.name: Tagging Spree
TFT14_Augment_StreetDemon_TaggingSpree.desc: Signature Street Demon hexes grant @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed. Gain 3 Street Demons and @ItemCount@ Spray Can items that create signature Street Demon hexes.

TFT14_Augment_Strong_Vertical.name: Lethal Rerouting
TFT14_Augment_Strong_Vertical.desc: Slayers above @HealthThreshold*100@% Health gain @AttackDamageBonus*100@% Attack Damage. While under @HealthThreshold*100@%, they gain @OmnivampBonus*100@% Omnivamp. Gain a Vayne and a Shaco.

TFT14_Augment_TechieCirclet.name: Techie Circlet
TFT14_Augment_TechieCirclet.desc: Gain a Techie Emblem, a Brand, and a Tear of the Goddess.

TFT14_Augment_Divinicorp_Splash.desc: If you have @NumDivinicorp@ or fewer Divinicorp champions, their bonuses are increased by @BaseBonus*100@% + @BonusPerStage*100@% for each Stage. Gain a Rhaast and a Morgana.

TFT14_Augment_Immortal_VerticalPlus.name: Golden Fleece+
TFT14_Augment_Immortal_VerticalPlus.desc: Each Golden Ox drops @GoldDropped@ gold after fighting @TurnsPerGold@ rounds. Your max interest is @InterestCap@. Gain a Graves, an Alistar, and @Gold@ gold.

TFT14_Augment_AnimaSquadCirclet.name: Anima Squad Circlet
TFT14_Augment_AnimaSquadCirclet.desc: Gain an Anima Squad Emblem and a Yuumi.

TFT14_Augment_BastionCirclet.name: Bastion Circlet
TFT14_Augment_BastionCirclet.desc: Gain a Bastion Emblem, a Sejuani, and a Giant's Belt.

TFT14_Augment_Controller_VerticalPlus.desc: Every @Rounds@ rounds with Strategist active, bet whether you'll win more or lose more. After those rounds, gain @GoldReward@ gold. If you're correct, gain a completed item Anvil. Gain a Yuumi and an Ekko.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_Strategist_BetStatus@

TFT14_Augment_RapidfireCrown.name: Rapidfire Crown
TFT14_Augment_RapidfireCrown.desc: Gain a Rapidfire Emblem, a Giant Slayer, and a Twisted Fate.

TFT14_Augment_Cyberboss_HighScore.name: New High Score
TFT14_Augment_Cyberboss_HighScore.desc: Cyberbosses increase their score when they deal damage. When they reach the next high score gain bonus loot. Gain a Veigar and a Poppy.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_Cyberbosses_Highscore_Tooltip@

TFT14_Augment_Exotech_Cyberdeck.name: Cyberdeck

TFT14_Augment_GoldenOxCirclet.name: Golden Ox Circlet
TFT14_Augment_GoldenOxCirclet.desc: Gain a Golden Ox Emblem and a Jarvan.

TFT14_Augment_Exotech_TrialRun.name: Trial Run

If you're correct, gain a completed item Anvil. Gain a Yuumi and an Ekko.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Augment_Strategist_BetStatus@

TFT14_Augment_Armorclad_Splash.name: Transistor

TFT14_Augment_SlayerCirclet.name: Slayer Circlet
TFT14_Augment_SlayerCirclet.desc: Gain a Slayer Emblem, a Zed, and a Sparring Gloves.

TFT14_Augment_SyndicateCrown.name: Syndicate Crown
TFT14_Augment_SyndicateCrown.desc: Gain a Syndicate Emblem, an Infinity Edge, and a Darius.

TFT14_Item_Strategist_LoseMore.name: Lose More
TFT14_Item_Strategist_LoseMore.desc: Bet that you'll lose 3 or more of the next 5 combats.

TFT14_Augment_BoomBotsCirclet.name: BoomBot Circlet
TFT14_Augment_BoomBotsCirclet.desc: Gain a BoomBot Emblem and a Fiddlesticks.

TFT14_Augment_ExecutionerCrown.name: Executioner Crown
TFT14_Augment_ExecutionerCrown.desc: Gain an Executioner Emblem, a Guardbreaker, and a Graves.

TFT14_Augment_BastionCrown.name: Bastion Crown

TFT14_Augment_Bruiser_Vertical_HR.desc: Whenever a Bruiser dies, it permanently gains @HealthBonus@ Health.Gain a Darius and Alistar.

TFT14_Augment_GragasCarry.name: The Chug Bug
TFT14_Augment_GragasCarry.desc: Gain @TOOLTIPNumberOfCopies@ Gragas. Your strongest Gragas's attacks have a chance to knockback and deal bonus magic damage. His ability heals and empowers his next attack.

TFT14_Augment_ExotechCrown.name: Exotech Crown
TFT14_Augment_ExotechCrown.desc: Gain an Exotech Emblem, a Guinsoo's Rageblade, and a Naafiri.

TFT14_Augment_Nitro_SpareParts.name: Spare Parts
TFT14_Augment_Nitro_SpareParts.desc: Get a Nitro Hex Turret that has @SharePercent*100@% of your total Chrome. Gain a Shyvana.

TFT14_Augment_ExecutionerCirclet.name: Executioner Circlet
TFT14_Augment_ExecutionerCirclet.desc: Gain an Executioner Emblem, a Vex, and a Sparring Gloves.

TFT14_Augment_AnimaSquadCrown.name: Anima Squad Crown
TFT14_Augment_AnimaSquadCrown.desc: Gain an Anima Squad Emblem, an Adaptive Helm, and an Illaoi.

TFT14_Augment_MarksmanCirclet.name: Marksman Circlet
TFT14_Augment_MarksmanCirclet.desc: Gain a Marskman Emblem, an Aphelios, and a Recurve Bow.

TFT14_Augment_Suits_CorporateCashOut.name: Hostile Takeover
TFT14_Augment_Suits_CorporateCashOut.desc: Cypher gains @CombatMultiplier*100@% of its combat bonus now. Gain @KillMultiplier*100@% Intel from kills, but only @LossMultiplier*100@% from losses. Gain a Draven.

TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketBlueBattery.name: Blue Battery III
TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketBlueBattery.desc: Gain a Blue Buff. Your units gain @BonusAP@ Ability Power. After casting their Ability, gain @ManaRestore@ Mana.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_VoltageConduit.name: Voltage Conduit
TFT16_Item_Piltover_VoltageConduit.desc: Reduce the max Mana of Piltover units by @ManaReduction*100@%.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_MicroRockets.name: Micro-Rockets
TFT16_Item_Piltover_MicroRockets.desc: Fire a barrage of missiles that repeats @DamageRepeat*100@% of the damage dealt by Piltover units this combat as magic damage.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_KineticBarrier.name: Kinetic Barrier
TFT16_Item_Piltover_KineticBarrier.desc: Piltover units gain @HigherResist@ Armor and @LowerResist@ Magic Resist. If they've taken more magic damage than physical, they gain the opposite.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_Upgrade.name: Upgrade!
TFT16_Item_Piltover_Upgrade.desc: Upgrade a random item on your strongest Piltover unit to Radiant. They also gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and @MaxHealth@ max Health.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_MagnetronCoil.name: Magnetron Coil
TFT16_Item_Piltover_MagnetronCoil.desc: Piltover units gain @BaseDamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp, increased by @DamageAmpPerCast*100@% for each cast from any Piltover unit this combat before this Module triggered.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_GigantificationRay.name: Gigantification Ray
TFT16_Item_Piltover_GigantificationRay.desc: Piltover units gain @MaxHealthGain*100@% max Health and become much larger.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_MomentumDrive.name: Momentum Drive
TFT16_Item_Piltover_MomentumDrive.desc: Cleanse all allied crowd control effects. Your team gains @Tenacity*100@% Tenacity.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_BlastShield.name: Blast Shield
TFT16_Item_Piltover_BlastShield.desc: All allies gain a @PercentHealthShield*100@% max Health Shield.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_90CaliberNets.name: 90 Caliber Nets
TFT16_Item_Piltover_90CaliberNets.desc: Stun the @NumEnemies@ enemies who have dealt the most damage for @Duration@ seconds.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_ContinuumCogs.name: Continuum Cogs
TFT16_Item_Piltover_ContinuumCogs.desc: All allies gain @ManaGen@ Mana Regen and @AbilityPower@ Ability Power.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_TunedOscillator.name: Tuned Oscillator
TFT16_Item_Piltover_TunedOscillator.desc: Increase your team's Healing and Shielding by @HealingShielding*100@%.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_EMP.name: E.M.P.
TFT16_Item_Piltover_EMP.desc: Increase the Mana cost of all enemies' next cast by @ManaCostIncrease@.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_ElectricalOverload.name: Electrical Overload
TFT16_Item_Piltover_ElectricalOverload.desc: Deal @FlatDamage@ + @MaxHealthRatio*100@% max Health as true damage to all enemies.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_UnstableCore.name: Unstable Core
TFT16_Item_Piltover_UnstableCore.desc: If Piltover units have cast at least @CastBreakpoint@ times this combat, deal @SuccessMaxHealthDamage*100@% max Health true damage to all enemies. Otherwise, deal @FailureMaxHealthDamage*100@%.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_ArmorNullifier.name: Armor Nullifier
TFT16_Item_Piltover_ArmorNullifier.desc: Piltover units deal @BaseDamageAmp*100@% more damage, increased to @TankDamageAmp*100@% against Tanks.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_SuperiorLifeform.name: Superior Lifeform
TFT16_Item_Piltover_SuperiorLifeform.desc: Summon a robot copy of your @NumUnitsToCopy@ strongest Piltover units. They have @PercentHealthOfOriginal*100@% of the original's Health and deal @DamageOutput*100@% as much damage.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_MiningDrill.name: Mining Drill
TFT16_Item_Piltover_MiningDrill.desc: Gain @RollsPerCastBreakpoint@ Gold or @RollsPerCastBreakpoint@ Boot, randomly. (Repeats for every Piltover cast!)

TFT16_Item_Piltover_EchoEngine.name: Echo Engine
TFT16_Item_Piltover_EchoEngine.desc: For the rest of combat, repeat the effects of your other Modules every @RepeatSeconds@ seconds.

TFT16_Item_Piltover_AccelerationGate.name: Acceleration Gate
TFT16_Item_Piltover_AccelerationGate.desc: After casting, Piltover units restore @ManaRefill*100@% of their max Mana over @RefillDuration@ seconds.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_DeadmansDagger.name: Dead Man's Dagger
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_DeadmansDagger.desc: Attacks and Abilities execute enemies below @ExecuteThreshold*100@% Health. On kill, gain @BonusADPerKill*100@% Attack Damage and @BonusAPPerKill@% Ability Power.Recommended holder: Graves

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_LuckyEyepatch.name: Lucky Doubloon
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_LuckyEyepatch.desc: On takedown, generate an additional @BonusSerpents@ %i:scaleSerpents%. (Earned: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_LuckyDoubloon_SerpentsEarned@)Recommended holder: Gangplank

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_BilgeratCutlass.name: Cutthroat's Cutlass
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_BilgeratCutlass.desc: Damaging enemies causes them to Bleed, dealing an additional @BleedDamagePercent*100@% damage over 4 seconds.Recommended holder: Gangplank

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_BlackmarketExplosi.name: Blackmarket Explosives
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_BlackmarketExplosi.desc: Every @Interval@ seconds, deal @BaseDamage@ + @DamageStored*100@% of damage dealt within the last @Interval@ seconds as magic damage to current target and @NumTargets@ nearest enemies.Recommended holder: Fizz

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ArmorMRTier2.name: +@BonusArmorMR@ Armor & Magic Resist
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ArmorMRTier2.desc: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusArmorMR@ Armor and @BonusArmorMR@ Magic Resist.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ArmorMRTier3.name: +@BonusArmorMR@ Armor & Magic Resist
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ArmorMRTier3.desc: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusArmorMR@ Armor and @BonusArmorMR@ Magic Resist.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ArmorMRTier1.name: +@BonusArmorMR@ Armor & Magic Resist
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ArmorMRTier1.desc: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusArmorMR@ Armor and @BonusArmorMR@ Magic Resist.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_FirstFreeADAP.name: First One's Free!
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_FirstFreeADAP.desc: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and Ability Power.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADAPTier2.name: +@BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage & Ability Power
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADAPTier2.desc: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and @BonusAP@% Ability Power.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADAPTier3.name: +@BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage & Ability Power
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADAPTier3.desc: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and @BonusAP@% Ability Power.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADAPTier1.name: +@BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage & Ability Power
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADAPTier1.desc: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and @BonusAP@% Ability Power.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_FirstFreeArmorMR.name: First One's Free!
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_FirstFreeArmorMR.desc: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusArmorMR@ Armor and @BonusArmorMR@ Magic Resist.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADTier3.name: +@BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADTier3.desc: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and Ability Power.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADTier2.name: +@BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADTier2.desc: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and Ability Power.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADTier1.name: +@BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ADTier1.desc: Bilgewater champions gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and Ability Power.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ShopRefresh.name: Black Market Restock
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_ShopRefresh.desc: Replace all items in the Black Market!

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_BrigandsDice.name: Brigand's Dice
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_BrigandsDice.desc: Immediately re-roll your shop and fill it with Bilgeater champions.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_PileOCitrus.name: Pile O' Citrus
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_PileOCitrus.desc: Every @HealthRegenInterval@ seconds, heal @HealingPercent@% max Health and shed all negative effects. After @SerpentTimer@ seconds, gain @BonusSerpents@ %i:scaleSerpents%.Recommended holder: Illaoi

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_FirstMatesFlintloc.name: First Mate's Flintlock
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_FirstMatesFlintloc.desc: Every second during combat, gain @ADPerStack*100@% Attack Damage and @ASPerStack*100@% Attack Speed.Recommended holder: Miss Fortune

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_TheList.name: Treasure Typhoon
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_TheList.desc: Summon a tidal wave that brings valuable treasures from the deep.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_HauntedSpyglass.name: Haunted Spyglass
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_HauntedSpyglass.desc: NYIOnce per fight, after 3 takedowns, summon the ghost of the Dreadway, dealing 650% (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage in a 3-hex radius.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_FreebootersFrock.name: Barknuckles
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_FreebootersFrock.desc: While above @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, double the Armor and Magic Resist bonuses from this item.Every @Timer@ seconds, deal magic damage equal to @ResistPercent*100@% of current total Armor and Magic Resist to the @NumEnemies@ nearest enemies.Recommended holder: Nautilus

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_JollyRoger.name: Captain's Hat
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_JollyRoger.desc: NYI The bearer becomes the Captain! Grant allies (a really cool effect) while the bearer is alive.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_DreadwayCannon.name: Dreadway Cannon
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_DreadwayCannon.desc: NYIEvery 4 seconds, launch cannonballs at the bearer's target, dealing damage equal to 50% of the damage they took over the last 4 seconds.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_CaptainsBrew.name: Captain's Brew
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_CaptainsBrew.desc: Attacks and Abilities Burn and Chill enemies for @DebuffDuration@ seconds.Recommended holder: Twisted Fate

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_TreasureTyphoon.name: Treasure Typhoon
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_TreasureTyphoon.desc: Summon a tidal wave that brings valuable treasures from the deep.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_BWLesserDuplicator.name: Bilgewater Lesser Champion Duplicator
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_BWLesserDuplicator.desc: Use on a 3-cost Bilgewater champion or less to create a 1-star copy on your bench.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_MyronsDark.name: Treasure Typhoon
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_MyronsDark.desc: Summon a tidal wave that brings valuable treasures from the deep.

TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_SyrensBroadside.name: Syren's Broadside
TFT16_Item_Bilgewater_SyrensBroadside.desc: At combat start, call in a cannon barrage dealing massive damage to all enemies.

TFT16_Consumable_GwensScissors.name: Gwen's Scissors
TFT16_Consumable_GwensScissors.desc: Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT16_Consumable_GwensScissors_2.name: Gwen's Scissors <rules>(2 uses left!)</rules>
TFT16_Consumable_GwensScissors_2.desc: Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT16_Consumable_GwensScissors_3.name: Gwen's Scissors <rules>(3 uses left!)</rules>
TFT16_Consumable_GwensScissors_3.desc: Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT16_Consumable_GwensScissors_4.name: Gwen's Scissors <rules>(4 uses left!)</rules>
TFT16_Consumable_GwensScissors_4.desc: Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT16_Consumable_GwensScissors_5.name: Gwen's Scissors <rules>(5 uses left!)</rules>
TFT16_Consumable_GwensScissors_5.desc: Use on a champion to remove all their items and break them down into components.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_BlastRadius.name: Blast Radius
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_BlastRadius.desc: Secondary blast radius is increased by @IncreasedRadius@ hex, dealing @DamageReductionPerHex*100@% less for each additional hex.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_VoidCoefficien.name: Void Coefficient
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_VoidCoefficien.desc: Each cast reduces Mana Cost by @PercentManaReductionPerCast*100@% (to a minimum of 10)

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_AimAssistant.name: Aim-Assistant
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_AimAssistant.desc: Deal @BonusDamagePerHex*100@% bonus damage per hex distance from the target.

TFT17_GravesTrait_FrameDefense.name: Reinforced Frame
TFT17_GravesTrait_FrameDefense.desc: !!DO NOT PICK - NOT YET IMPLEMENTED!!1 Range, Attack TankSpecialized in absorbing damage and protecting allies.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_Meltthrough.name: Meltthrough
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_Meltthrough.desc: Every second, reduce the Armor of enemies within 2-hexes by @ArmorMRReduction@, doubled for adjacent enemies.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_Buckshot3.name: Buckshot++
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_Buckshot3.desc: Increase the number of Attack projectiles by @NumBonusProjectiles@. Spread increased by @SpreadIncrease*100@%.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_Buckshot2.name: Buckshot+
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_Buckshot2.desc: Increase the number of Attack projectiles by @NumBonusProjectiles@. Spread increased by @SpreadIncrease*100@%.

TFT17_GravesTrait_FrameSupport.name: Support Frame
TFT17_GravesTrait_FrameSupport.desc: !!DO NOT PICK - NOT YET IMPLEMENTED!!4 Range, Hybrid CasterSpecialized in debilitating enemies and empowering allies.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_GravBooster.name: Grav Booster
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_GravBooster.desc: On takedown, dash to the next target and attack @BonusMultAS*100@% faster for @NumAttacks@ attacks.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_FragmentationR.name: Fragmentation Rounds+
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_FragmentationR.desc: Attacks send @FragmentProjectiles@ fragments to nearby enemies on hit that deal @FragmentDamage*100@% damage.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_ReactiveArmor.name: Reactive Armor
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_ReactiveArmor.desc: Taking damage from enemies grants @ReactiveArmorAndMR@ bonus Armor and Magic Resistances, up to @MaxReactiveArmorAndMR@.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_Shockwave.name: Shockwave
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_Shockwave.desc: Combat Start: Unleash a shockwave forward that deals @ShockwavePercentMaxHealthDamage*100@% of Graves' max Health as magic damage and stun enemies hit for @ShockwaveStunDuration@ seconds.

TFT17_GravesTrait_FrameOffense.name: Assault Frame
TFT17_GravesTrait_FrameOffense.desc: 4 Range, Attack MarksmanSpecialized in dealing damage to foes.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_Buckshot.name: Buckshot
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_Buckshot.desc: Increase the number of Attack projectiles by @NumBonusProjectiles@. Spread increased by @SpreadIncrease*100@%.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_EmergencyShiel.name: Emergency Shielding
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_EmergencyShiel.desc: At @TriggerHealth*100@% Health, gain a @PercentMaxHealthShield*100@% max Health shield that decays over @Duration@ seconds.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_RevUp2.name: Rev-Up+
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_RevUp2.desc: Gain @AttackSpeedPerAttack*100@% Attack Speed for each attack against the same target, up to @MaxAttackSpeed*100@%.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_EmergencyShiel.name: Emergency Shielding+
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_EmergencyShiel.desc: At @TriggerHealth*100@% Health, gain a @PercentMaxHealthShield*100@% max Health shield that decays over @Duration@ seconds.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_RipperBullets.name: Ripper Bullets
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_RipperBullets.desc: Attacks reduce enemy Armor and Magic Resistance by @ArmorMRReduction@.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_RipperBullets2.name: Ripper Bullets+
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_RipperBullets2.desc: Attacks reduce enemy Armor and Magic Resistance by @ArmorMRReduction@.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_CloseQuarters.name: Assault Frame
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_CloseQuarters.desc: Become an Attack Fighter with @Range@ Range. Gain @BaseHealth@ Base Health, @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp, and @AttackDamage*100@% Attack Damage.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_APRounds.name: AP Rounds
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_APRounds.desc: Attacks and Abilities ignore @ArmorPen*100@% of enemy Armor

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_RevUp.name: Rev-Up
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_RevUp.desc: Gain @AttackSpeedPerAttack*100@% Attack Speed for each attack against the same target, up to @MaxAttackSpeed*100@%.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_HeavyPlating.name: Heavy Plating
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_HeavyPlating.desc: Gain @BaseHealth@ Base Health, @BonusAR@ Armor, and @BonusMR@ Magic Resistance.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_FragmentationR.name: Fragmentation Rounds
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_FragmentationR.desc: Attacks send @FragmentProjectiles@ fragments to nearby enemies on hit that deal @FragmentDamage*100@% damage.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_GravBooster2.name: Grav Booster+
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_GravBooster2.desc: On takedown, dash to the next target and attack @BonusMultAS*100@% faster for @NumAttacks@ attacks.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_LatentExplosio.name: Latent Explosion
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_LatentExplosio.desc: Store @LatentExplosionStoredDamage*100@% of damage dealt to enemies. On takedown, enemies release the stored damage as physical damage in a two-hex radius.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_SharpshooterMo.name: Power Frame
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_SharpshooterMo.desc: Gain Precision and increase Ability damage by @AbilityDamagePercentIncrease*100@%.{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_LaserBallistic.name: Laser Ballistics
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_LaserBallistic.desc: Attacks travel an additional hex and pierce enemies, reducing damage by @DamageReductionPerTarget*100@% per target pierced.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_LaserBallistic.name: LaserBallistics++
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_LaserBallistic.desc: Attacks travel an additional @BonusHexes@ hexes and pierce enemies, reducing damage by @DamageReductionPerTarget*100@% per target pierced.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_LaserBallistic.name: Laser Ballistics+
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_LaserBallistic.desc: Attacks travel an additional @BonusHexes@ hexes and pierce enemies, reducing damage by @DamageReductionPerTarget*100@% per target pierced.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_BlastRadius2.name: Blast Radius+
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_BlastRadius2.desc: Secondary blast radius is increased by @IncreasedRadius@ hexes, dealing @DamageReductionPerHex*100@% less for each additional hex.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_BlastRadius3.name: Blast Radius++
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_BlastRadius3.desc: Secondary blast radius is increased by @IncreasedRadius@ hexes, dealing @DamageReductionPerHex*100@% less for each additional hex.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_SympatheticDet.name: Sympathetic Detonation
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_SympatheticDet.desc: A second one-hex radius explosion occurs on the nearest enemy, dealing @SympatheticDamageReduction*100@% damage.

TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_APRounds2.name: AP Rounds+
TFT17_GravesTrait_Offense_APRounds2.desc: Attacks and Abilities ignore @ArmorPen*100@% of enemy Armor

TFTTutorial_Augment_WithItemAS2.desc: Your champions holding an item gain @AttackSpeed*100@ Attack Speed.

TFTTutorial_Augment_AtkDmg.desc: Your team gains @Health@ Health, @AttackDamage@% Attack Damage, @AbilityPower@% Ability Power, @Armor@ Armor, @MR@ Magic Resist, @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed, and @Mana@ Mana.

TFTTutorial_Augment_AtkSpeed.desc: Your team gains @Health@ Health, @AttackDamage@% Attack Damage, @AbilityPower@% Ability Power, @Armor@ Armor, @MR@ Magic Resist, @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed, and @Mana@ Mana.

TFTTutorial_Augment_WithItemHealth2.desc: Your champions holding an item gain @Health@ Health.

TFTTutorial_Augment_MR.desc: Your team gains @Health@ Health, @AttackDamage@% Attack Damage, @AbilityPower@% Ability Power, @Armor@ Armor, @MR@ Magic Resist, @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed, and @Mana@ Mana.

TFTTutorial_Augment_Health.name: Tons of Stats!
TFTTutorial_Augment_Health.desc: Your team gains @Health@ Health, @AttackDamage@% Attack Damage, @AbilityPower@% Ability Power, @Armor@ Armor, @MR@ Magic Resist, @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed, and @Mana@ Mana.

TFTTutorial_Augment_FrontRowMana1.name: Splash Zone
TFTTutorial_Augment_FrontRowMana1.desc: Combat start: Your champions in the front 2 rows gain @Mana@ Mana.

TFT15_Item_EdgelordEmblemItem.name: Edgelord Emblem

When they die, they join your side with @PrismaticZombieHealth@ Health that decays over @PrismaticZombieDecayDuration@ seconds.Recommended users: Silco and Renata Glasc

TFT13_Crime_Bronze_ChemGrips.name: Salvaged Contraption

After casting, launch @NumMissiles@ missiles at the current target that deal @FlatDamage@ magic damage.Perfected Bonus: Casts also launch a wave of toxins that deals @PrismaticWaveDamage@ magic damage.Recommended users: Silco and Renata Glasc

TFT13_Crime_Silver_DestabilizedChemtank.name: Destabilized Chemtank

TFT13_Crime_Consumable_PerfectedShimmer.name: Perfected Shimmer
TFT13_Crime_Consumable_PerfectedShimmer.desc: Use on a Chem-Baron to restore @PlayerHeal@ player health.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT13_Crime_Bronze_MiningGauntlet.name: Salvaged Gauntlet

TFT13_Crime_Prismatic_ShimmerBloom.name: Perfected Shimmer Bloom
TFT13_Crime_Prismatic_ShimmerBloom.desc: Increase healing and shielding by @IncreasedHealShieldPercent*100@%. Every @Cadence@ seconds, gain @ShieldAmount@ Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and grant the same Shield to the @NumAllies@ lowest Health allies.Perfected Bonus: Shielding or healing allies grants them @PrismaticAllyAP@ Ability Power and @PrismaticAllyAS*100@% Attack Speed. (Cooldown: @PrismaticCooldownTime@s)Recommended users: Renni and Renata Glasc

TFT13_Crime_Gold_VirulentVirus.name: Virulent Virus II

While below @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, double the Omnivamp.

TFT_Item_Shroud.desc: Combat start: Shoot a beam that @CostIncrease@% Mana Reaves enemies.Your team gains @BonusAllyHealth@ Health.[Support item] [Unique - only 1 per champion]Mana Reave: increase maximum Mana until the next cast@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_BindOnEquipTRA@

TFT_Consumable_ShadowTransformer.name: Shadow Transformer
TFT_Consumable_ShadowTransformer.desc: Turns all items on a champion into shadow items when used.[CONSUMABLE - This item disappears when used.]This Item cannot transform Force of Nature, which is above corruption.

TFT14_AnimaSquad_T3_Laser.name: The Annihilator
TFT14_AnimaSquad_T3_Laser.desc: At @DelayTime@ seconds, The Annihilator deals percent max Health true damage once.

TFT14_AnimaSquad_Weapon_GatlingBunnyGuns.name: Gatling Bunny-Guns
TFT14_AnimaSquad_Weapon_GatlingBunnyGuns.desc: Every @CastPeriod@ seconds, a random Anima Squad champion fires Gatling Bunny-Guns in a long cone, dealing high physical damage.

TFT14_AnimaSquad_T3_YasuoQ.name: Tornadoes
TFT14_AnimaSquad_T3_YasuoQ.desc: Every @CastPeriod@ seconds, a random Anima Squad champion spawns a whirl of Tornadoes, dealing magic damage.

TFT14_AnimaSquad_T1_SearingShortbow.name: Searing Shortbow
TFT14_AnimaSquad_T1_SearingShortbow.desc: Every @CastPeriod@ seconds, a random Anima Squad champion fires Searing Shortbow, shooting an arrow that leaves an area that deals magic damage over time.

TFT14_AnimaSquad_Weapon_VortexGlove.name: Vortex Glove
TFT14_AnimaSquad_Weapon_VortexGlove.desc: Every @CastPeriod@ seconds, a random Anima Squad champion fires piercing orbs from Vortex Glove, that deal magic damage, reduced for each enemy struck.

TFT14_AnimaSquad_T1_Mines.name: Ani-Mines
TFT14_AnimaSquad_T1_Mines.desc: Every @CastPeriod@ seconds, a random Anima Squad champion throws three Ani-Mines that explode, dealing physical damage in an area.

TFT14_AnimaSquad_Weapon_UwUBlasters.name: UwU Blasters
TFT14_AnimaSquad_Weapon_UwUBlasters.desc: Every @CastPeriod@ seconds, a random Anima Squad champion rapidfires UwU Blasters, dealing physical damage to the first enemy hit.

TFT14_AnimaSquad_T1_Magic.name: Guiding Hex
TFT14_AnimaSquad_T1_Magic.desc: Every @CastPeriod@ seconds, a random Anima Squad champion casts Guiding Hex, dealing magic damage to 3 random nearby targets.

TFT14_AnimaSquad_Weapon_Boomerang.name: Blade-o-rang
TFT14_AnimaSquad_Weapon_Boomerang.desc: Every @CastPeriod@ seconds, a random Anima Squad champion throws a returning Blade-o-rang that deals physical damage, increased for the first target hit.

TFT14_AnimaSquad_T3_Train.name: Final City Transit
TFT14_AnimaSquad_T3_Train.desc: Every few seconds, Final City Transit summons trains that run through the battlefield, dealing devastating damage and carrying away low health enemies.

TFT14_AnimaSquad_Weapon_SupplyDrop.name: Surprise Supply Drop
TFT14_AnimaSquad_Weapon_SupplyDrop.desc: Every @Period@ seconds, Supply Drop calls in a support ship that drops powerful goodies onto the battlefield.

TFT14_JhinCyberneticItem_Radiant.name: Pulse Silencer
TFT14_JhinCyberneticItem_Radiant.desc: Execute enemies below @ExecuteThresholdPercent*100@% Health. Abilities can critically strike. Gain @RedundantCritDamage*100@% Critical Strike Damage.Total Executions This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_JhinItem_TotalExecutions@Recommended users: Jhin and Zeri

TFT14_MordekaiserCyberneticItem.name: Corrupted Chassis
TFT14_MordekaiserCyberneticItem.desc: All Shields are @ShieldEffectivenessPercent*100@% more effective on the holder. Every @SiphonFrequency@ seconds, siphon @HealthSiphonAmt*100@% of the owner's max Health from the current target and convert it to a Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.Shielding This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_MordekaiserItem_TotalShielding@Recommended users: Mordekaiser, Jax, and Sejuani

TFT14_VarusCyberneticItem.name: Holobow
TFT14_VarusCyberneticItem.desc: Attacks that Critically Strike grant @BonusManaOnHit@ bonus Mana. After casting an Ability, gain @CritChanceOnCast@% Critical Strike Chance for @Duration@ seconds. Recommended users: Varus, Jhin, and Zeri

TFT14_SejuaniCyberneticItem.name: Cybercoil
TFT14_SejuaniCyberneticItem.desc: Abilities and Attacks mark enemies for @MarkDuration@ seconds. Heal for @HealingPercent*100@% of damage dealt to marked enemies.Total Healing This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_SejuaniItem_TotalHealing@Recommended users: Sejuani, Jax, and Mordekaiser

TFT14_VarusCyberneticItem_Radiant.name: Scoped Holobow
TFT14_VarusCyberneticItem_Radiant.desc: Attacks that Critically Strike grant @BonusManaOnHit@ bonus Mana. After casting an Ability, gain @CritChanceOnCast@% Critical Strike Chance for @Duration@ seconds. Recommended users: Varus, Jhin, and Zeri

TFT14_NaafiriCyberneticItem_Radiant.name: Apex-Fangs
TFT14_NaafiriCyberneticItem_Radiant.desc: When you damage an enemy, deal @StoredDamage*100@% of the damage to the nearest enemy as physical damage after a brief delay.Total Shockwave Damage This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_NaafiriItem_TotalShockwaveDamage@Recommended users: Naafiri, Jhin, and Varus

TFT14_JhinCyberneticItem.name: Pulse Stabilizer
TFT14_JhinCyberneticItem.desc: Execute enemies below @ExecuteThresholdPercent*100@% Health. Abilities can critically strike. If the holder's abilities can already critically strike, gain @RedundantCritDamage*100@% Critical Strike Damage instead.Total Executions This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_JhinItem_TotalExecutions@Recommended users: Jhin and Zeri

TFT14_ZeriCyberneticItem.name: Flux Capacitor
TFT14_ZeriCyberneticItem.desc: Attacks store charge. At @ChargeCap@ charges, the next attack consumes the charges to deal @ShockDamage*100@% of the target's max health as physical damage and reduces their Armor by @FlatArmorReduction@.Total Charge Damage This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_ZeriItem_TotalLightningDamage@Recommended users: Zeri and Naafiri

TFT14_JaxCyberneticItem.name: Repulsor Lantern
TFT14_JaxCyberneticItem.desc: Gain @BonusPercentHP*100@% health. Every @Interval@ seconds, deal @PercHealthDamage*100@% of the holder's max health as magic damage to all enemies within @Radius@-hex.Total Damage Dealt This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_JaxItem_TotalDamageReflected@Recommended users: Jax, Mordekaiser, and Sejuani

TFT14_SejuaniCyberneticItem_Radiant.name: Hijacked Cybercoil
TFT14_SejuaniCyberneticItem_Radiant.desc: Abilities and Attacks mark enemies for @MarkDuration@ seconds. Heal for @HealingPercent*100@% of damage dealt to marked enemies.Total Healing This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_SejuaniItem_TotalHealing@Recommended users: Sejuani, Jax, and Mordekaiser

TFT14_ZeriCyberneticItem_Radiant.name: Fully-Charged Flux Capacitor
TFT14_ZeriCyberneticItem_Radiant.desc: Every other attack is charged, dealing @ShockDamage*100@% of the target's max health as physical damage and reduces their Armor by @FlatArmorReduction@.Total Charge Damage This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_ZeriItem_TotalLightningDamage@Recommended users: Zeri and Naafiri

TFT14_JaxCyberneticItem_Radiant.name: Nullifier Lantern
TFT14_JaxCyberneticItem_Radiant.desc: Gain @BonusPercentHP*100@% health. Every @Interval@ seconds, deal @PercHealthDamage*100@% of the holder's max health as magic damage to all enemies within @Radius@-hex.Total Damage Dealt This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_JaxItem_TotalDamageReflected@Recommended users: Jax, Mordekaiser, and Sejuani

TFT14_MordekaiserCyberneticItem_Radiant.name: Harmonized Chassis
TFT14_MordekaiserCyberneticItem_Radiant.desc: All Shields are @ShieldEffectivenessPercent*100@% more effective on the holder. Every second, siphon @HealthSiphonAmt*100@% of the owner's max Health from the nearest @NumEnemies@ enemies and convert it to a Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.Shielding This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_MordekaiserItem_TotalShielding@Recommended users: Mordekaiser, Jax, and Sejuani

TFT14_NaafiriCyberneticItem.name: Hyper Fangs
TFT14_NaafiriCyberneticItem.desc: When you damage an enemy, store @StoredDamage*100@% of your damage dealt to them. After @MarkDuration@ seconds, deal the stored damage to the target and the nearest enemy as physical damage.Total Shockwave Damage This Round: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT14_Trait_Cybernetic_NaafiriItem_TotalShockwaveDamage@Recommended users: Naafiri, Jhin, and Varus

TFT12_Item_Arcana_Signifier.name: Arcana Signifier
TFT12_Item_Arcana_Signifier.desc: Use this on an Arcana champion to change Arcana's effect to theirs. Ahri: Gain Ability Power for each 3-star champion.Hecarim: Units holding items gain Damage Reduction and Attack Damage.Tahm Kench: Gain Health for each active trait.Xerath: Abilities deal bonus true damage for each Charm purchased.Emblem: Gain Damage Amp for each Spatula item equipped.

TFT12_Item_Faerie_QueensCrownRadiant.name: Eternal Monarch's Crown
TFT12_Item_Faerie_QueensCrownRadiant.desc: After dealing damage @MaxNumStacks@ times, gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT12_Faerie_DamageAmp@% %i:scaleDA% for the rest of combat.After dealing damage @RadiantMaxStacks@ times, gain @RadiantMaxHealth*100@% maximum Health, @RadiantOmnivamp*100@% Omnivamp, and @RadiantDamageAmp*100@% damage amp.Only Faeries can hold this item.Bench the champion to remove it.

TFT12_Item_Faerie_QueensCrown.name: Faerie Queen's Crown
TFT12_Item_Faerie_QueensCrown.desc: After dealing damage @MaxNumStacks@ times, gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT12_Faerie_DamageAmp@% %i:scaleDA% for the rest of combat.Only Faeries can hold this item.Bench the champion to remove it.

TFT12_Item_MilioThreeStar_CursedQuicksil.name: Cursed Quicksilver
TFT12_Item_MilioThreeStar_CursedQuicksil.desc: The holder of this item is stunned. This effect ends when they die.

TFT12_Item_Bound_LightSnack.name: A Light Snack
TFT12_Item_Bound_LightSnack.desc: Use this on a Briar to grant her @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT12_BoundHealthGain@ %i:scaleHealth% in exchange for @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT12_BoundHealthCost@ of your player health.In Choncc's Treasure, this item is improved at Stage 3-1 and 4-1.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT12_Item_MilioThreeStar_CursedGuinsoos.name: Cursed Guinsoo's Rageblade
TFT12_Item_MilioThreeStar_CursedGuinsoos.desc: The holder of this item sets their attack speed cap to @ASCap@ and cannot gain mana or cast. Every time they are attacked, the attacker gains @BonusAttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT12_Item_MilioThreeStar_CursedHextechG.name: Cursed Hextech Gunblade
TFT12_Item_MilioThreeStar_CursedHextechG.desc: The holder deals @NegativeDamageAmp*100@% less damage. They also take @DamageRatio*100@% of their max health as true damage per second, and heal Milio for the same amount.

TFT12_Item_Faerie_Armor.name: Queenguard's Armor
TFT12_Item_Faerie_Armor.desc: Gain @HealShieldPower*100@% increased healing and shielding. Heal for @QueenHealRatio*100@% of the Queen's damage dealt. Only Faeries can hold this item.Bench the champion to remove it.

TFT12_Item_Faerie_ArmorRadiant.name: Armor of Eternal Devotion
TFT12_Item_Faerie_ArmorRadiant.desc: Gain @HealShieldPower*100@% increased healing and shielding. Heal for @QueenHealRatio*100@% of the Queen's damage dealt.Only Faeries can hold this item.Bench the champion to remove it.

TFT15_HiddenTech_FlameAffinity.name: Flame Affinity
TFT15_HiddenTech_FlameAffinity.desc: Wounded allies gain @WoundDamageAmp*100@% %i:scaleDA%.Wound: Reduce healing received by 50%

TFT15_HiddenTech_DormantProphecy.name: Dormant Prophecy
TFT15_HiddenTech_DormantProphecy.desc: Combat Start: If the holder is 3 star, they star up.

TFT15_HiddenTech_FireStorm.name: Fire Storm
TFT15_HiddenTech_FireStorm.desc: Combat Start: Wound all enemies for @Duration@ seconds.Wound: Reduce healing received by 50%

TFT15_HiddenTech_LimitBreak.name: Limit Break
TFT15_HiddenTech_LimitBreak.desc: Gain @AbilityPower@ Ability Power & @AttackDamage@% Attack Damage. Triple it when below @HealthThreshold@% Health.

TFT15_HiddenTech_ShatterSweep.name: Shatter Sweep
TFT15_HiddenTech_ShatterSweep.desc: Allies that start combat in the back @NumRow@ rows @ArmorReduction*100@% Sunder enemies for @Duration@ seconds when dealing physical damage.Sunder: Reduce Armor

TFT15_HiddenTech_UnyieldingCovenant.name: Unyielding Covenant
TFT15_HiddenTech_UnyieldingCovenant.desc: This champion is Untargetable while at least @NumAlliesAlive@ allies are alive (does not include the holder).

TFT15_HiddenTech_ArcaneRend.name: Arcane Rend
TFT15_HiddenTech_ArcaneRend.desc: Allies that start combat in the back @NumRow@ rows @MRReduction*100@% Shred enemies for @Duration@ seconds when dealing magic damage.Shred: Reduce Magic Resist

TFT15_HiddenTech_Test1.name: Use your Power Snax on a champion to unlock Power Ups.
TFT15_HiddenTech_Test1.desc: Use your Power Snax on a champion to unlock Power Ups.

TFT15_HiddenTech_FusionHex.name: Fusion Hex
TFT15_HiddenTech_FusionHex.desc: Combat Start: Merge with the nearest ally gaining @StatPercent*100@% of their Health, Attack Damage, Ability Power.

TFT15_HiddenTech_ShieldMelt.name: Shield Melt
TFT15_HiddenTech_ShieldMelt.desc: Combat Start: Your team deals @BonusDamage@% bonus damage to shielded enemies.

TFT15_HiddenTech_AffinityForCold.name: Cold Affinity
TFT15_HiddenTech_AffinityForCold.desc: Combat Start: Chill all enemies in the back 2 rowsChill: Reduce healing received by 20%

TFT15_HiddenTech_TrainingWeights.name: Training Weights
TFT15_HiddenTech_TrainingWeights.desc: This champion receives a penalty for @NumRounds@ rounds losing -@DamagePenalty*100@% %i:scaleDA% and -@DurabilityPenalty*100@% %i:scaleDR% and capping their Attack Speed to @ASCapPenality@.After @NumRounds@ rounds, remove the penalty and instead gain @ASReward*100@% %i:scaleAS% and @DamageReward*100@% %i:scaleDA%.Rounds are tracked per Champion.

TFT15_HiddenTech_KiBarrier.name: Ki Barrier
TFT15_HiddenTech_KiBarrier.desc: The holder takes @FlatReducedDamage@ less damage from all sources.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitMascotActivator.name: Mascot
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitMascotActivator.desc: Your team heals a percentage of their max Health every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:Seconds@ seconds.When a champion dies, they retreat to the sidelines to cheer on your team. Your team's healing increases for each cheering champion. (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:BaseHealthRegen@% %i:scaleHealth% base, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.1:HealthRegenPerMascot@% %i:scaleHealth% per cheering champion (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.2:BaseHealthRegen@% %i:scaleHealth% base, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mascot.2:HealthRegenPerMascot@% %i:scaleHealth% per cheering champion

TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver7_Support.name: Tome of Mending
TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver7_Support.desc: Every @Duration@ seconds, revive the strongest ally that hasn't been revived yet at @HPPercent*100@% of their maximum Health.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitDragonlordActivat.name: Dragonlord
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitDragonlordActivat.desc: After @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:FirstDelay@ seconds of combat, the Dragon strikes the board, dealing true damage and stunning all enemies. Allies gain Attack Speed for the rest of combat.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:TrueDamageHPRatio*100@% %i:scaleHealth% damage, Stuns for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:StunDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.1:AttackSpeedBuff*100@% %i:scaleAS%.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:TrueDamageHPRatio*100@% %i:scaleHealth% damage, Stuns for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:StunDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:AttackSpeedBuff*100@% %i:scaleAS%.After an additional @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Dragonlord.2:SecondDelay@ seconds, the Dragon strikes again.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitSocialiteActivato.name: Socialite
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitSocialiteActivato.desc: Gain a spotlight hex.Combat start: the unit standing in the spotlight gains bonus stats.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.1:DamagePercent*100@% %i:scaleDA% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.1:ManaPerSecond@ %i:scaleMana% per second.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:DamagePercent*100@% %i:scaleDA%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:ManaPerSecond@ %i:scaleMana% per second, and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Socialite.2:OmnivampPercent*100@% %i:scaleSV%. Gain another spotlight hex.

TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver7_AP.name: Tome of Power
TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver7_AP.desc: Kayle deals @DamageAmpPercent*100@% more damage. When she casts, she fires two waves.

TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver7_AS.name: Tome of Swiftness
TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver7_AS.desc: Kayle deals @DamageAmpPercent*100@% more damage. Her attacks now hit in a @HexRadius@-hex radius around the target

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitMountainActivator.name: Mountain
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitMountainActivator.desc: Gain 2 Mountain hexes in the front row.Combat start: units standing on a Mountain hex gain a Shield and permanent bonus Health.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.1:ShieldValue@ Shield, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.1:PermBonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%. (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.2:ShieldValue@ Shield, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Mountain.2:PermBonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%. The entire front row becomes Mountain hexes.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitShimmerscaleActiv.name: Shimmerscale
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitShimmerscaleActiv.desc: Gain Shimmerscale items. These items give gold as well as combat power.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.1:MinUnits@)Gain Goldmancers Staff. At Stage @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.1:SecondItemStage@-@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.1:SecondItemRound@ gain Draven's Axe.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shimmerscale.2:MinUnits@)Gain Crown of Champions.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitConquerorActivato.name: Conqueror
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitConquerorActivato.desc: Your team's takedowns grant stacks of Conquest. After gaining enough Conquest, open War Chests full of loot!Your team gains Attack Damage and Ability Power, increased by @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror:PercentIncreasePerChest*100@% for each War Chest opened.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.1:ADAPBase*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%; @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.1:StacksPerKill@x Conquest(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.2:ADAPBase*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%; @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror.2:StacksPerKill@x ConquestWar Chests Opened: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror_ChestsCompleted@Current Stats: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Conqueror_CurrentADAP@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitPunkActivator.name: Punk
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitPunkActivator.desc: Your team gain bonus Health, Attack Damage and Ability Power, which increases by 1% every time you spend gold on a Shop reroll.After each combat, gain a 1 gold reroll for that round. Your first reroll each round grants @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk:FIRST_ROLL_BONUS@% bonus instead!(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.1:MinUnits@ )@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.1:BONUS_HEALTH@ %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.1:BONUS_AD_AP*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.2:MinUnits@ )@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.2:BONUS_HEALTH@ %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Punk.2:BONUS_AD_AP*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%Current Bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Punk_CurrentBonus@%@TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Punk_CurrentHealthBonus@ %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_Punk_CurrentADBonus@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitStoryweaverActiva.name: Storyweaver
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitStoryweaverActiva.desc: Summon a Hero named Kayle and evolve her as you level up!(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver.1:MinUnits@) When you reach level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:FirstArmoryLevel@, Kayle upgrades to 2-star. Pick a supportive effect.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver.2:MinUnits@) Kayle evolves again at levels @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:SecondArmoryLevel@, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:ThirdArmoryLevel@ and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:FourStarUpgradeLevel@:Level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:SecondArmoryLevel@: Pick a combat effect. Level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:ThirdArmoryLevel@: Kayle upgrades to 3-star. Pick a combat effect.Level @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver:FourStarUpgradeLevel@: Kayle upgrades to 4-star.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitGlacialActivator.name: Glacial
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitGlacialActivator.desc: Gain a Glacial Mallet. Attacks from champions holding a mallet have a @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:ProcPercent*100@% chance to stun their target for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:StunDuration@ second and deal bonus magic damage. (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:BonusDamage@ magic damage.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.2:BonusDamage@ magic damage. Gain another Glacial Mallet.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitMechPilotActivato.name: Mech-Pilot
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitMechPilotActivato.desc: Use the Pilot Selector to choose a Pilot. Combat start: the Pilot jumps into a Mech.The Mech has the Traits and items of its Pilot, and gains a percent of the pilot's Attack Damage and max Health. When the Mech dies, the Pilot(s) are ejected with @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.1:EjectedPilotHealthPercent@% of their max Health.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.1:MinUnits@) Mini-Mech: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.1:MechCombinedADRatio*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleHealth% (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.2:MinUnits@) Super-Mech: @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_MechPilot.2:MechCombinedADRatio*100@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleHealth%. The 2 nearest units to the Pilot also jump into the Mech.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitPyroActivator.name: Pyro
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitPyroActivator.desc: Your team gains @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro:BaseASPct@% %i:scaleAS% Attack Speed.For each kill, your team creates an infernal cinder that you collect the next round. For every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro:NumCinders@ cinders you collect, your team gains @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro:ASPctPerNumCinders@% more %i:scaleAS%.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.1:NumCindersPerKill@ infernal cinder per enemy.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.2:NumCindersPerKill@ infernal cinders per enemy and execute enemies under @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Pyro.2:ExecutePct@% Health.Cinders collected: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_PyroCindersCollected@Team %i:scaleAS%: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_PyroAttackSpeed@%

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitJazzActivator.name: Jazz
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitJazzActivator.desc: For each active trait, your team gains bonus Health and Damage Amp.(Excludes unique and Anniversary Traits)(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.1:BonusHealth*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.1:BonusDamage*100@% %i:scaleDA%(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.2:BonusHealth*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Jazz.2:BonusDamage*100@% %i:scaleDA%Bonus Health: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_Jazz_TraitTracker_CurrentBonus@%Bonus Damage Amp: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_Jazz_TraitTracker_CurrentBonus_Damage@%

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitRebelActivator.name: Rebel
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitRebelActivator.desc: Your team gains a Shield and Damage Amp for each adjacent ally.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:ShieldAmount@ Shield for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:ShieldDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.1:DamageAmp@% %i:scaleDA%(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:ShieldAmount@ Shield for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:ShieldDuration@ seconds, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Rebel.2:DamageAmp@% %i:scaleDA%

TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver3_AP.name: Talisman of Might
TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver3_AP.desc: Grant Kayle and adjacent allies in the same row @APAmt@ Ability Power at the start of combat.

TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver3_AS.name: Talisman of Speed
TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver3_AS.desc: Grant Kayle and adjacent allies in the same row @ASAmt*100@% Attack Speed at the start of combat.

TFTEvent5YR_Consumable_MechPilot_PilotMa.name: Pilot Selector
TFTEvent5YR_Consumable_MechPilot_PilotMa.desc: Use this on a champion to make it the Pilot of the Mech. [Cannot be used on champions in combat.] [Unlimited uses]

TFTEvent5YR_Item_SevikasJinxedArm.name: Sevika's Jinxed Arm
TFTEvent5YR_Item_SevikasJinxedArm.desc: At the times shown in the High Roller trait, roll a random Jinx mod:- Rocket: Launch @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_NumRockets@ rockets at random enemies, dealing@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:Spell1RocketADScalar*100@% Attack Damage + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:Spell1RocketAPScalar*100@% Ability Power physical damage per rocket.- Shield: Gain a @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_ShieldFlatAmount@ + @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_ShieldMaxHPPercentage@% max Health Shield for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:Spell2ShieldDuration@ seconds.- Gold: Gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_GoldAmount@ gold.

TFTEvent5YR_Item_ShimmerscaleGoldmancers.name: Goldmancer's Staff
TFTEvent5YR_Item_ShimmerscaleGoldmancers.desc: Grant %i:scaleAP% @AbilityPowerPerGold@ Ability Power per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AbilityPowerGoldMax@ gold) and a @OnKillProcChance*100@% chance to drop %i:goldCoins% @OnKillProcGold@ gold on enemy kill.Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitElderwoodActivato.name: Elderwood
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitElderwoodActivato.desc: Every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:TickRate@ seconds your team grows, gaining bonus stats. This effect stacks up to @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:MaxStacks@ times.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:BonusResists@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.1:BonusADSP@ %i:scaleAP%%i:scaleAD%(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.2:BonusResists@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Elderwood.2:BonusADSP@ %i:scaleAP%%i:scaleAD%

TFTEvent5YR_Item_GlacialMallet.name: Glacial Mallet
TFTEvent5YR_Item_GlacialMallet.desc: Attacks have a @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Glacial_StunChance@% chance to stun enemies for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Glacial.1:StunDuration@ second and deal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Glacial_BonusDamage@ bonus magic damage.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitBossActivator.name: The Boss
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitBossActivator.desc: Gain Boss Knuckles. When the holder first drops below @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:HealthThreshold*100@% Health, they become The Boss and leave combat to start doing sit-ups. Each sit-up restores maximum Health and grants Attack Speed. (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:HealPercent*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.1:AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:HealPercent*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%. If they reach full Health they return to combat Pumped Up: all of their attacks and abilities deal @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Boss.2:TrueDamagePercentage*100@% of damage as true damage.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitYordleActivator.name: Yordle
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitYordleActivator.desc: After each player combat, a random 1, 2 or 3 cost champion that usually fits your team is added to your bench for free.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Yordle.1:MinUnits@) Gain champions!(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Yordle.2:MinUnits@) If you have @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Yordle.2:NumOfThreeStarsNeeded@ or more 3 star champions, you instead gain a Yordle-Lord.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitPhantomActivator.name: Phantom
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitPhantomActivator.desc: Combat start: random enemies have their Health reduced.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.1:MinUnits@) Set @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.1:NumUnitsToReduce@ enemy's Health to @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.1:PercentHealth*100@% maximum Health.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.2:MinUnits@) Set @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.2:NumUnitsToReduce@ enemies' Health to @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Phantom.2:FlatHealth@.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitHellionActivator.name: Hellion
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitHellionActivator.desc: When an allied champion dies, a Doppelhellion (a one less star copy) equipped with a Red Buff will leap from the Hellion portal and join the fight!(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.1:MinUnits@) The first @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.1:NumOfUnits@ champions(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.2:MinUnits@) The first @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Hellion.2:NumOfUnits@ champions

TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver5_AS.name: Scroll of Haste
TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver5_AS.desc: Attacks grant Kayle @ASAmt*100@% stacking Attack Speed.

TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver5_AP.name: Scroll of Force
TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver5_AP.desc: Kayle's Ability hits a wider area and deals @APAmt*100@% more damage.

TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver3_Support.name: Talisman of Aid
TFTEvent5YR_Storyweaver3_Support.desc: Kayle's damaging attacks and abilities @ResistPercent*100@% Shred and Sunder enemies hit for @Duration@ seconds.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitBilgewaterActivat.name: Bilgewater
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitBilgewaterActivat.desc: Your team's attacks and Abilities mark enemies. The mark stores a percentage of damage dealt to the enemy.Marked enemies are struck by a cannonball after @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:BarrageInterval@ seconds, dealing the stored damage plus a flat value as physical damage.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:Damage@ + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.1:DamagePercent@% damage dealt(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:Damage@ + @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:DamagePercent@% damage dealt. Every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Bilgewater.2:ShotsUntilTreasure@th cannonball is replaced with a treasure chest that drops gold!

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitPreserverActivato.name: Preserver
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitPreserverActivato.desc: Your team heals for a percent of their Max Health every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:Duration@ seconds. If they are full Health, restore Mana instead. (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:HealthPct*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, or @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.1:ManaPct*100@% %i:scaleMana%. (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.2:HealthPct*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Preserver.2:ManaPct*100@% %i:scaleMana%. Always get both.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitHighRollerActivat.name: High Roller
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitHighRollerActivat.desc: Gain a Sevika's Jinxed Arm!Combat start: roll a random Jinx mod. Roll another one:(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:MinUnits@) after @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:RollingFrequency@ seconds.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.2:MinUnits@) every @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.2:RollingFrequency@ seconds. Mods are stronger, and the holder can now hit a Jinxed Jackpot!Mods:- Rocket: Launch rockets at random enemies. - Shield: Gain a shield for @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller.1:Spell2ShieldDuration@ seconds.- Coin: Gain gold.Rockets Fired: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_RocketsFired@Shields Gained: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_ShieldsGained@Gold Gained: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_GoldGained@Jackpots Hit: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFTEvent5YR_HighRoller_JackpotsHit@

TFTEvent5YR_Item_BossKnuckles.name: Boss Knuckles
TFTEvent5YR_Item_BossKnuckles.desc: Once per combat at 60% Health, become The Boss and leave combat to start doing sit-ups. Each sit-up restores @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Boss_HealPercent@% max Health and grants @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFTEvent5YR_Boss_AttackSpeedPercent@% Attack Speed. If all allies die, The Boss will immediately return to combat.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitTrainerActivator.name: Trainer
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitTrainerActivator.desc: After combat, the 3 champions closest to Nomsy feed her 1 Snax per star level, adding Health and Ability Power. Nomsy's star level increases every 25 Snax!(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Trainer.1:MinUnits@) Summon Nomsy!(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Trainer.2:MinUnits@) Nomsy's Ability deals @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Trainer.2:DamageInc*100@% bonus damage

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitShurimaActivator.name: Shurima
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitShurimaActivator.desc: Combat start: select champions Ascend and gain @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:BonusHealthPercent*100@% maximum Health %i:scaleHealth% and @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:BonusASPercent*100@% Attack Speed %i:scaleAS%.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:MinUnits@) The strongest champion Ascends after @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.1:SecondsToAscend@ seconds. (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.2:MinUnits@) The @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Shurima.2:NumUnitsToAscend@ strongest champions Ascend immediately.

TFTEvent5YR_Item_TrainerSnax.name: Delicious Snax
TFTEvent5YR_Item_TrainerSnax.desc: Nomsy needs to eat this many more Snax to level up![This does not count as an item.]

TFTEvent5YR_Item_ShimmerscaleDravensAxe.name: Draven's Axe
TFTEvent5YR_Item_ShimmerscaleDravensAxe.desc: Gain %i:scaleAD% @AttackDamagePerGold@% Attack Damage per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AttackDamageGoldLimit@ gold).Attacks grant @StacksPerAttack@ stack, up to @CashoutStacks@ times. At full stacks, grant %i:goldCoins% @CashoutGold@ gold.[Unique - only 1 per champion]Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitImperialActivator.name: Imperial
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitImperialActivator.desc: Combat start: select champions gain @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.1:DamageAmp*100@% %i:scaleDA%.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.1:NumOfUnits@ random champions.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Imperial.2:NumOfUnits@ random champions.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitCovenActivator.name: Coven
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitCovenActivator.desc: The unit nearest to the center of your team is chosen as the Coven Leader, gaining bonus Ability Power.Whenever your team casts an Ability, the Coven Leader gains Mana.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.1:AbilityPower@ %i:scaleAP%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.1:ManaToGive@ %i:scaleMana% (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.2:AbilityPower@ %i:scaleAP%, @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_Coven.2:ManaToGive@ %i:scaleMana%

TFTEvent5YR_Item_ShimmerscaleCrownOfCham.name: Crown Of Champions
TFTEvent5YR_Item_ShimmerscaleCrownOfCham.desc: Every @SecondsForEmpoweredAttack@ seconds, the next attack deals @AttackGoldMultiplier@x the amount of %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank in true damage.[Unique - only 1 per champion]This does no damage if you have 0 gold.

TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitLaserCorpsActivat.name: LaserCorps
TFTEvent_5YR_Item_TraitLaserCorpsActivat.desc: Your team gains laser drones. When a unit attacks or is hit by an attack, their drone deals magic damage to the target (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.1:ICD@ second cooldown). Drones are reassigned to another ally on death.(@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.1:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.1:MagicDamage@ magic damage. (@TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.2:MinUnits@) @TFTTrait.TFTEvent5YR_LaserCorps.2:MagicDamage@ magic damage. All units gain an additional drone.

TFTEvent_SF_Item_PowerUp_Rank4.name: Soul Crown
TFTEvent_SF_Item_PowerUp_Rank4.desc: Prevents the holder's first death. When they revive after 2 seconds, they shed all negative effects and gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Event_SF_SoulCrownHealthRestore@ Health (double your Soul Power).Contribute +1 to the last listed Trait. (Unique traits excluded.) [Cannot be used on champions in combat.] [Unlimited uses.]

TFTEvent_SF_Item_PowerUp_Rank1.name: Imperfect Soul Crown
TFTEvent_SF_Item_PowerUp_Rank1.desc: Contribute +1 to the last listed Trait. (Unique traits excluded.)A new effect unlocks at the start of the tournament (4-1). [Cannot be used on champions in combat.] [Unlimited uses.]

TFTEventCT_Item_HextechSniper.name: Hextech Sniper Rifle
TFTEventCT_Item_HextechSniper.desc: Combat start: Fire a sniper shot that instantly executes enemies.

TFTEventCT_Encounter_ChoiceItem_Recombob.name: Recombobulate your board. Gain a reforger.

TFT7_Item_DarkflightEssence.name: Darkflight Essence
TFT7_Item_DarkflightEssence.desc: When the holder dies, grant this item's stats to each Darkflight champion.[Aquired from copying a non-Craftable item or emblem via the Darkflight Trait].

TFT7_Item_TrainerSnax.name: Delicious Snax
TFT7_Item_TrainerSnax.desc: Nomsy needs to eat this many more Snax to level up![This does not count as an item.]

TFT7_Consumable_Dragonmancer_DragonBless.name: Dragon Blessing
TFT7_Consumable_Dragonmancer_DragonBless.desc: Use on a Dragonmancer to make them your Dragonmancer Hero.[Cannot be used during combat.]

TFT7_Item_ZekesHerald.name: Darkflight Zeke's Herald
TFT7_Item_ZekesHerald.desc: Combat start: Grant %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed to the holder and allies within 2 hexes in the same row.​​This item's effect applies after Darkflight champions receive their items.

TFT_Item_Redemption.name: Spirit Visage
TFT_Item_Redemption.desc: Regenerate @MissingHealthHeal*100@% of missing Health each second.

TFT_Item_BansheesVeil.name: Banshee's Veil
TFT_Item_BansheesVeil.desc: Combat start: Grant the holder and allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row immunity to crowd control and @BuffAttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for @Duration@ seconds.[Support item] [Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT17_Consumable_BlessingWealth.name: Blessing: Wealth
TFT17_Consumable_BlessingWealth.desc: Permanently grant a champion @ADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power, and a @GoldChance@% chance to generate @Gold@ gold on takedown.

TFT17_Consumable_BlessingProsperityPlus.name: Blessing: Prosperity +
TFT17_Consumable_BlessingProsperityPlus.desc: Permanently grant a champion @BaseHealth@ Health, which increases by @InterestHealth@ Health for each interest you earn.

TFT17_Consumable_BlessingProsperity.name: Blessing: Prosperity
TFT17_Consumable_BlessingProsperity.desc: Permanently grant a champion @BaseHealth@ Health, which increases by @InterestHealth@ Health for each interest you earn.

TFT9_Item_OrnnDuskbladeOfDraktharr.name: Choncc's Prowler's Claw
TFT9_Item_OrnnDuskbladeOfDraktharr.desc: Combat Start: Leap to the enemy backline. Damage from an Ability can critically strike.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT_Item_Artifact_ShadowPuppet.name: Shadow Puppet
TFT_Item_Artifact_ShadowPuppet.desc: Spawn a clone that copies the holder's items. The clone has @ClonePercentHealth*100@% max Health and deals @ClonePercentDamage*100@% damage.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT16_Item_BrawlerEmblemItem.name: Bruiser Emblem
TFT16_Item_BrawlerEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Bruiser trait. Every second, deal @HealthRatio*100@% of the holder's max Health as magic damage in a @HexRadius@-hex radius.

TFT16_Item_InvokerEmblemItem.name: Invoker Emblem
TFT16_Item_InvokerEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Invoker trait. On cast, gain Ability Power equal to @APPercent*100@% of Mana spent.

TFT16_Item_SlayerEmblemItem.name: Slayer Emblem
TFT16_Item_SlayerEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Slayer trait. Upon dropping below @HealthThreshold*100@% max Health, Gain @ManaGain@ Mana and a @ShieldPercent*100@% max Health Shield.

TFT16_Item_VanquisherEmblemItem.name: Vanquisher Emblem
TFT16_Item_VanquisherEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Vanquisher trait and a @ChanceForGold@% chance to drop @GoldAmount@ gold on critical strikes.Cooldown: @ICD@ secondsGold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

TFT16_Item_LongshotEmblemItem.name: Longshot Emblem
TFT16_Item_LongshotEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Longshot trait and +@RangeIncrease@ Attack Range.

TFT16_Item_RapidfireEmblemItem.name: Quickstriker Emblem
TFT16_Item_RapidfireEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Quickstriker trait. On takedown, dash to the nearest target and heal for @HealPercent*100@% maximum Health.

TFT16_Item_MagusEmblemItem.name: Disruptor Emblem
TFT16_Item_MagusEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Disruptor trait. Abilities deal @DOTPercent*100@% bonus magic damage over @Duration@ seconds.

TFT16_Item_YordleEmblemItem.name: Yordle Emblem
TFT16_Item_YordleEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Yordle trait.

TFT16_Item_GunslingerEmblemItem.name: Gunslinger Emblem
TFT16_Item_GunslingerEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Gunslinger trait.Dealing physical damage to an enemy reduces their Armor by @ArmorPerDamage@.

TFT16_Item_VoidEmblemItem.name: Void Emblem
TFT16_Item_VoidEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Void trait.

TFT16_Item_PiltoverEmblemItem.name: Piltover Emblem
TFT16_Item_PiltoverEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Piltover trait.

TFT16_Item_JuggernautEmblemItem.name: Juggernaut Emblem
TFT16_Item_JuggernautEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Juggernaut trait and @PercentHealth*100@% of other Juggernaut's max Health when they die.

TFT16_Item_BilgewaterEmblemItem.name: Bilgewater Emblem
TFT16_Item_BilgewaterEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Bilgewater trait.

TFT16_Item_FreljordEmblemItem.name: Freljord Emblem
TFT16_Item_FreljordEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Freljord trait.

TFT16_Item_WardenEmblemItem.name: Warden Emblem
TFT16_Item_WardenEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Warden trait. When a Shield on the holder breaks, heal them for @HealPercent*100@% of the Shield's initial value.

TFT16_Item_SorcererEmblemItem.name: Arcanist Emblem
TFT16_Item_SorcererEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Arcanist trait. On kill, refund @ManaRefundRatio*100@% of the holder's max Mana.

TFT16_Item_NoxusEmblemItem.name: Noxus Emblem
TFT16_Item_NoxusEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Noxus trait.

TFT16_Item_ZaunEmblemItem.name: Zaun Emblem
TFT16_Item_ZaunEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Zaun trait.

TFT16_Item_IxtalEmblemItem.name: Ixtal Emblem
TFT16_Item_IxtalEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Ixtal trait.

TFT16_Item_IoniaEmblemItem.name: Ionia Emblem
TFT16_Item_IoniaEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Ionia trait.

TFT16_Item_DemaciaEmblemItem.name: Demacia Emblem
TFT16_Item_DemaciaEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Demacia trait.

TFT16_Item_DefenderEmblemItem.name: Defender Emblem
TFT16_Item_DefenderEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Defender trait. Combat Start: Gain @ResistGain*100@% more Armor OR Magic Resist from all sources, depending on whichever is higher.

TFT15_Item_DragonFistFighterStance.name: Duelist Stance
TFT15_Item_DragonFistFighterStance.desc: Passive: On attack, deal @ModifiedPassiveCloneDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to a nearby enemy.Active: Strike swiftly, sending @ModifiedNumClones@ (%i:scaleAS%) afterimages to the nearest @NumEnemies@ enemies. Each deals @ModifiedCloneDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage and reduces armor by @ModifiedArmorShred@ (%i:scaleAP%).

TFT15_Item_DragonFistTankStance.name: Juggernaut Stance
TFT15_Item_DragonFistTankStance.desc: Briefly gain @WindowedDR*100@% Durability, then deal @ModifiedInitialDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage to the target, @ModifiedFinalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to all enemies behind the target, and @ModifiedAllEnemiesDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to other enemies in a 2-hex radius.

TFT15_Item_DragonFistReaperStance.name: Executioner Stance
TFT15_Item_DragonFistReaperStance.desc: Deal @ModifiedStrikeDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage to the lowest Health enemy within @HexRange@ hexes and Stun them for @StunDuration@ seconds. Other enemies in a 1-hex radius take @ModifiedAOEDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage. After @NumKills@ kills with this ability all enemies instantly take @ModifiedShockwaveDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage and are Stunned for @KillStunDuration@ seconds.

TFT14_Item_CloseGarenArmory.name: Close Armory
TFT14_Item_CloseGarenArmory.desc: Closes the Armory. Will reopen next round with new traits.

TFT_Consumable_RecommendedArmoryRadiant.name: Radiant Lucky Item Chest
TFT_Consumable_RecommendedArmoryRadiant.desc: Use on a champion to open an armory of Radiant items especially suited for them.These items are based on the champion's recommended items.

TFT16_Consumable_Void_PredatorInstincts.name: Predator Instincts
TFT16_Consumable_Void_PredatorInstincts.desc: Gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_PredatorADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power. Every @ShedRefresh@ seconds, cleanse crowd control effects and become untargetable for @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_PredatorUntargetableDuration@ second(s).Recommended users: Rek'Sai and Bel'Veth

TFT16_Consumable_Void_AdrenalineModules.name: Adrenaline Modules
TFT16_Consumable_Void_AdrenalineModules.desc: Gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_AdrenalineModulesDamageAmp@% Damage Amp, increased by @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_AdrenalineModulesDamageAmpPerTick@% after every @AttackNumBreakpoint@ attacks.Recommended users: Bel'Veth and Kai'sa

TFT16_Consumable_Void_IronCarapace.name: Iron Carapace
TFT16_Consumable_Void_IronCarapace.desc: Gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_IronCarapaceHealth@ max Health. Gain Armor and Magic Resist equal to @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_IronCarapaceArmorMR@% of max Health.Recommended users: Cho'Gath and Rift Herald

TFT16_Consumable_Void_SpitterSpines.name: Spitter Spines
TFT16_Consumable_Void_SpitterSpines.desc: After dealing @DamageRequirement@ damage, fire spikes at the @NumTargets@ nearest enemies that deal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_SpitterSpinesDamage@ physical damage.Recommended users: Rek'Sai, Malzahar, and Kai'sa

TFT16_Consumable_Void_RoyalHusk.name: Royal Husk
TFT16_Consumable_Void_RoyalHusk.desc: Gain @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_RoyalHuskHealth@ + @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_RoyalHuskPercentHealth*100@% Health. After dropping below @FirstHealthThreshold*100@% max Health, spawn a Voidling with @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_RoyalHuskSummonMaxHealth@% of this unit's max Health.Recommended users: Cho'Gath and Rift Herald

TFT16_Consumable_Void_LeechingNucleus.name: Leeching Nucleus
TFT16_Consumable_Void_LeechingNucleus.desc: Heal the lowest Health ally for @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_LeechingHealPercent@% of damage dealt. After damaging an enemy, steal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT16_Void_LeechingADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power from them, up to @MaxADAPSteal@ stacks from all sources.Recommended users: Kog'Maw, Malzahar, and Kai'sa

TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleGamblersBlade_Radi.name: Radiant Gambler's Blade
TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleGamblersBlade_Radi.desc: Grant %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeedPerGold*100@% bonus Attack Speed per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AttackSpeedGoldLimit@ gold). Each attack has a @ChanceToProc*100@% chance to drop %i:goldCoins% @GoldPerProc@ gold.Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleGoldmancersStaff_R.name: Radiant Goldmancer's Staff
TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleGoldmancersStaff_R.desc: Grant %i:scaleAP% @AbilityPowerPerGold@ Ability Power per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AbilityPowerGoldMax@ gold) and a @OnKillProcChance*100@% chance to drop %i:goldCoins% @OnKillProcGold@ gold on enemy kill.Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleDeterminedInvestor.name: Radiant Determined Investor
TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleDeterminedInvestor.desc: After dying during combat @StackLimit@ times, this item is destroyed. Upon destruction, grant the item Radiant Diamond Hands, 1 Champion Duplicator, and %i:goldCoins% @GoldGranted@ gold.

TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleCrownOfChampions_R.name: Radiant Crown of Champions
TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleCrownOfChampions_R.desc: Every @SecondsForEmpoweredAttack@ seconds, the next attack deals @AttackGoldMultiplier@x the amount of %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank in true damage.

TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleDravensAxe_Radiant.name: Radiant Draven's Axe
TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleDravensAxe_Radiant.desc: Gain %i:scaleAD% @AttackDamagePerGold@% Attack Damage per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @AttackDamageGoldLimit@ gold).Attacks grant @StacksPerAttack@ stack, up to @CashoutStacks@ times. At full stacks, grant %i:goldCoins% @CashoutGold@ gold and @CashoutComponents@ item component(s).Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleHighStakes_Radiant.name: Radiant Orb of Greed
TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleHighStakes_Radiant.desc: Risky! Summon the Golden Dragon Bank. Losing combat stores gold in the bank based on your loss streak. Win to convert it into loot and gold.Gold generated by Shimmerscale items gets stored in the Golden Dragon Bank with a @BonusGoldRatio*100@% conversion rate.The equipped unit has a @GoldChance@% chance to grant @PointsPerKill@ gold on takedowns.

TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleMogulsMail_Radiant.name: Radiant Mogul's Mail
TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleMogulsMail_Radiant.desc: Grants @BaseResistsPerStack@ Armor, @BaseResistsPerStack@ Magic Resist, and @BaseHealthPerStack@ Health when taking damage, stacking up to @StackCap@ times.At full stacks, grant %i:goldCoins% @GoldAtFullStacks@ gold.Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleDiamondHands_Radia.name: Radiant Diamond Hands
TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleDiamondHands_Radia.desc: Once per combat: At @HPThreshold1*100@% Health and @HPThreshold2*100@% Health, become invulnerable for @BaseDamageImmunityTime@ second and grant %i:goldCoins% @GoldPerImmunityProc@ gold.

TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleHeartOfGold_Radian.name: Radiant Needlessly Big Gem
TFT7_Item_ShimmerscaleHeartOfGold_Radian.desc: If the holder is alive after @ProcTimeInSeconds@ seconds, your team deals @BonusDamagePerGold*100@% more damage per %i:goldCoins% gold in your bank (up to %i:goldCoins% @GoldLimit@ gold). For every @UnitsPerGold@ units alive when this happens, gain @GoldAmount@ gold.Gold generated this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

TFT_Item_DebugFirstHit.name: Ace
TFT_Item_DebugFirstHit.desc: Cause this unit to deal @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_UnitProperty_Debug@% damage on their next attack.

TFT_Item_Artifact_LichBane.name: Lich Bane
TFT_Item_Artifact_LichBane.desc: The holder's first attack after each Ability cast deals @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_Artifact_LichBane_Damage@ bonus magic damage.Damage increases based on Stage.

TFT_Item_PowerGauntlet.name: Striker's Flail
TFT_Item_PowerGauntlet.desc: Critical Strikes grant @BuffDamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp for @Duration@ seconds, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times.

TFT_Item_EmptyBag.name: TFT_Item_EmptyBag

TFT_Consumable_TrashToTreasure_Reforger.name: Reforger
TFT_Consumable_TrashToTreasure_Reforger.desc: Unequip all items and randomly transform them into new ones of a similar type and quality.Trash to Treasure: Completed items transform into Artifacts and do not consume the Reforger[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Consumable_LightTransformer.desc: Turns all items on a champion into standard items when used.[CONSUMABLE - This item disappears when used.]This Item cannot transform Force of Darkness, which is beyond redemption.

TFT_Item_SentinelSwarm.name: Sentinel Swarm
