TFT4_Consumable_KaynRed.name: Rhaast's Embrace
TFT4_Consumable_KaynRed.desc: Place on Kayn to force Rhaast to overtake him, permanently improving his Reaping Slash spell to heal him.[KAYN CONSUMABLE - This item disappears when used and DESTROYS Kayn's Liberation][Can only be used during the Planning Phase]

TFT_Item_Artifact_ForbiddenIdol.name: Forbidden Idol
TFT_Item_Artifact_ForbiddenIdol.desc: Shields have @PercentShieldConversion@% of their value converted to max Health instead.

TFT17_Item_ShieldTankEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Vanguard trait. Gain @APGain@% Ability Power whenever an ally gains a shield.

TFT17_Item_AnimaSquadEmblemItem.name: Anima Emblem

TFT17_Item_PulsefireEmblemItem.name: Timebreaker Emblem
TFT17_Item_PulsefireEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Timebreaker trait.

TFT17_Item_AstronautEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Meeple trait and @ManaRegenPerMeep@ additional Mana Regen per %i:set14AmpIcon%.

TFT17_Item_SummonTraitEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Shepherd trait. On cast, grant @ManaSharePercent*100@% of max Mana to the Bond of the Stars.

TFT17_Item_PsyOpsEmblemItem.name: Psionic Emblem
TFT17_Item_PsyOpsEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Psionic trait.

TFT17_Item_HPTankEmblemItem.name: Brawler Emblem
TFT17_Item_HPTankEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Brawler trait. Attacks deals @PercentHPAttack*100@% of the holder's max health as magic damage.

TFT17_Item_AssassinTraitEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Rogue trait. At @HealthThreshold*100@% health, gain @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp and immunity to crowd control for @BuffDuration@ seconds.

TFT17_Item_ASTraitEmblemItem.name: Challenger Emblem
TFT17_Item_ASTraitEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Challenger trait. On takedown, the holder's next @NumAttacks@ attacks each heal for @PercentHealthHeal*100@% of max health.

TFT17_Item_DarkStarEmblemItem.name: Dark Star Emblem
TFT17_Item_DarkStarEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Dark Star trait.

TFT17_Item_StargazerEmblemItem.name: Stargazer Emblem
TFT17_Item_StargazerEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Stargazer trait.

TFT17_Item_MeleeTraitEmblemItem.name: Marauder Emblem
TFT17_Item_MeleeTraitEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Marauder trait and has a @GoldDropChance@% chance to drop @GoldAmount@ gold on kill.Gold dropped this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_GoldGenerated@

TFT17_Item_SpaceGrooveEmblemItem.name: Space Groove Emblem
TFT17_Item_SpaceGrooveEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Space Groove trait. On cast, the holder enters {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDuration@ seconds.Can only occur once every @ICD@ seconds.

TFT17_Item_ResistTankEmblemItem.name: Bastion Emblem
TFT17_Item_ResistTankEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Bastion trait. After the first @Delay@ seconds of combat, the holder gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT17_Item_FlexTraitEmblemItem.name: Voyager Emblem
TFT17_Item_FlexTraitEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Voyager trait. Combat Start: The holder and allies within 1 hex in the same row gain a bonus based on the holder's role.- Tanks: @BonusArmorMR@ Armor and Magic Resist- Fighters/Assassins: @BonusOmnivamp*100@% Omnivamp- Other Roles: @BonusAttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed

TFT17_Item_PrimordianEmblemItem.name: Primordian Emblem
TFT17_Item_PrimordianEmblemItem.desc: The holder gains the Primordian trait.

TFT9_Consumable_EagleEye_MagicResist.name: Eagle's Antimagic
TFT9_Consumable_EagleEye_MagicResist.desc: Your team gains temporary magic resist.

TFT_Consumable_NeekosHelp.name: Champion Duplicator
TFT_Consumable_NeekosHelp.desc: Use on a champion to create a 1-star copy on your bench.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFTTutorial_Item_BlueBuff.name: Blue Buff
TFTTutorial_Item_BlueBuff.desc: Gain @ManaRefund@ Mana after casting. When the holder gets a takedown, they deal @DamageAmp*100@% more damage for @TakedownTimer@ seconds.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFTTutorial_Item_GuinsoosRageblade.name: Guinsoo's Rageblade
TFTTutorial_Item_GuinsoosRageblade.desc: Attacks grant %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeedPerStack@% bonus Attack Speed. This effect stacks.

TFTTutorial_Item_GuardianAngel.name: Guardian Angel
TFTTutorial_Item_GuardianAngel.desc: Prevents the holder's first death, placing them in stasis instead. After @StasisDuration@ seconds, they return with @HealthRestore@ Health and shed all negative effects.[Unique - Only One Per Champion]

TFT_Augment_Changeling_GlamourItemTier4.name: Changing Glamour
TFT_Augment_Changeling_GlamourItemTier4.desc: Use this on the Changeling to transform them into a new champion!Refreshes each round

TFT_Item_Artifact_MirroredPersona.name: Mirrored Persona
TFT_Item_Artifact_MirroredPersona.desc: Every @NumCombats@ player combats gain a lesser copy of Mirrored Persona (@TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT_Item_Artifact_MirroredPersona_Combats@/@NumCombats@). Share @StatSharePercent*100@% of the holder's bonus Attack Damage, Ability Power, Attack Speed, Armor, Magic Resist, and Health with other Mirrored Persona holders.Can't be Reforged, Lesser copies do not produce copies.Unique: one per champion

TFT_Augment_Changeling_GlamourItemTier5.name: Changing Glamour
TFT_Augment_Changeling_GlamourItemTier5.desc: Use this on the Changeling to transform them into a new champion!Refreshes each round

TFT_Augment_Changeling_GlamourItemTier2.name: Changing Glamour
TFT_Augment_Changeling_GlamourItemTier2.desc: Use this on the Changeling to transform them into a new champion!Refreshes each round

TFT_Augment_Changeling_GlamourItemTier3.name: Changing Glamour
TFT_Augment_Changeling_GlamourItemTier3.desc: Use this on the Changeling to transform them into a new champion!Refreshes each round

TFT7_Augment_NasusCarry.name: Soul Eater
TFT7_Augment_NasusCarry.desc: Gain a Nasus. Your strongest Nasus becomes a Fighter. He now slams his staff on enemies, dealing physical damage. If this kills the enemy, Nasus gains permanent Attack Damage.

TFT7_Augment_VladimirCarry.name: Cosmic Hemomancy
TFT7_Augment_VladimirCarry.desc: Gain a Vladimir. Your strongest Vladimir becomes a Caster. He no longer Heals, but gains 2 range and every fourth cast damages enemies in an area around his target. Enemies damaged lose Magic Resist.

TFT15_MechanicTrait_BloodFury_Consumable.name: A Hungry Snack
TFT15_MechanicTrait_BloodFury_Consumable.desc: Consume @HealthToFeed@ player health for Health %i:scaleHealth%, Attack Damage %i:scaleAD% and Ability Power %i:scaleAP%.

TFT_Augment_Changeling_GlamourItemTier1.name: Changing Glamour
TFT_Augment_Changeling_GlamourItemTier1.desc: Use this on the Changeling to transform them into a new champion!Refreshes each round

TFT11_Item_InkshadowOx.name: Tattoo of Vitality
TFT11_Item_InkshadowOx.desc: Attacks heal the holder for @HealthRatio*100@% of their max Health and deal the same amount as bonus magic damage.

TFT11_Item_InkshadowHorse.name: Tattoo of Force
TFT11_Item_InkshadowHorse.desc: Whenever the holder acquires a new target they run quickly to and briefly stun them, dealing @Damage@ magic damage, and double the stats from this item for @BuffDuration@ seconds.

TFT11_Item_InkshadowRat.name: Tattoo of Bombardment
TFT11_Item_InkshadowRat.desc: Every 3rd attack fires bolts at the 2 lowest percent health enemies which deal @ADPercent@% Attack Damage as physical damage.

TFT11_Item_InkshadowPig.name: Tattoo of Protection
TFT11_Item_InkshadowPig.desc: Gain a @HealthShieldRatio*100@% Shield after casting the first time each combat. When it breaks, grant @AllyShieldRatio*100@% of this shield amount to the 2 nearest allies.

TFT11_Item_InkshadowSnake.name: Tattoo of Toxin
TFT11_Item_InkshadowSnake.desc: Damage applies a toxin that deals an additional @DamageRatio*100@% of that damage over @Duration@ seconds and @HealingReductionPct@% Wounds the target.Wound: Reduces healing received

TFT11_Item_InkshadowTiger.name: Tattoo of Fury
TFT11_Item_InkshadowTiger.desc: Deal @BonusRatio*100@% bonus damage to targets below half health. On takedown, gain @AttackSpeedPercent@% attack speed for @Duration@ seconds.

TFT_Item_Artifact_Fishbones.name: Fishbones
TFT_Item_Artifact_Fishbones.desc: The holder's attacks target random enemies.

TFT_Item_GargoyleStoneplate.name: Gargoyle Stoneplate
TFT_Item_GargoyleStoneplate.desc: Gain @ArmorPerEnemy@ Armor and @MRPerEnemy@ Magic Resist for each enemy targeting the holder.

TFT_Item_Artifact_TitanicHydra.name: Titanic Hydra
TFT_Item_Artifact_TitanicHydra.desc: Attacks deal @PercentMaxHealthSplash@% of the holder's max Health plus @PercentAttackDamageSplash@% of their Attack Damage as bonus physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies.

TFT_Item_BrambleVest.name: Bramble Vest
TFT_Item_BrambleVest.desc: Gain @PercentMaxHP*100@% max health.Take @AutoDamageReduction*100@% reduced damage from attacks. When struck by any attack, deal @1StarAoEDamage@ magic damage to all adjacent enemies.Cooldown: @ICD@ seconds

TFT4_Item_OrnnRocketPropelledFist.name: Choncc's Rocket-Propelled Fist
TFT4_Item_OrnnRocketPropelledFist.desc: Combat start: The farthest enemy is pulled into melee range and Stunned for @StunDuration@ seconds. Allies within range will prioritize attacking that enemy.[Unique - only 1 per champion]Stun: cannot move, attack, or cast Abilities

TFT_Item_Artifact_AegisOfDusk.name: Aegis of Dusk
TFT_Item_Artifact_AegisOfDusk.desc: Every @TickRate@ seconds, steal @MRStealPerTick@ Magic Resist from enemies within 1 hex and deal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_Artifact_AegisDuskDawn_Damage@% of the holder's Magic Resist as magic damage.If Aegis of Dawn is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every @TickRateWithAegisOfDawn@ seconds instead.Damage increases based on Stage.

TFT10_Consumable_KaynRed.name: Fury Guitar
TFT10_Consumable_KaynRed.desc: Place on Kayn to unleash his Fury Rapper energy, permanently improving his Reaping Slash Ability to heal him.[KAYN CONSUMABLE - This item disappears when used and DESTROYS the Shadow Mic][Can only be used during the Planning Phase]

TFT_Consumable_PocketRecombobulator.name: Pocket Recombobulator
TFT_Consumable_PocketRecombobulator.desc: Use on a 1 or 2 cost champion to upgrade them to a unit of 1 higher cost.Not for use on living, mechanical, experimental, imaginary, or reanimated creatures . Keep out of reach of Yordles.

TFT_Item_Artifact_UnendingDespair.name: Unending Despair
TFT_Item_Artifact_UnendingDespair.desc: Whenever a Shield on the holder breaks, @PercentDamage@% of that Shield's initial value is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

TFT5_Item_LocketOfTheIronSolariShadow.name: Locket of the Silver Lunari
TFT5_Item_LocketOfTheIronSolariShadow.desc: Combat start: The holder and all allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row gain @BonusDefenses@ bonus Armor and Magic Resist, but gain 5 less Mana per attack.

TFT5_Item_ChaliceOfPowerShadow.name: Chalice of Malice
TFT5_Item_ChaliceOfPowerShadow.desc: Combat start: Grant %i:scaleAP% @BonusAP@ Ability Power to allies within @HexRange@ hex in the same row. The holder loses %i:scaleAP% @APLost@ Ability Power instead of gaining any.

TFT5_Item_ZephyrShadow.name: Turbulent Zephyr
TFT5_Item_ZephyrShadow.desc: Combat start: Summon a whirlwind on the opposite side of the arena that removes the closest enemy from combat for @BanishDuration@ seconds. Once the enemy returns to combat, they gain 30 bonus attack damage and 30 ability power for the rest of combat. [Ignores CC immunity][Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT5_Item_ShroudOfStillnessShadow.name: Dark Shroud of Stillness
TFT5_Item_ShroudOfStillnessShadow.desc: Combat start: Shoot a beam straight ahead and behind that @CostIncrease@% Mana Reaves enemies and other allies.[Unique - only 1 per champion]Mana Reave: increase maximum Mana until the next cast

TFT4_Item_OrnnEternalWinter.name: Eternal Winter
TFT4_Item_OrnnEternalWinter.desc: Enemies who damage the holder are @AttackSpeedSlowPercent@% Chilled for @SlowDuration@ seconds. After @NumApplications@ Chills from this item, the attacker is Stunned instead (Cooldown: @FreezeCooldown@ seconds).[Unique - only 1 per champion]Chill: reduce Attack SpeedStun: cannot move, attack, or cast Abilities

TFT17_Item_Artifact_YasuoArtifact.name: Yasuo's Bladework
TFT17_Item_Artifact_YasuoArtifact.desc: Every @Interval@ seconds, your next attack is a double attack.

TFT9_Item_BaronsHead.name: Baron Nashor's Head
TFT9_Item_BaronsHead.desc: The terror from the Void was no match for the ingenuity, firepower, and weapons of dubious legality from Piltover.

TFT17_Item_MissFortuneUniqueFlexTraitSta.name: Replicator Mode
TFT17_Item_MissFortuneUniqueFlexTraitSta.desc: Miss Fortune gains the Replicator trait.

TFT17_Item_MissFortuneUniqueManaTraitSta.name: Conduit Mode
TFT17_Item_MissFortuneUniqueManaTraitSta.desc: Miss Fortune gains the Conduit trait.

TFT17_Item_MissFortuneUniqueASTraitStanc.name: Challenger Mode
TFT17_Item_MissFortuneUniqueASTraitStanc.desc: Miss Fortune gains the Challenger trait.

TFT8_Item_ArsenalRedGun.name: Onslaught
TFT8_Item_ArsenalRedGun.desc: Aphelios enters an onslaught, slinging chakrams and dealing massive damage to nearby enemies.

TFT8_Item_ArsenalBlueGun.name: Duskwave
TFT8_Item_ArsenalBlueGun.desc: Aphelios unleashes a wave of energy in a cone in his target's direction, locking onto and dealing damage to all enemies hit.

TFT8_Item_ArsenalPurpleGun.name: Binding Eclipse
TFT8_Item_ArsenalPurpleGun.desc: Aphelios casts forth a lunar spotlight towards the largest group of units, stunning all enemies hit and dealing damage to them.

TFT_Item_MadredsBloodrazor.name: Giant Slayer
TFT_Item_MadredsBloodrazor.desc: Gain @DamageAmp*100@% additional Damage Amp against Tanks.

TFT3_Item_BlademasterEmblem.name: Blademaster Emblem
TFT3_Item_BlademasterEmblem.desc: The holder gains the Blademaster trait.

TFT3_Item_StarGuardianEmblem.name: Star Guardian Emblem
TFT3_Item_StarGuardianEmblem.desc: The holder gains the Star Guardian trait.

TFT3_Item_BattlecastEmblem.name: Battlecast Emblem
TFT3_Item_BattlecastEmblem.desc: The holder gains the Battlecast trait.

TFT3_Item_InfiltratorEmblem.name: Infiltrator Emblem
TFT3_Item_InfiltratorEmblem.desc: The holder gains the Infiltrator trait.

TFT3_Item_CelestialEmblem.name: Celestial Emblem
TFT3_Item_CelestialEmblem.desc: The holder gains the Celestial trait.

TFT3_Item_RebelEmblem.name: Rebel Emblem
TFT3_Item_RebelEmblem.desc: The holder gains the Rebel trait.

TFT3_Item_DarkStarEmblem.name: Dark Star Emblem
TFT3_Item_DarkStarEmblem.desc: The holder gains the Dark Star trait.

TFT3_Item_ProtectorEmblem.name: Protector Emblem
TFT3_Item_ProtectorEmblem.desc: The holder gains the Protector trait.

TFT_Item_Artifact_MendingEchoes.name: Mending Echoes
TFT_Item_Artifact_MendingEchoes.desc: Increase healing on the holder by @IncreasedHealing*100@%. When the holder gives or receives a heal, grant @HealPercentToGrant*100@% of the heals value to the lowest health ally as well.

TFT4_Item_OrnnObsidianCleaver.name: Obsidian Cleaver
TFT4_Item_OrnnObsidianCleaver.desc: Damage dealt @Shred@% Shreds and @Shred@% Sunders enemies for @Duration@ seconds.Your team gains @TeamAD*100@% Attack Damage and @TeamAP@ Ability Power.​​[Support item] [Unique - only 1 per champion]Shred: Reduce Magic ResistSunder: Reduce Armor

TFT_Item_RedBuff.name: Sunfire Cape
TFT_Item_RedBuff.desc: Gain @BonusPercentHP*100@% max Health. Every @ICD@ seconds, deal @BurnPercent@% Burn and @GrievousWoundsPercent@% Wound to an enemy within @HexRange@ hexes for @BurnDuration@ seconds.Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every secondWound: Reduces healing received

TFT_Item_RadiantVirtue.name: Virtue of the Martyr
TFT_Item_RadiantVirtue.desc: Every @HealTickRate@ seconds, heal your team for @MaxHealthHeal@% of their max Health. When the holder dies, the healing increases to @TOOLTIPEmpoweredHeal@% max Health for @NumBonusHeals@ extra heals.Healing: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Tracker_Value1@​​[Support item]

TFT17_Item_Artifact_ThreshLantern.name: Thresh's Lantern
TFT17_Item_Artifact_ThreshLantern.desc: After @Delay@ seconds of combat, pull the leftmost benched unit onto the battlefield. While that unit lives, @DamageShare*100@% of all damage the holder would take is redirected to them.Traits of champions flung onto the board do not become active

TFT13_GoopBuff_VoraciousAppetite_Consuma.name: A Chromatic Snack
TFT13_GoopBuff_VoraciousAppetite_Consuma.desc: Consume @HealthToFeed@ player health for Health %i:scaleHealth% and Damage Amp %i:scaleDA%.

TFT13_Item_SquadStolenItem.name: Confiscated!
TFT13_Item_SquadStolenItem.desc: This dangerous item has been confiscated by the Enforcers. You can have it back after serving your time.

TFT_Item_ThiefsGloves_AcademyCopy1.name: Thief's Gloves
TFT_Item_ThiefsGloves_AcademyCopy1.desc: Each round: Equip 2 random items.[Consumes 3 item slots.]@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_BindOnEquipTRA@

TFT_Item_ThiefsGloves_AcademyCopy2.name: Thief's Gloves
TFT_Item_ThiefsGloves_AcademyCopy2.desc: Each round: Equip 2 random items.[Consumes 3 item slots.]@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_BindOnEquipTRA@

TFT_Consumable_Dissolver.name: Divine Dissolver
TFT_Consumable_Dissolver.desc: Use on a champion to break apart all items into components and unequip them. [Cannot be used on board champions in combat.][Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Item_UnstableConcoction.name: Hand Of Justice
TFT_Item_UnstableConcoction.desc: Gain 2 effects:@AD_NotStatBar*100@% Attack Damage and @AP_NotStatBar@% Ability Power.@StatOmnivamp_NotStatBar*100@% Omnivamp.While above @HealthThreshold*100@% health, double the Attack Damage and Ability Power. While below @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, double the Omnivamp.

TFT_Item_GuardianAngel.name: Edge of Night
TFT_Item_GuardianAngel.desc: At @HealthThreshold@% Health, briefly become untargetable, shed negative effects, and heal @MissingHealthRestore*100@% missing health.

TFT17_Item_Artifact_KayleArtifact.name: Kayle's Exaltation
TFT17_Item_Artifact_KayleArtifact.desc: After @Delay@ seconds of combat, this and all completed items on the holder become Radiant.

TFT_Item_SeraphsEmbrace.name: Blue Buff
TFT_Item_SeraphsEmbrace.desc: Gain @ManaRefund@ Mana after casting. When the holder gets a takedown, they deal @DamageAmp*100@% more damage for @TakedownTimer@ seconds.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT_Item_CrestOfCinders.name: Crest Of Cinders
TFT_Item_CrestOfCinders.desc: Combat start: the holder and allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row gain the Crest of Cinders.Champions holding the Crest of Cinders empower their attacks to Burn their target for @BurnAmount*100@% of their max Health as true damage and apply 33% Wound.[Unique - only one per champion]

TFT_Item_FreeDeathblade.name: Deathblade
TFT_Item_FreeDeathblade.desc: Perfect peace and calm for the holder - and all who face it.@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_TragicalBlade_TRAKey@

TFT_Item_Artifact_CursedBlade.name: Cursed Blade
TFT_Item_Artifact_CursedBlade.desc: Attacks reduce the target's max Health by @MaxHealthPercent@%. @HitCount@ attacks on the same target reduces their star level by 1.

TFT_Item_MacaoMode_HextechSniper.name: Hextech Sniper Rifle
TFT_Item_MacaoMode_HextechSniper.desc: Combat start: Fire a sniper shot that instantly executes enemies.

TFT4_Item_OrnnZhonyasParadox.name: Zhonya's Paradox
TFT4_Item_OrnnZhonyasParadox.desc: Once per combat at @PercentHealthThreshold@% Health, become invulnerable and untargetable for @InvulnDuration@ seconds.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT_Item_TitansResolve.name: Titan's Resolve
TFT_Item_TitansResolve.desc: Gain @StackingAD*100@% Attack Damage and @StackingSP@% Ability Power when attacking or taking damage, stacking up to @StackCap@ times. At full stacks, gain @StackedAmp*100@% Damage Amp and gain immunity to crowd control.

TFT9_Item_PiltoverCharges.name: Charges
TFT9_Item_PiltoverCharges.desc: Start with @TooltipStartingCharge@ Charge. Gain Charges each time you lose. The larger your loss streak, the more Charges you gain per loss. When you win, all Charges are converted to Power for the T-Hex.Current loss streak: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_Piltover_Charges@ (doubled in Hyper Roll)Charges granted next loss: +@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_Piltover_ChargesToGrant@Current loot value on victory: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_Piltover_ProgressGoldValue@ gold[This does not count as an item.]

TFT_Item_SupportKnightsVow.name: Knight's Vow
TFT_Item_SupportKnightsVow.desc: Combat start: Grant @AllyHealth@ Health and @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp to the holder and allies within 1 hex in the same row.​​[Support item]

TFT17_Consumable_Anomaly_HungerForPower.name: Hunger For Power Anomaly
TFT17_Consumable_Anomaly_HungerForPower.desc: Use on a unit to grant them the Hunger For Power anomaly. Sell the unit to regain this consumable.Hunger For PowerCombat start: Consume an adjacent ally Champion and gain @HealthAndADPercent_TOOLTIPONLY@% of their Health and Attack Damage.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Item_ChonccsChalice.name: Choncc's Chalice
TFT_Item_ChonccsChalice.desc: Your team gains +@MaxArmySizeIncrease@ max team size.@PercentGoldChance@% chance to drop 1 gold when you win combat."Only the finest beverages can go into Choncc's Chalice"

TFT_Consumable_MasterworkUpgrade.name: Masterwork Upgrade
TFT_Consumable_MasterworkUpgrade.desc: Use on a champion to choose a Radiant version of that champion's craftable completed items. Upgrade the item you choose to its Radiant equivalent and unequip it.

TFT_Item_Artifact_LudensTempest.name: Luden's Tempest
TFT_Item_Artifact_LudensTempest.desc: @PercentOfOverkill@% of overkill damage plus @BaseDamage@ is dealt as magic damage to the three enemies nearest the target.

TFT_Item_Artifact_SpectralCutlass.name: Spectral Cutlass
TFT_Item_Artifact_SpectralCutlass.desc: Combat start: Teleport the holder to the mirrored hex on the enemy's side of the board. After @Duration@ seconds, the holder returns to their original location.

TFT_Item_RunaansHurricane.name: Kraken's Fury
TFT_Item_RunaansHurricane.desc: Attacks grant @ADOnAttack*100@% stacking Attack Damage, up to @MaxStacks@ attacks. After @MaxStacks@ attacks, gain @ASCapstone*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT_Item_DebugDamageAmp.name: Damage Amp
TFT_Item_DebugDamageAmp.desc: Cause this unit to deal @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_UnitProperty_Debug@% increased damage. Does not stack. Lasts until the unit is deconstructed.

TFT9_Item_CrownOfDemacia_DU.name: Crown of Demacia
TFT9_Item_CrownOfDemacia_DU.desc: If the holder begins combat in the front 2 rows, regenerate @HealingPercentPerTickPerStage@-@HealingPercentPerTickPerStage*7@% maximum Health every @HealTickRate@ seconds (based on stage). If they start in the back 2 rows, gain @ADandAPPerTick@-@ADandAPPerTick*7@% %i:scaleAD% Attack Damage and %i:scaleAP% Ability Power every @HealTickRate@ seconds instead. If the holder of this item dies, you instantly lose the fight.You can remove this item by benching the holder.Double Up: This item no longer causes you to lose the fight that round if it's holder is part of a reinforcement.

TFT15_Item_CrystalRoseHellionItem.name: Crystalline Reinforcements
TFT15_Item_CrystalRoseHellionItem.desc: Your team gains @Health@ health. Whenever a unit dies, a crystalline copy one star level lower joins the fight!

TFT_Augment_GrowingUp_SkipOption.name:
All Done
Stop transforming, and allow me to star up

TFT_Item_Artifact_RapidFirecannon.name: Rapid Firecannon
TFT_Item_Artifact_RapidFirecannon.desc: Gain +1 Attack Range, increased by 1 whenever the holder kills an enemy.

TFT9_Consumable_GoldenItemRemover.name: Golden Item Remover
TFT9_Consumable_GoldenItemRemover.desc: Use on a champion to unequip all items as many times as you want. Converts all future Magnetic Removers to Reforgers.

TFT_Item_Bloodthirster.name: Bloodthirster
TFT_Item_Bloodthirster.desc: Once per combat at @HealthThreshold@% Health, gain a @ShieldHealthPercent@% max Health Shield that lasts up to @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

TFT_Item_Artifact_StatikkShiv.name: Statikk Shiv
TFT_Item_Artifact_StatikkShiv.desc: Every 3rd attack deals @Damage@ + @APScalar*100@% of the holder's Ability Power as additional magic damage to 4 enemies.

TFT9_Item_OrnnHorizonFocus.name: Sniper's Focus
TFT9_Item_OrnnHorizonFocus.desc: Gain @DamageAmpPerHex*100@% Damage Amp against targets @HexRequirement@ or more hexes away.

TFT_Item_UnstableTreasureChest.name: Unstable Treasure Chest
TFT_Item_UnstableTreasureChest.desc: When the holder dies, the @ItemsGranted@ highest percent health allies gain a temporary completed item.​​[Support item]

TFT_Item_ArchangelsStaff.name: Archangel's Staff
TFT_Item_ArchangelsStaff.desc: Combat start: Gain @APPerInterval@% Ability Power every @IntervalSeconds@ seconds in combat.

TFT_Item_Artifact_AegisOfDawn.name: Aegis of Dawn
TFT_Item_Artifact_AegisOfDawn.desc: Every @TickRate@ seconds, steal @ArmorStealPerTick@ Armor from enemies within 1-hex and heal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_Artifact_AegisDuskDawn_Damage@% of the holder's Armor.If Aegis of Dusk is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every @TickRateWithAegisOfDusk@ seconds instead.Healing increases based on Stage.

TFT17_Item_Artifact_EvelynnArtifact.name: Evelynn's Instinct

TFT_Item_KnightsVow.name: Knight's Vow
TFT_Item_KnightsVow.desc: Extra %i:scaleArmor% +@Armor@Holder is also a Knight[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT17_Item_Artifact_SorakaArtifact.name: Soraka's Miracle
TFT17_Item_Artifact_SorakaArtifact.desc: The first @NumMiracles@ times the holder drops below @HPThreshold*100@% Health, a Miracle occurs, healing them for @TotalHealRatio@% of their max Health.If the holder survives player combat, gain @PlayerHealth@ player Health for each Miracle this combat.

TFT17_Item_Artifact_VarusArtifact.name: Varus's Obsession
TFT17_Item_Artifact_VarusArtifact.desc: Combat Start: Your strongest Tank becomes the Soulmate. For each second they are alive, the holder gains @StackingStats@% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power.The Soulmate heals for @HealPct*100@% of damage the holder deals.

TFT_Item_DebugTaunt.name: Taunt
TFT_Item_DebugTaunt.desc: Taunt all enemies who are in range to attack the target.

TFT_Consumable_ChampionDuplicator_III.name: Lesser Champion Duplicator
TFT_Consumable_ChampionDuplicator_III.desc: Use on a 3-cost champion or less to create a 1-star copy on your bench.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Item_Artifact_Dawncore.name: Dawncore
TFT_Item_Artifact_Dawncore.desc: Reduce the holder's max Mana by @FlatManaReduction@. Subsequent spellcasts reduce max Mana by @ReductionPerCast*100@%, to a minimum of @MinimumTotalMana@.

TFT14_Item_Suits_HoldHigh.name: Win More

TFT14_Item_Suits_HoldMid.name: Win More
TFT14_Item_Suits_HoldMid.desc: Bet that you'll win 3 or more of the next 5 combats.

TFT10_Consumable_EDM_Selector.name: EDM Selector
TFT10_Consumable_EDM_Selector.desc: Use this on an EDM champion to select them. The selected champion determines the frequency of EDM casts.Jax: Every @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_EDM_JaxFrequency@ seconds.Lux: Every @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_EDM_LuxFrequency@ seconds.Zac: Every @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_EDM_ZacFrequency@ seconds.Zed: Every @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT10_Trait_EDM_ZedFrequency@ seconds.

TFT_Item_TitanicHydra.name: Zz'Rot Portal
TFT_Item_TitanicHydra.desc: Combat start: Taunt.On death, a Voidspawn arises, Taunting nearby enemies. The Voidspawn has massively reduced effectiveness when created by a summoned unit.Taunt: enemies that are able and in range must attack the taunter

TFTEventCT_Augment_Artifactory.name: Choncc's Artifactory
TFTEventCT_Augment_Artifactory.desc: At the start of each turn, your benched completed items transform into a random Artifact item. Gain @NumItems@ Artifact Anvil and a reforger.

TFT17_Item_Artifact_AhriArtifact.name: Ahri's Aura
TFT17_Item_Artifact_AhriArtifact.desc: The holder is orbited by 3 foxfires. Each one deals @FlatMagicDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and the orbit expands to hit the holder's current target.For every @ManaSpent@ Mana the holder spends, foxfires travel @PercentSpeedIncrease*100@% faster for the rest of combat.

TFT9_Item_CrownOfDemacia.name: Crown of Demacia
TFT9_Item_CrownOfDemacia.desc: If the holder is a Tank, regenerate @HealingPercentPerTickPerStage@-@HealingPercentPerTickPerStage*7@% maximum Health every @HealTickRate@ seconds (based on stage). Otherwise, gain @ADandAPPerTick@% %i:scaleAD% Attack Damage and %i:scaleAP% Ability Power every @HealTickRate@ seconds instead. If the holder of this item dies, you instantly lose the fight.You can remove this item by benching the holder.

TFT_Item_EternalFlame.name: The Eternal Flame
TFT_Item_EternalFlame.desc: While the holder is alive, all enemies are @TOOLTIPWoundAmount@% Wounded and all allies gain @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp. This effect refreshes every @WoundDuration@ seconds.​​[Support item]Wound: Reduces healing received

TFT17_EkkoOffering_AnomalyItem.name: Anomaly
TFT17_EkkoOffering_AnomalyItem.desc: Evolve the holder, granting an effect based on their role.Tank: Gain @TankHP_TOOLTIPONLY@ health and grow in size.Marksman: Gain @MarksmanBonusAS_TOOLTIPONLY*100@% Attack Speed. On cast, knock back their target if within @MarksmanKnockbackRange_TOOLTIPONLY@ hexes of them.Fighter/Assassin: Gain @FighterAP_TOOLTIPONLY@ Ability Power & @FighterAD_TOOLTIPONLY@% Attack Damage. Triple it when below @FighterHealthThreshold_TOOLTIPONLY@% Health.Caster: For every @CasterManaSpent_TOOLTIPONLY@ Mana spent, throw a @CasterHexRadius_TOOLTIPONLY@-hex fireball that deals @CasterHPRatio_TOOLTIPONLY*100@% max Health true damage, 33% Wounds, and 1% Burns for @CasterDuration_TOOLTIPONLY@ seconds.Specialist: Gain @SpecialistNumStars_TOOLTIPONLY@ stars that orbit this champion. Each star deals @SpecialistMissileDamage_TOOLTIPONLY@ magic damage and the orbit expands to hit the champion's current target.

TFT_Item_Artifact_LightshieldCrest.name: Lightshield Crest
TFT_Item_Artifact_LightshieldCrest.desc: Every @TriggerRate@ seconds, Shields the lowest percent Health ally for @PercentOfResists@% of the holder's combined Armor and Magic Resist for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.On death grants this shield to all allies.

TFT17_Consumable_MechaTransformer.name: Mecha-Former
TFT17_Consumable_MechaTransformer.desc: Use this on a Mecha unit to change their form.Transformed Mechas take up two team slots and count twice for the Mecha trait.

TFT4_Item_OrnnDeathsDefiance.name: Death's Defiance
TFT4_Item_OrnnDeathsDefiance.desc: @IgnorePainPercent@% of the damage the holder receives is instead dealt over @BleedDuration@ seconds as non-lethal damage.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT_Item_YoumuusGhostblade.name: Youmuu's Ghostblade
TFT_Item_YoumuusGhostblade.desc: The holder is also an Assassin.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT_Item_SpectralGauntlet.name: Evenshroud
TFT_Item_SpectralGauntlet.desc: @ARReductionAmount@% Sunder enemies within @HexRange@ hexes. Gain @BonusResists@ Armor and Magic Resist for the first @BonusResistDuration@ seconds of combat.Sunder: Reduce Armor

TFT9_Item_OrnnPrototypeForge.name: Blacksmith's Gloves
TFT9_Item_OrnnPrototypeForge.desc: Each round: Equip 2 random Ornn Artifacts.[Consumes 3 item slots.]@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_BindOnEquipTRA@

TFT_Item_Artifact_BlightingJewel.name: Blighting Jewel
TFT_Item_Artifact_BlightingJewel.desc: Dealing magic damage reduces the target's Magic Resist by @MRReduction@. If their Magic Resist is 0, grant the holder @ManaGain@ Mana instead.Ability damage can only trigger on each enemy once every @ICD@ seconds.

TFT_Item_Artifact_TalismanOfAscension.name: Talisman Of Ascension
TFT_Item_Artifact_TalismanOfAscension.desc: After @Seconds@ seconds gain @MaxHealthPercent@% max Health and @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp for the rest of combat.

TFT_Item_LocketOfTheIronSolari.name: Locket of the Iron Solari
TFT_Item_LocketOfTheIronSolari.desc: Combat start: The holder and allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row gain a @ShieldValue@ Shield, @BonusResists@ Armor, and @BonusResists@ Magic Resist for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.​​[Support item]

TFT_Item_Leviathan.name: Nashor's Tooth
TFT_Item_Leviathan.desc: Attacks grant @BaseManaOnHit@ bonus Mana, increased to @ManaOnCrit@ if they critically strike.

TFT_Item_Artifact_SuspiciousTrenchCoat.name: Suspicious Trench Coat
TFT_Item_Artifact_SuspiciousTrenchCoat.desc: Once per combat at @PercentHealthTrigger@% Health, the holder splits into 3 copies of themself each with @PercentHealthOfCopies@% of their max Health.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT_Item_Morellonomicon.name: Morellonomicon
TFT_Item_Morellonomicon.desc: Attacks and Abilities deal @BurnPercent@% Burn and @GrievousWoundsPercent@% Wound to enemies for @BurnDuration@ seconds.Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every secondWound: Reduces healing received

TFT_Item_RapidFireCannon.name: Red Buff
TFT_Item_RapidFireCannon.desc: Attacks and Abilities @BurnPercent@% Burn and @HealingReductionPct@% Wound enemies for @Duration@ seconds.Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every secondWound: Reduces healing received

TFT_Consumable_TrainingDummy.name: Training Dummy
TFT_Consumable_TrainingDummy.desc: Use on a champion to spawn a movable Training Dummy nearby. [Cannot be used in combat. Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Item_Crownguard.name: Crownguard
TFT_Item_Crownguard.desc: Combat Start: Gain a @ShieldSize@% max Health Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.When the Shield expires, gain @ShieldBonusAP@% Ability Power.

TFT_Item_Artifact_Mittens.name: Mittens
TFT_Item_Artifact_Mittens.desc: Shrinks the holder, granting them increased movement speed and immunity to Slow, Burn, and Wound.{{TFT_Keyword_Chill}}{{TFT_Keyword_Burn}}{{TFT_Keyword_Wound}}

TFT9_Item_PiltoverProgress.name: Power
TFT9_Item_PiltoverProgress.desc: Gain Power by winning combats after gaining Charges. More Power gives more stats.[This does not count as an item.]

TFT_Item_AdaptiveHelm.name: Adaptive Helm
TFT_Item_AdaptiveHelm.desc: Gain an additional @ManaPercIncrease*100@% Mana from all sources. The holder gains an additional bonus based on their Role:Tanks and Fighters: Gain @FrontlineResists@ Armor and Magic Resistance.Other Roles: Gain @BacklineADAP@% Attack Damage and Ability Power.

TFT_Consumable_ShopReroller.name: Loaded Dice
TFT_Consumable_ShopReroller.desc: Use on a champion to reroll a special Shop that contains only champions sharing a Trait with the source champion. [Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT9_Item_OrnnDeathfireGrasp.name: Deathfire Grasp
TFT9_Item_OrnnDeathfireGrasp.desc: Combat start: Blast the current target for @PercentMaxHealthDamage@% of their max Health as magic damage. Repeat this every @RepeatTime@ seconds.

TFT_Consumable_ItemRemover_UsesLeft10.name: Magnetic Remover <rules>(10 uses left!)</rules>
TFT_Consumable_ItemRemover_UsesLeft10.desc: Use on a champion to unequip all items. [Cannot be used on champions in combat.][Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Item_Artifact_NavoriFlickerblades.name: Flickerblades
TFT_Item_Artifact_NavoriFlickerblades.desc: Attacks grant @ASPerStack*100@% stacking Attack Speed. Every @StacksPerBonus@ attacks also grant @ADPerBonus*100@% Attack Damage and @APPerBonus@% Ability Power.

TFT_Item_Spite.name: Spite
TFT_Item_Spite.desc: Combat start: The holder and all adjacent allies gain @ADIncrease*100@% Attack Damage and @APIncrease@ Ability Power.When the holder dies, Stun all enemies within 2-hexes for @Duration@ seconds.​​[Support item]

TFT_Item_BlueBuff.name: Blue Buff
TFT_Item_BlueBuff.desc: Gain @ModifiedADAP*100@% additional Attack Damage and Ability Power from all sources.

TFT_Item_Artifact_CursedVampiricScepter.name: Corrupt Vampiric Scepter
TFT_Item_Artifact_CursedVampiricScepter.desc: Attacks deal an additional @PercentDamage@% Attack Damage %i:scaleAD% as physical damage and heal the holder for the damage dealt.The holder cannot cast their Ability or gain Mana.

TFT13_AnotherAnomaly_Item.name: Portable Anomaly
TFT13_AnotherAnomaly_Item.desc: The holder gains your Anomaly evolution.

TFT_Item_LastWhisper.name: Last Whisper
TFT_Item_LastWhisper.desc: Damage from attacks and Abilities @ArmorReductionPercent@% Sunder the target for @ArmorBreakDuration@ seconds. This effect does not stack.Sunder: Reduce Armor

TFT_Item_DebugUnitID.name: Do You Know Who I Am?

TFT_Item_Artifact_WitsEnd.name: Wit's End
TFT_Item_Artifact_WitsEnd.desc: Attacks deal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_Artifact_WitsEnd_Damage@ bonus magic damage.Heals the holder for @PercentHealing@% of all magic damage dealt.Damage increases based on Stage.

TFT17_DRXSelector.name: Striker Selector
TFT17_DRXSelector.desc: Use this on a N.O.V.A. champion to activate their Strike effect when the Power Surge occurs.

TFT_Item_Artifact_HorizonFocus.name: Horizon Focus
TFT_Item_Artifact_HorizonFocus.desc: Stunning an enemy causes lightning to strike them, dealing @PercentHealthDamage@% of their max Health as magic damage.

TFT4_Item_OrnnRanduinsSanctum.name: Randuin's Omen
TFT4_Item_OrnnRanduinsSanctum.desc: Combat start: Grant %i:scaleArmor% @BonusDefense@ Armor and %i:scaleMR% @BonusDefense@ Magic Resistance to the holder and adjacent allies.​​[Support item]

TFT_Item_NightHarvester.name: Steadfast Heart
TFT_Item_NightHarvester.desc: Gain @BaseDurability*100@% Durability. While above @ThresholdForEmpower*100@% Health, instead gain @EmpoweredDurability*100@% Durability.@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_WarmogsBuckle_TRAKey@

TFT_Item_Artifact_ProwlersClaw.name: Prowler's Claw
TFT_Item_Artifact_ProwlersClaw.desc: After killing a target, shed negative effects and dash to the farthest target within @HexRange@ hexes. The next 2 critical attacks deal @CritDamageBonusPercent@% bonus Critical Strike Damage.

TFT_Item_Moonstone.name: Moonstone Renewer
TFT_Item_Moonstone.desc: Every @ShieldRate@ seconds, grant a @BaseShieldAmount@-@MaxShield@ Shield (based on Stage) to the @ShieldTargets@ lowest percent health allies for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.​​[Support item]

TFT9_Consumable_MasterworkUpgrade.name: Masterwork Upgrade
TFT9_Consumable_MasterworkUpgrade.desc: Use on a champion to choose a Radiant version of that champion's craftable completed items. Upgrade the item you choose to its Radiant equivalent and unequip it.

TFT_Item_ForceOfNature.name: Tactician's Crown
TFT_Item_ForceOfNature.desc: Your team gains +@MaxArmySizeIncrease@ max team size.@PercentGoldChance@% chance to drop 1 gold when you win combat."...the Heart of a hero..."

TFT_Item_AegisOfTheLegion.name: Aegis of the Legion
TFT_Item_AegisOfTheLegion.desc: Combat start: Grant @ASBuff@% Attack Speed and @BonusResists@ Armor and Magic Resist to the holder, adjacent allies in the same row, and all allies behind them for @BuffDuration@ seconds.​​[Support item]

TFT_Item_Quicksilver.name: Quicksilver
TFT_Item_Quicksilver.desc: Combat Start: Gain immunity to crowd control for @SpellShieldDuration@ seconds.Gain @ProcAttackSpeed*100@% stacking Attack Speed every second.

TFT_Item_Deathblade.name: Deathblade
TFT_Item_Deathblade.desc: Perfect peace and calm for the holder - and all who face it.@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_TragicalBlade_TRAKey@

TFT_Item_ChonccsCrown.name: Choncc's Crown
TFT_Item_ChonccsCrown.desc: Your team gains +@MaxArmySizeIncrease@ max team size.@PercentGoldChance@% chance to drop 1 gold when you win combat."Choncc's Crown is the perfect accessory to dress up your fancy dinners"

TFT_Item_Chalice.name: Chalice of Power
TFT_Item_Chalice.desc: Combat start: Grant @ChaliceAP@ Ability Power and @BonusInitialMana@ Mana to the holder and allies within 2 hexes in the same row.​​[Support item]

TFT_Item_Artifact_VoidGauntlet.name: Void Gauntlet
TFT_Item_Artifact_VoidGauntlet.desc: Combat start: Store @InitialPercentHealthStore*100@% max Health and @PercentHealthStore*100@% more every second. On death, unleash the stored Health as magic damage split between enemies within @HexRadius@-hexes.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT_Item_Artifact_SilvermereDawn.name: Silvermere Dawn
TFT_Item_Artifact_SilvermereDawn.desc: Grants immunity to Stuns and the holder's attacks Stun the target for @StunDuration@ seconds.The holder's Attack Speed is locked at @AttackSpeedCap@.

TFT_Item_TacticiansScepter.name: Tactician's Shield
TFT_Item_TacticiansScepter.desc: Your team gains +@MaxArmySizeIncrease@ max team size.@PercentGoldChance@% chance to drop 1 gold when the holder dies."Imbued with a Philosopher's wisdom..."

TFT_Consumable_RecommendedArmory.name: Lucky Item Chest
TFT_Consumable_RecommendedArmory.desc: Use on a champion to open an armory of items especially suited for them.These items are based on the champion's recommended items.

TFT11_Item_ThiefsGlovesSupport.name: Accomplice's Gloves
TFT11_Item_ThiefsGlovesSupport.desc: Each round: Equip 2 random Support items.[Consumes 3 item slots.]@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_BindOnEquipTRA@

TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft5.name: Reforger <rules>(5 uses left!)</rules>
TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft5.desc: Unequip all items and randomly transform them into new ones of a similar type and quality.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft4.name: Reforger <rules>(4 uses left!)</rules>
TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft4.desc: Unequip all items and randomly transform them into new ones of a similar type and quality.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft7.name: Reforger <rules>(7 uses left!)</rules>
TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft7.desc: Unequip all items and randomly transform them into new ones of a similar type and quality.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Item_Artifact_SeekersArmguard.name: Seeker's Armguard
TFT_Item_Artifact_SeekersArmguard.desc: Takedowns increase the holder's Armor, Magic Resist, and Ability Power by @StatsPerTakedown@.

TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft6.name: Reforger <rules>(6 uses left!)</rules>
TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft6.desc: Unequip all items and randomly transform them into new ones of a similar type and quality.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Item_StatikkShiv.name: Void Staff
TFT_Item_StatikkShiv.desc: Damage from attacks and Abilities @MRShred@% Shred the target for @MRShredDuration@ seconds. This effect does not stack.Shred: Reduce Magic Resist

TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft3.name: Reforger <rules>(3 uses left!)</rules>
TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft3.desc: Unequip all items and randomly transform them into new ones of a similar type and quality.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT4_Item_OrnnTheCollector.name: Gold Collector
TFT4_Item_OrnnTheCollector.desc: Attacks and Abilities execute enemies below @ExecutePercent@% of their maximum Health. Executions have a @GoldChance@% chance to drop %i:goldCoins% 1 gold.Gold Collected: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Tracker_Value1@g[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft2.name: Reforger <rules>(2 uses left!)</rules>
TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft2.desc: Unequip all items and randomly transform them into new ones of a similar type and quality.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Item_Artifact_CappaJuice.name: Cappa Juice
TFT_Item_Artifact_CappaJuice.desc: The holder dons a Hat on each takedown. The holder gains @ADAPPerTakedown@% Attack Damage and Ability Power per Hat. On death lose @PercentHatLoss*100@% of all Hats. (Hats: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT_Item_Artifact_CappaJuice_NumHats@)

TFT_Item_UnusableSlot.name: Unusable Slot
TFT_Item_UnusableSlot.desc: This slot can't hold an item.

TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft9.name: Reforger <rules>(9 uses left!)</rules>
TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft9.desc: Unequip all items and randomly transform them into new ones of a similar type and quality.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft8.name: Reforger <rules>(8 uses left!)</rules>
TFT_Consumable_ItemReroller_UsesLeft8.desc: Unequip all items and randomly transform them into new ones of a similar type and quality.[Consumable - This item disappears when used.]

TFT_Item_HextechGunblade.name: Hextech Gunblade
TFT_Item_HextechGunblade.desc: Heal the lowest percent Health ally for @AllyHealing*100@% of damage dealt.Ally Healing: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Tracker_Value1@

TFT_Item_ChonccsSpork.name: Choncc's Spork
TFT_Item_ChonccsSpork.desc: The wearer gains +1 to all of their listed non-unique traits."Choncc's Spork, truly the greatest culinary tool"

TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketShockTreatment.name: Shock Treatment
TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketShockTreatment.desc: Gain a Statikk Shiv and another after @Delay@ player combats. Your Statikk Shivs grant @BonusAS*100@% more Attack Speed and their chain lightning effects deal @tooltipincreaseddamage1*100@-@tooltipincreaseddamage2*100@% more damage (based on stage level).

TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketShockTreatmentP.name: Shock Treatment+
TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketShockTreatmentP.desc: Gain a Statikk Shiv and another after @Delay@ player combats. Your Statikk Shivs grant @BonusAS*100@% more Attack Speed and their chain lightning effects deal @tooltipincreaseddamage1*100@-@tooltipincreaseddamage2*100@% more damage (based on stage level).

TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketGargantuanResol.name: Gargantuan Resolve
TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketGargantuanResol.desc: Gain a Titan's Resolve and another after @Delay@ player combats. Your Titan's Resolves can continue stacking to @MaxStacks@ instead of 25. The total resist bonus is increased by @ResistIncrease*100@%.

TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketUnstableEvoluti.name: Unstable Evolution
TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketUnstableEvoluti.desc: Your champions randomly gain one of the following when they are starred up: @BonusHP@ Health, @BonusAS@% Attack Speed, @BonusAD@% Attack Damage, or @BonusAP@ Ability Power.

TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketGargantuanResol.name: Gargantuan Resolve
TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketGargantuanResol.desc: Gain a Titan's Resolve and another after @Delay@ player combats. Your Titan's Resolves can continue stacking to @MaxStacks@ instead of 25. The total resist bonus is increased by @ResistIncrease*100@%.

TFT14_Augment_BlackMarket_ScopedWeapons.name: Scoped Weapons II
TFT14_Augment_BlackMarket_ScopedWeapons.desc: Your units that start combat in the back 2 rows gain infinite Attack Range and @AS*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketTitanicStrength.name: Titanic Strength
TFT14_Augment_BlackMarketTitanicStrength.desc: Your team gains @ADHealthPercent@% of their max Health as Attack Damage and @APHealthPercent@% of their max Health as Ability Power.

TFT3_Item_ProtectorSpatulaItem.name: Protector's Chestguard
TFT3_Item_ProtectorSpatulaItem.desc: The holder gains the Protector trait.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

TFT3_Item_BattlecastSpatulaItem.name: Battlecast Plating
TFT3_Item_BattlecastSpatulaItem.desc: The wearer gains the Battlecast trait.[Unique - Only One Per Champion]

TFT15_MechanicTrait_ExpungePowerItem.name: Power Remover
TFT15_MechanicTrait_ExpungePowerItem.desc: Use on a champion to remove their Power Up and regain a Power Snax.

TFT7_Augment_WhispersTerrify.name: Terrify
TFT7_Augment_WhispersTerrify.desc: Your units take @DamageReduction@% less damage from enemies shrunken by Whisper champions. Gain a Sylas.

TFT7_Augment_CavalierEmblem2.name: Cavalier Crown
TFT7_Augment_CavalierEmblem2.desc: Gain a Cavalier Emblem, a Spirit Visage, and a Nunu.

TFT7_Augment_ScalescornNomads.name: Base Camp
TFT7_Augment_ScalescornNomads.desc: Scalescorns gain @DamageAmp@% damage each time they start combat in the same hex as last round, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times. Gain a Lillia.

TFT7_Augment_Bloodlust2.name: Combat Training II
TFT7_Augment_Bloodlust2.desc: Your champions permanently gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage every time they kill an enemy. Champions start with @StartingAD*100@% bonus Attack Damage.

TFT7_Augment_Bloodlust3.name: Combat Training III
TFT7_Augment_Bloodlust3.desc: Your champions permanently gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage every time they kill an enemy. Champions start with @StartingAD*100@% bonus Attack Damage.

TFT7_Augment_DarkflightSoulSiphon.name: Soul Siphon
TFT7_Augment_DarkflightSoulSiphon.desc: Darkflight champions benefit from the first-listed trait of a sacrificed champion. This does not increase the trait count for that trait. Gain an Aphelios.

TFT7_Augment_ShimmerscaleSpending.name: Pay to Win
TFT7_Augment_ShimmerscaleSpending.desc: If you purchase a Shop reroll during Planning, champions holding a Shimmerscale Item and all Shimmerscale champions gain @DamageAmp@% damage when the next combat begins. Gain a Jax.

TFT7_Augment_RevelTrait.name: Revel Heart
TFT7_Augment_RevelTrait.desc: Your team counts as having 1 additional Revel. Gain a Jinx.

TFT7_DoubleUpAugment_PartnersUnited.name: Partners United
TFT7_DoubleUpAugment_PartnersUnited.desc: Your units gain @resists@ Attack Damage and Ability Power per trait active across your team and your partner's team.

TFT7_Augment_DarkflightTrait.name: Darkflight Heart
TFT7_Augment_DarkflightTrait.desc: Your team counts as having 1 additional Darkflight. Gain an Aphelios.

TFT7_Augment_JadeTrait2.name: Jade Soul
TFT7_Augment_JadeTrait2.desc: Your team counts as having 1 additional Jade. Gain a Titan's Resolve and a Gnar.

TFT7_Augment_ShimmerscaleTrait2.name: Shimmerscale Soul
TFT7_Augment_ShimmerscaleTrait2.desc: Your team counts as having 1 additional Shimmerscale. Gain a Titan's Resolve and a Volibear.

TFT7_Augment_Preparation1HR.name: Preparation I
TFT7_Augment_Preparation1HR.desc: Champions on your bench permanently gain @HPBonus@ Health, @Stats@% Attack Damage, and @Stats@% Ability Power every round. Champions start with @StartingStacks@ stack of this effect, and can stack up to @MaxStacks@ times.

TFT7_Augment_AstralEmblem.name: Astral Crest
TFT7_Augment_AstralEmblem.desc: Gain an Astral Emblem and a Lux.

TFT7_Augment_DragonGoldCarry.name: Idas Touch
TFT7_Augment_DragonGoldCarry.desc: Gain an Idas. Your strongest Idas becomes a Fighter. She now deals magic damage in a cone and can create gold.

TFT7_Augment_BruiserPersonalTrainerHR.name: Personal Training
TFT7_Augment_BruiserPersonalTrainerHR.desc: At the end of combat, champions that started combat adjacent to Bruisers permanently gain @Health@ Health, increased by @BonusHealth@ if they survived. Gain a Jax.

TFT7_Augment_WhispersEmblem.name: Whispers Crest
TFT7_Augment_WhispersEmblem.desc: Gain a Whispers Emblem and a Zyra.

TFT7_Augment_RevelEmblem.name: Revel Crest
TFT7_Augment_RevelEmblem.desc: Gain a Revel Emblem and a Jinx.

TFT7_Augment_AstralTrait.name: Astral Heart
TFT7_Augment_AstralTrait.desc: Your team counts as having 1 additional Astral. Gain a Lux.

TFT7_Augment_ScopedWeapons2.name: Scoped Weapons II
TFT7_Augment_ScopedWeapons2.desc: Your units that start combat in the back 2 rows gain infinite Attack Range and @AS*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT7_Augment_TrainerSecretSnax.name: Secret Snax
TFT7_Augment_TrainerSecretSnax.desc: While feeding their dragonling, Trainers have a @FeedChance@% chance to secretly feed a bonus Snax. Gain a Tristana.

TFT7_Augment_GuildEmblem2.name: Guild Crown
TFT7_Augment_GuildEmblem2.desc: Gain a Guild Emblem, a Protector's Vow, and a Twitch.

TFT7_Augment_GadgetExpert.name: Gadget Expert
TFT7_Augment_GadgetExpert.desc: Direct damage items deal @DamageIncPercent*100@% more damage as true damage. Gain a Statikk Shiv.

TFT7_Augment_RevelPartyFavors.name: Party Favors
TFT7_Augment_RevelPartyFavors.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold for every @GoldReq@ firecrackers launched by Revel champions each combat. Additionally, gain a special prize the first time @SpecialPrizeReq@ total firecrackers are launched. Gain a Jinx.

TFT7_DoubleUpAugment_Shareosel.name: Share-o-sel
TFT7_DoubleUpAugment_Shareosel.desc: After the carousel, you gain a copy of the item on the unit your partner picked.

TFT7_Augment_WarriorEmblem2.name: Warrior Crown
TFT7_Augment_WarriorEmblem2.desc: Gain a Warrior Emblem, a Giant Slayer, and a Yone.

TFT7_Augment_UrfsGrabBag1.name: Urf's Grab Bag I
TFT7_Augment_UrfsGrabBag1.desc: Gain @NumSpatulas@ Spatula, @NumComponents@ random components, and @NumGold@ gold.

TFT7_Augment_TempestEmblem.name: Tempest Crest
TFT7_Augment_TempestEmblem.desc: Gain a Tempest Emblem and a Qiyana.

TFT7_Augment_GuildLootHR.name: Loot Master
TFT7_Augment_GuildLootHR.desc: Gain a random component every @Combats@ player combats when you have at least Guild (@TraitLevelReq@) active. Gain a Twitch.

TFT7_Augment_ShapeshifterBeastsDen.name: Beast's Den
TFT7_Augment_ShapeshifterBeastsDen.desc: Units that start combat next to Shapeshifters gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and Movement Speed. Shapeshifters always gain this bonus. Gain a Gnar.

TFT7_Augment_LagoonEmblem2.name: Lagoon Crown
TFT7_Augment_LagoonEmblem2.desc: Gain a Lagoon Emblem, a Spear of Shojin, and a Zeri.

TFT7_Augment_MirageTrait.name: Mirage Heart
TFT7_Augment_MirageTrait.desc: Your team counts as having 1 additional Mirage. Gain a Yone.

TFT7_Augment_DarkflightEmblem2.name: Darkflight Crown
TFT7_Augment_DarkflightEmblem2.desc: Gain a Darkflight Emblem, a Titan's Resolve, and a Rengar.

TFT7_Augment_AssassinTrait.name: Assassin Heart
TFT7_Augment_AssassinTrait.desc: Your team counts as having 1 additional Assassin. Gain a Qiyana.

TFT7_Augment_LagoonOasis.name: Oasis
TFT7_Augment_LagoonOasis.desc: Every @HealTimer@ seconds, Lagoon champions remove all negative effects on themselves and heal for @MissingHPPercent@% of their missing Health. Gain a Zac.

TFT7_Augment_GuardianEmblem.name: Guardian Crest
TFT7_Augment_GuardianEmblem.desc: Gain a Guardian Emblem and a Zac.

TFT7_Augment_FirstAidKit3.name: First Aid Kit III
TFT7_Augment_FirstAidKit3.desc: All healing and shielding on your units is increased by @HealShieldIncrease*100@%.

TFT7_Augment_AssassinEmblem2.name: Assassin Crown
TFT7_Augment_AssassinEmblem2.desc: Gain an Assassin Emblem, a Hand of Justice, and a Rengar.

TFT7_Augment_CannoneerRicochet.name: Ricochet
TFT7_Augment_CannoneerRicochet.desc: Cannoneer's cannon shots bounce once, dealing @BounceReduction@% less damage. Gain an Aphelios.

TFT7_Augment_AgeOfDragons.name: Age of Dragons
TFT7_Augment_AgeOfDragons.desc: If your team has @NumDragons@+ Dragons, every @AttackNum@th attack from a Dragon fires a blast that deals magic damage equal to @HealthPct@% of the target's maximum Health. Gain a Nomsy, Zippy, and a Tier 4 Dragon.

TFT7_Augment_TempestLightningRod.name: Lightning Rod
TFT7_Augment_TempestLightningRod.desc: Every @Period@ second(s), the Tempest lightning alternates between striking a low health enemy and a strong Tempest champion with @Modifier*100@% effectiveness.

TFT7_Augment_GuildGearUpgrades.name: Gear Upgrades
TFT7_Augment_GuildGearUpgrades.desc: Guild champions holding an item gain @Resists@ Armor and an additional @GuildBonusPct@% of their base Guild Bonus. Gain a Twitch.

TFT7_Augment_DragonmancerEmblem.name: Dragonmancer Crest
TFT7_Augment_DragonmancerEmblem.desc: Gain a Dragonmancer Emblem and a Kai'Sa.

TFT7_Augment_Preparation3HR.name: Preparation III
TFT7_Augment_Preparation3HR.desc: Champions on your bench permanently gain @HPBonus@ Health, @Stats@% Attack Damage, and @Stats@% Ability Power every round. Champions start with @StartingStacks@ stack of this effect, and can stack up to @MaxStacks@ times.

TFT7_Augment_CannoneerEmblem.name: Cannoneer Crest
TFT7_Augment_CannoneerEmblem.desc: Gain a Cannoneer Emblem and an Aphelios.

TFT7_Augment_MageTrait.name: Mage Heart
TFT7_Augment_MageTrait.desc: Your team counts as having 1 additional Mage. Gain a Lillia.

TFT7_Augment_HugificationPotion1.name: Huge-ification Potion I
TFT7_Augment_HugificationPotion1.desc: Your Tier 1 and 2 units are larger and gain @BonusHealth@ Health.

TFT7_Augment_WarriorTrait.name: Warrior Heart
TFT7_Augment_WarriorTrait.desc: Your team counts as having 1 additional Warrior. Gain a Yone.

TFT7_Augment_HugificationPotion2.name: Huge-ification Potion II
TFT7_Augment_HugificationPotion2.desc: Your Tier 1 and 2 units are larger and gain @BonusHealth@ Health.

TFT7_Augment_DarkflightEmblem.name: Darkflight Crest
TFT7_Augment_DarkflightEmblem.desc: Gain a Darkflight Emblem and a Rell.

TFT7_Augment_WarriorEmblem.name: Warrior Crest
TFT7_Augment_WarriorEmblem.desc: Gain a Warrior Emblem and a Yone.

TFT7_Augment_RagewingTantrum.name: Tantrum
TFT7_Augment_RagewingTantrum.desc: After casting their first Ability, Ragewings restore @ManaRestorePct@% of their maximum Rage. Gain a Senna.

TFT7_Augment_DragonmancerInspire.name: Inspire
TFT7_Augment_DragonmancerInspire.desc: When the Dragonmancer Hero gets a takedown, champions that share a trait with the Dragonmancer Hero gain @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed for @Duration@ seconds. Gain a Kaisa.

TFT7_Augment_ShimmerscaleTrait.name: Shimmerscale Heart
TFT7_Augment_ShimmerscaleTrait.desc: Your team counts as having 1 additional Shimmerscale. Gain a Jax.

TFT7_Augment_SwiftshotPressTheAttack.name: Press the Attack
TFT7_Augment_SwiftshotPressTheAttack.desc: Your Swiftshots' attacks apply a stack on their target for @StackDuration@ seconds. Every third stack deals true damage equal to @PercentHPDamage@% of the target's maximum Health. Gain a Twitch.

TFT7_Augment_AstralIntercosmicGifts.name: Intercosmic Gifts
TFT7_Augment_AstralIntercosmicGifts.desc: Astral Orbs have a @BonusLootPct@% chance to spawn a small bonus orb that contains loot. Gain a Lux.

TFT7_Augment_MageEssenceTheft.name: Essence Theft

TFT16_XerathZap_FatefulFind.name: Fateful Find

TFT16_XerathZap_CrumblingSands.name: Crumbling Sands

TFT16_XerathZap_TheChariot.name: The Chariot

TFT16_XerathZap_TheLovers.name: The Lovers

TFT16_XerathZap_Judgement.name: Judgment

TFT_Item_CorruptedHandOfJustice.desc: Gain 2 effects:@AD_NotStatBar*100@% Attack Damage and @AP_NotStatBar@% Ability Power.@StatOmnivamp_NotStatBar*100@% Omnivamp.While above @HealthThreshold*100@% health, double the Attack Damage and Ability Power. While below @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, double the Omnivamp.

TFT_Item_CorruptedDeathblade.name: Deathblade
TFT_Item_CorruptedDeathblade.desc: Perfect peace and calm for the holder - and all who face it.@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT_Augment_TragicalBlade_TRAKey@

TFT5_Item_SpearOfShojinShadow.name: Spectral Spear of Shojin

TFT5_Item_InfinityEdgeShadow.name: Sacrificial Infinity Edge

Each point of Critical Strike Chance above 100% becomes +@BonusCritDmgPerCritAbove100@% Critical Strike Damage. The holder also gains @BonusCritDamage@% Critical Strike Damage.[Unique - only one per champion]

TFT5_Item_DragonsClawShadow.name: Refracted Dragon's Claw
