TFT5_Item_LudensEchoShadow.desc: Each time the holder casts their Ability, they gain empty maximum Health equal to @ManaRatio@% of their maximum Mana. The holder then heals for that amount.

TFT5_Item_JeweledGauntletShadow.name: Sacrificial Gauntlet
TFT5_Item_JeweledGauntletShadow.desc: The holder gains @CritDamageAmp@% Critical Strike Damage, and magic and true damage from their Ability can critically strike. The first time they cast their Ability each combat, they gain an additional @BonusCritChance@% Critical Strike Chance for the remainder of combat (applies to that Ability cast).

TFT5_Item_BloodthirsterShadow.name: Riskthirster
TFT5_Item_BloodthirsterShadow.desc: Physical damage heals the holder for @Lifesteal@% of the damage dealt. Each time the holder heals to @HealthThresholdPercent@% Health, they gain @BonusAS@% Attack Speed for @BonusASDuration@ seconds. The holder takes @HealthLossPercent@% of their maximum Health in true damage at the beginning of combat or upon being equipped.

TFT5_Item_DeathbladeShadow.name: Caustic Deathblade
TFT5_Item_DeathbladeShadow.desc: Contributing to a kill grants the holder %i:scaleAD% @ADPerStack@ Attack Damage for the rest of combat. This effect can stack any number of times (starting at @StartingStacks@).

TFT5_Item_ThiefsGlovesShadow.name: Trickster's Gloves
TFT5_Item_ThiefsGlovesShadow.desc: At the beginning of each planning phase, the holder equips 2 temporary items. These are always full shadow items.[Consumes Three Item Slots]

TFT5_Item_RapidFirecannonShadow.name: Rapid Deathcannon
TFT5_Item_RapidFirecannonShadow.desc: Increases the holder's Attack Range by @HexRangeIncrease@ hex. Additionally, the holder gains %i:scaleAS% +@BonusAS@% bonus Attack Speed when there are no enemies within @HexRequirement@ hex.The holder's attacks can no longer miss.

TFT5_Item_TitansResolveShadow.name: Titan's Revenge
TFT5_Item_TitansResolveShadow.desc: @PercentDamage@% of incoming damage is stored. Every @SecondsBetweenProcs@ seconds, the holder's next attack unleashes this stored damage as true damage.

TFT5_Item_FrozenHeartShadow.name: Frozen Dark Heart
TFT5_Item_FrozenHeartShadow.desc: Reduces the Attack Speed of all enemies within @HexRadius@ hexes by @AttackSpeedSlow@%.[Unique - only one per champion]

TFT5_Item_IonicSparkShadow.name: Ionic Dark-Spark
TFT5_Item_IonicSparkShadow.desc: Enemies within @HexRange@ hexes have their Magic Resist reduced by @MRShred@%. When they cast an Ability, they are zapped taking magic damage equal to @ManaRatio@% of their max Mana.

TFT5_Item_SunfireCapeShadow.name: Eclipse Cape
TFT5_Item_SunfireCapeShadow.desc: Every @ICD@ second(s), a random enemy within @HexRange@ hexes is burned for @BurnPercent@% of their maximum Health as true damage over @BurnDuration@ seconds. Any healing they receive is reduced by @GrievousWoundsPercent@%.[Unique - only one per champion]

TFT5_Item_RunaansHurricaneShadow.name: Runaan's Untamed Hurricane
TFT5_Item_RunaansHurricaneShadow.desc: The holder's attacks fire bolts at @AdditionalTargets@ nearby enemies, dealing @MultiplierForDamage@% of the holder's Attack Damage. These bolts can critically strike but do not apply on-hit effects.

TFT5_Item_ForceOfNatureShadow.name: Force of Darkness
TFT5_Item_ForceOfNatureShadow.desc: The holder's team gains +@MaxArmySizeIncrease@ maximum team size, but the player's Little Legend takes +@PercentDamageIncrease@% damage after losing a battle.

TFT5_Item_GuardianAngelShadow.name: Fallen Guardian Angel
TFT5_Item_GuardianAngelShadow.desc: Prevents the holder's first death, placing them in stasis instead. After @StasisDuration@ seconds, they return with @HealthRestorePercent@% Health and shed all negative effects.[Unique - only one per champion]

TFT5_Item_GiantSlayerShadow.name: Spectral Giantslayer
TFT5_Item_GiantSlayerShadow.desc: The holder's Abilities and attacks do @SmallBonusPct@% bonus damage. If the target has more than @HealthThreshold@ maximum Health, the bonus increases to @LargeBonusPct@%.

TFT5_Item_ZzRotPortalShadow.name: Unstable Zz'Rot Portal
TFT5_Item_ZzRotPortalShadow.desc: At the start of combat, the holder taunts enemies within @HexRadius@ hexes.When the holder dies, an Unstable Voidspawn with @ZombieHealth@ Health arises and taunts enemies again. When it dies it deals @ExplosionDamage@ true damage to enemies within @ExplosionHexRange@ hex(es).Voidspawns that arise from summoned units are @SummonedStatReduction@% effective.

TFT5_Item_HextechGunbladeShadow.name: Hextech Gunblade Of Immortality
TFT5_Item_HextechGunbladeShadow.desc: The holder's magic and true damage from Abilities heals the ally with lowest percent Health for @OmniVamp@% of the damage dealt. This heal cannot affect the holder.

TFT5_Item_TrapClawShadow.name: Banshee's Claw
TFT5_Item_TrapClawShadow.desc: When combat begins, the holder and all allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row gain a shield that blocks the first enemy Ability.[Unique - only one per champion]

TFT5_Item_GuinsoosRagebladeShadow.name: Guinsoo's Sacrificial Rageblade
TFT5_Item_GuinsoosRagebladeShadow.desc: Attacks grant +@AttackSpeedPerStack@% bonus Attack Speed for the rest of combat. The bonus Attack Speed can stack any number of times.

TFT5_Item_MorellonomiconShadow.name: Mor-evil-lonomicon
TFT5_Item_MorellonomiconShadow.desc: When the holder deals magic or true damage with their Ability, they burn the target, dealing @BurnPercent@% of the target's maximum Health as true damage over @BurnDuration@ seconds, and reducing healing by @GrievousWoundsPercent@% for the duration of the burn.[Unique - only one per champion]

TFT_Item_CarouselOfChaos_TimeUndilator.name: Time Undilator
TFT_Item_CarouselOfChaos_TimeUndilator.desc: Combat start: Unravel time within an X-pattern, destroying ALL units (including this one!)

TFT16_CarouselOfChaos_GoldGreedOption.name: Gain 15 Gold
TFT16_CarouselOfChaos_GoldGreedOption.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. (Awarded after all players make their decision.)

TFT16_CarouselOfChaos_GoldSplitOption.name: Split 80 Gold With Other Splitters
TFT16_CarouselOfChaos_GoldSplitOption.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold, split evenly among all players that chose this option (rounded down).

TFT_Augment_AllThatShimmersPlus.name: All That Shimmers+
TFT_Augment_AllThatShimmersPlus.desc: Choose a gold-generating Artifact. Gain a Magnetic Remover and @GoldGranted@ gold.

TFT_Augment_ItemCollector2.name: Item Collector II
TFT_Augment_ItemCollector2.desc: Your team gains @BaseHP@ Health. For each unique item they are holding, your team gains bonus @Health@ Health, @AD*100@% Attack Damage, and @AP@% Ability Power.

TFT_Augment_ItemCollector1.name: Item Collector I
TFT_Augment_ItemCollector1.desc: For each unique item they are holding, your team gains @AD*100@% Attack Damage and @AP@% Ability Power.

TFT9_Augment_AllThatShimmers.name: All That Shimmers
TFT9_Augment_AllThatShimmers.desc: Choose a gold-generating Artifact item and gain a Magnetic Remover.

TFT6_Augment_TheGoldenEgg.name: The Golden Egg
TFT6_Augment_TheGoldenEgg.desc: Gain a golden egg that hatches in @EggTurns@ turns for a huge amount of loot. Winning player combat speeds up the hatch timer by an extra turn.

TFT6_Augment_TheGoldenEggHR.name: The Golden Egg
TFT6_Augment_TheGoldenEggHR.desc: Gain a golden egg that hatches in @EggTurns@ turns for a huge amount of loot. Winning player combat speeds up the hatch timer by an extra turn.

TFT7_Augment_LivingForgeHR.name: Living Forge
TFT7_Augment_LivingForgeHR.desc: Gain an Artifact anvil now and after every @NumberOfCombats@ player combats.Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.

TFT8_Augment_SalvageBinPlusHR.name: Salvage Bin+
TFT8_Augment_SalvageBinPlusHR.desc: Gain 1 random completed item now, and 1 component after @NumRounds@ player combats. Selling champions breaks completed items into components (excluding Tactician's items and Emblems).

TFT6_Augment_SalvageBinHR.name: Salvage Bin
TFT6_Augment_SalvageBinHR.desc: Gain 1 random completed item now, and 1 component after @NumRounds@ player combats. Selling champions breaks completed items into components (excluding Tactician's items and Emblems).

TFT9_Augment_WhatTheForge.name: What the Forge
TFT9_Augment_WhatTheForge.desc: Completed items you own (except Tactician's Items and Emblems) are transformed into random Artifacts. Champions gain @Health@ Health per equipped Artifact. Gain @NumAnvil@ Artifact Anvil.

TFT_Augment_SuperstarsSilver.name: Superstars I
TFT_Augment_SuperstarsSilver.desc: Your team deals @BaseBonusDamage*100@% more damage, increased by @BonusDamagePer3Star*100@% for every 3-star champion on your team. Gain @Rerolls@ rerolls.Bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_SuperstarsTotalDamageBonus@%

TFT9_Augment_Dedication.name: Dedication
TFT9_Augment_Dedication.desc: The first time you field at least @NumUnits@ distinct units of the same trait in player combat, gain an Emblem for that trait.

TFT_Augment_Retribution.name: Retribution
TFT_Augment_Retribution.desc: Gain @ItemCount@ Hands of Justice. Allies equipped with Hand of Justice gain Precision and @CritChance*100@% Critical Strike Chance.{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}

TFT_Augment_MinMaxer.name: Min-Max
TFT_Augment_MinMaxer.desc: Gain a Golden Item Remover and @NumItems@ random components.Golden Item Remover is a Magnetic Remover with infinite uses.

TFT_Augment_Indecision2.name: Indecision II
TFT_Augment_Indecision2.desc: In @RoundDelay@ rounds, choose a new augment of the same tier. Gain @Gold@ gold now.

TFT_Augment_ArcaneViktory.name: Arcane Viktor-y
TFT_Augment_ArcaneViktory.desc: After @FirstStunSeconds@ seconds of combat, stun the enemy team for @StunDuration@ seconds. Repeat this after @SecondStunSeconds@ seconds of combat.TFT Macao Open, 2024

TFT_Augment_WaterLotus1.name: Water Lotus I
TFT_Augment_WaterLotus1.desc: Your team gains @CritChance*100@% Critical Strike chance, and their Abilities can critically strike. If an Ability critically strikes, restore @ManaOnCrit@% of your Mana over @ManaDuration@ seconds.

TFT_Augment_EpicRolldown.name: Epic Rolldown
TFT_Augment_EpicRolldown.desc: When you reach Level 8, gain @NumRerolls@ Shop rerolls.Runeterra Reforged Championship, 2023

TFT9_Augment_ThreesACrowd.name: Three's a Crowd
TFT9_Augment_ThreesACrowd.desc: Your team gains @HealthPerUnit@ Health for each unique @Tier@-cost champion on your board.

TFT_Augment_MaxBuild.name: Max Build
TFT_Augment_MaxBuild.desc: Gain a Champion Duplicator, @Gold@ gold, and your next shop contains 5 unique four-cost champions.Galaxies Championship, 2020

TFT_Augment_FiresalePlus.name: Firesale
TFT_Augment_FiresalePlus.desc: Each round, steal a random @CostLimit@-cost or lower champion from the shop. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_MoneyHealsAllWounds.name: Wellness Trust
TFT9_Augment_MoneyHealsAllWounds.desc: Round start: Gain @GoldPerTurn@ gold. If you have at least @GoldThreshhold@ gold, heal @Health@ player health.

TFT_Augment_Indecision1.name: Indecision I
TFT_Augment_Indecision1.desc: In @RoundDelay@ rounds, choose a new augment of the same tier. Gain @Gold@ gold now.

TFT6_Augment_TinyTitans.name: Tiny Titans
TFT6_Augment_TinyTitans.desc: Increase your current and max player health by @heal@.

TFT11_Augment_Common_EverythingMustGo.name: Everything Must Go!
TFT11_Augment_Common_EverythingMustGo.desc: Your champions buy and sell for @cost@ gold. Gain @gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_Survivor.name: Survivor
TFT_Augment_Survivor.desc: Gain @InitialGold@ gold. After @PlayersDead@ players are eliminated, gain @Gold@ more gold.

TFT_Augment_SupportSentinel2.name: Support Golem II
TFT_Augment_SupportSentinel2.desc: Gain @NumOfDummies@ Golem that fights for your team, holding @NumOfItems@ permanently attached Support item(s).

TFT6_Augment_RichGetRicher.name: Rich Get Richer
TFT6_Augment_RichGetRicher.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. Your max interest is increased to @InterestCap@.Interest is extra gold you gain per 10g saved.

TFT_Augment_MarksmansToolbox.name: Marksman's Toolbox
TFT_Augment_MarksmansToolbox.desc: Gain a Sniper's Focus. in @combatnum@ rounds, gain a Fishbones.

TFT_Augment_BulkingUp1.name: Bulking Up I
TFT_Augment_BulkingUp1.desc: Your team gains @BaseHP@ Health. After each round, they gain @IncreasePerRound@ more. (Current Health: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_BulkingUp1Rounds@)

TFT_Augment_Unforgotten.name: Warlord's Honor
TFT_Augment_Unforgotten.desc: Every round, your team gain @Stats@% Attack Damage and Ability Power. Champions start with @StartingStacks@ stack of this effect, and can stack up to @MaxStacks@ times.

TFT_Augment_BulkingUp2.name: Bulking Up II
TFT_Augment_BulkingUp2.desc: Your team gains @BaseHP@ Health. After each round, they gain @IncreasePerRound@ more. (Current Health: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_BulkingUp2Rounds@)

TFT9_Augment_ArmyBuilding.name: Team Building
TFT9_Augment_ArmyBuilding.desc: Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator. Gain another after @PlayerCombatNum@ player combats.This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.

TFT9_Augment_TiniestTitan.name: Tiniest Titan
TFT9_Augment_TiniestTitan.desc: Gain @Heal@ player Health and @Gold@ gold after every player combat. Your Tactician also moves faster.

TFT_Augment_LightningStrike.name: Lightning Strike
TFT_Augment_LightningStrike.desc: After @StrikeDelay@ seconds, lightning strikes the enemy team dealing @MaxHealthDamage*100@% HP true damage and stunning for @StunDuration@ second.

TFT_Augment_ItemRefresh.name: Item Refresh
TFT_Augment_ItemRefresh.desc: Lose all completed items, and gain 2 random components for each item lost. Then gain @ComponentsToGive@ random components.

TFT9_Augment_YoungAndWildAndFree.name: Young and Wild and Free
TFT9_Augment_YoungAndWildAndFree.desc: You can always move freely on Carousel rounds. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT6_Augment_CyberneticImplants1.name: Cybernetic Implants I
TFT6_Augment_CyberneticImplants1.desc: Allies holding an item gain @HP@ Health and @AD*100@% Attack Damage. Gain a B.F. Sword.

TFT_Augment_TacticiansKitchen.name: Tactician's Kitchen
TFT_Augment_TacticiansKitchen.desc: Gain a random Emblem. After @TurnDelay@ rounds, gain a Tactician's Cape.

TFT11_Augment_BaBoom.name: Ba-BOOM!
TFT11_Augment_BaBoom.desc: Your champions deal @BonusDamage*100@% more damage for @Duration@ seconds on every other cast.

TFT6_Augment_HyperRoll.name: Hustler
TFT6_Augment_HyperRoll.desc: You no longer gain interest but gain @Gold@ gold at the start of every player combat round. Gain @InitialGold@ gold now.Interest is extra gold you gain per 10g saved.

TFT_Augment_SupportMiningPlus.name: Support Mining+
TFT_Augment_SupportMiningPlus.desc: Gain a Training Dummy. When it dies @NumDeaths@ times, gain a random Support Item and remove the Training Dummy.

TFT_Augment_DummyPower.name: Dummy Backpacks
TFT_Augment_DummyPower.desc: Your dummies can equip items and use item-related consumables. Gain a Training Dummy.

TFT10_Augment_CrownGuarded.name: Crown Guarded
TFT10_Augment_CrownGuarded.desc: Gain a Crownguard. Your Crownguards' start of combat effect is @effectincrease*100@% stronger and the shield lasts @DurationIncrease@ seconds longer.

TFT_Augment_BigOnes.name: Big Ones
TFT_Augment_BigOnes.desc: Combat start: Your 1-cost champions gain @Health@ max Health and @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp.

TFT6_Augment_BandOfThieves2Plus.name: Band of Thieves II+
TFT6_Augment_BandOfThieves2Plus.desc: Gain @NumGloves@ Thief's Gloves. After @DelayTurns@ player combats, gain another.

TFT_Augment_PIckEms.name: Guess Ahead
TFT_Augment_PIckEms.desc: In @NumRounds@ rounds, get up to @Gold@ gold based on how close you are to your current ranking in the lobby.

TFT_Augment_GiantAndMighty.name: Giant and Mighty
TFT_Augment_GiantAndMighty.desc: Your team becomes large, gaining @FlatHealth@ Health and @PercentHealth*100@% max Health.

TFT6_Augment_CyberneticImplants3.name: Cybernetic Implants III
TFT6_Augment_CyberneticImplants3.desc: Allies holding an item gain @HP@ Health and @AD*100@% Attack Damage. Gain a B.F. Sword.

TFT6_Augment_LudensEcho3.name: Luden's Echo III
TFT6_Augment_LudensEcho3.desc: Every @ManaThreshold@ Mana spent, your units next instance of Ability damage deals an additional @MagicDamage1@-@MagicDamage4@ (based on current Stage) magic damage to the target and a nearby enemy.

TFT_Augment_CloseQuarters.name: Close Quarters
TFT_Augment_CloseQuarters.desc: Your back 2 rows are disabled, but your team gains [STATS TM].

TFT9_Augment_EnshroudingStillness.name: Mana Burn
TFT9_Augment_EnshroudingStillness.desc: All enemies take @MaxHealthPerSecond@% of their max Health as true damage each second until they cast their Ability.Gain a Shroud of Stillness.

TFT6_Augment_CyberneticImplants2.name: Cybernetic Implants
TFT6_Augment_CyberneticImplants2.desc: Allies holding an item gain @HP@ Health and @AD*100@% Attack Damage. Gain a B.F. Sword.

TFT6_Augment_LudensEcho2.name: Luden's Echo II
TFT6_Augment_LudensEcho2.desc: Every @ManaThreshold@ Mana spent, your units next instance of Ability damage deals an additional @MagicDamage1@-@MagicDamage4@ (based on current Stage) magic damage to the target and a nearby enemy.

TFT_Augment_Replication.name: Replication
TFT_Augment_Replication.desc: Choose 1 of 3 components. For the next @RoundsOfBonusItems@ rounds, gain a copy of that component.

TFT10_Augment_CrashTestDummies.name: Crash Test Dummies
TFT10_Augment_CrashTestDummies.desc: Gain @Numdummies@ Training Dummies. Combat start: Your Training Dummies launch themselves towards a group of enemies and Stun them for @stun@ seconds.

TFT6_Augment_LudensEcho1.name: Luden's Echo I
TFT6_Augment_LudensEcho1.desc: Every @ManaThreshold@ Mana spent, your units next instance of Ability damage deals an additional @MagicDamage1@-@MagicDamage4@ (based on current Stage) magic damage to the target and a nearby enemy.

TFT_Augment_InstantGratification.name: Instant Gratification
TFT_Augment_InstantGratification.desc: The first copy of each unlockable 1- @MaxCost@ cost champion you purchase is upgraded to 2-star. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_PoweredByPain.name: Powered By Pain
TFT_Augment_PoweredByPain.desc: When your champions get a kill, they get 5 bonus mana per 100 overkill damage; this bonus increases with significant excess damage.

TFT7_Augment_LuckyGlovesPlus.name: Lucky Gloves+
TFT7_Augment_LuckyGlovesPlus.desc: Thief's Gloves will always give your champions recommended items. Gain @NumGloves@ Sparring Gloves now, then another after @DelayTurns@ player combats.

TFT_Augment_Trifecta1_Set7.name: Trifecta I
TFT_Augment_Trifecta1_Set7.desc: Gain @numunits@ tier-@Tier@ champions. Combat Start: @BuffedNumber@ random tier-@Tier@ champions gain @Health@ Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT9_Augment_GiftsFromTheFallen.name: Gifts from the Fallen
TFT9_Augment_GiftsFromTheFallen.desc: Your team gains @AD@% Attack Damage, @ap@ Ability Power, @Armor@ Armor, and @MR@ Magic Resist. Each time an ally dies, gain these stats again.

TFT_Augment_OopsAllRageblades.name: Anger Issues
TFT_Augment_OopsAllRageblades.desc: All your current and future completed items transform into Guinsoo's Rageblades that grant @ResistStackValue@ Armor and Magic Resist. Every @AttacksPerStack@ Rageblade stacks grant @StackValue@% Attack Damage and Ability Power.

TFT_Augment_Dummify.name: Dummify
TFT_Augment_Dummify.desc: Lose all champions on your board and bench. Gain a Training Dummy with @HealthPercent@% of their combined Health. The Training Dummy gains @HPPerStage@ Health per stage. Gain a non-Tank 2-star @ChampCost@-cost champion.

TFT11_Augment_TrashToTreasure.name: Trash to Treasure
TFT11_Augment_TrashToTreasure.desc: Reforging completed items turns them into a random Artifact and does not consume the reforger. Gain a Reforger and @ComponentAnvils@ Component Anvil(s).

TFT_Augment_BraggingRights.name: Bragging Rights
TFT_Augment_BraggingRights.desc: If you get 1st, a fancy celebration plays. This augment has no other effect, and can be rerolled for free.

TFT_Augment_TrickstersGlassAugment.name: Trickster's Treat
TFT_Augment_TrickstersGlassAugment.desc: Get a Trickster's Glass. Your Trickster's Glass summons clones every @Frequency@ seconds, but each additional clone has @HealthReducedTooltip@% Max Health and @ManaIncreasedTooltip@% Max Mana.

TFT_Augment_PatienceIsAVirtue.name: Patience is a Virtue
TFT_Augment_PatienceIsAVirtue.desc: Gain @InitialRerolls@ rerolls now. Each round, gain @FreeRerolls@ free rerolls if you did not buy a champion last round.

TFT_Augment_DeadlierCaps.name: Deadlier Caps
TFT_Augment_DeadlierCaps.desc: Gain a Rabadon's Deathcap. Rabadon's Deathcaps permanently gain @AP@% Ability Power whenever their holders score a takedown.

TFT_Augment_UnleashTheBeast.name: Unleash The Beast
TFT_Augment_UnleashTheBeast.desc: Gain a Sterak's Gage. When its effect triggers, the holder gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for the rest of combat and immunity to crowd control for @CCImmunityDuration@ seconds.

TFT11_Augment_TinyButDeadly.name: Tiny, but Deadly
TFT11_Augment_TinyButDeadly.desc: Your team becomes small, gaining @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and Movement Speed.

TFT_Augment_PowerUp.name: Augmented Power
TFT_Augment_PowerUp.desc: Your next augment is one tier higher.

TFT7_Augment_UrfsGrabBag2.name: Urf's Grab Bag
TFT7_Augment_UrfsGrabBag2.desc: Gain @NumSpatulas@ Spatula, @NumComponents@ random components, and @NumGold@ gold.

TFT11_Augment_SharingIsCaring.name: Sharing Is Caring
TFT11_Augment_SharingIsCaring.desc: Combat start: You gain @YourGold@ gold and your opponent gains @EnemyGold@ gold.

TFT10_Augment_LittleBuddies_Set7.name: Little Buddies
TFT10_Augment_LittleBuddies_Set7.desc: Your Tier-4 and Tier-5 champions gain @health@ Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for every Tier-1 and Tier-2 champion on your board.

TFT7_Augment_LastStand.name: Last Stand
TFT7_Augment_LastStand.desc: The first time you would be eliminated, you escape death and your team permanently gains @Health@ Health, @Resists@ Armor and Magic Resist, and @Omnivamp@% Omnivamp.

TFT_Augment_ExpensiveHamburger.name: Training Manual
TFT_Augment_ExpensiveHamburger.desc: Gain @BaseHealth@ Health and @BaseAttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Gain a Training Manual, which converts @Gold@ gold into @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and @Health@ Health. Subsequent uses increase the cost and the bonus.Cost: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ExpensiveHamburger_GoldCostTooltip@Giving @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ExpensiveHamburger_ASTotal@% Attack Speed and @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ExpensiveHamburger_HealthTotal@ Health

TFT10_Augment_Scapegoat.name: Scapegoat
TFT10_Augment_Scapegoat.desc: Gain a Training Dummy and @InitialGold@ gold. If it is the first to die each player combat, gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_EndlessConflagration.name: Endless Conflagration
TFT_Augment_EndlessConflagration.desc: Choose a Burn item. Your Burns now stack, increasing the original Burn's damage by @BurnIncreasePerStack*100@%.

TFT_Augment_FoodfightTactics.name: Mess Hall
TFT_Augment_FoodfightTactics.desc: After @EndSeconds@ seconds of combat, your champions gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed and attacks also hurl @ProjectileCount@ delicious projectiles that deal @BaseDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

TFT_Augment_TheBaronsLair.name: Baron's Lair
TFT_Augment_TheBaronsLair.desc: Gain a random Tank item. After @StartSeconds@ seconds of combat, your team gains @Stats@% bonus Attack Damage and Ability Power every second for the rest of combat.TFT Paris Open, 2025

TFT9_Augment_MissedConnections.name: Missed Connections
TFT9_Augment_MissedConnections.desc: Gain a copy of each 1-cost champion.

TFT10_Augment_LuckyStreak_HR.name: Lucky Streak
TFT10_Augment_LuckyStreak_HR.desc: Gain a Gambler's Blade and a Magnetic Remover.Gambler's Blade helps you gain gold.

TFT_Augment_WinOut.name: Win Out
TFT_Augment_WinOut.desc: When you reach level 9, immediately level to 10 and gain @RerollCount@ free Shop rerolls. Gain @InstantXP@ XP now.

TFT9_Augment_ACutAbove.name: A Cut Above
TFT9_Augment_ACutAbove.desc: Gain a Deathblade. Champions holding this item have a @ProcChance*100@% chance to drop @Gold@ gold on kill.

TFT11_Augment_PickOfTheLitter_Plus.name: Pick of the Litter+
TFT11_Augment_PickOfTheLitter_Plus.desc: Open a special Shop with 3 free @ChampionTier@-cost champions. You can only pick 1, but you get @NumCopies@ copies of it.

TFT10_Augment_BlankSlate.name: Blank Slate
TFT10_Augment_BlankSlate.desc: Immediately sell your team (including bench) for @BonusGoldTOOLTIPONLY*100@% of their value. Your next @FreeRerolls@ Shop rerolls this round are free.

TFT11_Augment_ScoreboardScrapper.name: Scoreboard Scrapper
TFT11_Augment_ScoreboardScrapper.desc: Every round, if you're in the bottom @BottomHalf@, your team permanently gains @LoserBoost*100@% Attack Damage and Ability Power. If you're in the Top @UpperHalf@, they have @WinningStatBoost*100@% more Health.

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestGlove_PAIRS.name: Critical Success
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestGlove_PAIRS.desc: Gain a Sparring Glove. After your team's attacks critically strike @StacksForReward@ times, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Critical strikes: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT_Augment_RerollTransfer.name: Reroll Transfer
TFT_Augment_RerollTransfer.desc: For every @AugmentRerollTracked@ unused Augment Reroll, gain @ShopRerollToGrant@ free shop rerolls. Gain @Gold@ gold.Does not include the round this augment is selected.

TFT_Augment_BronzeForLife2.name: Bronze For Life II
TFT_Augment_BronzeForLife2.desc: Your team gains @DamageAmpBonus*100@% Damage Amp and @Resists@ Armor and Magic Resist for each Bronze-tier trait.Damage Amp: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_BronzeForLife_CurrentDamageAmp@%Armor and Magic Resist: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_BronzeForLife_CurrentDurability@

TFT_Augment_AbilityAmplification.name: Spellblade

TFT_Augment_FrontlineFoundation.name: Frontline Foundation
TFT_Augment_FrontlineFoundation.desc: Gain a 2-star 1-cost Tank champion and an Emblem that matches their last-listed trait.

TFT6_Augment_Ascension.name: Ascension

TFT_Augment_Spellsword.name: Spellsword

TFT_Augment_CrownguardSpirit.name: Crown's Will

TFT_Augment_Trifecta1.name: Trifecta I
TFT_Augment_Trifecta1.desc: Gain @numunits@ @Tier@-cost champions.Combat Start: @BuffedNumber@ random @Tier@-cost champions gain @Health@ Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT_Augment_WealthyRehab3.name: Health is Wealth III
TFT_Augment_WealthyRehab3.desc: Your team gains @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp. Get a bonus of @Gold@ gold when your team first accumulates @HealingThreshold@ total champion healing.Total Healing: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_WealthyRehabHealing@

TFT_Augment_EarlyLearning.name: Early Learnings
TFT_Augment_EarlyLearning.desc: Your team gains @NumADAP@% Attack Damage & Ability Power. This increases by @IncPerPlayerCombat@% after each player combat. 1-cost champions gain double.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_EarlyLearning_TRAKey@TFT Vegas Open, 2023

TFT_Augment_SupportMining.name: Support Mining
TFT_Augment_SupportMining.desc: Gain a Training Dummy. When it dies @NumDeaths@ times, gain a random Support Item and remove the Training Dummy.

TFT_Augment_TombRaider2.name: Tomb Raider II

TFT_Augment_WealthyRehab2.name: Health is Wealth II
TFT_Augment_WealthyRehab2.desc: Your team gains @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp. Get a bonus of @Gold@ gold when your team first accumulates @HealingThreshold@ total champion healing.Total Healing: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_WealthyRehabHealing@

TFT_Augment_ParentingForDummies.name: Scapegoat

TFT9_Augment_YouHaveMyBow.name: You Have My Bow

TFT_Augment_TombRaider1.name: Tomb Raider I

TFT_Augment_Crossfire1.name: Crossfire

TFT_Augment_SatedSpellweaver.name: Sated Spellweaver
TFT_Augment_SatedSpellweaver.desc: After casting an Ability, champions gain @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp for @Duration@ seconds. Excess healing is converted to a shield up to @MaxShield@ Health.

TFT_Augment_HeroicEulogy.name: Heroic Eulogy

TFT_Augment_PiercingLotus1.desc: Your team gains @critchance@% Critical Strike chance, and their Abilities can critically strike. Critical strikes @ShredSunderPerc*100@% Shred and Sunder the target for @Duration@ seconds.

TFT_Augment_Crossfire2.name: Piercing Sight

TFT_Augment_Manaflow1.name: Manaflow I

TFT6_Augment_MakeshiftArmor2.name: Makeshift Armor II
TFT6_Augment_MakeshiftArmor2.desc: Allies without items equipped gain @Resists@ Armor and Magic Resist.

TFT7_Augment_TomeOfTraits2.name: Ancient Archives II

TFT_Augment_Manaflow2.name: Manaflow II

TFT6_Augment_MakeshiftArmor3.name: Makeshift Armor III

TFT_Augment_BlossomingLotus1.name: Blossoming Lotus I

TFT9_Augment_CyberneticBulk3.name: Cybernetic Bulk III
TFT9_Augment_CyberneticBulk3.desc: Your champions holding an item gain @health@ Health.

TFT7_Augment_BigFriend.name: Big Friend I

After @Rounds@ rounds, gain all remaining gold.Gold: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_WithinTheMargins@Rounds Remaining: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_WithinTheMarginsRounds@

TFT7_Augment_BestFriends2.name: Best Friends II

TFT_Augment_HowlingGale.name: Howling Gale

TFT_Augment_GroupHug1.name: Group Hug I

Every @ManaPerComponent@ Mana your team spends grants an additional component (max @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT_Augment_TheVidalion_NumComponents@/@ComponentMax@).Mana spent: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT_Augment_TheVidalion_TrackedMana@/@ManaPerComponent@

TFT9_Augment_Martyr.name: Martyr

TFT6_Augment_TomeOfTraits1.name: Ancient Archives I

TFT_Augment_FinalResistance.desc: Each time an allied champion dies, @SunderPercentage@% Shred and Sunder the nearest @NumUnits@ enemies for @Duration@ seconds.Shred: reduces Magic Resist, Sunder: reduces Armor

TFT_Augment_DiversifiedPortfolio2.name: Diversified Portfolio+
TFT_Augment_DiversifiedPortfolio2.desc: Gain @InstantGold@ gold. Each round, gain @GoldRate@ gold for every @TraitsActive@ non-unique traits active.Gold Bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_DiversifiedPortfolio_GoldReturned@

TFT_Augment_RiggedShop.name: Rigged Shop
TFT_Augment_RiggedShop.desc: Your next shop and every @NumRolls@ shops will contain all 3-cost champions.

TFT_Augment_Coronation.name: Coronation
TFT_Augment_Coronation.desc: Gain a Tactician's Crown. Tactician's Crown, Shield, and Cape grant the holder an additional @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed, @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage, and @BonusAP@% Ability Power.

TFT9_Augment_Commander_TeamingUp1.name: Teaming Up
TFT9_Augment_Commander_TeamingUp1.desc: Gain @NumComponents@ random component and @NumChamps@ random 3-cost champions.

TFT6_Augment_RichGetRicherPlus.name: Rich Get Richer+
TFT6_Augment_RichGetRicherPlus.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. Your max interest is increased to @InterestCap@.Interest is extra gold you gain per 10g saved.

TFT_Augment_DiversifiedPortfolio1.name: Diversified Portfolio
TFT_Augment_DiversifiedPortfolio1.desc: Gain @InstantGold@ gold. Each round, gain @GoldRate@ gold for every @TraitsActive@ non-unique traits active.Gold Bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_DiversifiedPortfolio_GoldReturned@

TFT6_Augment_Electrocharge3.name: Electrocharge III
TFT6_Augment_Electrocharge3.desc: Every @AttacksToProc@ attacks an ally takes, they deal @Damage1@-@Damage4@ (based on current Stage) magic damage to nearby enemies (@ICD@ second cooldown).

TFT_Augment_ShippingRoute.name: Shipping Route
TFT_Augment_ShippingRoute.desc: Every loot orb you open creates a copy in Treasure Portal, where they gain value each turn. Sell the Treasure Portal to open all the orbs inside. Gain several bonus orbs now. Portal Value: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ShippingRoute_Tracker@

TFT_Augment_GildedSteel.name: Gilded Steel
TFT_Augment_GildedSteel.desc: Gain @NumUnits@ non-Tank 5-cost champions. If you field at least one 5-cost champion, your 1 to 4-cost champions gain @Durability*100@% Durability.K.O. Coliseum Tactician's Crown, 2025

TFT6_Augment_Electrocharge2.name: Electrocharge II
TFT6_Augment_Electrocharge2.desc: Every @AttacksToProc@ attacks an ally takes, they deal @Damage1@-@Damage4@ (based on current Stage) magic damage to nearby enemies (@ICD@ second cooldown).

TFT7_Augment_AxiomArc2.name: Axiom Arc II
TFT7_Augment_AxiomArc2.desc: Your team gains @ManaGain@ Mana on kill.

TFT_Augment_Spellblades.name: Spellblades
TFT_Augment_Spellblades.desc: Whenever one of your champion casts, their next attack deals bonus magic damage equal to @abilitypower*100@% of their Ability Power.

TFT11_Augment_BloodBank.name: Lunch Money
TFT11_Augment_BloodBank.desc: Every @Damage@ damage you deal to enemy tacticians gives you @Gold@ gold.Total Payouts: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT11_BloodBankPayoutTotal@ Gold

TFT6_Augment_Electrocharge1.name: Electrocharge I
TFT6_Augment_Electrocharge1.desc: Every @AttacksToProc@ attacks an ally takes, they deal @Damage1@-@Damage4@ (based on current Stage) magic damage to nearby enemies (@ICD@ second cooldown).

TFT6_Augment_WoodlandCharm.name: Woodland Charm
TFT6_Augment_WoodlandCharm.desc: Your highest Health champion is cloned. The clone has @CloneHealth*100@% bonus Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% bonus Attack Speed but cannot equip items.

TFT9_Augment_Commander_TeamingUp2.name: Teaming Up II
TFT9_Augment_Commander_TeamingUp2.desc: Gain @NumItems@ random Support item and @NumUnits@ random 4-cost champions.

TFT_Augment_NineLives.name: Nine Lives
TFT_Augment_NineLives.desc: Set your current and max player Health to @NumberOfLives@. On combat loss, you only lose @HealthLoss@ health and gain loot. You can't gain health.

TFT6_Augment_ItemGrabBag2.name: Item Grab Bag II
TFT6_Augment_ItemGrabBag2.desc: Gain @NumItems@ random completed items and @NumReforgers@ Reforgers.

TFT9_Augment_DravenSpoilsOfWar.name: Spoils of War I
TFT9_Augment_DravenSpoilsOfWar.desc: Enemies have a @LootDropChance*100@% chance to drop loot when killed.

TFT9_Augment_NotToday.name: Not Today
TFT9_Augment_NotToday.desc: Gain an Edge of Night. Champions holding this item gain @AS@% Attack Speed.

TFT_Augment_WorthTheWaitGold.name: Worth the Wait
TFT_Augment_WorthTheWaitGold.desc: Gain a random @UnitTier@-cost champion. Gain another copy of them at the start of each round for the rest of the game.Champion: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_WorthTheWait@

TFT_Augment_BranchingOutPlus.name: Branching Out+
TFT_Augment_BranchingOutPlus.desc: Gain a random Emblem and a Reforger.Reforgers allow you to remake any item.

TFT_Augment_TheOneWhoKnocks.name: The One Who Knocks
TFT_Augment_TheOneWhoKnocks.desc: Gain a Silvermere Dawn. In @combatnum@ rounds, gain a Horizon Focus.One causes Stuns, and in 3 rounds, the other makes those Stuns hurt...a lot.

TFT_Augment_ChemtechOverdrive.name: Chemtech Overdrive
TFT_Augment_ChemtechOverdrive.desc: Open @NumHexes@ portals to Zaun on random hexes in the second row. Any unit that starts combat in a portal gains @Health@ Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed, and drops @Gold@ gold on death.

TFT10_Augment_GoingLong.name: Going Long
TFT10_Augment_GoingLong.desc: You no longer gain interest. Gain @Gold@ gold now. Round start: gain @XP@ XP.Interest is extra gold you gain per 10g saved.

TFT_Augment_ForgeRod.name: Staffsmith
TFT_Augment_ForgeRod.desc: Gain @NumItems@ random completed items that build from Needlessly Large Rod.

TFT9_Augment_UnleashedArcana.name: Unleashed Arcana
TFT9_Augment_UnleashedArcana.desc: Gain a Jeweled Gauntlet, a Rabadon's Deathcap, a Needlessly Large Rod, and a Magnetic Remover.Useful for Magic Carries or Magic Casters!

TFT_Augment_ExpectedUnexpectedness.name: Expected Unexpectedness
TFT_Augment_ExpectedUnexpectedness.desc: Now and at the start of the next @NumStages@ stages, roll 3 dice. Gain various rewards based on their total.

TFT_Augment_Dominance3.name: Dominance
TFT_Augment_Dominance3.desc: For every @PerSurvivingUnit@ surviving champions after winning a player combat, gain @Gold@ gold. Gain @Experience@ XP.

TFT_Augment_PetriciteArmorI.name: Petricite Armor I
TFT_Augment_PetriciteArmorI.desc: Your team takes @ReducedAbilityDamage*100@% reduced damage from champion abilities.

TFT_Augment_PlaceboPlus.name: Placebo+
TFT_Augment_PlaceboPlus.desc: Your team gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_SpiritLink2.name: Spirit Link II
TFT_Augment_SpiritLink2.desc: Champions restore @BaseRegenBonus*100@% of their max Health every @RegenPeriod@ seconds. Increase the healing by @RegenPerMissingHP@% for every 10 missing player Health.

TFT_Augment_Firesale.name: Firesale
TFT_Augment_Firesale.desc: Each round, steal a random @CostLimit@-cost or lower champion from the shop. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_PhreakyFridayPlus.name: Phreaky Friday +
TFT9_Augment_PhreakyFridayPlus.desc: Gain an Infinity Force. After @CombatNum@ player combats, gain another.Infinity Force: Artifact that offers tons of offensive and defensive stats

TFT6_Augment_TriForce1.name: Tri Force I
TFT6_Augment_TriForce1.desc: Your Tier 3 champions gain @Health@ Health, @Mana@ starting Mana, and @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed.

TFT_Augment_QuietQuitting.name: Quiet Quitting
TFT_Augment_QuietQuitting.desc: For the next @NumRounds@ player combats, you cannot use your shop. After, gain @Gold@ gold and a Completed Item Anvil.

TFT_Augment_VoidborneHR.name: Void Swarm
TFT_Augment_VoidborneHR.desc: Gain a Zz'Rot Portal and another after every @NumberOfCombats@ player combats. Zz'Rot Portal Voidlings gain @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed and @BonusOmnivamp*100@% Omnivamp.

TFT_Augment_HoldTheLine.name: Hold the Line
TFT_Augment_HoldTheLine.desc: Allies in your back 2 rows gain @AP@% Ability Power and @AD*100@% Attack Damage for each ally that starts combat in your front row.

TFT_Augment_TacticiansKitchen_HR.name: Tactician's Kitchen
TFT_Augment_TacticiansKitchen_HR.desc: Gain a random Emblem. After @TurnDelay@ rounds, gain a Tactician's Cape.

TFT_Augment_SpiritLink1.name: Spirit Link
TFT_Augment_SpiritLink1.desc: Champions restore @BaseRegenBonus*100@% of their max Health every @RegenPeriod@ seconds. Increase the healing by @RegenPerMissingHP@% for every 10 missing player Health.

TFT6_Augment_SunfireBoard.name: Sunfire Board
TFT6_Augment_SunfireBoard.desc: Combat Start: Burn all enemies for @TotalBurnPercent@% of their max Health over @Duration@ seconds and reduce healing received by @GrievousWoundsPercent@%.

TFT6_Augment_TriForce3.name: Tri Force III
TFT6_Augment_TriForce3.desc: Your Tier 3 champions gain @Health@ Health, @Mana@ starting Mana, and @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed.

TFT9_Augment_IronAssets.name: Iron Assets
TFT9_Augment_IronAssets.desc: Gain a component anvil and @Gold@ gold.

TFT6_Augment_TriForce2.name: Tri Force II
TFT6_Augment_TriForce2.desc: Your Tier 3 champions gain @Health@ Health, @Mana@ starting Mana, and @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed.

TFT_Augment_HeftyRolls.name: Hefty Rolls
TFT_Augment_HeftyRolls.desc: Your team gains @Health@ Health and size for each time you've rolled this game. Gain @Gold@ gold. Rolls: @TFTUnitProperty.Item:TFT_Augment_HeftyRolls_NumRolls@ Health: @TFTUnitProperty.Item:TFT_Augment_HeftyRolls_HealthBonus@

TFT_Augment_FeedTheFlames.name: Feed the Flames
TFT_Augment_FeedTheFlames.desc: Gain a Sunfire Cape. Your team gains @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp when attacking Burning enemies.

TFT_Augment_BeggarsCanBeChoosers.name: Beggars Can Be Choosers
TFT_Augment_BeggarsCanBeChoosers.desc: You get +@ExtraRolls@ Augment rerolls for all other augment choices. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT7_Augment_ThinkFast.name: Think Fast
TFT7_Augment_ThinkFast.desc: Shop rerolls are free until the end of this round. Traits and other augments do not benefit from these free Shops. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_Invested.name: Invested
TFT_Augment_Invested.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. After every combat, gain 1 Shop reroll for every @GoldPerReroll@ gold above @GoldThreshold@ (max @MaxGold@ gold).

TFT_Augment_SupportSentinel.name: Support Golem I
TFT_Augment_SupportSentinel.desc: Gain @NumOfDummies@ Golem that fights for your team, holding @NumOfItems@ permanently attached Support item(s).

TFT_Augment_InstantGratification2.name: Instant Gratification
TFT_Augment_InstantGratification2.desc: The first time you unlock each champion, immediately gain a copy.

TFT_Augment_Contested.name: Contested
TFT_Augment_Contested.desc: After each player combat, gain @GoldPerInstance@ gold for every @PlayerPerInstance@ other players who have fielded the leftmost champion on your bench this game.

TFT_Augment_BlazingSoul2.name: Blazing Soul II
TFT_Augment_BlazingSoul2.desc: Combat start: Your highest Attack Speed champion gains @AbilityPower@% Ability Power and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Repeat on another ally every @TransferDuration@ seconds.

TFT9_Augment_HedgeFundPlus.name: Hedge Fund+
TFT9_Augment_HedgeFundPlus.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. Your max interest is increased to @InterestCap@.Interest is extra gold you gain per 10g saved.

TFT10_Augment_SticksAndStones.name: Sticks And Stones
TFT10_Augment_SticksAndStones.desc: Champions that aren't holding items Shred and Sunder enemies for @Duration@ seconds. Physical damage Sunders for @SunderPercentage@%, and magic damage Shreds for @ShredPercentage@%.Shred: reduces Magic Resist, Sunder: reduces Armor

TFT6_Augment_BlueBattery2.name: Blue Battery II
TFT6_Augment_BlueBattery2.desc: Your units gain @BonusAP@ Ability Power. After casting their Ability, set the caster's Mana to @ManaRestore@.

TFT_Augment_GoldDestinyPlus.name: Gold Destiny+
TFT_Augment_GoldDestinyPlus.desc: Gain a random Gold Augment and @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_MoneyHungryPlus.name: Money Hungry+
TFT_Augment_MoneyHungryPlus.desc: Gain @InstantGold@ gold now, then @StageGold@ gold at the start of every stage. Picking up gold makes your Tactician larger.

TFT9_Augment_CombatCaster.name: Combat Caster
TFT9_Augment_CombatCaster.desc: Your team gains @shieldamount1@-@shieldamount4@ Shield for @Duration@ seconds after casting their Ability. The Shield amount scales with round of the game.

TFT_Augment_CloningFacility.name: Cloning Facility
TFT_Augment_CloningFacility.desc: Empower the hex in the center of the third row. Summon a clone of the champion in it with @HealthPercent*100@% base Health and @ManaPercent*100@% increased Mana cost.

TFT_Augment_HardBargain.name: Hard Bargain
TFT_Augment_HardBargain.desc: You cannot choose your Carousel rewards. Gain an additional @PlayerHealth@ player Health and @Gold@ Gold each carousel round.When you do not pick a Carousel Reward, you are given an unpicked champion and the item it carries

TFT_Augment_GoldenGamble.name: Golden Gamble
TFT_Augment_GoldenGamble.desc: Gain @gold@ gold and flip a coin. If heads, gain a Radiant Lucky Item Chest. If tails, gain @CompletedAnvils@ Completed item anvils.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_GoldenGamble_Tooltip@

TFT6_Augment_BlueBattery1.name: Blue Battery I
TFT6_Augment_BlueBattery1.desc: Your units gain @BonusAP@ Ability Power. After casting their Ability, set the caster's Mana to @ManaRestore@.

TFT_Augment_ExpensiveHamburger_Item.name: Training Manual
TFT_Augment_ExpensiveHamburger_Item.desc: Use this on a champion to spend @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ExpensiveHamburger_GoldCostTooltip@ gold and permanently give your team @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ExpensiveHamburger_HealthPerStack@ health and @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ExpensiveHamburger_ASPerStack@% attack speed

TFT7_Augment_AFK.name: AFK
TFT7_Augment_AFK.desc: You cannot perform actions for the next @RoundsToSkip@ rounds. Afterwards, gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_HedgeFund.name: Hedge Fund
TFT9_Augment_HedgeFund.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. Your max interest is increased to @InterestCap@.Interest is extra gold you gain per 10g saved.

TFT_Augment_BackupDancers.name: Backup Dancers
TFT_Augment_BackupDancers.desc: Combat start: Every @Period@ seconds, champions in your @BenchSlots@ rightmost bench slots grant your team @AttackSpeedPerUnit*100@% Attack Speed per slot.

TFT_Augment_TwoMuchValue.name: Two Much Value
TFT_Augment_TwoMuchValue.desc: Gain @FreeRerolls@ reroll for every @UnitCount@ unique 2-cost champions fielded last player combat. Gain @NumChampsToGrant@ 2-cost champions.

TFT_Augment_HeroicGrabBagPlus.name: Heroic Grab Bag+
TFT_Augment_HeroicGrabBagPlus.desc: Gain @LesserDuplicatorAmount@ Lesser Champion Duplicators and @Gold@ gold.This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.

TFT_Augment_WaitForIt.name: Wait For It
TFT_Augment_WaitForIt.desc: Your teams mana costs are increased by @ManaIncrease*100@%, but all Ability damage is increased by @DamageIncrease*100@%.

TFT_Augment_Changeling.name: Changeling
TFT_Augment_Changeling.desc: Get a @StarLevel@-star Changeling, which benefits from all active traits. Each round, gain a consumable which turns the Changeling into a random champion. The unit's tier goes up each stage. Gain a golden remover.

TFT9_Augment_StationarySupport3.name: Stationary Support III
TFT9_Augment_StationarySupport3.desc: Gain @NumOfDummies@ Training Dummy with @NumOfItems@ permanently attached Support item(s).

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestBow.name: Backup Bows
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestBow.desc: Gain a Recurve Bow. After your team attacks @StacksForReward@ times, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Attacks: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT_Augment_ShareTheSpotlight.name: Share the Spotlight
TFT_Augment_ShareTheSpotlight.desc: Gain a spotlight in the back corner of your board. All units in the spotlight gain @DamagePercent*100@% Damage Amp, @OmnivampPercent*100@% Omnivamp, and @ManaPerSecond@ Mana per second.

TFT_Augment_QuestingHero.name: Questing Hero
TFT_Augment_QuestingHero.desc: The first time you field @NumChampsNeeded@ distinct unlockable champions in a player combat, gain a massive reward!

TFT_Augment_PlotArmor.name: Plot Armor
TFT_Augment_PlotArmor.desc: Your team gains @BaseResists@ Armor and Magic Resist. After falling below @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, increase this to @EnhancedTotalResists@ for the rest of combat.

TFT9_Augment_StationarySupport2.name: Stationary Support II
TFT9_Augment_StationarySupport2.desc: Gain @NumOfDummies@ Training Dummy with @NumOfItems@ permanently attached Support item(s).

TFT_Augment_AnUpgradedJourney.name: An Upgraded Adventure
TFT_Augment_AnUpgradedJourney.desc: After upgrading @NumUpgrades@ champions to 3-star, gain a magnificent reward. Gain @NumStartUnits@ 1-cost champions.

TFT9_Augment_StationarySupport1.name: Stationary Support I
TFT9_Augment_StationarySupport1.desc: After @PlayerCombatRounds@ player combats, gain @NumOfDummies@ Training Dummy(s) with @NumOfItems@ permanently attached Support item(s).

TFT_Augment_PocketRecombobulator.name: Pocket Recombobulator
TFT_Augment_PocketRecombobulator.desc: Get @NumRecombobulator@ Pocket Recombobulators, a consumable that transforms a 1 or 2-cost champion into one of a higher cost. They keep their Star level. Also receive @NumReforgers@ Reforgers.

TFT9_Augment_LongDistanceRelationship2.name: Long Distance Pals
TFT9_Augment_LongDistanceRelationship2.desc: Combat start: Your 2 units furthest from each other form a bond, sharing @PercentShare*100@% of their Armor, Magic Resist, Attack Damage, and Ability Power with each other.

TFT9_Augment_BuildingACollectionPlusPlus.name: Buried Treasures+
TFT9_Augment_BuildingACollectionPlusPlus.desc: Gain @UpfrontItems@ random item components now, then 1 more at the start of the next @RoundsOfBonusItems@ rounds.

TFT_Augment_WarmogsBuckle.name: Heart of Steel
TFT_Augment_WarmogsBuckle.desc: Gain a Steadfast Heart. Every @SecondsPerGain@ seconds of combat its holder survives, Steadfast Heart gains additional @Health@ permanent max Health.

TFT7_Augment_SacrificialPact.name: Cruel Pact
TFT7_Augment_SacrificialPact.desc: Buying XP costs @HealthCost@ player health instead of 4 gold. Heal @Heal@ player health before each player combat. Gain @Gold@ now.

TFT_Augment_ChargeTransfer1.name: Charge Transfer I
TFT_Augment_ChargeTransfer1.desc: Your team gains @DamageAmp@% Damage Amp. @OverkillPercent*100@% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

TFT9_Augment_SocialDistancing.name: Social Distancing I
TFT9_Augment_SocialDistancing.desc: Combat start: Allies with no adjacent teammates gain @Stats@% Attack Damage and @Stats@ Ability Power.

TFT_Augment_HeroicGrabBagPlusPlus.name: Heroic Grab Bag++
TFT_Augment_HeroicGrabBagPlusPlus.desc: Gain @LesserDuplicatorAmount@ Lesser Champion Duplicators and @Gold@ gold.This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.

TFT_Augment_StockMarket.name: Stock Market
TFT_Augment_StockMarket.desc: At the start of every stage, the cost of each unit tier shuffles.

TFT_Augment_WaterLotus2.name: Water Lotus II
TFT_Augment_WaterLotus2.desc: Your team gains @CritChance*100@% Critical Strike chance, and their Abilities can critically strike. If an Ability critically strikes, restore @ManaOnCrit@% of your Mana over @ManaDuration@ seconds.

TFT6_Augment_SalvageBin.name: Salvage Bin
TFT6_Augment_SalvageBin.desc: Gain 1 random completed item now, and 1 component after @NumRounds@ player combats. Selling champions breaks completed items into components (excluding Tactician's items and Emblems).

TFT_Augment_ChargeTransfer2.name: Charge Transfer II
TFT_Augment_ChargeTransfer2.desc: Your team gains @DamageAmp@% Damage Amp. @OverkillPercent*100@% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

TFT11_Augment_RadiantRefactor.name: Radiant Refactor
TFT11_Augment_RadiantRefactor.desc: Gain a Masterwork Upgrade and @anvils@ component anvil.Masterwork Upgrade upgrades an item to Radiant!

TFT9_Augment_LearningFromExperience2.name: Patient Study
TFT9_Augment_LearningFromExperience2.desc: After player combat, gain @winxp@ XP if you won or @lossxp@ XP if you lost.

TFT6_Augment_HighEndShopping.name: High End Shopping II
TFT6_Augment_HighEndShopping.desc: Champions appear in your Shop as if you were 1 level higher. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_BigSpender.name: Big Spender
TFT_Augment_BigSpender.desc: Your team gains @Value@% Attack Damage and Ability Power for every 1 gold in champion value on your board (Gold Value: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_BigSpender_Value@g).

TFT_Augment_BRB.name: BRB
TFT_Augment_BRB.desc: You cannot perform actions for the next @RoundsToSkip@ rounds. Afterwards, gain @Anvils@ completed item anvils.

TFT_Augment_UrfsGambit.name: Urf's Gambit
TFT_Augment_UrfsGambit.desc: If you win your next player combat, gain a Spatula. If you lose, gain a Frying Pan. Gain a component anvil and @Gold@ gold now.

TFT11_Augment_Slammin.name: Slammin'
TFT11_Augment_Slammin.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. After each player combat, if there are no items on your bench (other than consumables), gain @XP@ XP.

TFT_Augment_BadLuckProtection.name: Bad Luck Protection
TFT_Augment_BadLuckProtection.desc: Your team can no longer critically strike. Convert each @CritChancePercent@% Critical Strike Chance into @ADPerCrit*100@% Attack Damage. Gain a Sparring Gloves.

TFT9_Augment_OneHundredDuckSizedHorses.name: Endless Hordes
TFT9_Augment_OneHundredDuckSizedHorses.desc: Gain +@TeamSize@ maximum team size, but your units can only hold 1 item and their total health is reduced by @HealthReduction*100@%. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_InvestmentStrategy2.name: Investment Strategy II
TFT_Augment_InvestmentStrategy2.desc: Your champions gain @HealthPerInterest@ permanent max Health per interest you earn. Your max interest is increased to @MaxInterest@. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_BronzeForLifeI.name: Bronze For Life I
TFT_Augment_BronzeForLifeI.desc: Your team gains @DamageAmpBonus*100@% Damage Amp for each Bronze-tier trait.Damage Amp Bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_BronzeForLife_CurrentDamageAmp@%

TFT_Augment_InvestmentStrategy1.name: Investment Strategy I
TFT_Augment_InvestmentStrategy1.desc: Your champions gain @HealthPerInterest@ permanent max Health per interest you earn.

TFT_Augment_Voidborne.name: Void Swarm
TFT_Augment_Voidborne.desc: Gain a Zz'Rot Portal and another after every @NumberOfCombats@ player combats. Zz'Rot Portal Voidlings gain @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed and @BonusOmnivamp*100@% Omnivamp.

TFT_Augment_CosmicRestart.name: Cosmic Restart
TFT_Augment_CosmicRestart.desc: Call upon the Gods to sell all units on your board and bench. Gain @Emblems@ random Emblems and @Rerolls@ free Shop rerolls.

TFT7_Augment_DarkflightZekes.name: Relic of the Past
TFT7_Augment_DarkflightZekes.desc: Gain a special Darkflight Zeke's Herald from the past.

TFT_Augment_DualPurpose.name: Dual Purpose
TFT_Augment_DualPurpose.desc: The first time you buy XP each round, gain @goldtogive@ gold. Whenever you buy XP, reroll your Shop.

TFT_Augment_HighVoltage.name: High Voltage
TFT_Augment_HighVoltage.desc: Gain an Ionic Spark. Your Ionic Sparks have +@hexincreasetooltip@ hex radius and do @effectincrease*100@% more damage.

TFT_Augment_SoloLeveling.name: Solo Leveling
TFT_Augment_SoloLeveling.desc: For the next @NumCombats@ combats, your team size is 1 but the champion you field has massively increased stats. Gain @XPPerKill@ XP for every kill they get. Afterwards, gain @NumComponents@ item components.

TFT11_Augment_SoulCollector.name: Blood Money
TFT11_Augment_SoulCollector.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold per @HealthPerGold@ Health your Tactician loses.

TFT6_Augment_Distancing.name: Exiles I
TFT6_Augment_Distancing.desc: Your champions that start combat with no adjacent champions gain a @MaxHealthShield@% max Health shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

TFT9_Augment_CapriciousForge.name: Capricious Forge
TFT9_Augment_CapriciousForge.desc: Gain a Blacksmith's Gloves, which equips two random Artifacts each round.Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.

TFT9_Augment_ReturnOnInvestment.name: Return on Investment
TFT9_Augment_ReturnOnInvestment.desc: When you reroll your Shop @RollCount@ times, gain a Tactician's Crown.(Refreshes this game: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_ReturnOnInvestmentRolls@)

TFT_Augment_SpellcastersToolbox.name: Spellcaster's Toolbox
TFT_Augment_SpellcastersToolbox.desc: Gain a Manazane. In @combatnum@ rounds, gain a Zhonya's Paradox.

TFT_Augment_EfficientShopper2.name: Efficient Shopper II
TFT_Augment_EfficientShopper2.desc: For the next @NumStages@ carousels, gain a second copy of the champion taken and its item. Gain @Gold@ gold now.

TFT6_Augment_TradeSectorPlus.name: Trade Sector+
TFT6_Augment_TradeSectorPlus.desc: Gain a free Shop reroll every round. Gain @Gold@ gold now.

TFT_Augment_TreasureHunt.name: Treasure Hunt
TFT_Augment_TreasureHunt.desc: Gain a locked chest each Stage between now and Stage @MaxNumChests@. Unlock each chest when you spend @GoldNeededPerChest@ gold on Shop rerolls. These chests persist until opened.

TFT_Augment_Superstars.name: Superstars II
TFT_Augment_Superstars.desc: Your team deals @BaseBonusDamage*100@% more damage, increased by @BonusDamagePer3Star*100@% for every 3-star champion on your team. Gain @Rerolls@ rerolls.Bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_SuperstarsTotalDamageBonus@%

TFT_Augment_ComponentExpert.name: Component Expert
TFT_Augment_ComponentExpert.desc: Break apart all current completed items into components. You can no longer build completed items but champions can equip multiple components, and components grant @StatMultiplier@x their usual stats. Gain @NumAnvil@ component anvils.

TFT10_Augment_TwinTerror1.name: Twin Terror I
TFT10_Augment_TwinTerror1.desc: When you field exactly 2 copies of a champion, they both gain @BonusStats*10@ Health and @BonusStats@% Attack Speed. Anytime you 3-star, gain a 2-star copy.

TFT10_Augment_Vampirism.name: Vampirism I
TFT10_Augment_Vampirism.desc: Your team gains @BaseHP@ Health. Gain another @BonusHPPer5MissingHealth@ Health and @OmnivampPercentPer5MissingHealth*100@% Omnivamp per 5 missing player health.(Omnivamp: healing for a percent of damage dealt)

TFT9_Augment_OneHundredDuckSizedHorsesPl.name: Endless Hordes +
TFT9_Augment_OneHundredDuckSizedHorsesPl.desc: Gain +@TeamSize@ maximum team size, but your units can only hold 1 item and their total health is reduced by @HealthReduction*100@%. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_MagicRollMinus.name: Slightly Magic Roll
TFT_Augment_MagicRollMinus.desc: Roll a die. Gain rewards based on the number rolled.Reward: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_MagicRoll@

TFT10_Augment_TwinTerror2.name: Twin Terror II
TFT10_Augment_TwinTerror2.desc: When you field exactly 2 copies of a champion, they both gain @BonusStats*10@ Health and @BonusStats@% Attack Speed. Anytime you 3-star, gain a 2-star copy.

TFT11_Augment_Accomplice.name: Accomplice
TFT11_Augment_Accomplice.desc: Get a Support Thief's Gloves and @gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_TwoTrick.name: Two Trick
TFT_Augment_TwoTrick.desc: Gain a random 2-star 2-cost and 2 random 2-star 1-cost champions.

TFT_Augment_Mentorship1.name: Mentorship I
TFT_Augment_Mentorship1.desc: If an ally starts combat next to a higher-cost ally, it gains @AS*100@% Attack Speed and @Health@ Health.

TFT10_Augment_InspiringEpitaph.name: Inspiring Epitaph
TFT10_Augment_InspiringEpitaph.desc: When an champion dies, the nearest ally gains a @ShieldRatio*100@% max Health Shield and @AttackSpeed*100@% stacking Attack Speed.

TFT_Augment_Mentorship2.name: Mentorship II
TFT_Augment_Mentorship2.desc: If an ally starts combat next to a higher-cost ally, it gains @AS*100@% Attack Speed and @Health@ Health.

TFT_Augment_BlazingSoul.name: Blazing Soul I
TFT_Augment_BlazingSoul.desc: Combat start: Your highest Attack Speed champion gains @AbilityPower@% Ability Power and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Repeat on another ally every @TransferDuration@ seconds.

TFT_Augment_FindYourCenter.name: Find Your Center
TFT_Augment_FindYourCenter.desc: Your champion that starts combat in the center of the front row gains @BonusDamage*100@% Damage Amp and @BonusHealth*100@% max Health.

TFT10_Augment_GoodForSomethingSilver.name: Good For Something I
TFT10_Augment_GoodForSomethingSilver.desc: Champions that aren't holding items have a @dropchance*100@% chance to drop @Gold@ gold on death.

TFT_Augment_VoidTouched.name: Shred Spread
TFT_Augment_VoidTouched.desc: Gain a Void Staff. Enemies who die while Shredded explode, dealing @MinDamageTOOLTIPONLY@-@MaxDamageTOOLTIPONLY@ magic damage and @ShredPercentage@% Shredding enemies within @ExplosionHexRange@ hexes for @ShredDuration@ seconds.

TFT8_Augment_SalvageBinPlus.name: Salvage Bin+
TFT8_Augment_SalvageBinPlus.desc: Gain 1 random completed item now, and 1 component after @NumRounds@ player combats. Selling champions breaks completed items into components (excluding Tactician's items and Emblems).

TFT6_Augment_Keepers1.name: Keepers I
TFT6_Augment_Keepers1.desc: Combat start: Grant units with adjacent allies a @ShieldHealth@ Health Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. This Shield stacks.

TFT_Augment_ItemSpiritVisage.name: Spirit of Redemption
TFT_Augment_ItemSpiritVisage.desc: Gain a Spirit Visage. Every @Frequency@ seconds, Spirit Visage heals allies within @HexRadius@ hex for @MissingHealth@% of their missing Health.

TFT_Augment_SpeedyDoubleKill.name: Speedy Double Kill
TFT_Augment_SpeedyDoubleKill.desc: Gain a Guinsoo's Rageblade. When 2 players are eliminated, gain @GoldAmount@ gold.Fates Championship, 2021

TFT_Augment_ForwardThinking.name: Forward Thinking
TFT_Augment_ForwardThinking.desc: Lose all your gold. After @Rounds@ player combats, gain back the original amount and another @BaseGold@ gold.Incoming Gold: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ForwardThinkingGold@

TFT_Augment_Dhampyr1.name: Vampiric Vitality I
TFT_Augment_Dhampyr1.desc: You heal for @Omnivamp*100@% of the damage you deal to enemy Tacticians. Your team gains @OmnivampStatBonus*100@% Omnivamp.

TFT10_Augment_LowInterestRates.name: Low Interest Rates
TFT10_Augment_LowInterestRates.desc: Your max interest is capped at @InterestCap@ gold but you gain @Gold@ gold at the start of every player combat.Interest is extra gold you gain per 10g saved.

TFT6_Augment_Keepers2.name: Keepers II
TFT6_Augment_Keepers2.desc: Combat start: Grant units with adjacent allies a @ShieldHealth@ Health Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. This Shield stacks.

TFT10_Augment_LuckyStreak.name: Lucky Streak
TFT10_Augment_LuckyStreak.desc: Gain a Gambler's Blade and a Magnetic Remover.Gambler's Blade helps you gain gold.

TFT_Augment_Dhampyr2.name: Vampiric Vitality II
TFT_Augment_Dhampyr2.desc: You heal for @Omnivamp*100@% of the damage you deal to enemy Tacticians. Your team gains @OmnivampStatBonus*100@% Omnivamp.

TFT_Augment_Flexible.name: Flexible
TFT_Augment_Flexible.desc: Gain @StartingEmblems@ random Emblem. At the start of every Stage, gain a random Emblem. Your team gains @HPPerEmblem@ Health for each Emblem they are holding.

TFT_Augment_RestartMission.name: Restart Mission
TFT_Augment_RestartMission.desc: Remove all champions on your board and bench. Gain @3Cost@ random 2-star 3-costs, @2Cost@ 2-star 2-costs, and @1Cost@ 2-star 1-cost champion.

TFT_Augment_DuoQueue.name: Duo Queue
TFT_Augment_DuoQueue.desc: Gain @NumUnits@ random 5-cost champions and @NumComponents@ copies of a random component.

TFT7_Augment_Preparation3.name: Preparation III
TFT7_Augment_Preparation3.desc: Champions on your bench permanently gain @HPBonus@ Health, @Stats@% Attack Damage, and @Stats@% Ability Power every round. Champions start with @StartingStacks@ stack of this effect, and can stack up to @MaxStacks@ times.

TFT7_Augment_Preparation2.name: Preparation II
TFT7_Augment_Preparation2.desc: Champions on your bench permanently gain @HPBonus@ Health, @Stats@% Attack Damage, and @Stats@% Ability Power every round. Champions start with @StartingStacks@ stack of this effect, and can stack up to @MaxStacks@ times.

TFT_Augment_GodWillowsGrove.name: God Willow's Grove
TFT_Augment_GodWillowsGrove.desc: The champion in your right-most bench slot contributes its non-unique traits as though it was on your team.

TFT6_Augment_Traitless2.name: Built Different
TFT6_Augment_Traitless2.desc: Your allies with no Traits active gain @HP1@-@HP4@ Health and @AS1@-@AS4@% Attack Speed (based on current Stage).

TFT_Augment_BloodRage.name: Blood Rage
TFT_Augment_BloodRage.desc: Your allies gain @BaseDamageAmp*100@-@DamageAmpCap*100@% Damage Amp based on their missing Health. Maximum Damage Amp gained at @MissingHealthCap@% Health.

TFT9_Augment_RedBuff.name: Blistering Strikes
TFT9_Augment_RedBuff.desc: Your team's attacks Burn their targets for @BurnPercent@% of their max Health over @Duration@ seconds. Attacks also reduce their targets' healing received by @HealingReductionPct@%.

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestTear_PAIRS.name: Flowing Tears
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestTear_PAIRS.desc: Gain a Tear of the Goddess. After your team spends @StacksForReward@ Mana, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Mana spent: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT6_Augment_Traitless3.name: Built Different III
TFT6_Augment_Traitless3.desc: Your allies with no Traits active gain @HP1@-@HP4@ Health and @AS1@-@AS4@% Attack Speed (based on current Stage).

TFT_Augment_Artifactory.name: Artifactory
TFT_Augment_Artifactory.desc: At the start of each turn, your benched completed items transform into a random Artifact item. Gain @NumItems@ Artifact Anvil and @NumRemovers@ Removers.

TFT11_Augment_TwoforOne.name: Two for One
TFT11_Augment_TwoforOne.desc: Each round, get a copy of the first champion you buy that costs 3 or less.

TFT9_Augment_DangerousToGoAlone.name: Parting Gifts
TFT9_Augment_DangerousToGoAlone.desc: When a champion dies, the nearest ally with open slots receives a temporary copy of an item they were holding and a @shieldratio*100@% max Health Shield.

TFT11_Augment_Slammin_Plus.name: Slammin'+
TFT11_Augment_Slammin_Plus.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold and @XPNow@ XP now. After each player combat, if there are no items on your bench (other than consumables), gain @XP@ XP.

TFT6_Augment_Diversify2.name: Stand United II
TFT6_Augment_Diversify2.desc: Gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage and @AP@% Ability Power for each non-unique Trait active across your team.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_Diversify_TRAKEY_Holder@

TFT_Augment_WithinTheMarginsPlus.name: Within the Margins+
TFT_Augment_WithinTheMarginsPlus.desc: Start with a pool of @MaxGold@ gold. After each combat, subtract @MinusGoldPerUnit@ gold for each remaining champion alive on either team. After @Rounds@ rounds, gain all remaining gold.Gold: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_WithinTheMargins@Rounds Remaining: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_WithinTheMarginsRounds@

TFT_Augment_TrappersDelight.name: Trapper's Delight
TFT_Augment_TrappersDelight.desc: Gain @NumDummies@ Training Dummies. When your dummies die, they explode and stun enemies within @StunStartRadius@ hexes for @StunStartDuration@ seconds. Every @StunIncrement@ seconds, the duration and size increase to a maximum of @StunMaxDuration@ seconds and @StunMaxRadius@ hexes.

TFT6_Augment_MaxLevel10.name: Level Up!
TFT6_Augment_MaxLevel10.desc: When you buy XP, gain an additional @XP@. Gain @InitialXP@ immediately.

TFT6_Augment_Diversify3.name: Stand United III
TFT6_Augment_Diversify3.desc: Gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage and @AP@% Ability Power for each non-unique Trait active across your team.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_Diversify_TRAKEY_Holder@

TFT6_Augment_ThrillOfTheHunt1.name: Thrill of the Hunt I
TFT6_Augment_ThrillOfTheHunt1.desc: Your champions heal @MissingHPHeal@ Health on kill.

TFT6_Augment_Traitless1.name: Built Different I
TFT6_Augment_Traitless1.desc: Your allies with no Traits active gain @HP1@-@HP4@ Health and @AS1@-@AS4@% Attack Speed (based on current Stage).

TFT6_Augment_SecondWind2.name: Second Wind II
TFT6_Augment_SecondWind2.desc: After @Delay@ seconds of combat, your team heals @HealPercent@% of their missing Health.

TFT_Augment_TwinGuardians.name: Twin Guardians
TFT_Augment_TwinGuardians.desc: If you have exactly @NumUnits@ allies in your first row, grant them @BonusHealth@ bonus Health, @BonusAR@ Armor, and @BonusMR@ Magic Resist.

TFT6_Augment_SecondWind1.name: Second Wind
TFT6_Augment_SecondWind1.desc: After @Delay@ seconds of combat, your team heals @HealPercent@% of their missing Health.

TFT_Augment_GoldenGamblePlus.name: Golden Gamble+
TFT_Augment_GoldenGamblePlus.desc: Gain @gold@ gold and flip a coin. If heads, gain a Radiant Lucky Item Chest. If tails, gain @CompletedAnvils@ Completed item anvils.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_GoldenGamble_Tooltip@

TFT_Augment_AnExaltedAdventure.name: An Exalted Adventure
TFT_Augment_AnExaltedAdventure.desc: Gain three 2-cost champions. If you 3-star two of them, gain an orb filled with loot. Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator at the start of next @NumStages@ stages.Champions: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ExaltedAdventure_Champs@, @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ExaltedAdventure_Champs2@, @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ExaltedAdventure_Champs3@

TFT6_Augment_Diversify1.name: Stand United
TFT6_Augment_Diversify1.desc: Gain @AD*100@% Attack Damage and @AP@% Ability Power for each non-unique Trait active across your team.Current Bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_Diversify_ADCounter@% %i:scaleAD% @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_Diversify_APCounter@% %i:scaleAP%

TFT_Augment_FivePointedStar.name: Five-Pointed Star
TFT_Augment_FivePointedStar.desc: Now and at the start of each stage, the first champion you buy with a cost equal to the stage number is 2-star. Gain @Gold@ gold and a 2-star 1-cost champion now.

TFT6_Augment_JeweledLotus.name: Jeweled Lotus I
TFT6_Augment_JeweledLotus.desc: Your team gains @CritChance@% Critical Strike Chance and Precision.{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}

TFT9_Augment_StarsAreBorn.name: Stars Are Born
TFT9_Augment_StarsAreBorn.desc: The first 1-cost and 2-cost champions you buy are instantly upgraded to 2-star. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_FeelingLucky.name: Feeling Lucky
TFT_Augment_FeelingLucky.desc: Gain @BaseGold@ gold, then flip a coin. If heads, gain @GoldForHeads@ more gold.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_FeelingLucky_Tooltip@

TFT6_Augment_ThrillOfTheHunt2.name: Thrill of the Hunt II
TFT6_Augment_ThrillOfTheHunt2.desc: Your champions heal @MissingHPHeal@ Health on kill.

TFT_Augment_AdvancedLoan.name: Advanced Loan
TFT_Augment_AdvancedLoan.desc: Gain @Gold@ Gold. Your next augment is one tier lower.

TFT_Augment_TheGoldenDragon.name: The Golden Dragon
TFT_Augment_TheGoldenDragon.desc: Gain a Mogul's Mail. Champions holding Mogul's Mail take up 2 team slots but gain @BonusHealth@ Health and @DurabilityPct*100@% Durability.Mogul's Mail gives gold as well as combat power.Dragonlands Championship, 2022

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestRod.name: Continuous Conjuration
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestRod.desc: Gain a Needlessly Large Rod. After your team deals @StacksForReward@ magic damage, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Damage dealt: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT_Augment_TraitTracker.name: Trait Tracker
TFT_Augment_TraitTracker.desc: The first time you activate @NumTraits@ non-unique traits for 1 combat, gain @NumEmblems@ random emblems.

TFT_Augment_Trifecta2_Set7.name: Trifecta II
TFT_Augment_Trifecta2_Set7.desc: Gain @numunits@ tier-@Tier@ champions. Allies gain @TeamAttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Combat Start: @BuffedNumber@ random tier-@Tier@ champions gain @Health@ Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT6_Augment_BinaryAirdrop.name: Binary Airdrop
TFT6_Augment_BinaryAirdrop.desc: Combat start: Champions holding 2 items gain a random 3rd completed item. Gain @ComponentCount@ random component now.

TFT9_Augment_IndomitableWill.name: Indomitable Will
TFT9_Augment_IndomitableWill.desc: When your team scores a takedown, they shed all negative effects and become immune to crowd control for @duration@ seconds.

TFT6_Augment_OneTwoFive.name: One, Two, Five!
TFT6_Augment_OneTwoFive.desc: Gain @NumComponents@ random component, @Gold@ gold, and @NumChamps@ random 5-cost champion.

TFT_Augment_InfinityProtection.name: Infinity Protection
TFT_Augment_InfinityProtection.desc: Gain @GoldAmount@ gold now. On Stage 3-7, gain an Infinity Force. Infinity Force gives allies in the same row a @HealthPercent@% Health shield.Monsters Attack Championship, 2023

TFT10_Augment_LearningToSpell.name: Learning to Spell
TFT10_Augment_LearningToSpell.desc: Your team gains @StartingAP@ bonus Ability Power, and permanently gains @AP@ Ability Power every @NumTakedowns@ takedowns.

TFT_Augment_FortuneFavorsTheBold.name: Fortune Favors the Bold
TFT_Augment_FortuneFavorsTheBold.desc: Winning combat against a player will give bonus orbs. The longer your loss streak, the bigger the payout.

TFT_Augment_ForgeAFriend.name: Forge a Friend
TFT_Augment_ForgeAFriend.desc: The next 1-cost champion you buy is 3-star. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_PandorasPocketLint.name: Pandora's Pocket Lint
TFT_Augment_PandorasPocketLint.desc: Alternate between gaining a Magnetic Remover and Reforger every @NumRounds@ rounds. Gain a random component after every carousel.

TFT9_Augment_AllNatural2.name: All Natural II
TFT9_Augment_AllNatural2.desc: Champions that aren't holding items gain @health@ Health and heal for @Healing*100@% of their max Health each second.

TFT_Augment_HomeCooking.name: Care Package
TFT_Augment_HomeCooking.desc: Now and at the start of the next @NumStages@ Stages, receive a care package with loot and @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_ForgeSword.name: Swordsmith
TFT_Augment_ForgeSword.desc: Gain @NumItems@ random completed items that build from B.F. Sword.

TFT_Augment_CalculatedEnhancement.name: Calculated Enhancement
TFT_Augment_CalculatedEnhancement.desc: Each combat, @NumUnits@ random champions in your last two rows gain @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage and @BonusAP@ Ability Power.

TFT11_Augment_EpochPlus.name: Epoch+
TFT11_Augment_EpochPlus.desc: Now, and at the start of every stage, gain @XP@ XP and @Rerolls@ free rerolls.

TFT_Augment_FinalPolish.name: Final Polish
TFT_Augment_FinalPolish.desc: Gain a Support Anvil and a completed item anvil.

TFT11_Augment_GoldenRemover.name: The Golden Remover
TFT11_Augment_GoldenRemover.desc: Gain a Golden Remover and component item anvil.Golden Remover is an Item Remover with infinite uses.

TFT9_Augment_BuildingACollection.name: Buried Treasures I
TFT9_Augment_BuildingACollection.desc: Gain a random item component now and at the start of the next @roundsofbonusitems@ rounds.

TFT9_Augment_EarlyEducation.name: Early Education
TFT9_Augment_EarlyEducation.desc: Your team permanently gains @AP@ Ability Power whenever they kill an enemy. Combat start: Your team gains @StartingAP@ bonus Ability Power.

TFT_Augment_FuriousBlows.name: Kahunahuna
TFT_Augment_FuriousBlows.desc: Every @NumAttacks@th attack deals bonus true damage equal to @PercentAD*100@% Basic Attack Damage.

TFT_Augment_AxiomArc3.name: Axiom Arc III
TFT_Augment_AxiomArc3.desc: Your allies gain @ManaGain@ Mana on kill. Gain a completed item Anvil.

TFT_Augment_FutureSight2.name: Future Sight II
TFT_Augment_FutureSight2.desc: You can see who you will fight next. Gain @NumDummies@ Training Dummies, each equipped with a Zephyr or Shroud of Stillness.

TFT_Augment_MuseumHeist.name: Component Heist
TFT_Augment_MuseumHeist.desc: After @NumberOfCombats@ player combats, gain 1 of every item component. Gain a random component now.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_MuseumHeist_TooltipTRAKey@ @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_MuseumHeist_CompleteTRAKey@

TFT_Augment_ForgeBow.name: Bowsmith
TFT_Augment_ForgeBow.desc: Gain @NumItems@ random completed items that build from Recurve Bow.

TFT_Augment_RanduinsImmovableObject.name: Immovable Object
TFT_Augment_RanduinsImmovableObject.desc: Gain a Randuin's Omen. Its range is increased by 1 hex and its effect is increased by @effectincrease*100@%.

TFT_Augment_AuraFarming.name: Aura Farming
TFT_Augment_AuraFarming.desc: Gain a @StarLevel@-star 5-cost champion holding a recommended item. You cannot field it until Stage @UnlockStage@-@UnlockRound@.

TFT_Augment_BeltOverflow.name: Belt Overflow
TFT_Augment_BeltOverflow.desc: Gain @NumItems@ Giant's Belts. Your Giant's Belts grant +@BonusHealth@ bonus Health.

TFT_Augment_ForgedInStrength.name: Forged in Strength
TFT_Augment_ForgedInStrength.desc: Gain @NumArtifacts@ random Artifact. When you drop below @HealthThreshold@ Health, gain @NumMoreArtifacts@ more random Artifacts.Remix Rumble Championship, 2023

TFT_Augment_EyeForAnEye.name: Eye For An Eye
TFT_Augment_EyeForAnEye.desc: For every @AllyDeaths@ ally champions that die, gain a random component (max @NumComponents@).Deaths Remaining: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_EyeForAnEyeDeaths@

TFT9_Augment_PhreakyFriday.name: Phreaky Friday
TFT9_Augment_PhreakyFriday.desc: Gain an Infinity Force. After @CombatNum@ player combats, gain another.Infinity Force: Artifact that offers tons of offensive and defensive stats

TFT6_Augment_VerdantVeil.name: Verdant Veil
TFT6_Augment_VerdantVeil.desc: Your units are immune to crowd control effects for the first @Duration@ seconds of combat and gain @BonusAS*100@% bonus Attack Speed.

TFT_Augment_TeslaCoil.name: Tesla Coil
TFT_Augment_TeslaCoil.desc: Each of your allies with @MinItems@ items equipped emits @NumArcs@ arcs of lightning every @Frequency@ seconds, dealing @Stage2Damage@-@Stage6Damage@ magic damage based on stage.

TFT_Augment_TraitTree.name: The Trait Tree
TFT_Augment_TraitTree.desc: Gain @NumOfEmblems@ random Emblems, a Reforger, and @Gold@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_HighEndSector.name: Shopping Spree
TFT9_Augment_HighEndSector.desc: When you level up, gain a number of free shop refreshes equal to your level+@BonusRollPerLevel@. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_SavingsAccount.name: Savings Account
TFT_Augment_SavingsAccount.desc: After you earn @GoldRequired@ gold in interest, gain @GoldToGain@ gold. Your max interest is increased to @InterestCap@. Gain @GoldNow@ gold now.Gold earned: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_SavingsAccount_Tracker@

TFT_Augment_BlacksmithTraining.name: Blacksmith Training
TFT_Augment_BlacksmithTraining.desc: Whenever you build an item, gain a completed item anvil instead. That anvil always offers the item built + @NumOptions@ other options. Gain a random component.

TFT_Augment_CraftedCrafting.name: Crafted Crafting
TFT_Augment_CraftedCrafting.desc: Whenever you craft a completed item, gain @Rerolls@ rerolls.

TFT9_Augment_JeweledLotus.name: Jeweled Lotus I
TFT9_Augment_JeweledLotus.desc: Your team gains @CritChance@% Critical Strike Chance and Precision.{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}

TFT9_Augment_ImpromptuInventions.name: Scrappy Inventions
TFT9_Augment_ImpromptuInventions.desc: Combat start: Up to @MaxComponents@ equipped components turn into completed items for the rest of combat. Gain a component at the start of the next @NumStages@ stages.

TFT_Augment_Incoming.name: Lit Fuse
TFT_Augment_Incoming.desc: Allies that start in the back two rows split @Mana@ total Mana after @DelaySeconds@ seconds of combat.

TFT_Augment_BirthdayReunion.name: Birthday Reunion
TFT_Augment_BirthdayReunion.desc: Gain a random 2-star 2-cost champion. When you reach Level @FirstLevelBreakpoint@, gain a Thief's Gloves. When you reach Level @SecondLevelBreakpoint@, gain a random 2-star 5-cost champion.Inkborn Fables Tactician's Crown, 2024

TFT11_Augment_LethalTempo.name: Lethal Tempo
TFT11_Augment_LethalTempo.desc: When your team attacks, they gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed, up to @AttackSpeed*100*MaxStacks@%.Your team gains @AttackSpeed*100@% stacking Attack Speed every time they attack, up to 10 stacks.

TFT7_Augment_CursedCrown.name: Cursed Crown
TFT7_Augment_CursedCrown.desc: Gain +@MaxArmySizeIncrease@ max team size and your team gains @DurabilityBonus*100@% Durability, but you take double player damage when you lose a player combat.

TFT11_Augment_RainingGoldPlus.name: Raining Gold+
TFT11_Augment_RainingGoldPlus.desc: Gain @InstantGold@ gold now and @RoundGold@ gold every round.

TFT9_Augment_InfernalContract.name: Infernal Contract
TFT9_Augment_InfernalContract.desc: Your max level is 7. Gain @augmentgold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_ExclusiveCustomization2.name: Exclusive Customization II
TFT_Augment_ExclusiveCustomization2.desc: Gain @ItemCount@ Lucky Item Chests, a Magnetic Remover, and @Gold@ gold.Use a Lucky Item Chest on a champion to choose from an armory of recommended items!

TFT9_Augment_CustomerIsAlwaysRight.name: Component Buffet
TFT9_Augment_CustomerIsAlwaysRight.desc: Whenever you would get a component, gain a component anvil instead. Gain a random component now.The anvil offers 4 choices.

TFT11_Augment_Prizefighter.name: Prizefighter
TFT11_Augment_Prizefighter.desc: Gain @component@ item components. Every @WinsNeeded@ wins gives you an item component.

TFT10_Augment_HeroicGrabBag.name: Heroic Grab Bag
TFT10_Augment_HeroicGrabBag.desc: Gain @LesserDuplicatorAmount@ Lesser Champion Duplicators and @Gold@ gold.This item allows you to copy a 3-cost or less champion.

TFT_Augment_ExclusiveCustomization.name: Exclusive Customization
TFT_Augment_ExclusiveCustomization.desc: Gain a Lucky Item Chest, a Magnetic Remover, and @Gold@ gold.Use a Lucky Item Chest on a champion to choose from an armory of recommended items!

TFT7_Augment_Preparation.name: Preparation I
TFT7_Augment_Preparation.desc: Champions on your bench permanently gain @HPBonus@ Health, @Stats@% Attack Damage, and @Stats@% Ability Power every round. Champions start with @StartingStacks@ stack of this effect, and can stack up to @MaxStacks@ times.

TFT_Augment_InvestedPlusPlus.name: Invested++
TFT_Augment_InvestedPlusPlus.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. After every combat, gain 1 Shop reroll for every @GoldPerReroll@ gold above @GoldThreshold@ (max @MaxGold@ gold).

TFT_Augment_DawnbringersBlessing1.name: Combat Bandages I
