TFT_Augment_DawnbringersBlessing1.desc: The first time each ally unit falls below @HealthThreshold*100@% health, they restore @FlatHealing1@-@flathealing3@ health (based on stage) over @Duration@ seconds.

TFT_Augment_WandOverflow.name: Wand Overflow
TFT_Augment_WandOverflow.desc: Gain @NumItems@ Needlessly Large Rods. Your Needlessly Large Rods grant +@BonusStat*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT9_Augment_RollTheDice.name: Radiant Rascal
TFT9_Augment_RollTheDice.desc: Gain a Rascal's Gloves item. This equips 2 random Radiant items every round.Radiant items are very powerful versions of completed items.

TFT_Augment_GreaterMoonlight.name: Greater Moonlight
TFT_Augment_GreaterMoonlight.desc: Combat start: @NumUnits@ random 1-cost champion is upgraded to 4-star for that round and gains @ADBonus*100@% Attack Damage and @APBONUS@% Ability Power.

TFT_Augment_DawnbringersBlessing2.name: Combat Bandages II
TFT_Augment_DawnbringersBlessing2.desc: The first time each ally unit falls below @HealthThreshold*100@% health, they restore @FlatHealing1@-@flathealing3@ health (based on stage) over @Duration@ seconds.

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestBelt_PAIRS.name: Extra Buckles
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestBelt_PAIRS.desc: Gain a Giant's Belt. After your team takes @StacksForReward@ damage, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Damage taken: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT_Augment_SpreadingRootsPlus.name: Spreading Roots+
TFT_Augment_SpreadingRootsPlus.desc: Gain @NumOfEmblems@ random Emblems, a Reforger, and @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_AllForOneII.name: One For All II
TFT_Augment_AllForOneII.desc: Your team gains @PercHP*100@% max Health and @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp for each unique one-cost champion on your board. Gain @NumChampsToGrant@ one-costs.

TFT9_Augment_Commander_Ascension.name: Ascension
TFT9_Augment_Commander_Ascension.desc: After @Delay@ seconds of combat, your team gains @DamageAmp@% Damage Amp.

TFT_Augment_Lineup.name: Lineup
TFT_Augment_Lineup.desc: Your team gains @Resistances@ Armor and Magic Resist for each ally that starts combat in the front two rows.

TFT9_Augment_PandorasItems2.name: Pandora's Items II
TFT9_Augment_PandorasItems2.desc: Round start: items on your bench are randomized.Gain @NumComponents@ random components.

TFT_Augment_LuxurySubscription.name: Luxury Subscription
TFT_Augment_LuxurySubscription.desc: Gain a package containing a 5-cost champion, a 2-star 1-cost champion, and @Gold@ gold.At the start of the next @FutureChampionCount@ stages, gain the package again.

TFT_Augment_BoosterPack.name: Booster Pack
TFT_Augment_BoosterPack.desc: Gain @TotalValue@ gold of random champions. (At least one @GuaranteedCost@-cost guaranteed!)(Each champion has a small chance of being holographic!)

TFT9_Augment_SilverTicket.name: Golden Ticket
TFT9_Augment_SilverTicket.desc: Each time your Shop is rerolled, you have a @RerollPercent@% chance to gain a free reroll. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_GoldenGamblePlusPlus.name: Golden Gamble++
TFT_Augment_GoldenGamblePlusPlus.desc: Gain @gold@ gold and flip a coin. If heads, gain a Radiant Lucky Item Chest. If tails, gain @CompletedAnvils@ Completed item anvils.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_GoldenGamble_Tooltip@

TFT_Augment_GlassCannonII.name: Glass Cannon II
TFT_Augment_GlassCannonII.desc: Allies that start combat in the back row begin combat at @Health*100@% Health but gain @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp.

TFT6_Augment_Recombobulator.name: Recombobulator
TFT6_Augment_Recombobulator.desc: Champions on your board permanently transform into random champions 1 cost tier higher (max 5). Gain @NumRemovers@ Magnetic Removers.

TFT11_Augment_OverEncumbered.name: Over Encumbered
TFT11_Augment_OverEncumbered.desc: For the next stage, you only get @BenchSlots@ bench slots. After, get @Components@ item components.

TFT9_Augment_HedgeFundPlusPlus.name: Hedge Fund++
TFT9_Augment_HedgeFundPlusPlus.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. Your max interest is increased to @InterestCap@.Interest is extra gold you gain per 10g saved.

TFT10_Augment_LittleBuddies.name: Little Buddies
TFT10_Augment_LittleBuddies.desc: Your 4-cost and 5-cost champions gain @health@ Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for every 1-cost and 2-cost champion on your board.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_LittleBuddies_Tooltip@

TFT_Augment_DarkAlleyDealings.name: Dark Alley Dealings
TFT_Augment_DarkAlleyDealings.desc: Gain a Suspicious Trenchcoat. After @CombatNum@ player combats, gain a Trickster's Glass.

TFT_Augment_EfficientShopper.name: Efficient Shopper
TFT_Augment_EfficientShopper.desc: For the next @NumStages@ carousels, gain a second copy of the champion taken. Gain @Gold@ gold now.

TFT_Augment_Overheal.name: Overheal
TFT_Augment_Overheal.desc: Every third attack deals @BonusDamage*100@% damage and heals @PercentHeal*100@% of the damage. Excess healing is converted to a shield up to @MaxShield@ Health.

TFT9_Augment_TransfusionPlusPlus.name: Transfusion III
TFT9_Augment_TransfusionPlusPlus.desc: Your units gain @BaseHP@ Health, plus @BonusHPPerMissingHealth@ Health per missing Tactician Health.

TFT7_Augment_DarkflightResurrect.name: Dark Resurrection
TFT7_Augment_DarkflightResurrect.desc: The Darkflight sacrifice returns after @ResurrectTime@ seconds of combat with @HealthBonus@% increased max Health, @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp, and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed

TFT_Augment_ThornPlatedArmor.name: Thorn-Plated Armor
TFT_Augment_ThornPlatedArmor.desc: Gain a Bramble Vest. Your Bramble Vests deal @damageamp1*100@-@damageamp4*100@% more damage (based on Stage).

TFT_Augment_TimeSkip.name: Time Skip
TFT_Augment_TimeSkip.desc: Disable your Shop for the next @PenaltyTurns@ rounds. Then gain @Experience@ XP.

TFT_Augment_AdvancedLoanPlus.name: Advanced Loan+
TFT_Augment_AdvancedLoanPlus.desc: Gain @Gold@ Gold. Your next augment is one tier lower.

TFT9_Augment_PumpingUp3.name: Pumping Up III
TFT9_Augment_PumpingUp3.desc: Your team gains @BaseAS@% Attack Speed. After each round, they gain @IncreasePerRound@% more. (Current Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_PumpingUp3Rounds@%)

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestBow_PAIRS.name: Backup Bows
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestBow_PAIRS.desc: Gain a Recurve Bow. After your team attacks @StacksForReward@ times, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Attacks: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT10_Augment_ShockTreatment.name: Shock Treatment
TFT10_Augment_ShockTreatment.desc: Gain a Statikk Shiv. Your Statikk Shivs' chain lightning effects deal @tooltipincreaseddamage1*100@-@tooltipincreaseddamage2*100@% more damage (based on stage level).

TFT_Augment_NarrowMind.name: Narrow Mind
TFT_Augment_NarrowMind.desc: For the rest of the game you have only have @NumBenchSlots@ bench slots, but your rerolls cost @RerollCost@g. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_PumpingUp2.name: Pumping Up II
TFT9_Augment_PumpingUp2.desc: Your team gains @BaseAS@% Attack Speed. After each round, they gain @IncreasePerRound@% more. (Current Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_PumpingUp2Rounds@%)

TFT_Augment_VerticallyInclined.name: Vertically Inclined
TFT_Augment_VerticallyInclined.desc: Your team gains @BaseDamageAmp@% Damage Amp.Gain @FullDamageAmp@% Damage Amp instead if you have fewer active non-unique traits than your opponent.

TFT_Augment_ItemCrownguard.name: Second Coronation
TFT_Augment_ItemCrownguard.desc: Gain a Crownguard. At @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, Crownguard's start of combat effect triggers again at @EffectMultiplier*100@% power.

TFT_Augment_CalledShot.name: Called Shot
TFT_Augment_CalledShot.desc: Set your win streak to @Streak@. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT6_Augment_TradeSector2.name: Commerce Core
TFT6_Augment_TradeSector2.desc: Gain @RerollsNow@ free Shop rerolls now and @RerollCount@ every round for the rest of the game.

TFT9_Augment_WhatDoesntKillYou.name: What Doesn't Kill You
TFT9_Augment_WhatDoesntKillYou.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold after losing a player combat. Gain a random component after every @RoundsPerComponent@ losses.Losses until next component: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT9_Augment_WhatDoesntKillYou_Counter@

TFT_Augment_EyeForAnEyePlus.name: Eye For An Eye+
TFT_Augment_EyeForAnEyePlus.desc: Gain a random component. For every @AllyDeaths@ ally champions that die, gain another component (max @NumComponents@).Deaths Remaining: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_EyeForAnEyeDeaths@

TFT_Augment_SearchForTheYordleLord.name: An Upgraded Adventure
TFT_Augment_SearchForTheYordleLord.desc: After upgrading @NumUpgrades@ champions to 3-star, gain a magnificent reward. Gain @NumStartUnits@ 1-cost champions.

TFT6_Augment_CyberneticShell1.name: Cybernetic Shell I
TFT6_Augment_CyberneticShell1.desc: Your champions holding an item gain @Health@ Health and @Resists@ Armor.

TFT_Augment_MarksMan.name: Focused Fire
TFT_Augment_MarksMan.desc: Your team gains @BaselineAD*100@% Attack Damage. Every @ProcDelay@ seconds, they gain @ADPerProc*100@% more.

TFT_Augment_SideEffects.name: Side Effects
TFT_Augment_SideEffects.desc: When an ally is healed, they deal @HealConversionPct*100@% of the healing to their target as magic damage. Every @HealInterval@ seconds, allies heal for @HealPct*100@% of their max Health.

TFT_Augment_InvestedPlus.name: Invested+
TFT_Augment_InvestedPlus.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold. After every combat, gain 1 Shop reroll for every @GoldPerReroll@ gold above @GoldThreshold@ (max @MaxGold@ gold).

TFT_Augment_GhostOfUnitsPast.name: Ghost of Friends Past
TFT_Augment_GhostOfUnitsPast.desc: Whenever an allied champion dies, your current team and all future allies permanently gain @HealthPerStack@ health, @ADPerStack*100@% Attack Damage, or @APPerStack@ Ability Power, based on the dying champion's role.Health: @TFTUnitProperty.Item:TFT_Augment_GhostOfUnitsPast_Health@Attack Damage: @TFTUnitProperty.Item:TFT_Augment_GhostOfUnitsPast_AD*100@% Ability Power: @TFTUnitProperty.Item:TFT_Augment_GhostOfUnitsPast_AP@

TFT_Augment_GolemPower.name: Geared-Up Golems
TFT_Augment_GolemPower.desc: Your golems can equip items and gain consumables. Gain a golem.

TFT_Augment_BodyguardTraining.name: Bodyguard Training
TFT_Augment_BodyguardTraining.desc: Allies gain @BaseResistGained@ Armor and Magic Resist, increased by @ResistsPerLevel@ per player level.Gizmos & Gadgets Championship, 2022

TFT11_Augment_RainingGold.name: Raining Gold
TFT11_Augment_RainingGold.desc: Gain @InstantGold@ gold now and @RoundGold@ gold every round.

TFT6_Augment_CyberneticShell3.name: Cybernetic Shell III
TFT6_Augment_CyberneticShell3.desc: Your champions holding an item gain @Health@ Health and @Resists@ Armor.

TFT_Augment_CryMeARiver.name: Cry Me A River
TFT_Augment_CryMeARiver.desc: Gain a Tear of the Goddess. Your team gains @RegenBonus@ Mana Regen. After @DelayTime@ seconds in combat, increase this to @UpgradedRegenBonus@.

TFT_Augment_DelayedShipment.name: Delayed Shipment
TFT_Augment_DelayedShipment.desc: After @Combats@ player combats, choose one of the following Artifacts: Manazane, Sniper's Focus, Hullcrusher.Rounds remaining: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_DelayedShipment_Counter@

TFT6_Augment_CyberneticShell2.name: Cybernetic Shell II
TFT6_Augment_CyberneticShell2.desc: Your champions holding an item gain @Health@ Health and @Resists@ Armor.

TFT6_Augment_MetabolicAccelerator.name: Metabolic Accelerator
TFT6_Augment_MetabolicAccelerator.desc: Gain @Heal@ player health after every player combat. Your Tactician also moves faster.

TFT9_Augment_Idealism.name: Idealism
TFT9_Augment_Idealism.desc: Gain a Hand of Justice. Champions holding this item deal @DamageAmp*100@% increased damage.

TFT_Augment_MagicRoll.name: A Magic Roll
TFT_Augment_MagicRoll.desc: Roll 3 dice. Gain rewards based on their total.Reward: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_MagicRoll@

TFT_Augment_SwordOverflow.name: Sword Overflow
TFT_Augment_SwordOverflow.desc: Gain @NumItems@ B.F. Swords. Your B.F. Swords grant +@BonusStat*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT_Augment_TheTower.name: The Tower
TFT_Augment_TheTower.desc: Gain a giant Training Dummy with increased Health (increases with Stage). Every @ZapInterval@ seconds, it zaps the @ZapCount@ nearest enemies dealing @MaxHealthPct*100@% max Health true damage.

TFT_Augment_WeStickTogether.name: We Stick Together
TFT_Augment_WeStickTogether.desc: Gain a random Emblem and a completed item anvil. Allies that share a trait with that Emblem gain @ASPercent@% Attack Speed. @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_WeStickTogether_Tooltip@Into The Arcane Tactician's Crown, 2025

TFT_Augment_SilverDestinyPlusPlus.name: Silver Destiny++
TFT_Augment_SilverDestinyPlusPlus.desc: Gain a random Silver Augment and @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestSword_PAIRS.name: Carve a Path
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestSword_PAIRS.desc: Gain a B.F. Sword. After your team deals @StacksForReward@ physical damage, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Damage dealt: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT6_Augment_ClearMind.name: Clear Mind
TFT6_Augment_ClearMind.desc: If there are no champions on your bench at the end of player combat, gain @XP@ XP.

TFT_Augment_PerfectLoss.name: Precise Planning
TFT_Augment_PerfectLoss.desc: When you win or lose combat by @UnitThreshold@ or fewer units, gain @GoldToGive@ gold next round.

TFT_Augment_WorthTheWaitPrismatic.name: Worth the Wait II
TFT_Augment_WorthTheWaitPrismatic.desc: Gain @InitialCopies@ copies of a random @unittier@-cost champion. Gain another copy of them at the start of each round for the rest of the game.Champion: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_WorthTheWait@

TFT9_Augment_YouHaveMySword.name: You Have My Sword
TFT9_Augment_YouHaveMySword.desc: Gain a B.F. Sword. Your units gain @AD@% Attack Damage.

TFT7_Augment_MikaelsGift.name: Better Together
TFT7_Augment_MikaelsGift.desc: Aura items that buff your team have their effects increased by @AuraIncreasePercent*100@%. Gain a Locket of the Iron Solari.

TFT_Augment_TitanicTitan.name: Titanic Titan
TFT_Augment_TitanicTitan.desc: Increase your current and max player Health by @Heal@. On carousel rounds you are released earlier, but are much slower.

TFT_Augment_ItemLadder.name: Item Ladder
TFT_Augment_ItemLadder.desc: Gain a temporary item that unequips and transforms at the start of each round. The item quality increases each Stage.

TFT_Augment_Misfits.name: Misfits
TFT_Augment_Misfits.desc: Your team gains @Health@ Health for each active Unique trait. Gain a Rhaast and a Miss Fortune.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_Misfits_TotalHealthTooltip@Unique traits belong to 1 champion and are shown in orange.

TFT_Augment_HeadStart.name: Delayed Start
TFT_Augment_HeadStart.desc: Sell your board and bench. Gain @NumUnits@ random 2-star @tier@-cost champions. Disable your Shop for the next @roundstoskip@ rounds.

TFT10_Augment_SwitchingGears.name: Switching Gears
TFT10_Augment_SwitchingGears.desc: Gain @Gold@ gold whenever you break your win or loss streak.

TFT11_Augment_WanderingTrainerGold.name: Wandering Trainer I
TFT11_Augment_WanderingTrainerGold.desc: Gain a Training Dummy with @NumOfEmblems@ permanently attached Emblems. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_ClockworkAccelerator.name: Clockwork Accelerator
TFT_Augment_ClockworkAccelerator.desc: Your team gains @attackspeed*100@% Attack Speed every @frequency@ seconds in combat.

TFT_Augment_Protagonist.name: Protagonist
TFT_Augment_Protagonist.desc: Gain a random 1-cost Champion Augment. After @TurnDelay@ turns, gain a copy of the champion at the start of every turn.

TFT6_Augment_BandOfThieves2.name: Band of Thieves II
TFT6_Augment_BandOfThieves2.desc: Gain @NumGloves@ Thief's Gloves. After @DelayTurns@ player combats, gain another.

TFT11_Augment_Buildabud.name: Build a Bud
TFT11_Augment_Buildabud.desc: Gain a random 3-star 1-cost champion. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT10_Augment_HeavyHitters.name: Heavy Hitters
TFT10_Augment_HeavyHitters.desc: Your units with at least @MaxHealthThreshold@ max Health gain Attack Damage and Ability Power equal to @PercentMaxHealthDamage*100@% of their max Health.

TFT_Augment_TwoTanky.name: Two Tanky
TFT_Augment_TwoTanky.desc: When you field exactly 2 copies of a champion, they both gain @BonusHealth@ Health. When one copy dies, the other gains a @OnDeathPercHeal*100@% max Health Shield for @HealDuration@ seconds. When you 3-star, gain a 2-star copy.

TFT10_Augment_Determinedinvestors.name: Determined Investors
TFT10_Augment_Determinedinvestors.desc: The first time you have @goldrequired@ gold at the end of combat, gain Diamond Hands and @numcomponents@ random component(s).This defensive item helps you gain more gold.

TFT_Augment_Kingslayer.name: Kingslayer
TFT_Augment_Kingslayer.desc: Now and after every player combat, gain @Gold@ gold. If you win against a player who had more health than you, gain @WinBonusGold@ gold instead.

TFT9_Augment_Commander_FinalAscension.name: Final Ascension
TFT9_Augment_Commander_FinalAscension.desc: Your team gains @damageamp@% Damage Amp. After @delay@ seconds, this increases to @AscendedAmpTOOLTIPONLY@% Damage Amp.

TFT7_Augment_FirstAidKit2.name: First Aid Kit II
TFT7_Augment_FirstAidKit2.desc: All healing and shielding on your units is increased by @HealShieldIncrease*100@%.

TFT_Augment_TheFloorIsLava.name: The Floor is Lava
TFT_Augment_TheFloorIsLava.desc: During combat, ALL units are @BurnPctTooltip@% Burned and @GrievousWoundsPct@% Wounded. Your team gains @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp.Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every secondWound: Reduces healing received

TFT_Augment_NobleSacrifice.name: Noble Sacrifice
TFT_Augment_NobleSacrifice.desc: When your first ally dies each combat, grant your team @BaseResists@ + @SharePerc*100@% of that ally's Armor and Magic Resistance.

TFT_Augment_StarryNight.name: Starry Night
TFT_Augment_StarryNight.desc: 1-cost and 2-cost champions in your shop have a chance to be 2-star. Gain @Gold@ gold.Current Chances: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_StarryNight_Odds@%Chances increase with player level.

TFT_Augment_Corrosion.name: Corrosion
TFT_Augment_Corrosion.desc: Enemy champions in the first two rows lose @ResistLoss@ Armor and Magic Resist every @Time@ seconds.

TFT11_Augment_DragonSpirit.name: Dragon's Spirit
TFT11_Augment_DragonSpirit.desc: Gain a Dragon's Claw. Champions equipped with a Dragon's Claw gain @Health@ Health and @Durability@% Durability.

TFT7_Augment_Consistency.name: Consistency
TFT7_Augment_Consistency.desc: Gain double win and loss streak gold.

TFT_Augment_OnTheHouse.name: On The House
TFT_Augment_OnTheHouse.desc: Whenever you star up a champion, gain @gold@ gold. Gain @augmentselectbonusgold@ gold now.

TFT_Augment_BoxingLessons.name: Boxing Lessons
TFT_Augment_BoxingLessons.desc: Your team gains @Health@ Health for each ally that starts combat in the front row.

TFT9_Augment_BronzeTicket.name: Silver Ticket
TFT9_Augment_BronzeTicket.desc: Gain a free Shop reroll after every @RollNumber@ rerolls. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_Contagion.name: Contagion
TFT9_Augment_Contagion.desc: Combat start: The highest Health enemy takes @DamageAmp*100@% more damage. Every @SpreadTimer@ seconds or on death, this effect spreads to @SpreadTargets@ nearby enemies.

TFT9_Augment_StarterKit.name: Starter Kit
TFT9_Augment_StarterKit.desc: Gain a 4-cost champion, a 2-star 1-cost champion that shares a trait with them, and @Gold@ gold.At the start of the next @FutureChampionCount@ stages, gain that 4-cost champion again.

TFT7_Augment_LategameSpecialist.name: Late Game Specialist
TFT7_Augment_LategameSpecialist.desc: When you reach Level @LevelReq@, gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_Golemify.name: Golemify
TFT_Augment_Golemify.desc: Lose all champions on your board and bench. Gain a Golem with @HealthPercent@% of their combined Health and @ADPercent@% of their combined Attack Damage. The Golem gains @HPPerStage@ Health per stage. Gain a non-Tank 2-star @ChampCost@-cost champion.

TFT11_Augment_TooMuchCandy.name: Too Much Candy
TFT11_Augment_TooMuchCandy.desc: Your rerolls cost @StartingCost@ gold. Every @NumUntilIncrease@ rerolls, the cost goes up by @IncreaseBy@ gold. At the start of each stage your reroll cost is reset to @StartingCost@.

TFT7_Augment_BirthdayPresents.name: Birthday Present
TFT7_Augment_BirthdayPresents.desc: Gain a 2-star champion and @Gold@ gold every time you level up. The champion's cost tier is your level minus 4 (max: 5-cost).

TFT_Augment_GrowingUp.name: Growing Up
TFT_Augment_GrowingUp.desc: Gain a 2-star @StartingCost@-cost champion, and an item they can use. Each stage, you can choose to Grow Up into a higher-cost champion or to keep the current one.While Growing Up, the unit cannot be sold or combined.

TFT_Augment_Pyromaniac.name: Pyromaniac
TFT_Augment_Pyromaniac.desc: Gain a Red Buff. Your Burns deal @BurnIncrease*100@% increased damage.

TFT11_Augment_IRA.name: IRA
TFT11_Augment_IRA.desc: You have no max interest. Any interest above @MinInterest@ gold gets converted to @XPPerGold@ XP each. Get @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_JustSlayer.name: Indiscriminate Killer
TFT_Augment_JustSlayer.desc: Gain a Giant Slayer. Giant Slayers gain their Damage Amp against all enemies instead of just Tanks.

TFT9_Augment_AllNatural.name: All Natural I
TFT9_Augment_AllNatural.desc: Champions that aren't holding items gain @health@ Health and heal for @Healing*100@% of their max Health each second.

TFT_Augment_ShimmerscaleEssence.name: Shimmerscale Essence
TFT_Augment_ShimmerscaleEssence.desc: Gain a Mogul's Mail. In @combatnum@ rounds, gain a Gamblers Blade.These items give gold as well as combat power.

TFT9_Augment_Shoplifting.name: Shoplifting
TFT9_Augment_Shoplifting.desc: At the start of each turn, gain the highest Tier champion in your shop for free.

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestTear.name: Flowing Tears
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestTear.desc: Gain a Tear of the Goddess. After your team spends @StacksForReward@ Mana, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Mana spent: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT_Augment_CookingPot_HR.name: Cooking Pot
TFT_Augment_CookingPot_HR.desc: At the start of each turn, all allies holding a Frying Pan or Spatula item grant the nearest champion @Health@ permanent Health. Gain a Frying Pan.

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestRod_PAIRS.name: Continuous Conjuration
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestRod_PAIRS.desc: Gain a Needlessly Large Rod. After your team deals @StacksForReward@ magic damage, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Damage dealt: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT_Augment_ItemGargoyleStoneplate.name: Solo Plate
TFT_Augment_ItemGargoyleStoneplate.desc: Gain a Gargoyle Stoneplate. Combat start: Allies holding Gargoyle Stoneplate gain @HealthIncrease*100@% max Health if they're the only one in their row.

TFT_Augment_SweetTreats.name: Sweet Treats
TFT_Augment_SweetTreats.desc: Gain an Artifact anvil. Your team gains @HealthPerItem@ Health for each item equipped on champions.Health Gained: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_SweetTreats_TeamHealth@Magic N' Mayhem Tactician's Crown, 2024

TFT9_Augment_DravenSpoilsOfWar3.name: Spoils of War III
TFT9_Augment_DravenSpoilsOfWar3.desc: Enemies have a @LootDropChance*100@% chance to drop loot when killed.

TFT_Augment_PreciseSmithing.name: Precise Smithing
TFT_Augment_PreciseSmithing.desc: Reforging items and Artifacts grants an anvil of the same value instead. Gain @NumComponents@ component and @NumReforger@ reforger now, and @StageReforger@ reforgers every stage.Includes components and Radiant Items, but does not affect Emblems or Tactician's Items.

TFT9_Augment_DravenSpoilsOfWar2.name: Spoils of War II
TFT9_Augment_DravenSpoilsOfWar2.desc: Enemies have a @LootDropChance*100@% chance to drop loot when killed.

TFT_Augment_SubscriptionService.name: Subscription Service
TFT_Augment_SubscriptionService.desc: Now and at the start of each Stage, open a Shop of 4 unique 4-cost champions and gain @GoldPerStage@ gold.

TFT6_Augment_Distancing3.name: Exiles III
TFT6_Augment_Distancing3.desc: Your champions that start combat with no adjacent champions gain a @MaxHealthShield@% max Health shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

TFT_Augment_PrismaticDestiny.name: Prismatic Destiny
TFT_Augment_PrismaticDestiny.desc: Gain a random Prismatic Augment and @Gold@ gold.

TFT6_Augment_Distancing2.name: Exiles II
TFT6_Augment_Distancing2.desc: Your champions that start combat with no adjacent champions gain a @MaxHealthShield@% max Health shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

TFT9_Augment_OnARoll.name: On a Roll
TFT9_Augment_OnARoll.desc: Whenever you star up a champion, gain up to @TurnLimit@ free Shop rerolls per round. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT6_Augment_BandOfThieves2PlusPlus.name: Band of Thieves II++
TFT6_Augment_BandOfThieves2PlusPlus.desc: Gain @NumGloves@ Thief's Gloves. After @DelayTurns@ player combats, gain another.

TFT_Augment_ShojinSpirit.name: Spear's Will
TFT_Augment_ShojinSpirit.desc: Your team gains @AD*100@% Attack Damage and @Mana@ Mana. Gain a B.F. Sword and a Tear of the Goddess.

TFT_Augment_ItemKrakenSlayer.name: Press the Attack
TFT_Augment_ItemKrakenSlayer.desc: Gain a Kraken's Fury. Allies holding Kraken's Fury apply a stack on their target every attack. Every third stack deals true damage equal to @PercentHPDamage@% of the target's max Health.

TFT11_Augment_Reinfourcement.name: ReinFOURcement
TFT11_Augment_Reinfourcement.desc: The next 4-cost champion you buy with gold is instantly upgraded to 2-star. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_NoScoutNoPivot.name: NO SCOUT NO PIVOT
TFT_Augment_NoScoutNoPivot.desc: Champions that fight in player combat cannot be benched or sold. Your team gains @HPScale*100@% Health, and @APScale@% Attack Damage and Ability Power after player combat. @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_NoScoutNoPivot_TrackerTRAKEY_Holder@

TFT_Augment_Backup.name: Backup
TFT_Augment_Backup.desc: Your team gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed if at least @MinUnits@ allies start combat in the back two rows.

TFT_Augment_GoldForDummies.name: Gold For Dummies
TFT_Augment_GoldForDummies.desc: Gain a Training Dummy. Every @GoldDuration@ seconds, all Training Dummies grant @GoldAmount@ gold.

TFT6_Augment_Weakspot.name: Weakspot
TFT6_Augment_Weakspot.desc: Your attacks ignore @ArmorPenPercent@% of the target's Armor and reduce healing received by @HealReductionPercent@% for @Duration@ seconds.

TFT9_Augment_EscortQuest.name: Escort Quest
TFT9_Augment_EscortQuest.desc: Gain a Training Dummy. You gain @Gold@ gold every time it survives player combat.

TFT_Augment_LateGameScaling.name: Late Game Scaling
TFT_Augment_LateGameScaling.desc: Gain @XPGain@ XP at the start of player combat rounds. Your 5-cost champions gain @BonusHealth*100@% Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.Cyber City Tactician's Crown, 2025

TFT_Augment_QualityOverQuantity.name: Quality Over Quantity
TFT_Augment_QualityOverQuantity.desc: Champions holding exactly 1 item upgrade that item to Radiant. Champions holding Radiant items gain @BonusHealth*100@% Health. Gain @NumRemovers@ Magnetic Removers.Thief's Gloves counts as multiple items.

TFT9_Augment_Sleightofhand.name: Sleight of Hand
TFT9_Augment_Sleightofhand.desc: Gain a Thief's Gloves. Champions holding this item gain @Health@ Health and @AS@% Attack Speed.

TFT_Augment_DefenseCall.name: Powered Shields
TFT_Augment_DefenseCall.desc: While Shielded, your allies gain @ReducedDamage*100@% Durability. The first time allies fall below @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, they gain @ShieldAmount1@-@ShieldAmount4@ Shield (based on Stage) for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

TFT7_Augment_ScopedWeapons1.name: Scoped Weapons
TFT7_Augment_ScopedWeapons1.desc: Your units that start combat in the back 2 rows gain +@HexRangeIncrease@ Attack Range and @AS*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT_Augment_MoneyHungry.name: Money Hungry
TFT_Augment_MoneyHungry.desc: Gain @InstantGold@ gold now, then @StageGold@ gold at the start of every stage. Picking up gold makes your Tactician larger.

TFT_Augment_Waverider.name: On a Roll
TFT_Augment_Waverider.desc: Whenever you star up a champion that you fielded last combat, gain @NumRolls@ free Shop rerolls. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_Placebo.name: Placebo
TFT_Augment_Placebo.desc: Your team gains @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT6_Augment_TrueTwos.name: True Twos
TFT6_Augment_TrueTwos.desc: Gain a random 2-star Tier 1 champion and a random 2-star Tier 2 champion.

TFT_Augment_DoubleDown.name: Double Down
TFT_Augment_DoubleDown.desc: After each player combat, gain gold equal to your win or loss streak (max @GoldMax@ gold).

TFT9_Augment_TransfusionPlus.name: Transfusion II
TFT9_Augment_TransfusionPlus.desc: Your units gain @BaseHP@ Health, plus @BonusHPPerMissingHealth@ Health per missing Tactician Health.

TFT_Augment_MirroredMonetization.name: Malicious Monetization
TFT_Augment_MirroredMonetization.desc: Gain @GoldContained@ gold. For the next @Rounds@ rounds, enemy champions drop @PercCost@ gold when killed.@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_MirroredMonetization_TotalGoldTooltip@

TFT_Augment_UnlimitedPower.name: Unlimited Power
TFT_Augment_UnlimitedPower.desc: Gain a Nashor's Tooth, a Jeweled Gauntlet, a Needlessly Large Rod and a Magnetic Remover.Useful for Magic Carries!

TFT_Augment_CookingPot.name: Cooking Pot
TFT_Augment_CookingPot.desc: At the start of each turn, all allies holding a Frying Pan or Spatula item grant the nearest champion @Health@ permanent Health. Gain a Frying Pan.

TFT10_Augment_GoodForSomething.name: Good For Something II
TFT10_Augment_GoodForSomething.desc: Champions that aren't holding items have a @dropchance*100@% chance to drop @Gold@ gold on death.

TFT9_Augment_PandorasRadiantBox.name: Pandora's Items III
TFT9_Augment_PandorasRadiantBox.desc: Round start: items on your bench are randomized. Gain 1 random Radiant item.

TFT_Augment_Scavenger.name: Scavenger
TFT_Augment_Scavenger.desc: The first @NumDeaths@ enemy champions that are killed each combat grant a champion on your team a temporary completed item.

TFT_Augment_MayTheFoursBeWithYou.name: May the Fours Be With You
TFT_Augment_MayTheFoursBeWithYou.desc: Your 4-cost champions and Jhin gain @Health@ Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Gain a Jhin.

TFT6_Augment_TradeSector.name: Trade Sector
TFT6_Augment_TradeSector.desc: Gain a free Shop reroll every round. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_Pilfer.name: Pilfer
TFT_Augment_Pilfer.desc: Each round, gain a 1-star copy of the first champion you killed last combat. The first time you gain @GoldRequired@ gold worth of champions in this way, gain a Thief's Gloves. @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_Pilfer_Tooltip@

TFT9_Augment_AirspeedVelocity2.name: Unburdened II
TFT9_Augment_AirspeedVelocity2.desc: Your units without items equipped gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT9_Augment_BigGrabBag.name: Big Grab Bag
TFT9_Augment_BigGrabBag.desc: Gain @NumItems@ random components, @Gold@ gold, and 1 Reforger. Reforgers allow you to remake any item.

TFT9_Augment_BardPlaybook2.name: Caretaker's Favor
TFT9_Augment_BardPlaybook2.desc: Gain a component anvil when you reach level @levelreqa@, @levelreqb@, @levelreqc@, and @levelreqd@.The anvil offers 4 choices.

TFT6_Augment_Battlemage1.name: Battlemage I
TFT6_Augment_Battlemage1.desc: Your units that start combat in the front 2 rows gain @Armor@ Armor and @AP@ Ability Power.

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestGlove.name: Critical Success
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestGlove.desc: Gain a Sparring Glove. After your team's attacks critically strike @StacksForReward@ times, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Critical strikes: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT6_Augment_CelestialBlessing1.name: Celestial Blessing I
TFT6_Augment_CelestialBlessing1.desc: Your team gains @Omnivamp@% Omnivamp. Excess healing is converted to a shield up to @MaxShield@ Health.

TFT9_Augment_BardPlaybook3.name: Caretaker's Chosen
TFT9_Augment_BardPlaybook3.desc: As you level, gain more powerful items.Level @levelreqa@: Component anvilLevel @levelreqb@: Completed item anvilLevel @levelreqc@: Choose 1 of 5 Radiant items

TFT9_Augment_AirspeedVelocity1.name: Unburdened I
TFT9_Augment_AirspeedVelocity1.desc: Your units without items equipped gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT6_Augment_CelestialBlessing2.name: Celestial Blessing II
TFT6_Augment_CelestialBlessing2.desc: Your team gains @Omnivamp@% Omnivamp. Excess healing is converted to a shield up to @MaxShield@ Health.

TFT6_Augment_Battlemage3.name: Battlemage III
TFT6_Augment_Battlemage3.desc: Your units that start combat in the front 2 rows gain @Armor@ Armor and @AP@ Ability Power.

TFT6_Augment_GachaAddict.name: Prismatic Ticket
TFT6_Augment_GachaAddict.desc: Each time your Shop is rerolled, you have a @RerollPercent@% chance to gain a free reroll.

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestSword.name: Carve a Path
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestSword.desc: Gain a B.F. Sword. After your team deals @StacksForReward@ physical damage, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Damage dealt: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT6_Augment_CelestialBlessing3.name: Celestial Blessing III
TFT6_Augment_CelestialBlessing3.desc: Your team gains @Omnivamp@% Omnivamp. Excess healing is converted to a shield up to @MaxShield@ Health.

TFT9_Augment_BardPlaybook1.name: Caretaker's Ally
TFT9_Augment_BardPlaybook1.desc: Gain a random @UnitTier@-cost champion now. Gain the same one again every time you level up.Champion: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_WorthTheWait@

TFT6_Augment_Battlemage2.name: Battlemage II
TFT6_Augment_Battlemage2.desc: Your units that start combat in the front 2 rows gain @Armor@ Armor and @AP@ Ability Power.

TFT_Augment_ConstructACompanion.name: Construct a Companion
TFT_Augment_ConstructACompanion.desc: The next 1-cost champion you buy is 3-star. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_ReinforcedRejuvenation2.name: Row Rejuvenation II
TFT_Augment_ReinforcedRejuvenation2.desc: Your team has @StatOmnivamp*100@% Omnivamp, increased by @BonusVampPer*100@% for every champion that starts combat in that same row.

TFT6_Augment_CalculatedLoss.name: Calculated Loss
TFT6_Augment_CalculatedLoss.desc: After losing your combat, gain @Gold@ gold and a free Shop reroll.

TFT9_Augment_CyberneticLeech3.name: Cybernetic Leech III
TFT9_Augment_CyberneticLeech3.desc: Champions holding an item gain @health@ Health and @omnivamp@% Omnivamp.

TFT_Augment_Sponging.name: Sponging
TFT_Augment_Sponging.desc: Combat start: Up to @MaxUnits@ champions with @MaxItemsToBeEligible@ or fewer items gain a copy of a random completed item from the nearest itemized ally.

TFT9_Augment_BalancedBudget2.name: Balanced Budget
TFT9_Augment_BalancedBudget2.desc: At the start of the next @rounds@ rounds, gain @gold@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_RiskyMoves.name: Risky Moves
TFT9_Augment_RiskyMoves.desc: Your Tactician loses @Health@ Health, but after @PlayerCombatNum@ player combats, gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT6_Augment_ForceOfNature.name: New Recruit
TFT6_Augment_ForceOfNature.desc: Gain +@MaxArmySizeIncrease@ max team size and @NumUnits@ four-cost champions.

TFT9_Augment_CyberneticLeech2.name: Cybernetic Leech II
TFT9_Augment_CyberneticLeech2.desc: Champions holding an item gain @health@ Health and @omnivamp@% Omnivamp.

TFTEvent_PM_Augment_TradeSector.name: Trade Sector
TFTEvent_PM_Augment_TradeSector.desc: Gain a free Shop reroll every round. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT9_Augment_CyberneticLeech1.name: Cybernetic Leech I
TFT9_Augment_CyberneticLeech1.desc: Champions holding an item gain @health@ Health and @omnivamp@% Omnivamp.

TFT_Augment_ReinforcedRejuvenation1.name: Row Rejuvenation I
TFT_Augment_ReinforcedRejuvenation1.desc: Your team has @StatOmnivamp*100@% Omnivamp, increased by @BonusVampPer*100@% for every champion that starts combat in that same row.

TFT_Augment_PetriciteArmorII.name: Petricite Armor II
TFT_Augment_PetriciteArmorII.desc: Your team takes @ReducedAbilityDamage*100@% reduced damage from champion abilities.

TFT_Augment_Moonlight.name: Moonlight
TFT_Augment_Moonlight.desc: Combat start: @NumUnits@ random 1-cost champion is upgraded to 3-star for that round and gains @ADBonus*100@% Attack Damage and @APBONUS@% Ability Power.

TFT_Augment_EvilBeyondMeasure.name: Evil Beyond Measure
TFT_Augment_EvilBeyondMeasure.desc: Your champions deal @BasePercentTrueDamage*100@% of their damage as True Damage for each Star level.

TFT_Augment_Isekai_Prodigy.name: Isekai
TFT_Augment_Isekai_Prodigy.desc: Summon a magical hero from another universe to fight for you. This hero is a Prodigy this game.

TFT_Augment_BadOdds.name: Bad Odds
TFT_Augment_BadOdds.desc: You can only reach even levels, but the XP cost to each level is reduced. Gain @StartingXP@ XP.

TFT_Augment_AwakenedSoul.name: Soul Awakening
TFT_Augment_AwakenedSoul.desc: Combat start: Your team gains @StatsPerSecond@% Attack Damage and Ability Power per second for @MaxStacks@ seconds. At max stacks, deal @BonusTrueDamage*100@% bonus true damage.

TFT_Augment_AvengeTheFallen.name: Avenge The Fallen
TFT_Augment_AvengeTheFallen.desc: After @NumDeaths@ allies die, your team gains @AD@% Attack Damage, @ap@ Ability Power, @Armor@ Armor, and @MR@ Magic Resist.

TFT9_Augment_KnowledgeIsPower.name: Library Card
TFT9_Augment_KnowledgeIsPower.desc: Gain a Tome of Traits and a component anvil.

TFT9_Augment_BalancedBudgetPlus.name: Balanced Budget+
TFT9_Augment_BalancedBudgetPlus.desc: At the start of the next @rounds@ rounds, gain @gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_SliceOfLife.name: Slice of Life
TFT_Augment_SliceOfLife.desc: Twice per stage, gain a random champion. Its cost increases by Stage. This effect ends after receiving @Max5Costs@ 5-cost champion.

TFT9_Augment_GreaterJeweledLotus.name: Jeweled Lotus II
TFT9_Augment_GreaterJeweledLotus.desc: Your team gains @CritChance@% Critical Strike Chance, @CritDamage*100@% Critical Strike Damage, and Precision.{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}

TFT_Augment_MoneyMonsoon.name: Money Monsoon
TFT_Augment_MoneyMonsoon.desc: Gain @RoundGold@ gold now and every round for the rest of the game.

TFT_Augment_ShopGlitch.name: Shop Glitch
TFT_Augment_ShopGlitch.desc: During non-player combat rounds, your shop refreshes for free every @RefreshTimer@ seconds for @TotalTimer@ seconds.

TFT7_Augment_LivingForge.name: Living Forge
TFT7_Augment_LivingForge.desc: Gain an Artifact anvil now and after every @NumberOfCombats@ player combats.Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.

TFT11_Augment_WanderingTrainerSilver.name: Wandering Trainer I
TFT11_Augment_WanderingTrainerSilver.desc: Gain a Training Dummy with @NumOfEmblems@ permanently attached Emblems. Gain @Gold@ gold.

TFT_Augment_RestartMissionPlus.name: Restart Mission +
TFT_Augment_RestartMissionPlus.desc: Delete all champions on your board and bench. Gain a random 2-star 4-cost, two 2-star 3-cost, two 2-star 2-cost, and 2-star 1-cost champion.

TFT6_Augment_MeleeStarBlade3.name: Knife's Edge III
TFT6_Augment_MeleeStarBlade3.desc: Your allies that start combat in the front 2 rows gain @ADPerStarLevel*100@% Attack Damage.

TFT_Augment_Warpath.name: Warpath
TFT_Augment_Warpath.desc: Gain a 2-star 2-cost champion. After dealing @PlayerDamage@ player damage, gain a chest of high cost champions and items.(Current: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_Warpath_DamageCount@)

TFT11_Augment_Common_ExampleAug.name: Vampirism I
TFT11_Augment_Common_ExampleAug.desc: Your team gains @BaseHP@ Health. Gain another @BonusHPPer5MissingHealth@ Health and @OmnivampPercentPer5MissingHealth*100@% Omnivamp per 5 missing player health.(Omnivamp: healing for a percent of damage dealt)

TFT6_Augment_MeleeStarBlade2.name: Knife's Edge II
TFT6_Augment_MeleeStarBlade2.desc: Your allies that start combat in the front 2 rows gain @ADPerStarLevel*100@% Attack Damage.

TFT_Augment_BulkyBuddies2.name: Bulky Buddies II
TFT_Augment_BulkyBuddies2.desc: Allies that start combat next to exactly 1 other ally gain @HealthBonus@ Health. When that champion dies, the other gains a @ShieldAmount*100@% max Health Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

TFT9_Augment_OverwhelmingForce.name: Overwhelming Force
TFT9_Augment_OverwhelmingForce.desc: Gain a Deathblade, an Infinity Edge, a BF Sword, and a Magnetic Remover.Useful for Attack Carries or Attack Fighters!

TFT6_Augment_MeleeStarBlade1.name: Knife's Edge I
TFT6_Augment_MeleeStarBlade1.desc: Your allies that start combat in the front 2 rows gain @ADPerStarLevel*100@% Attack Damage.

TFT_Augment_BulkyBuddies3.name: Bulky Buddies III
TFT_Augment_BulkyBuddies3.desc: Allies that start combat next to exactly 1 other ally gain @HealthBonus@ Health. When that champion dies, the other gains a @ShieldAmount*100@% max Health Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

TFT_Augment_AHeroArrives.name: A Hero Arrives!
TFT_Augment_AHeroArrives.desc: After @Delay@ seconds, the left-most champion on your bench enters combat with @BonusHP*100@% bonus Health, stunning enemies within @StunHexArea@-hexes for @StunDuration@ seconds.

TFT_Augment_TheDarkinBlade.name: Blood Offering
TFT_Augment_TheDarkinBlade.desc: Gain a Bloodthirster. Combat start: Allies holding Bloodthirsters lose @HPLossPercent*100@% Health but gain a @HPShieldPercent*100@% Health shield and @BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage.

TFT6_Augment_RadiantRelics.name: Radiant Relics
TFT6_Augment_RadiantRelics.desc: Choose 1 of @ArmoryChoiceCount@ Radiant items. Gain a Magnetic Remover.Radiant items are very powerful versions of completed items.

TFT_Augment_BulkyBuddies1.name: Bulky Buddies I
TFT_Augment_BulkyBuddies1.desc: Allies that start combat next to exactly 1 other ally gain @HealthBonus@ Health. When that champion dies, the other gains a @ShieldAmount*100@% max Health Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

TFT_Augment_AnotherOnePlus.name: Another One!+
TFT_Augment_AnotherOnePlus.desc: The next completed item you make grants another copy of it. Gain @NumComponents@ component anvil.

TFT7_Augment_BigFriend2.name: Big Friend II
TFT7_Augment_BigFriend2.desc: Allies that start combat next to an ally with over @RequiredHealth@ Health gain @DamageReductionPercent@% Durability. Gain a Giant's Belt.

TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestBelt.name: Extra Buckles
TFT_Augment_ComponentQuestBelt.desc: Gain a Giant's Belt. After your team takes @StacksForReward@ damage, gain @NumDelayed@ more.Damage taken: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_ComponentQuest_Tracker@

TFT7_Augment_AstralProjection.name: Astral Projection
TFT7_Augment_AstralProjection.desc: When an Astral unit dies, they leave behind a projection of themselves with reduced stats that casts immediately then rapidly loses Health. Gain a Skarner and a Nidalee.

TFT_Augment_GuardbreakerSpirit.name: Mace's Will
TFT_Augment_GuardbreakerSpirit.desc: Gain a Sparring Gloves. Your team gains @CritChance*100@% Critical Strike Chance.

TFT6_Augment_Twins1.name: Double Trouble I
TFT6_Augment_Twins1.desc: When you field exactly 2 copies of a champion, they both gain @BonusStats@% Attack Damage and @BonusStats@% Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist. When you 3-star, gain a 2-star copy.

TFT6_Augment_FuturePeepers2.name: Future Sight II
TFT6_Augment_FuturePeepers2.desc: Know who you will fight next. Gain a Radiant Zephyr.

TFT9_Augment_KnowYourEnemy.name: Know Your Enemy
TFT9_Augment_KnowYourEnemy.desc: You can see who you will fight next. Your team gains @BaseDamageAmp@% Damage Amp, increased to @FullDamageAmp@% if you and your opponent have any of the same traits active.

TFT6_Augment_Featherweights1.name: Featherweights I
TFT6_Augment_Featherweights1.desc: Your Tier 1 and 2 champions gain @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed and Move Speed.

TFT10_Augment_SilverVeil.name: Silver Veil
TFT10_Augment_SilverVeil.desc: Your team gains @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed and is immune to the first crowd control effect in combat.

TFT_Augment_LegionOfThrees.name: Legion of Threes
TFT_Augment_LegionOfThrees.desc: Gain a random Emblem. Your 3-cost champions and all allies equipped with an Emblem gain @HealthAmount@ Health and @AS*100@% Attack Speed.Reckoning Championship, 2021

TFT6_Augment_Twins2.name: Double Trouble
TFT6_Augment_Twins2.desc: When you field exactly 2 copies of a champion, they both gain @BonusStats@% Attack Damage and @BonusStats@% Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist. When you 3-star, gain a 2-star copy.

TFT_Augment_ImTheCarryNow.name: I'm the Carry Now
TFT_Augment_ImTheCarryNow.desc: Get a Golem with tailored offensive items. It gets stronger at the start of each Stage.

TFT_Augment_SizeMatters.name: Size Matters
TFT_Augment_SizeMatters.desc: Gain a Giant's Belt. After a champion starts combat with more than @HealthRequired@ max Health, gain a Warmog's Armor.

TFT9_Augment_BuildingACollectionPlus.name: Buried Treasures II
TFT9_Augment_BuildingACollectionPlus.desc: Gain a random item component now and at the start of the next @roundsofbonusitems@ rounds.

TFT6_Augment_Twins3.name: Double Trouble III
TFT6_Augment_Twins3.desc: When you field exactly 2 copies of a champion, they both gain @BonusStats@% Attack Damage and @BonusStats@% Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist. When you 3-star, gain a 2-star copy.

TFT6_Augment_Featherweights3.name: Featherweights III
TFT6_Augment_Featherweights3.desc: Your Tier 1 and 2 champions gain @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed and Move Speed.

TFT9_Augment_TonsOfStats.name: Tons of Stats!
TFT9_Augment_TonsOfStats.desc: Your team gains @Health@ Health, @AttackDamage@% Attack Damage, @AbilityPower@% Ability Power, @Armor@ Armor, @MR@ Magic Resist, @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed, and @Mana@ Mana.

TFT11_Augment_FineVintage.name: Fine Vintage
TFT11_Augment_FineVintage.desc: Completed items left on your bench for @Rounds@ rounds transform into Support Anvils.

TFT6_Augment_Featherweights2.name: Featherweights II
TFT6_Augment_Featherweights2.desc: Your Tier 1 and 2 champions gain @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed and Move Speed.

TFT_Augment_BoosterPackPlusPlus.name: Booster Pack++
TFT_Augment_BoosterPackPlusPlus.desc: Gain @TotalValue@ gold of random champions. (At least one @GuaranteedCost@-cost guaranteed!)(Each champion has a small chance of being holographic!)

TFT6_Augment_FirstAidKit.name: First Aid Kit I
TFT6_Augment_FirstAidKit.desc: All healing and shielding on your units is increased by @HealShieldIncrease*100@%.

TFT_Augment_LoneHero.name: Lone Hero
TFT_Augment_LoneHero.desc: Your last surviving champion gains @ASBonus*100@% Attack Speed and @DurabilityBonus*100@% Durability

TFT10_Augment_VampirismPlus.name: Vampirism II
TFT10_Augment_VampirismPlus.desc: Your team gains @BaseHP@ Health. Gain another @BonusHPPer5MissingHealth@ Health and @OmnivampPercentPer5MissingHealth*100@% Omnivamp per 5 missing player health.(Omnivamp: healing for a percent of damage dealt)

ability.name: Golem Smash
ability.desc: Slam the target dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

ability.name: Swimming Speed
ability.desc: Passive: Occasionally dash around the board.

ability.name: On Duty!
ability.desc: The Training Dummy cannot move or attack. It is also dressed like a devilishly handsome Yordle.

ability.name: Tome of Traits
ability.desc: Drag this Tome to the Shop to open an Armory full of emblems! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

ability.name: Completed Item Anvil
ability.desc: Drag this to the Shop to open an Armory full of completed items! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

ability.name: Component Anvil
ability.desc: Drag this to the Shop to open an Armory full of component items! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

ability.name: Artifact Item Anvil

ability.name: Support item anvil
