ability.name: Mercenary Chest
ability.desc: This chest stores all of the accumulated loot you've collected. Win a combat against a player to open it!

ability.name: Fish Frenzy
ability.desc: Passive: For every @PercentMissingHealth@% missing Health, gain @ModifiedAS@% (%i:scaleAP%) Attack SpeedActive: Deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the target, increased by @PercentBonusDamage*100@% if they're a tank.

ability.name: Tidal Slashes
ability.desc: Unleash a flurry of @TotalNumSlashes@ (%i:scaleAS%) slashes at the current target over @SlashDuration@ seconds, dealing @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage each.

ability.name: Gun Goddess Arsenal
ability.desc: Field Miss Fortune to choose whether she activates Conduit Mode, Challenger Mode, or Replicator Mode. The chosen mode determines her ability and her trait.

ability.name: Star Strike
ability.desc: Reposition next to the target to strike the most enemies. Then throw @NumShurikens@ piercing kunai, each dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the first enemy hit, reduced to @ModifiedSecondaryDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) for each subsequent target. Kunai remove @ArmorShred@ Armor, @ArmorShredCrit@ if they crit.N.O.V.A. Strike: Slice all enemies, applying Wound and a bleed that deals @ModifiedNovaDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage each second. Kunai increase the damage of the bleed by @NovaShurikenBonusDamage*100@%.

ability.name: Ultra Friendly Object
ability.desc: Summon a flying saucer over the current target that lasts @AugmentedDuration@@Duration@ seconds. Each second it deals @ModifiedDamagePerSecond@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the target, plus @ModifiedSplitDamagePerSecond@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage split between all enemies within @SecondaryHexRange@ hex. The saucer deals @TankDamageIncrease*100@% increased damage to Tanks.If an enemy under the UFO dies, Bard has a @AbductChance*100@% chance to abduct them and create a 1-star copy on your bench.Meep bonus: On combat start, grant the nearest @ModifiedNumAllies@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) Meeple allies an additional Meep.Friends abducted: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Bard_FriendsAbducted@

ability.name: Explosive Attitude
ability.desc: Fire a barrage of @ModifiedNumRockets@ (%i:scaleAS%) rockets in a cone, each dealing @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the first target hit.

ability.name: Test of Spirit
ability.desc: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @Duration@ seconds. Over the duration, drain @ModifiedHealthDrain@ (%i:scaleAP%) Health from the nearest @NumEnemies@ enemies. Then slam down, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to all enemies within 2 hexes.

ability.name: Hopped-Up Hacks
ability.desc: Open a @SpellHexRadius@ hex rift containing the target, Hacking enemies within for @HexDuration@ seconds and dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to each, plus @ModifiedSplitDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage split between all enemies hit.Hacked enemies store @HexPercent*100@% of all damage they take. When the Hack ends, they take true damage equal to the stored damage. The Hack ends early if it would kill the target.

ability.name: Perfect Bladework
ability.desc: Passive: Every @NumAttacks@ attacks, reveal a Vital on the target. If a Vital exists, dash to attack it dealing @ModifiedVitalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) bonus true damage and heal for @PercentHealing*100@% of the damage dealt.Active: Reveal @NumVitals@ Vitals on the target and quickly attack them all. If the target dies, remaining Vitals transfer to the nearest enemy. Upon striking the final Vital, create a two hex aura that heals allies within for @ModifiedHealing@ (%i:scaleAP%) over @AuraDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Slingshot Maneuver
ability.desc: Passive: Every 5th attack, launch a returning boomerang at the target that travels two hexes past the first enemy it hits. It deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage, reduced by @DamageReductionPerHit*100@% per hit.Meep Bonus: @ModifiedNumMeeps@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) Meeps attack alongside Gnar, dealing @ModifiedMeepDPS@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAS%) physical damage per second.

ability.name: Meep Bait
ability.desc: Dash through the current target, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. Every third cast also summons a Mega Meep after a delay, briefly knocking the target up and dealing @ModifiedChompDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%%i:set14AmpIcon%) magic damage. Adjacent enemies take @SecondaryDamage*100@% damage.Meep Bonus: Add @ModifiedNumMeeps@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) Meep to the bait, increasing Mega Meep damage by @ModifiedMeepBonusDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%).

ability.name: Gravitational Spin
ability.desc: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Then, strike enemies in a three hex line, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%%i:scaleArmor%) magic damage.Meep Bonus: Reduce the damage of incoming attacks by @ModifiedFlatDR@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%). After being attacked @AttacksPerPassiveTrigger@ times, deal @ModifiedPassiveDamage@ (%i:scaleArmor%%i:set14AmpIcon%) magic damage in a two hex radius.

ability.name: Huddle Up!
ability.desc: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. For the duration, allies within two hexes gain @ModifiedResists@ (%i:scaleAP%) Armor and Magic Resistance.Meep Bonus: Meeps grant @ModifiedMeepShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield to the nearest @ModifiedNumMeeps@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) allies for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Asteroid Blaster
ability.desc: Strafe to a nearby position, unleashing @BaseMissiles@ missiles split between the target and all enemies within two hexes. Missiles deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage with a @ProcChance@% Lucky chance of firing a mega missile that deals @ModifiedProcDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) instead.Meep Bonus: Every @ModifiedMeepCooldown@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) seconds, launch an Explosive Meep at the target, dealing @ModifiedMeepDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage in a one hex radius on impact.Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

ability.name: Meepteor Shower
ability.desc: Call down a Meepteor on the target that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.Meep Bonus: An additional @ModifiedMiniMeeps@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%) mini Meepteor are called down on nearby targets dealing @ModifiedMiniDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage each.

ability.name: Stellar Slash
ability.desc: Heal @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleAP%), then deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleArmor%) physical damage to the current target.N.O.V.A. Strike: Cleave the battlefield, briefly knocking up all enemies and dealing @ModifiedNovaDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleArmor%) physical damage.

ability.name: Aim For The Head
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks have a @ProcChance@% Lucky chance to fire an empowered Headshot, dealing @ModifiedHeadshotDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage.N.O.V.A. Strike: Mark all enemies, increasing damage taken by @NovaMarkDamageAmp*100@%. The first time marked targets drop below @NovaMarkThreshold*100@% Health, Headshot them for @ModifiedNovaHeadshotDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage.Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

ability.name: Grasp of Convergence
ability.desc: Passive: Gain @PassiveRatio*100@% more max Health from all sources.Active: Converge an X-shape of vines on the target, dealing @DamageTotal@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to each enemy hit and Stunning them for @StunDuration@ seconds. N.O.V.A. Strike: Send forth a wave of dragons that stun all enemies for @NovaStunDuration@ seconds. For the rest of combat, Maokai's attacks deal @ModifiedNovaDamage@ (%i:scaleHealth%) bonus physical damage.

ability.name: Cosmic Pursuit
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks and Abilities mark the target. When an enemy reaches @MaxMarks@ marks, Wolf consumes the marks, dealing @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage. Active: Jump up to @HexDistance@ hex away and fire arrows at the nearest @NumTargets@ targets, each dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage. N.O.V.A. Strike: Gain @NovaDamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp. Now and every @NovaRepeatTimer@ seconds after, add a mark to all enemies.

ability.name: Bullet Cluster
ability.desc: Passive: On takedown, gain @ManaPerKill@ mana.Active: Fire @BaseNumMissiles@ missiles in a @HexRange@-hex radius around the current target, dealing @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage each.

ability.name: Singularity
ability.desc: Gather the force of a black hole, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage split between the target and the @NumEnemies@ closest enemies to them. The target takes an additional @ModifiedSecondaryDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

ability.name: Space Opera
ability.desc: Passive: Jhin has a fixed attack speed of @FixedAS@ and converts every @PercentBonusASToConvert*100@% of bonus Attack Speed into @ADConversionRate@ bonus Attack Damage.Active: Summon @NumHands@ spectral hands that fire alongside Jhin for the next @NumAttacks@ attacks. Each hand deals @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage per shot. The final shots deal @FinalShotPercentDamageIncrease*100@% more damage and pierce through the most enemies in a line, dealing @PercentDamageReductionPerTargetHit*100@% reduced damage per target hit.

ability.name: Unstoppable Dreadnought
ability.desc: Passive - Proximity Blast: Whenever an enemy enters a @ShotgunRange@ (%i:scaleRange%) hex radius, fire a blast in a cone towards the closest adjacent hex that deals @ModifiedShotgunDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage with @FalloffPerHex*100@% falloff per hex. Each adjacent hex has a @ShotgunCooldown@ second cooldown, and starts combat on cooldown.Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and reposition up to one hex to maximize the number of targets within Proximity Blast's radius. Reset Proximity Blast's cooldowns.

ability.name: Deathbeam
ability.desc: Channel a deathbeam in a line towards the current target for @AugmentedDuration@@Duration@ seconds. It deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage per second, reduced by @DamageReductionPerTarget*100@% per enemy it passes through. Deathbeam ignores @MagicPen*100@% of the enemy's Magic Resist.

ability.name: Gravity Matrix
ability.desc: Enter a defensive stance for @DurabilityDuration@ seconds gaining @Durability*100@% Durability. While in the defensive stance, attract nearby enemy projectiles and heal @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleAP%) over the duration. When this ends, release a shockwave that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%) as physical damage in a @HexRange@-hex range.

ability.name: Psionic Storm
ability.desc: Channel a one-hex psionic storm that follows enemies for @AugmentedDuration@@Duration@ seconds. Each second, it grows larger and deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies within, reduced by @FalloffPerHex*100@% per hex from the epicenter.

ability.name: Marked for Death
ability.desc: Reposition up to one hex to throw a harpoon at the furthest enemy. The harpoon pulls the first enemy hit one hex forward and deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) physical damage. Then, teleport behind them and cleave, dealing @ModifiedTargetDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to them and @ModifiedAreaDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to nearby enemies.

ability.name: Psi Strikes
ability.desc: Passive: Every third attack is a doubleslash that deals @ModifiedPassiveDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) bonus physical damage.Active: After brief meditation, enter a Psi-State for @Duration@ seconds, gaining @Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp, @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed, and increased movement speed. Twice a second, fire a psychic projection at a random nearby enemy that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage

ability.name: Chemical Rage
ability.desc: Heal @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) over @Duration@ seconds. Then, deal @DamageTotal@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to target and enemies adjacent to them and @ASSlow*100@% Chill them for @CCDuration@ seconds.{{TFT_Keyword_Chill}}

ability.name: Double Time
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedHitDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage and an additional @ModifiedMagicDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) stacking magic damage over @PoisonDuration@ seconds. While an enemy has @GrooveStacks@ or more stacks, Teemo is in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}}.Active: Gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for @ActiveAttacks@ attacks.

ability.name: Groovin' Susan
ability.desc: Transform for @Duration@ seconds, temporarily gaining @MaxHealth@ max Health, entering {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}}, and dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to adjacent enemies each second.

ability.name: Dance n' Dice
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks deal magic damage. Gwen is in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} while targeting an enemy below @GrooveThreshold*100@% Health.Active: Dash to a nearby hex to snip the lowest percent Health enemy, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the target and @ModifiedAreaDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies in a cone. If this kills, dash and snip again at @ResetDamage*100@% damage!

ability.name: Jump and Jive
ability.desc: Passive: Whenever an enemy is knocked up, shoot them, dealing @ModifiedPassiveDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage and entering {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDuration@ seconds.Active: Unleash a volley of bullets at the target, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage and knocking up for @StunDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Disco Inferno
ability.desc: Passive: On combat start, forge a temporary completed item. If 3 items are already equipped, a random completed item becomes Radiant this combat instead.Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds, then breath fire in a cone dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. After any Shield on Ornn expires, Ornn enters {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Bubble Pop
ability.desc: Toss a disco bubble at the target that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) split between enemies in a one hex radius. The explosion sends @NumProjectiles@ globs towards nearby enemies that deal @ModifiedFirstBounceDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. On cast, Nami enters {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Party Crasher
ability.desc: Passive: Every @BoltCooldown@ seconds, call down a bolt on the highest Health nearby enemy that deals @ModifiedBoltDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.Active: Summon a disco ball at the largest clump of enemies, then knock up the current target into it, dealing @ModifiedUppercutDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. They crash down into the disco ball, dealing @ModifiedExplosionDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage in a three hex radius. Enter {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @GrooveDurationPerTarget@ second per enemy hit.

ability.name: Psionic Crush
ability.desc: Hurl a chunk of magnetic debris at the nearest target without one, dealing @ModifiedDebrisDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and sticking it to them. If an enemy with debris dies, it passes to the nearest enemy without one.Every @NumCasts@ casts, instead rip off all debris dealing @ModifiedDebrisRipDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage, then crush all the debris onto the target, dealing @ModifiedSlamDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and briefly stunning them.

ability.name: Fate's Gambit
ability.desc: Draw a card with a value between 1 and 9 by Lucky chance, then throw it at the target. Based on the card drawn, deal between @ModifiedDamageMin@ (%i:scaleAP%) and @ModifiedDamageMax@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. Overkill damage bounces to the nearest enemy. 3-Star Bonus: If a 9 is thrown, generate 1 gold.Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

ability.name: Diviner's Judgment
ability.desc: Stab the target, causing them to bleed for @ModifiedBleedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage over @BleedDuration@ seconds. After the attack, leap to the highest percent Health enemy within @HexDistance@ hexes.

ability.name: Counter Star-ike
ability.desc: Enter a defensive stance for @Duration@ seconds, reducing incoming damage by @ModifiedFlatDR@ (%i:scaleAP%) and gaining @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield. When the stance ends, strike all nearby enemies, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%) magic damage and Stunning them for @StunDuration@ second(s).

ability.name: It's Raining Stars
ability.desc: Passive: Gain a different secondary effect each game based on the Stargazer constellation.Active: Call down something from the sky, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to @NumEnemies@ nearby enemies and do some special effect based on this game's Stargazer Constellation.

ability.name: Calamity
ability.desc: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Summon an astrolabe to crash down on a nearby hex, dealing @ModifiedInitialDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies within 2 hexes. Then, push the astrolabe towards the end of the board, dealing @ModifiedFollowupDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. All enemies hit by the astrolabe are knocked up for @StunDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Lend Me a Hand, Shadow!
ability.desc: Passive: Every time Vex attacks, Shadow strikes a nearby enemy, dealing @ModifiedShadowHandDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. Whenever an enemy is struck @NumStrikesForPassive@ times by Shadow, Shadow strikes them again.Active: Shadow launches @NumActiveStrikes@ empowered strikes, dealing @ModifiedShadowHandMagicDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage instead.

ability.name: Time Warp
ability.desc: Passive: This Ability adapts to Attack Damage or Ability Power, whichever is higher. Attacks deal @ModifiedPassiveAPDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic@ModifiedPassiveADDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage.Active: Dash to a nearby hex, gaining @Shield@ Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and slashing adjacent enemies for @ModifiedAPDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic@ModifiedADDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage. Every third cast, leap into the air and launch a wave of energy that deals @ModifiedAPWaveDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic@ModifiedADWaveDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to enemies in a line.

ability.name: Reality Tear
ability.desc: Passive: On cast, attacks gain @ModifiedBonusDamage@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) stacking bonus magic damage. Starting from the third cast, gain true damage instead.Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds, then slice open a rift on the largest group of champions dealing the Passive's bonus damage to all enemies within. Enemies have their Attack Speed slowed by @ASSlow*100@% while allies within gain @BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed, both rapidly decaying over @BuffDebuffDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Mega Time Kick
ability.desc: Kick a ball at the current target that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. On impact, the ball has a 100% Lucky chance to bounce to a new target dealing @ModifiedBounceDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. These bounces can trigger additional bounces, but the odds halve with each bounce.Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

ability.name: Temporal Shot
ability.desc: Active: Fire a blast at the current target that deals @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage. Every @TakedownsToDrone@ takedowns, gain a drone that deals @ModifiedDroneDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the current target on cast. (Total Takedowns: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Ezreal_Takedowns@)

ability.name: Shield of Daybreak
ability.desc: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Bash the current target, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%) magic damage and stunning them for @StunDuration@ seconds.

ability.name: Paddle Star
ability.desc: Fire a paddle star at the current target, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the first target hit and @ModifiedSecondaryDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) to others it passes through. When the missile reaches its destination, redirect it to a distant enemy, increasing its speed and repeating the damage. This redirect can occur @AugmentedNumRedirects@@NumRedirects@ times.

ability.name: Pale Cascade
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedBonusDamageToAttacks@ (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage.Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield and summon 3 encircling orbs for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Orbs deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies they pass through, and rotate faster based on Attack Speed.

ability.name: Fracture Reality
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedBaseAttackDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage instead.Active: Summon @NumClones@ clones that attack alongside for @NumAttacks@ attacks, dealing @CloneDamageMultiplier*100@% damage. For their final attack, clones fire a bolt that deals @ModifiedBoltDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

ability.name: Accretion
ability.desc: Deal @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the lowest Health enemy in range and permanently gain @BonusHealthPerCast@ maximum Health. If this kills them, permanently gain @BonusHealthOnKill@ maximum Health instead.(Current Bonus: +@TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_ChoGathBonusHealth@ Health)

ability.name: Dark Matter
ability.desc: Hurl a shard towards the current target, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the first target it hits. After hitting its initial target or at its final destination, the dagger explodes dealing @ModifiedSecondaryDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to nearby targets.

ability.name: Quantum Clone
ability.desc: Create a clone behind the target with @HPPenalty*100@% reduced max Health and @ManaCostIncrease@ increased Mana cost. The clone inherits its creator's items, stats, and current Health, and can cast Quantum Clone.

ability.name: Screech
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks deal @ModifiedAADamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage.Active: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds and grant allies @BonusAP@% Ability Power for the rest of combat.

ability.name: Meep Impact
ability.desc: Heal @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) Health over @HealDuration@ seconds. Slam the target, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and knocking up for @StunDuration@ seconds. The impact creates meepwaves that deal @PercentEffects*100@% of these effects in the target's row.Meep Bonus: Meeps water Meepsie's flower, increasing all incoming Healing and Shielding by @ModifiedHealingAndShielding@ (%i:set14AmpIcon%).

ability.name: Indestructible
ability.desc: Gain @ModifiedInitialShield@ (%i:scaleAP%) Shield. Each second for the next @AugmentedDuration@@Duration@ seconds, gain @ModifiedShieldPerProc@ (%i:scaleAP%) more Shield and deal @ModifiedDamagePerProc@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to adjacent enemies. When this ability ends, consume the remaining Shield and heal for @HealRefund*100@% of its value.

ability.name: Stellar Ricochet
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks bounce to strike @AttackNumEnemies@ times, dealing @PassivePercentReducedDamage*100@% reduced damage per target hit and leaving a Feather behind the final target.Active: Gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed for the next @NumAttacks@ attacks. At the end, recall all Feathers split between the closest @RecallFeatherTargets@ enemies, dealing @TotalDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage each. Xayah's current target takes @ModifiedPrimaryTargetBonusDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) additional physical damage per feather.

ability.name: Collateral Damage
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks fire @NumProjectiles@ projectiles in a cone that deal @ModifiedPassiveDamage@ (%i:TFTBaseAD%) physical damage each.Active: Fire an explosive shell that deals @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the target, and @ModifiedSecondaryDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage to adjacent enemies.

ability.name: Tounge Lash
ability.desc: Passive: Once per combat after dropping below @HPThreshold*100@% Health, gain Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds equal to @PercentHealingToShield*100@% of healing received this combat.Active: Heal @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%), then tongue lash all enemies within two hexes dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%%i:scaleHealth%) magic damage.

ability.name: Divine Scythe
ability.desc: Gain @Durability*100@% Durability for @Duration@ seconds, healing @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleAP%) over the duration. Afterwards, slash forward in a line, dealing @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to enemies hit and knocking them up for @KnockupDuration@ second.

ability.name: Temporal Core
ability.desc: Sell Core to gain @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Timebreaker_NumEXP@ XP

ability.name: Upheaval
ability.desc: Heal @TotalHealing@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%), then briefly knock up adjacent enemies and deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

ability.name: Advanced Defences
ability.desc: Gain @ModifiedShield@ (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) Shield and @Durability*100@% Durability for @Duration@ seconds. Over the duration, deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage each second to enemies in a cone.

ability.name: Dark Form
ability.desc: Transform for @HealthGainDuration@ seconds, gaining @ModifiedHealthGain@ (%i:scaleAP%%i:scaleHealth%) Health and tethering to nearby champions. Over the duration, deal @ModifiedDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the closest @NumEnemies@ enemies and restore @ModifiedHeal@ (%i:scaleAP%) health to the closest @NumAllies@ injured allies.

ability.name: Nothing To See Here!
ability.desc: Cosmic Squids lack the intelligence to do anything but mindlessly attack. They're very squishy, though.

ability.name: Nothing To See Here!
ability.desc: Cosmic Scrappers lack the intelligence to do anything but mindlessly attack. They're doing their best though!

ability.name: Nothing To See Here!
ability.desc: Cosmic Bruisers lack the intelligence to do anything but mindlessly attack. Careful, they pack a punch!

ability.name: Nothing To See Here!
ability.desc: Cosmic Flutterbyes lack the intelligence to do anything but mindlessly attack. A bit annoying, really.

ability.name: Nothing To See Here!
ability.desc: Cosmic Gromps lack the intelligence to do anything but mindlessly attack. They're just protecting their...part of the cosmos?

ability.name: Primordial Breath
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks splash in a cone behind the target. Watch out!

ability.name: Tome of Traits
ability.desc: Drag this Tome to the Shop to open an Armory full of emblems! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

ability.name: Gravitational Collapse
ability.desc: A miniature black hole created by a supernova.Gains max health equal to @TOOLTIPDarkStarPercentHP@% of ally Dark Star Health.

ability.name: Harbinger of The End
ability.desc: Passive: Swords fly out in a grid dealing @TotalGridDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage to enemies they hit. Active: Launch @NumSwords@ swords into the air and gain @Durability*100@% Durability. When they land, they deal @TotalSwordAoEDamage@ (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage to enemies they hit in a @HexRange@-hex range.

TFT17_VexUniqueTrait.name: Doomer
TFT17_VexUniqueTrait.desc: Combat Start: Mark all enemies with Doom.The first time enemies are damaged each combat, their Doom is consumed, stealing @ADAP1@% Attack Damage and Ability Power from them and granting it to your strongest Vex.

TFT17_ASTrait.name: Challenger
TFT17_ASTrait.desc: Your team gains @TeamwideAS*100@% Attack Speed. Challengers gain bonus Attack Speed. When their target dies, Challengers dash to a new target and increase their Attack Speed bonus by @BurstPercent*100@% for @BurstDuration@ seconds.(@MinUnits@) @AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%(@MinUnits@) @AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%(@MinUnits@) @AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%(@MinUnits@) @AttackSpeedPercent*100@% %i:scaleAS%

TFT17_MissFortuneUndeterminedTrait.name: Choose Trait
TFT17_MissFortuneUndeterminedTrait.desc: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Conduit Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

TFT17_Stargazer_Wolf.name: Stargazer
TFT17_Stargazer_Wolf.desc: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Boar.Gain gold after winning player combat. Allies in empowered hexes gain @Wolf_Health_Teamwide*100@% Health, Attack Damage, and Ability Power. Stargazers gain more.(Gold Earned: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_Stargazer_Wolf_TotalGold@)(@MinUnits@) @Wolf_Gold@ gold, @Wolf_Health*100@% %i:scaleHealth%, @Wolf_ADAP@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%More hexes reveal at each player level

TFT17_APTrait.name: Replicator
TFT17_APTrait.desc: Replicator abilities occur a second time at reduced effectiveness.(@MinUnits@) @Effectiveness*100@% strength

TFT17_ShieldTank.name: Vanguard
TFT17_ShieldTank.desc: Vanguards gain @DamageReductionPct*100@% Durability while Shielded. Combat start and @HealthThreshold*100@% Health: Gain a max Health Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.(@MinUnits@) @ShieldPercentAmount*100@% max Health(@MinUnits@) @ShieldPercentAmount*100@% max Health(@MinUnits@) @ShieldPercentAmount*100@% max Health;@EnhancedDurability*100@% %i:scaleDR% while Shielded

TFT17_PsyOps.name: Psionic
TFT17_PsyOps.desc: Gain Psionic items that can be equipped to any ally.(@MinUnits@) Gain the @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_PsyOps_Item1@(@MinUnits@) Gain the @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_PsyOps_Item2@, Psionic items gain extra effects on Psionic units

TFT17_JhinUniqueTrait.name: Eradicator
TFT17_JhinUniqueTrait.desc: Enemies have @PctResists*100@% less Armor and Magic Resist.

TFT17_Timebreaker.name: Timebreaker
TFT17_Timebreaker.desc: (@MinUnits@) Allies gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.(@MinUnits@) AND When you lose, gain free rerolls. When you win, store XP in a Temporal Core (scales with stage).(@MinUnits@) AND Timebreakers gain an additional @TimebreakerAdditionalAS*100@% Attack SpeedRerolls on Loss: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Timebreaker_NumRerollsTooltip@XP on Win: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Timebreaker_NumXPTooltip@

TFT17_MeleeTrait.name: Marauder
TFT17_MeleeTrait.desc: Your team gains @TeamwideBonus*100@% Omnivamp. Marauders gain more Omnivamp, Attack Damage, and their Omnivamp overhealing is converted into Shield (up to @MaxPercentHealthShield*100@% max Health.)(@MinUnits@) @Omnivamp*100@% %i:scaleSV%, @AD*100@% %i:scaleAD%(@MinUnits@) @Omnivamp*100@% %i:scaleSV%, @AD*100@% %i:scaleAD%(@MinUnits@) @Omnivamp*100@% %i:scaleSV%, @AD*100@% %i:scaleAD%.

TFT17_MissFortuneUniqueTrait.name: Gun Goddess
TFT17_MissFortuneUniqueTrait.desc: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Conduit Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

TFT17_AnimaSquad.name: Anima
TFT17_AnimaSquad.desc: After losing a player combat, gain @TechPerCombat@ Tech, plus additional Tech equal to @TechPerLoss@ times the length of your loss streak. Additionally, gain @TechPerKill@ Tech per Anima takedown.Each time Animas get @TechBreakpoint@ Tech, they prototype new Anima Weapons. You can take them, or save your Tech to get more powerful weapons next time.(@MinUnits@) Start Researching! (@MinUnits@) After each player combat, gain loot!Gain @PairsPartnerWinMultiplier*100@% Tech from losing if your partner wins a combat in Double Up.

TFT17_Fateweaver.name: Fateweaver
TFT17_Fateweaver.desc: Innate: Fateweavers have Precision.(@MinUnits@) Chance effects on abilities are Lucky.(@MinUnits@) Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit Chance and @CritDamage@% Crit Damage. Critical strikes are also Lucky.{{TFT_Keyword_Precision}}Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

TFT17_ZedUniqueTrait.name: Galaxy Hunter
TFT17_ZedUniqueTrait.desc: Zed is obtained from the Invader Zed augment.While at least one clone is alive, Zed gains @BonusAD*100@% bonus Attack Damage.

TFT17_ShenUniqueTrait.name: Bulwark
TFT17_ShenUniqueTrait.desc: Summon a placeable relic. At the start of combat, it grants adjacent allies a @PercentHealthShield*100@% max Health shield and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed.

TFT17_SonaUniqueTrait.name: Commander
TFT17_SonaUniqueTrait.desc: (@MinUnits@) Sona gives you a random Command Mod every @RoundsPerMod@ rounds which allows you to alter the way an ally behaves during combat. Command Mods last @RoundsPerMod@ player combats even if they are not equipped.

TFT17_Stargazer_Medallion.name: Stargazer
TFT17_Stargazer_Medallion.desc: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Medallion.(@MinUnits@) Allies in empowered hexes gain @Medallion_DA@% Damage Amp, which increases by @Medallion_IncreasePer3Star@% for each 3-star ally.(Current Bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_Stargazer_Medallion_Increase@% %i:scaleDA%)More hexes reveal at each player level

TFT17_Stargazer_Huntress.name: Stargazer
TFT17_Stargazer_Huntress.desc: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Huntress.Combat Start: Mark the highest Health enemies. Allies in empowered hexes gain @Huntress_AS_Teamwide*100@% Attack Speed. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain more and heal for @Huntress_Heal*100@% of their max Health when a marked enemy dies.(@MinUnits@) @Huntress_AS*100@% %i:scaleAS%, @NumMarks@ marks(@MinUnits@) @Huntress_AS*100@% %i:scaleAS%, @NumMarks@ marks(@MinUnits@) @Huntress_AS*100@% %i:scaleAS%, @NumMarks@ marksMore hexes reveal at each player level

TFT17_Stargazer_Serpent.name: Stargazer
TFT17_Stargazer_Serpent.desc: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Serpent.Allies in empowered hexes gain @Serpent_DR_Teamwide*100@% Durability. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain more and poison enemies, repeating a portion of damage dealt as magic damage over @Serpent_Duration@ seconds.(@MinUnits@) @Serpent_DR*100@% %i:scaleDR%, @Serpent_Poison*100@% poison damageMore hexes reveal at each player level

TFT17_Stargazer_Shield.name: Stargazer
TFT17_Stargazer_Shield.desc: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Altar.(@MinUnits@) When ANY champion dies, they are sacrificed to the Altar. Allies in empowered hexes gain @Shield_Health_Teamwide@% Health and @Shield_AS_Teamwide@% Attack Speed.After @Shield_NumDeaths@ sacrifices, Stargazers in empowered hexes gain an additional @Shield_CashoutHP@% %i:scaleHealth% and @Shield_CashoutAS@% %i:scaleAS%Sacrifices: (@TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_Stargazer_Shield_Deaths@ / @Shield_NumDeaths@)More hexes reveal at each player level

TFT17_Stargazer_Fountain.name: Stargazer
TFT17_Stargazer_Fountain.desc: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Fountain.Allies in empowered hexes heal @Fountain_HealthRegen_Teamwide*100@% max Health every @Fountain_Interval@ seconds. Stargazers in empowered hexes heal an additional @Fountain_HealthRegen*100@% and gain stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power every @Fountain_Interval@ seconds.(@MinUnits@) @Fountain_StackingADAP@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%(@MinUnits@) @Fountain_StackingADAP@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%More hexes reveal at each player level

TFT17_AssassinTrait.name: Rogue
TFT17_AssassinTrait.desc: Rogues gain Attack Damage and Ability Power. The first time they fall below @HealthThreshold*100@% health, they slip into shadows. Enemies targeting them are redirected to a nearby unit, preferring Tanks.(@MinUnits@) @AP@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%(@MinUnits@) @AP@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%(@MinUnits@) @AP@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%(@MinUnits@) @AP@% %i:scaleAD% %i:scaleAP%

TFT17_DarkStar.name: Dark Star
TFT17_DarkStar.desc: (@MinUnits@) Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies at @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_NeutronStar_BonusExecutePercent*100@%@ExecuteHPPercent*100@% max health.(@MinUnits@) AND they gain @ADAP@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%.(@MinUnits@) AND the strongest Dark Star unit goes supermassive, gaining @SupermassivePercentBonus*100@% effectiveness from Dark Star, and creates 2 minor Black Holes.(@MinUnits@) All Dark Stars are supermassive. At level 10, CONSUME EVERYONE.

TFT17_Primordian.name: Primordian
TFT17_Primordian.desc: (@MinUnits@) Dealing damage spawns Swarmlings based on unique Primordian star level.(@MinUnits@) Spawn @PercentMoreSwarmlings@% more Swarmlings! After each player combat, gain a random 1 or 2-cost champion. @DamageTakenPercentModifier*100@% of damage taken contributes to damage dealt.

TFT17_SpaceGroove.name: Space Groove
TFT17_SpaceGroove.desc: (@MinUnits@) Groovians can enter {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}}. While in it, they gain Attack Speed and max Health Regen, increased per Groovian on your team.(@MinUnits@) All Groovians start combat in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for @StartOfCombatDuration@ seconds.(@MinUnits@) Each second spent in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} grants @ADAPPerSecond@% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power.(@MinUnits@) Increase these effects by @EffectBonus@%!(@MinUnits@) {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_Groove}}{{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}}: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_SpaceGroove_AS*100@% %i:scaleAS%, @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_SpaceGroove_HealthRegen*100@% %i:scaleHPRegen%

TFT17_ADMIN.name: Arbiter
TFT17_ADMIN.desc: Scribe a unique divine law, allowing you to choose an effect to apply to Arbiters when a chosen cause occurs.(@MinUnits@) Choose a cause and effect for your law(@MinUnits@) Effects are stronger.

TFT17_Stargazer_Mountain.name: Stargazer
TFT17_Stargazer_Mountain.desc: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The MountainEvery @Mountain_RoundsPerEmblem@ player combats, gain a Stargazer Emblem. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain various bonuses.(Combats Remaining: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_Stargazer_Mountain_CombatsRemaining@)(@MinUnits@) Gain @Mountain_Health*100@% Health(@MinUnits@) AND @Mountain_ADAP*100@% Attack Damage and Ability Power(@MinUnits@) AND @Mountain_Resists@ Armor and Magic Resist(@MinUnits@) AND @Mountain_AS*100@% Attack Speed(@MinUnits@) AND @Mountain_DR*100@% Durability(@MinUnits@) AND increase all other bonuses by @Mountain_StatIncrease*100@%More hexes reveal at each player level

TFT17_SummonTrait.name: Shepherd
TFT17_SummonTrait.desc: Shepherds summon the Bond of the Stars to aid them in battle.(@MinUnits@) Summon Bia(@MinUnits@) Summon Bayin(@MinUnits@) Bia and Bayin's bond grows deeperBia and Bayin's power are increased by the total star level of all Shepherds.

TFT17_RhaastUniqueTrait.name: Redeemer
TFT17_RhaastUniqueTrait.desc: (@MinUnits@) For each non-unique trait you have active, your team gains @BonusOffensiveStat1*100@%/@BonusOffensiveStat2*100@%/@BonusOffensiveStat3*100@% Attack Speed, and @BonusDefensiveStat1@/@BonusDefensiveStat2@/@BonusDefensiveStat3@ Armor and Magic Resist.Teamwide Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_RhaastUnique_OffensiveStatToGain@% %i:scaleAS%Teamwide Resists: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_RhaastUnique_DefensiveStatToGain@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%

TFT17_HPTank.name: Brawler
TFT17_HPTank.desc: Your team gains @TeamwideBonus*100@% Health. Brawlers gain more.(@MinUnits@) +@HealthBonus*100@% maximum Health

TFT17_ResistTank.name: Bastion
TFT17_ResistTank.desc: Your team gains @TeamwideResists@ Armor and Magic Resist.Bastions gain more, and the value doubles in the first @Duration@ seconds of combat.(@MinUnits@) @BonusArmor@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%(@MinUnits@) @BonusArmor@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%(@MinUnits@) @BonusArmor@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%; Non-Bastions gain an additional @EnhancedTeamwideArmor@ %i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%.

TFT17_Astronaut.name: Meeple
TFT17_Astronaut.desc: Meeple attract Meeps that empower Meeple abilities in meepy ways. They also gain bonus Health.(@MinUnits@) @Meeps@ %i:set14AmpIcon%, @BonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%(@MinUnits@) @Meeps@ %i:set14AmpIcon%, @BonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%(@MinUnits@) @Meeps@ %i:set14AmpIcon%, @BonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%. Create a Cloning Slot on your bench. Gain gold and a 1-star copy of the champion placed there when cloning completes.(@MinUnits@) @Meeps@ %i:set14AmpIcon%, @BonusHealth@ %i:scaleHealth%. SUMMON THE FOUR MEEPLORDS!Cloning time = Champion cost

TFT17_ManaTrait.name: Conduit
TFT17_ManaTrait.desc: Innate: Conduits gain @InnateManaGain*100@% additional Mana from all sources.Your team gains Mana Regen, increased for Conduits.(@MinUnits@) @TeamManaRegen@ %i:TFTManaRegen% | @ChannelerManaRegen@ %i:TFTManaRegen%

TFT17_Mecha.name: Mecha
TFT17_Mecha.desc: Innate: Mecha units can transform into their Ultimate form, upgrading their ability and gaining @TransformedPercentHealth*100@% Health. Transformed Mechas take up two team slots and count twice for the Mecha trait.(@MinUnits@) Energy Cells: Mechas gain @AP@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%.(@MinUnits@) Overclocked Cells: Increased to @AP@% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%.(@MinUnits@) Precision Engineering: +@TeamSize@ max team sizeUse the Mecha-Former item to toggle the forms of your Mecha units

TFT17_GravesTrait.name: Factory New
TFT17_GravesTrait.desc: After participating in combat, open an armory to purchase a permanent upgrade for your strongest Graves.Every @NumberOfUpgradesBeforeRoundCostIncrease@ upgrades, future upgrades will take an additional round.Next Upgrade: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_GravesTrait_RoundsUntilUpgrade@ Rounds.

TFT17_Stargazer.name: Stargazer
TFT17_Stargazer.desc: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game.Stargazers in empowered hexes gain various bonuses, starting at (@MinUnits@) units.More hexes reveal at each player level.

TFT17_FlexTrait.name: Voyager
TFT17_FlexTrait.desc: Combat Start: Your Tanks gain a Shield for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. Your other allies gain Damage Amp. Voyagers gain double.(@MinUnits@) @ShieldHP@ Shield; @BonusDA*100@% %i:scaleDA%

TFT17_BlitzcrankUniqueTrait.name: Party Animal
TFT17_BlitzcrankUniqueTrait.desc: Once per combat, after falling below @HealthThreshold*100@% percent Health, become untargetable and repair @PercentHealthHeal*100@% max Health per second. Upon reaching full Health, or when no other allies remain, return to combat. If fully healed, for the rest of combat Blitzcrank is in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} and Party Crasher's passive fires bolts four times as fast.

TFT17_DRX.name: N.O.V.A.
TFT17_DRX.desc: (@MinUnits@) @TeamAttackDelay@ seconds into combat, N.O.V.A. grant a power surge to allies based on champions.(@MinUnits@) Gain a Striker selector. The chosen N.O.V.A. activates their Strike during the power surge.Aatrox: Ally Damage @ShredAndSunder*100@% Shred and Sunders enemiesAatrox: Shred and Sunder enemiesCaitlyn: Grant allies @AS*100@% Attack SpeedCaitlyn: Grant Attack SpeedAkali: Allies gain PrecisionAkali: Allies gain PrecisionMaokai: Allies heal @Heal*100@% max HealthMaokai: Heal alliesKindred: Shield the strongest Tank for @ShieldValue@Kindred: Shield an allyEmblem: Allies deal @BonusTrueDamage*100@% stacking bonus true damageEmblem: Deal bonus true damage

TFT17_TahmKenchUniqueTrait.name: Oracle
TFT17_TahmKenchUniqueTrait.desc: Every @Rounds@ rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!Rounds Remaining: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_TahmKench_RoundsRemaining@Last Reward: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT17_TahmKench_LastReward@

TFT17_RangedTrait.name: Sniper
TFT17_RangedTrait.desc: Snipers gain Damage Amp, increased against targets farther away.(@MinUnits@) @PercentDamageIncrease@% %i:scaleDA%; +@PerHexIncrease@% %i:scaleDA% per hex(@MinUnits@) @PercentDamageIncrease@% %i:scaleDA%; +@PerHexIncrease@% %i:scaleDA% per hex(@MinUnits@) @PercentDamageIncrease@% %i:scaleDA%; +@PerHexIncrease@% %i:scaleDA% per hex

TFT17_FioraUniqueTrait.name: Divine Duelist
TFT17_FioraUniqueTrait.desc: Your Tactician heals for @PlayerOmnivamp*100@% of player damage dealt from winning.Fiora always wins a one on one duel.

TFT17_MorganaUniqueTrait.name: Dark Lady
TFT17_MorganaUniqueTrait.desc: Your team gains @Durability*100@% Durability, increased to @TransformedDurability*100@% when Morgana is in her Dark Form.
